title: Technical Project Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Technical Project Coordinator to join our growing team.

Responsibilities include:

• Assisting with the coordination of custom software, CRM, automation, and website projects.
• Maintaining project plans, priorities, timelines, and next steps across multiple active client projects.
• Tracking project progress and following up with tea ---------- mbers regarding open items, blockers, and deadlines.
• Preparing project status updates and summaries for management.
• Identifying projects that are falling behind schedule or require management attention.
• Attending internal and client meetings and documenting requirements, decisions, action items, assumptions, open questions, and next steps.
• Assisting with the preparation of project briefs, specifications, and Jira tasks based on client meetings, emails, and discussions.
• Converting meeting notes, emails, and client requests into organized project documentation, requirements summaries, and Jira tasks.
• Identifying missing requirements, open questions, and potential project risks.
• Assisting with light review of completed work against documented requirements when needed.
• Helping maintain project documentation, specifications, and implementation plans.
• Supporting communication and coordination between Operations, Engineering, and client-facing staff.
• Helping ensure that no client project falls through the cracks as the company continues to grow.

The ideal candidate will be highly organized, proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing many moving pieces simultaneously. Strong written and spoken English communication skills are required. Experience working with software development, website projects, CRM systems, Jira, project management tools, or technical teams is preferred but not required.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys creating structure, keeping projects organized, tracking follow-up items, documenting requirements, and helping teams stay aligned and on schedule.

This is a full-time position. Because this role works closely with tea ---------- mbers and clients in the United States, candidates must be willing and able to work primarily during United States Eastern Time business hours.

Immediately upon hiring, we honor most Filipino holidays except for All Saints and All Souls Day. After your 6-month probationary period, you will also qualify for vacation leaves, sick leaves, and 13th month.

Founded in 2006, Organize My People is a technology implementation and consulting firm focused on helping organizations utilize CRM systems, automation tools, custom software, and websites to improve their operations. Our clients include nonprofit organizations, educational institutions, event organizations, faith-based institutions, and other businesses throughout the United States, Canada, and Australia.

title: PHP / Laravel Software Developer with API Experience
description:
We are seeking a talented and experienced individual to join our growing team as a PHP / Laravel Software Developer with strong API integration experience. Responsibilities include:

• Building PHP-based web platforms for our clients which interface with either MySQL or Microsoft SQL databases.
• Updating existing PHP-based web platforms for our clients with new functionality, including platforms developed in native PHP, Laravel and Nuxt.js.
• Connecting PHP-based platforms with third party tools via their APIs.
• Building and maintaining scheduled data sync tools, webhook listeners, API polling jobs and integration scripts.
• Working with REST APIs, JSON, OAuth, API keys, pagination, rate limits, error handling and logging.
• Technical support for bugs/errors identified in existing client PHP-based web platforms and API integrations.

The ideal candidate will have experience with PHP development, Laravel, third-party API integrations, and either MySQL or Microsoft SQL databases. The ideal candidate will also have an attention to detail, the ability to complete tasks on time, a stable internet connection, and strong written English communication skills.

Full time, part time or contract based will all be considered based on your preferences.  Immediately upon hiring, we honor most Filipino holidays except for All Saints and All Souls Day. After your 6-month probationary period, you will also qualify for vacation leaves, sick leaves, and 13th month.

Founded in 2006, Organize My People is a strategy consulting, technology implementation and software development firm focused on helping organizations utilize technology to drive their missions. Clients include nonprofit organizations, event production companies, law firms, faith-based institutions, property management companies, healthcare offices, scientific research organizations, personal blogs and real estate investment companies. Based in South Florida, Organize My People serves clients throughout the United States including in Chicago, Los Angeles, San Francisco, New York, Atlanta, Pennsylvania, Maryland, Indiana and Hawaii as well as clients in Canada and Australia.

title: Wix Studio Designer with Light Coding + AI Automation Skills
description:

title: Experienced Virtual Assistants for Digital Growth & Marketing Projects (Content/SEO & Funnel Specialists)

title: Founding Systems Integrator — GoHighLevel, AI Automation & No-Code/Low-Code Systems
description:
# PAY

Starting monthly compensation in PHP, based on experience, proof of work, expected weekly hours, and fit.

We are cost-conscious because we are still early-stage, but we will pay fairly for someone who can actually solve the right problems.

This may start part-time or ramp up over time depending on workload, performance, and mutual fit.


# ROLE TYPE

Remote contractor role. Long-term opportunity for the right person.


# COMPANY

Atlas Cybertech

---

# ABOUT THE COMPANY

Atlas Cybertech is a Canadian AI automation and systems company building internal platforms, CRM infrastructure, automation workflows, and operational systems.

We are early-stage and moving quickly toward revenue. That means we need to get our baseline systems live fast, without creating a fragile mess that breaks later.

Good-enough, working systems are better than perfect systems that never launch. But “good enough” still needs to be clear, testable, and maintainable.

We are not looking for AI hype, random tool-stacking, or “automate everything” thinking.

We are looking for someone who can help us build practical MVP systems quickly, especially around GoHighLevel, AI-assisted workflows, no-code/low-code tools, automations, integrations, and internal operations.

---

# ROLE SUMMARY

This is a *GoHighLevel-heavy role.*

GoHighLevel is one of the most important platforms in our business, so you must have real hands-on GHL experience.

This role is not GHL-only, but strong GHL ability is central.

You will help build and improve Atlas Cybertech’s internal systems across:

- GoHighLevel
- CRM workflows
- No-code/low-code tools
- Automations
- Forms and intake flows
- System of Record structures
- Internal portals or dashboards
- AI-assisted documentation and SOPs
- Light AI-assisted workflows
- API/webhook-based integrations where needed

We are especially interested in someone who is personally excited about AI and actively experiments with AI tools, AI coding assistants, agentic workflows, automation tools, and new ways to use AI to build faster and work smarter.

You do not need to be a full-stack software developer or AI engineer.

You do need to be technically sharp, AI-curious, systems-minded, and capable of figuring things out.

---

# JOB MISSION

Your mission is to help get Atlas Cybertech’s internal operating stack online quickly, then improve it over time.

The first priority is helping us get our core MVP systems configured, connected, tested, documented, and usable.

The goal is to create systems that:

- Reduce manual work
- Help us move toward revenue faster
- Keep data reasonably clean
- Avoid silent failures
- Make workflows easier to understand
- Make automations easier to troubleshoot
- Support future client delivery
- Can be documented, maintained, and handed off later


This role is ideal for someone who naturally asks:

- How do we get this live quickly without making a mess?
- Where is the bottleneck?
- What data should live where?
- What happens if this automation fails?
- What is the simplest working version?
- How can AI help us build, document, or troubleshoot faster?
- How can another person maintain this later?

---

# WHAT YOU'LL WORK ON

You may help with:

- Building and improving GoHighLevel workflows, pipelines, tags, custom fields, calendars, forms, automations, snapshots, triggers, and integrations.

- Setting up and troubleshooting GHL sub-accounts, workflow logic, CRM stages, and client-style account structures.

- Helping structure data in systems like SmartSuite, Airtable, or similar tools.

- Connecting forms, CRM, automations, dashboards, portals, and documentation workflows.

- Building no-code/low-code automations using tools like Make, Zapier, n8n, or similar platforms.

- Troubleshooting broken workflows, triggers, integrations, data-sync issues, and automation failures.

- Creating AI-assisted SOPs, workflow maps, field maps, process notes, Loom walkthroughs, and system documentation.

- Helping build internal systems for hiring, onboarding, lead handling, client intake, follow-up, and operations.

- Supporting AI-assisted workflows where AI helps the process but does not become the source of truth.

- Using AI-assisted light coding where appropriate for small scripts, API calls, webhook troubleshooting, data transformations, or internal workflow helpers.

- Improving system reliability, error visibility, speed of execution, and handoff readiness.

You do not need to be a professional writer, but you do need to care about leaving clear notes and using AI tools to make documentation faster and easier.

---

# IMPORTANT ARCHITECTURE PRINCIPLE

We separate tools by role.

- The System of Record is the main source of truth for important business data.
- GoHighLevel is the CRM and workflow layer.
- Forms are for intake.
- Portals and dashboards are for viewing or interacting with data.
- Automation tools move data and trigger workflows.
- AI tools can assist, but they do not own the process.

GoHighLevel is very important, but it is not automatically the System of Record for everything.

If this distinction makes sense to you, this role may be a strong fit.

---

# REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

You should have real experience with:

- GoHighLevel workflows, pipelines, tags, custom fields, triggers, calendars, forms, and automations.

- GHL troubleshooting and workflow behavior.

- CRM setup, pipeline logic, and automation logic.

- No-code/low-code automation tools such as Make, Zapier, n8n, or similar.

- Basic API/webhook concepts.

- Data fields, records, statuses, permissions, and workflow stages.

- Troubleshooting broken automations or integrations.

- Clear documentation, SOPs, workflow maps, or process notes.

- Explaining technical decisions in plain English.

- Using AI tools to improve speed, research, documentation, troubleshooting, or technical implementation.


You should also have strong personal interest in AI.

Ideally, you already spend some of your own time testing, researching, or experimenting with tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Codex-style tools, AI coding assistants, AI agents, automation agents, or other AI tools.

You do not need to be a full-stack software developer or AI engineer.

You do need to be technically sharp enough to understand workflows, data movement, integration logic, AI-assisted workflows, prompting, failure points, and system handoff.

---

# HIGH-PRIORITY EXPERIENCE

These are especially valuable:

- GoHighLevel snapshots
- GHL SaaS mode
- GHL agency/sub-account setup
- GHL AI features or AI Employee-style workflows
- Client account cloning or snapshot deployment
- Twilio or SMS/calling workflows
- A2P / SMS approval workflows
- AI appointment-setting bots
- AI voice/SMS/chat workflows
- Advanced AI tools, AI coding tools, agentic tools, or automation agents

The more experience you have with GHL and AI-assisted systems, the better.

---

# STRONG BONUS EXPERIENCE

These are not all required, but they are useful:

- SmartSuite
- Airtable
- Fillout
- Softr
- Noloco
- Bubble / Glide / Loveable
- Google Workspace / Google Drive
- Microsoft 365
- Meta / Facebook Ads lead flow
- Lead forms, UTM tracking, pipeline attribution, or conversion tracking
- KPI dashboards or funnel reporting
- Lightweight JavaScript, Python, JSON, or API troubleshooting
- Experience supporting agencies, consultants, founder-led companies, or service businesses

You do not need to be a media buyer, but paid ads platform literacy is a plus because many systems will connect to lead generation workflows.

---

# THIS ROLE IS *NOT* FOR YOU IF

Please do not apply if:

- You are mainly a VA with light tool experience.
- You only know basic GHL admin tasks.
- You only build funnels and landing pages.
- You only know simple Zapier automations.
- You describe yourself mainly as a prompt engineer.
- You want a CTO, executive, or management title.
- You prefer custom code before checking simpler options.
- You add new tools before understanding the current system.
- You automate unstable workflows without mapping them first.
- You do not like documenting your work.
- You give vague answers like “I can automate everything.”
- You rely on AI-generated answers without real examples.
- You are not personally interested in learning and testing new AI tools.

This role is not for beginners.

---

# WORKING STYLE

This role is a good fit if you are:

- Strong with GoHighLevel.
- Highly interested in AI tools and automation.
- Practical and MVP-minded.
- Systems-minded.
- Strong at troubleshooting.
- Fast, but not reckless.
- Comfortable figuring things out independently.
- Clear in written and spoken English.
- Comfortable working directly with a founder.
- Willing to use AI to speed up documentation and technical work.
- Able to explain tradeoffs clearly.
- Willing to challenge weak ideas respectfully.
- Focused on building systems that other people can maintain later.

We want speed, but not reckless speed.

Good-enough, working systems are better than perfect systems that never launch. But “good enough” still needs to be clear, testable, and maintainable.

---

# AUTHORITY BOUNDARIES

You will be expected to recommend, build, test, troubleshoot, and document systems.

However:

- You do not choose new core platforms without approval.
- You do not turn GHL into the System of Record by default.
- You do not add tools without a clear reason.
- You do not build custom-code dependencies unless clearly justified and approved.
- You do not redesign the core architecture without discussion.

The founder makes final architecture and platform decisions.

Your role is to recommend, execute, document, and improve.

---

# HIRING PROCESS

The hiring process is designed to avoid long live interviews.

Shortlisted applicants may complete:

- A short recorded screening
- A more detailed scenario-based assessment
- One paid practical task if selected as a finalist
- A short 10-15 minute founder call as the final step

The paid practical task is only for finalists. We do not ask many candidates to do unpaid project work.

---

# HOW TO APPLY

At the top of your application, write this exact phrase:
*Atlas Systems*
Then answer the questions below.

Please answer all screening questions directly in your application. Applications that do not answer the questions will not be considered.

Generic AI-written answers will be rejected. Use specific examples from systems you have personally built, fixed, documented, improved, or tested.

---

# APPLICATION QUESTIONS

1. Evidence of Ability

In 3-5 bullet points, describe the strongest evidence of your ability for this role.

Focus on difficult systems, GoHighLevel builds, automations, workflow problems, AI-assisted builds, or technical issues you personally solved.


2. Proof of Work

Share any relevant proof of work.

Examples:

- Loom videos
- Screenshots
- Diagrams
- SOPs
- Documentation
- Portfolio links
- Workflow maps
- Case studies

Do not share confidential client data.


3. Tool and Skill Experience

List the main tools or tool categories you have real experience with.

For each category, mention the specific tools, what you personally used them for, and your approximate skill level from 1-10.

Categories:

- GoHighLevel / CRM systems: 
Workflows, pipelines, snapshots, SaaS mode, sub-accounts, automations, troubleshooting

- Automation tools: 
Make, Zapier, n8n, Pabbly, Relay, or similar

- No-code/low-code tools: 
Airtable, SmartSuite, Fillout, Softr, Noloco, Bubble, Glide, or similar

- AI tools / AI coding / agentic tools: 
ChatGPT, Claude, Codex-style tools, Gemini, DeepSeek, AI agents, AI coding tools, automation agents, or similar

- API / webhook / data integration work: 
Webhooks, JSON, API calls, data transformations, scripts

- Paid ads / lead-flow systems: 
Meta Ads, lead forms, tracking, attribution, conversion events, UTM/source tracking

- SMS/calling systems: 
Twilio, A2P, calling/SMS workflows, notification systems

- Business ops tools: 
Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, ClickUp, Notion, Slack, Google Sheets


You are not expected to know every tool listed above. 

These are examples to help you explain your experience clearly. 
GoHighLevel experience is the most important. 

Strong AI interest and automation ability are also very important. 
The more relevant tools and systems you know, the better.


4. Availability and Starting Compensation 

Please provide the following:

- Desired starting monthly compensation in PHP for the first 1-3 months while onboarding, learning our systems, and ramping up. 

- Number of hours per week this monthly amount assumes. 

- Maximum hours per week you are available to work consistently. 

- Target long-term monthly compensation in PHP after the first 1-3 months, assuming strong performance and good fit. 

- Usual work window in Philippine time, such as morning, afternoon, evening, late night, overnight, or flexible.

- Earliest available start date. 

---

# FINAL NOTE

We are cost-conscious because we are still early-stage, but we will pay fairly for someone who can actually solve the right problems.

We are looking for the best mix of capability, reliability, speed, judgment, AI interest, GHL ability, and reasonable cost.

If you enjoy building systems, solving technical puzzles, experimenting with AI tools, improving workflows, and making operations run better, this role may be a strong fit.

title: Email Marketing Specialist — Klaviyo / Fashion E-Commerce
description:

Hours: Full-Time or Part-Time (flexible, Monday–Friday)

Job Description:

We run multiple women's fashion e-commerce brands doing $100K+/month in revenue. We need an email marketing specialist to take FULL ownership of our email channel — strategy, flows, campaigns, design, copywriting, segmentation, testing, and reporting.
You will be the email person. Everything email-related is yours. If it involves sending an email to a customer, it's your responsibility.

Build and manage all automated flows in Klaviyo from scratch
Abandoned checkout recovery (this alone should recover $10-15K/month)

Welcome series for new subscribers
Browse abandonment flows
Win-back campaigns for inactive customers

Write email copy that sounds human and drives clicks (not generic AI slop)

A/B test subject lines, send times, content, and offers
Monitor deliverability (open rates, click rates, spam rates, unsubscribes)
Report weekly on email revenue, flow performance, and list growth

Must-Have:

Proven experience with Klaviyo (not just Mailchimp — we use Klaviyo specifically)
Portfolio showing email flows you've built that generated real revenue
Experience with fashion or e-commerce email marketing
Strong copywriting skills — you write emails people actually want to read
Eye for design — clean, branded, mobile-friendly email templates
Understanding of email deliverability, list hygiene, and spam avoidance
Data-driven mindset — you test, measure, and optimize based on numbers
Can work independently with minimal supervision

Nice to Have:

Experience with Shopify-based stores
Understanding of SMS marketing (Klaviyo SMS)
Experience with pop-up forms and list building strategies
Knowledge of email compliance (CAN-SPAM, GDPR basics)
Experience segmenting by purchase behavior, browsing behavior, and engagement

What We Provide:

Full Klaviyo account access
Shopify store access
Brand guidelines and product imagery
Performance data and ad spend context
Creative freedom to build and test

title: Mobile Gaming / App Studio - Product Manager
description:
About the Role
We are seeking a data-driven Product Manager to lead the development and optimization of our mobile app portfolio. You will own the product strategy, roadmap, and execution to drive user engagement and revenue growth. You will bridge the gap between creative vision and business performance.

Key Responsibilities
* Roadmap Management: Define and execute the product roadmap for live titles and new prototypes.

* LiveOps Strategy: Design and manage in-app events, offers, and content updates to maximize retention and monetization.

* Data Analysis: Monitor key performance indicators (DAU, ARPU, LTV) to identify opportunities for improvement.

* A/B Testing: Formulate hypotheses and run experiments to validate new features and UI/UX changes.

* Collaboration: Work closely with engineering, art, and design teams to deliver high-quality features on schedule.

* Economy Design: Balance and optimize game economies to ensure a healthy free-to-play ecosystem.

Qualifications
* Product management experience in the mobile gaming industry.
* Deep understanding of free-to-play (F2P) mechanics and monetization strategies.
* Strong analytical skills with proficiency in Google Sheets/Excel and SQL.
* Experience with data visualization tools.
* Ability to communicate complex data insights.
* Passion for gaming and a strong intuition for what makes apps fun.

title: Virtual Assistant - Sales Support & Data Entry
description:
JOB OVERVIEW
About GraphicLab
GraphicLab is a fast-paced promotional products company based in California. We handle big clients, big projects, and in-house screen printing and embroidery. You will act as the direct support line for our Sales Team, ensuring that our internal systems run flawlessly so our sales team can focus on client relationships.

The Role
We are seeking a highly reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage the critical backend data of our sales process, working directly with a senior sales supervisor. You will be responsible for taking quotes and emailed instructions from our California team and ensuring it is accurately entered into our CRM. You will be explicitly trained on our standards and procedures ("the GraphicLab way") by our lead VA.

In addition, during slower periods you will support light marketing execution, creating email and social media outreach campaigns using CRM/customer data to help us re-engage past customers and generate new leads.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Data Entry & CRM Management: Accurately enter new jobs and orders into our CRM system (CommonSKU). 

Daily Follow-Up & Calendar Management: Proactively stay on top of calendar, daily communications, and follow-ups.

Quoting Support: Assist in building and organizing quotes for new jobs based on provided pricing parameters.

Order Tracking: Monitor the status of jobs by checking in with production schedules and external vendors.

Logistics: Compile and organize shipping/tracking information to be sent to clients.

Communication: Maintain clear, daily communication with the California-based Sales Team to provide end-of-shift progress reports.


Email + Social Campaign Support (Slow-Season Outreach):

Use CRM data to pull lists/segments (past customers, warm leads, target industries) for outreach.

Build and send email campaigns (subject lines, copy, basic layout) to re-engage customers and drive quote requests.

Create simple social media content (IG + LinkedIn) using provided brand direction: captions + basic graphics (Canva-style).

Schedule posts and coordinate a simple content calendar.

Track and report results (what was sent/posted, opens/clicks/replies, what to improve next round).

REQUIREMENTS
Industry Experience: Knowledge of the Beverage Industry is highly important. Experience in the Promotional Products / Apparel industry is ideal. Having experience in both is considered a massive plus.

Communication Style (Crucial): You must be a loud, clear, and confident communicator; therefore, candidates who are soft-spoken or meek will not be a good fit.

Shift Requirement: You must be available to work a strict 40-hour week on the US Pacific Standard Time (PST) schedule to entirely overlap with our California office. Note: Hours are strictly capped at 40 per week and cannot be exceeded unless requested in writing.

lawless English (Written and Spoken): You must be able to write clear, professional emails and CRM communications. You will attend virtual meetings with our internal team and occasionally with our customers.

Attention to Detail: You must be highly diligent; a single typo in a SKU number or choosing the wrong color can cost the company money. Accuracy is paramount.

Tech-Savvy: Familiarity with CRM systems is a plus, but a strong general ability to learn new software quickly is required (MS Office, Google Workspace, Adobe, etc.).

Marketing Execution Skills: You must be comfortable using CRM data to support outbound email + social campaigns, writing clear outreach copy, and creating simple on-brand visuals (Canva or similar).

HOW TO APPLY
Submit your resume.

Include a brief cover letter highlighting your experience in the Beverage and/or Promotional Products industries, your experience with data entry/CRM management, and any marketing support background.

A 1 to 2-Minute Camera Loom Video: Please ensure your speaking voice is projected loudly and clearly in this video. Introduce yourself, briefly mention your CRM experience, your background working as a VA on the night shift (PST), and answer these scenarios:

If a vendor emails you to say a shipment of 500 shirts is delayed by 3 days, what are the exact steps you take to update our system and notify our California sales team?

During a slow week, you’re asked to re-engage past customers. What CRM info would you pull, and what would your first email campaign look like (who it targets + subject line + goal)?

title: FUNNEL BUILDER / GOHIGHLEVEL / SHOPIFY DEVELOPER JOB POSTING
description:
Funnel Builder & Shopify Developer (GoHighLevel / Shopify / Landing Pages)

Most dev and design roles are slow. You wait for approvals. You build things that never launch. You do great work and nobody notices.

This is not that.

We are a fast moving digital brand studio building funnels, Shopify stores, and automated marketing systems for health, wellness, and financial brands that are scaling right now. When you build something here it goes live. When it converts we know it was you. When it performs we give you more.

We are looking for one sharp builder who knows GoHighLevel, Shopify, and funnel design — and who uses AI tools to work faster than everyone else.

What your days look like
You get a brief. You build it. It launches. You see the data. You make the next one better.
No six month timelines. No bloated tea ---------- etings. No chasing down feedback for weeks. Just clean fast work on projects that are actually live in the market doing real things.

Some weeks you are building a full Shopify store from scratch. Some weeks you are wiring up a GoHighLevel funnel with email automations, pixels, and upsell flows. Some weeks you are optimizing pages that are already live to squeeze more conversions out of existing traffic. Every week you are doing work that matters and getting better at your craft.
What you will build

High converting funnels and landing pages in GoHighLevel, Shopify, and Webflow
Opt-in pages, sales pages, thank you pages, upsell and downsell flows
Checkout pages and product pages built to convert not just look good

Email and SMS automations connected to real campaigns
Domain connections, pixel integrations, form setups, and tracking
Clean modern designs that load fast and work perfectly on mobile

Who this is for
You have built funnels before and you know what a good one looks like. You understand conversion optimization — not just how to make pages but how to make them perform. You are comfortable with Stripe, Zapier, Facebook Pixel, and Google Analytics. You move fast, communicate clearly, and do not need your hand held.
Most importantly — you use AI. Not occasionally. Daily. You use it to write faster, build faster, and solve problems faster. If you are still doing everything manually while everyone else is using AI to do it in half the time, this is not the right fit.

You are exactly who we need if:

You have real hands-on experience with GoHighLevel and Shopify
You have built funnels that actually converted — not just looked good in screenshots
You use AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT, Make, or Zapier AI to move faster
You understand direct response marketing — you know why a page converts or does not
You communicate clearly and hit deadlines without being chased
You want consistent ongoing work with a team that actually appreciates good builders

What you get

Competitive pay based on your experience — we pay well for people who deliver
Consistent ongoing projects — this is not a one-off gig, we have a full pipeline
Real path to a long term position — if you are great we want you around for everything we build
Fully remote and flexible — work on your schedule from wherever you are
A small fast team that respects your craft — no ego, no politics, just people who are good at what they do and enjoy working together
You will see your work launch and perform — no building things that disappear into a drawer

Huge bonus if you have:

Direct response marketing experience
Copywriting understanding — you know why words on a page make people buy
Shopify CRO experience
Experience building webinar funnels
Experience scaling brands or lead gen funnels

To apply:
Fill out our quick application here — it takes 3 minutes and tells us everything we need to know:

Apply here:  ---------- 

Qualified applicants hear back within 24 hours. The best candidates get a paid test project that lets you show us what you can actually do — and lets you see exactly what working with us looks like before committing to anything.

title: Merchant Support Specialist
description:
We’re Hiring: Merchant Support Specialist (VA)
 REMOTE | $6-$7 per hr

At Coastal Pay, we’re looking for a highly organized and resourceful Merchant Support Specialist to support our merchants and agents. This role is ideal for someone who takes ownership of customer issues, enjoys solving problems, and can confidently guide agents through questions related to payment processing, transactions, onboarding, and account support.
You’ll play an important role in ensuring our merchants receive responsive, knowledgeable service while helping our internal teams operate smoothly. The ideal candidate is naturally curious, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-moving fintech environment where no two days look the same.
If you take pride in delivering exceptional customer experiences, thinking critically to resolve issues, and being the person customers trust to get things done, this could be a great fit.
Schedule
REMOTE
8 - 5pm PST (REQUIRED)
Best suited for someone who is self-directed and comfortable working independently
What You’ll Do
The Merchant Support Specialist is responsible for providing exceptional customer support to merchants while ensuring efficient communication between internal teams and external vendors.


Monitor support ticket queues and escalate issues to the appropriate teams as needed.

Maintain accurate and thorough documentation of all customer interactions, issues reported, and resolutions provided.

Adhere to company customer service policies, procedures, and knowledge standards.

Serve as a liaison between merchants and internal departments to ensure timely resolution of inquiries.

Handle complex client escalations through multiple communication channels including phone, email, ticketing systems, chat, and other support platforms used by Coastal Pay.

Assist merchants with basic account support requests such as account updates, password resets, CRM navigation, and gateway assistance.

Follow up with merchants who have left voicemails or support requests, including messages received during weekends or outside business hours.

Respond to customer support emails in a professional and timely manner.

Coordinate with vendors to process account updates and changes when required.

Utilize and maintain proficiency in company tools and platforms including CRM systems and vendor portals (e.g., Asana, Slack, Zendesk) to deliver efficient support.

Apply strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills to resolve complex situations and provide effective solutions.

Communicate and escalate significant issues to leadership to ensure prompt resolution and continued client success.
What We’re Looking For
Highly organized with strong attention to detail when managing customer requests and account information


Clear, professional communicator who can confidently assist merchants and explain payment-related issues


Resourceful problem-solver who takes ownership of customer questions and follows issues through to resolution


Tech-savvy and comfortable learning new systems, platforms, and support tools


Able to manage multiple customer inquiries while maintaining a high level of responsiveness and accuracy


Trustworthy and discreet when handling sensitive merchant and transaction information


Prior experience in customer support within payment processing, fintech, SaaS, or merchant service environments preferred

Who You Are
You stay organized and structured while adapting easily when priorities shift


You take ownership of customer issues and follow through until they are fully resolved


You communicate with clarity, empathy, and professionalism when assisting merchants


You remain calm and solution-focused when navigating complex questions or changing demands


You are responsive, reliable, and take pride in delivering a high level of customer service


You notice details others might miss and proactively step in to prevent problems before they escalate


You enjoy improving processes and helping teams build more efficient support workflows


Nice to Have
Familiarity with CRM platforms such as IRIS, Salesforce, or HubSpot
What we Offer
Remote-first environment
A welcoming, supportive, and collaborative work place
A commitment to individualized coaching and professional development
Location
100% REMOTE (Must work 8-5 PST)

title: Junior Bookkeeper – Ironbooks
description:
**Location:** Philippines | **Type:** Full-time Remote

---

## The Vision

We're building the AI-powered bookkeeping service for trades contractors. And we're doing it differently.

Most bookkeeping firms are dinosaurs—slow, expensive, offshore labor treated as a cost center. We're proving the opposite: that the best bookkeepers aren't in expensive US metros. They're smart, hungry, high-D/high-C operators who want to build something real.

**You're not joining a bookkeeping team. You're joining the proof of concept that AI + offshore talent + ruthless execution = the future of accounting operations.**

Every client we onboard. Every book you clean up. Every report you own. That's market validation that traditional accounting firms are about to get disrupted.

---

## What You're Actually Building

This role is ground zero for something bigger:

- **You're the backbone of Ironbooks' operations.** Every client win flows through the work you do. You're not hidden in the back office—your work directly drives revenue, client retention, and company reputation.

- **You're proving a thesis.** We're showing that a Filipino bookkeeper + Claude AI + clear processes = better, faster, cheaper than traditional US-based accounting. That's not a side hustle. That's category-defining.

- **You're scaling a system, not just doing work.** Right now, you're learning. In 6 months, you're training others. In 12 months, you're leading a team and working with our CEO on process improvement. This grows with you.

- **You're part of the Painter Growth ecosystem.** Ironbooks isn't standalone—it's the operational proof point for Painter Growth's AI positioning across the trades. Your work is literally the case study we use to sell coaching and other services. High visibility. Real leverage.

---

## Why This Matters (For You)

**If you're the type who wants more than a job:**

- You'll see direct ROI on your effort. Ship a clean book ? client signs for annual contract ? you see the impact immediately.
- You're not a cost center. You're a revenue driver. That matters differently when you know it.
- You're learning a category-defining skill set: bookkeeping + AI automation + operational systems. That's not replaceable. That's your edge.
- There's a real path here. We're scaling. The people who prove themselves in the first 6 months aren't stuck in junior roles—they move into leadership, specialist tracks, or new ventures as we expand.
- You're working with founders who care about outcomes and speed, not politics. That changes everything about how work feels.

---

## The Reality

We're lean. We move fast. We don't tolerate slow thinking or excuses. But we also:

- Celebrate wins loudly (and mean it)
- Pay attention to people who deliver
- Build in public (you'll see how your work impacts the market)
- Give autonomy to people who earn it
- Actually promote from within

---

## What We Need

**Must-haves:**
- 2+ years of bookkeeping or accounting experience
- Fluent English (writing and speaking)
- Comfortable with QuickBooks Online
- High D energy: you want to win, you move fast, you own your output
- High C discipline: you catch errors, you care about quality, you want to build systems that work
- Openness to AI tools—this is non-negotiable. You'll use Claude, ChatGPT, and automation to multiply your productivity
- Reliable internet and a workspace where you can focus

**Nice-to-haves:**
- Experience with AI tools (you already know how to use them)
- Previous remote work or offshore experience
- Familiarity with Zapier or integration platforms
- Trades or contractor business background

---

## The First 90 Days

- **Month 1:** You're learning our systems, processes, and standards. You're doing deep work on client cleanups and learning to work alongside our AI tools.
- **Month 2:** You're owning client relationships independently. You're proofing your own work, shipping reports, and starting to see patterns in what works.
- **Month 3:** You're refining our processes. You're identifying bottlenecks. You're having ideas about how we do things better. We're listening.

By the end of 90 days, we know if you're the one who grows with us.

---

## Compensation & Benefits

- **Salary:** $7/hr with opportunities for bonuses and raises quickly if demonstrating high quality and great work ethic
- **Hours:** 8 hours/day, PST-aligned (flexible within reason)
- **Tools:** All software, licenses, and AI tools provided
- **Growth trajectory:** Clear progression to senior bookkeeper, operations specialist, or leadership roles
- **Equity conversation:** After 6 months of proving yourself, we talk about how you can own a piece of this upside

---

## Send Us

1. Your resume (focused on results and ROI, not just tasks)
2. 2–3 bookkeeping examples you're genuinely proud of
3. A short note: *Why this role? What does "building something" mean to you? Give us the real answer.*

---

**This isn't a generic bookkeeping job.** We're looking for someone who sees the bigger picture and wants to be part of proving that offshore + AI + execution = the future of accounting.

If that's you, let's talk.

title: Legal Administrative Virtual Assistant/Virtual Medical Records Coordinator
description:

title: Sales Closer - no cold calling
description:
We are looking for an experienced and motivated Sales Closer to join our growing team. We specialize in window cleaning, pressure washing, and gutter cleaning services, helping homeowners keep their properties looking their best.

If you have a proven track record of closing sales, building relationships, and following up with prospects to turn opportunities into customers, we'd love to hear from you.

Important Note

This is not a cold-calling position.

You will be working with homeowners who have already requested a quote, submitted an inquiry, or expressed interest in our services. Your primary role will be to follow up with these leads, answer their questions, build trust, and help them move forward with booking our services.

Key Responsibilities
Lead Follow-Up
Contact homeowners who have requested a quote or estimate.
Follow up with prospects through phone calls, text messages, and email.
Build rapport and understand the homeowner's needs.
Sales Closing
Present service recommendations and pricing in a professional and confident manner.
Address customer concerns and overcome objections.
Guide prospects through the decision-making process and close sales.
Consistently work toward achieving and exceeding sales goals.
Pipeline Management
Maintain regular follow-up with leads who have not yet made a decision.
Re-engage older leads and previous quote requests when appropriate.
Ensure no qualified lead falls through the cracks.
CRM Management
Accurately record customer interactions, notes, and sales outcomes.
Keep lead statuses updated within the CRM system.
Maintain organized and detailed records of all follow-up activities.
Performance Tracking
Meet or exceed monthly sales and conversion targets.
Monitor personal performance metrics and continuously improve results.
Provide feedback on common customer questions and objections.
To Show You've Read This

Include your favorite fruit in the subject line of your application.

Qualifications
Experience
Minimum of 3 years of sales closing experience.
Proven ability to close deals and consistently meet sales targets.
Experience in home services, construction, roofing, exterior cleaning, or other service-based industries is a plus.
Communication Skills
Excellent English speaking and listening skills.
Strong negotiation and objection-handling abilities.
Professional, friendly, and confident phone presence.
Results-Oriented
Driven by performance and motivated to earn commissions.
Comfortable working toward revenue and conversion goals.
Self-motivated with a strong work ethic.
Organization
Excellent follow-up and time management skills.
Ability to manage multiple opportunities simultaneously.
Detail-oriented and consistent with CRM updates.
Technology Skills
Experience using CRM systems.
Familiarity with Go High Level is preferred but not required.
Compensation
Starting pay: $3.00 per hour
Performance-based commission structure
Additional earning opportunities based on closed sales and revenue generated
What We Offer
Remote Work
Work from home
Flexible schedule options available
Growth Opportunity
Join a growing company with a strong reputation in the home service industry.
Opportunities for advancement as the company continues to expand.
How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume
A 60-second video introducing yourself and explaining why you're a great fit for this role
Details about your sales experience, including:
Industries you've worked in
Average monthly sales volume
Typical closing rate or sales performance metrics

We're looking for a confident sales professional who knows how to build trust, follow up consistently, and turn qualified leads into happy customers. If you're ready to grow with a company that values performance and results, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Product Sourcing Specialist VA, US Tactical Gear Brand, Alibaba and Helium 10 Required
description:

Cedar Mill Firearms Family is a US-based e-commerce brand selling firearm storage and EDC accessories on Amazon, BigCommerce, and Shopify. We sell trigger locks, gun socks, dehumidifiers, cleaning kits, range bags, safes. We do NOT source firearms, federal law prohibits Amazon firearm sales and we do not import them.


WHAT YOU WILL OWN

Build the FOB to landed-cost to retail-margin spreadsheet for every candidate. Negotiate MOQ, FOB pricing, and lead time with Alibaba Gold suppliers. PREFERRED, HTS codes for accessories, especially the 9304 range.
REQUIRED, sales velocity vs monthly revenue framing for inventory reordering.


KPI TARGETS

Landed COGS to retail margin greater than 55 percent.
First order MOQ less than or equal to 500 units.
Lead time less than or equal to 45 days.
Supplier replies within 48 business hours.


HIRING PROCESS, 4 STAGES

Stage 1, apply via our Google Form, 15 minutes.

Stage 3, 45 minute video interview via Google Meet.

We respond to every applicant within 5 business days regardless of outcome.


APPLY HERE

WE NEVER charges any fee to apply or to be considered. We NEVER ask for registration or training payments. Our ONLY application channel is the Google Form link above. Please do NOT message us on onlinejobs.ph chat.

title: Cloud Migration Engineer (GCP ? Azure)
description:
Company Overview
We are a digital health platform delivering AI-driven music therapy solutions to nursing home facilities across the United States. Their current infrastructure runs on Google Cloud Platform (GCP), utilizing NestJS/TypeScript microservices, Python FastAPI ML services, MySQL 8, Redis Cluster, Pub/Sub, Flutter mobile applications, and an Angular dashboard.

Role Overview
We are looking for a highly experienced Cloud Migration Engineer to lead and execute a full migration from GCP to Microsoft Azure. This is a hands-on technical role for someone with proven real-world production migration experience using both gcloud and az CLI environments. The selected candidate will work closely with the engineering team to architect, execute, and complete the migration while ensuring system stability, scalability, and minimal downtime.

Key Responsibilities
• Lead the end-to-end migration of Rubato’s infrastructure from GCP to Azure.
• Map existing GCP services to Azure equivalents and recommend the best architecture solutions.
• Execute phased migration plans with minimal or zero downtime.
• Handle cross-cloud migration of MySQL databases and Redis state management.
• Configure and manage Azure infrastructure components including networking, security, storage, and identity access management.
• Conduct knowledge transfer sessions and provide post-migration support documentation.
• Collaborate closely with engineering and DevOps teams throughout the migration process.

Current GCP Stack
• Cloud Run
• Pub/Sub
• Cloud SQL MySQL
• Memorystore Redis
• Secret Manager
• Cloud Storage
• IAM

Target Azure Stack
• Azure Container Apps or AKS
• Azure Service Bus
• Azure Database for MySQL
• Azure Cache for Redis
• Azure Key Vault
• Azure Blob Storage
• Entra ID / RBAC

Must-Have Requirements
• Proven production-level GCP ? Azure migration experience.
• Strong hands-on experience with:
o Azure Container Apps or AKS
o Azure Service Bus
o Azure Database for MySQL
o Azure Cache for Redis
o Azure Key Vault
• Experience working with containerized NestJS/TypeScript and Python FastAPI services.
• Strong MySQL operational knowledge including replication, backup/restore, and cross-cloud migration.
• Solid networking fundamentals including VNets, private endpoints, DNS, and egress control.
• Comfortable working directly with cloud CLI tools (gcloud and az).
• Strong documentation and communication skills for architecture mapping and knowledge transfer.

Nice-to-Have
• DevOps/SRE background.
• Experience supporting healthcare or HIPAA-adjacent platforms.
• Experience with Terraform or Infrastructure-as-Code tooling.

title: Finance Coordinator
description:
Hiring: Urgent role : Finance Coordinator

We’re a fast-moving wellness company, looking for a hands-on Finance Lead to own our day-to-day finances end to end. You’ll run payroll, manage purchases, keep AR/AP clean, and produce accurate financial statements and reporting on a fast, reliable cadence. 

We value someone who can take ownership quickly, work with minimal supervision, and turn things around the same day or the soonest possible time when needed. Ideally, we expect precision, speed, and a finance brain that flags opportunities (fees, spend, payroll efficiency) rather than just processing transactions. International Experience 

SEND US : 
1. CV 
2. Video (short); tell us about you and tell us what have you actually handled with your clients ; have you worked with US or European companies, what financial management apps have you used; tell us why should we hire you based on technical area of this work?
3. Anything that you want to share that can prove your experience

Key Responsibilities
Payroll & salary processing — Run accurate, on-time payroll for the full team; handle adjustments, reimbursements, and contractor payments.

Purchasing — Process small and daily purchases promptly; track spend against budget and keep records clean.
Accounts Payable (AP) — Manage vendor bills, schedule and execute payments, and reconcile statements.
Accounts Receivable (AR) — Issue invoices, track incoming payments, and follow up on outstanding balances.
Financial statements — Prepare monthly P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow statements.
Financial reporting — Deliver clear, timely reports to leadership; surface trends, risks, and savings opportunities.
Financial Dashboard - Create a financial dashboard and update it  weekly
Cash & banking — Manage banking through Mercury; monitor cash position and flag anything unusual.
Bookkeeping — Keep QuickBooks fully up to date and reconciled.
Fast turnaround — Process requests at the soonest available time; same-day when the business needs it.

Requirements
5+ years in finance/accounting, ideally including a finance lead, senior bookkeeper, or finance manager role.
Strong working knowledge of QuickBooks (setup, reconciliation, reporting).
Hands-on experience with Mercury (or comparable digital banking platforms).
Proven ability to run payroll, AR/AP, and month-end close independently.
Comfortable producing financial statements and management reports without hand-holding.
Highly organized, detail-obsessed, and fast — completes tasks on time and meticulously.
Able to start soon and ramp up quickly to manage the function with minimal supervision.

Nice to Have
Experience in wellness, healthcare, clinic, or coaching / online-services businesses.
Exposure to multi-currency payments and international vendors.
A proactive, advisory mindset — recommending better banking, lower fees, or smarter spend.
Comfort working with finance tools and light automation.

In this role, you’ll build scalable systems, set up tone and response frameworks, and create QA processes to keep performance on track.

Responsibilities

Lead end-to-end implementation of customer support platforms (e.g., Gorgias, Zendesk, Intercom, or similar).
Configure ticket routing, tagging, automation, and escalation logic tailored to each brand’s workflow.
Build and maintain AI guidance libraries, macros, and tone frameworks for brand consistency.
Integrate support tools with e-commerce and communication platforms (e.g., Shopify, Klaviyo, Recharge, Loop, ShipBob, Slack).
Develop QA systems to track AI and agent metrics (FRT, CSAT, self-serve rate).
Automate reports and workflows using Google Sheets, Apps Script, Zapier, or Make.
Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure CX policies and processes remain accurate and scalable.
Establish AI governance standards and escalation rules.
Present findings, reports, and optimization plans to internal or client stakeholders.

Core Competencies:
Advanced admin and AI/automation management within CX platforms
Systems thinking & workflow automation (Google Apps Script, Zapier, APIs)
CX policy and documentation design
AI tone, voice, and compliance management
QA & analytics (FRT, CSAT, self-serve rate)
Multi-brand CX architecture & communication alignment
Excellent written and verbal English

Preferred Background:
2+ years in CX Operations, Automation Strategy, or AI Implementation with proven experience in a major helpdesk platform (Gorgias, Zendesk, Intercom, or similar).
Strong understanding of logic systems, tagging, and escalation flow design.
Advanced proficiency in Google Sheets and workflow automation tools is highly preferred.


If you’re passionate about AI, automation, and modern CX systems — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Human Resources Assistant
description:
Purpose:  
The Human Resources Assistant provides confidential administrative and operational support to ensure the smooth and efficient functioning of the Human Resources Department. This role is responsible for preparing correspondence, reports, and departmental documentation; maintaining accurate records and filing systems; assisting with onboarding activities; and supporting inquiries through the department’s ticketing system.

General Description of duties: This job description is not intended to be all-inclusive. Employee may perform other 
related duties to meet the ongoing needs of the organization.
• Engages and communicates effectively with internal and external stakeholders, collaborating with the Talent Management team to support employees and deliver HR solutions aligned with organizational goals.
• Maintain confidentiality and follow HR policies and legal requirements.
• Maintain confidential electronic employee records, personnel files, and HRIS databases with accuracy and compliance.
• Prepare and process HR documents, including offer letters, status change forms, and termination paperwork.
• Support onboarding and orientation processes, ensuring new hires receive required materials, system access, and training schedules.
• Respond to employee questions and requests submitted through the HR/Payroll ticketing systems, assigning tickets, and escalating issues to the appropriate tea ---------- mbers as needed.
• Partners with talent tea ---------- mbers to support administrative tasks with accuracy, related to payroll, benefits, workers’ compensation, unemployment, safety, leave of absence and out sick boards, ensuring full regulatory compliance.
• Generate reports from HRIS and other systems to support audits, compliance, and departmental metrics. 
• Serves as administrative support to the safety committee, ensuring safety documentation, calendars and presentations are maintained with accuracy and compliance.
• Participate in special projects, process improvements, and other duties as assigned.

Qualifications:
• Must possess the ability to focus on repetitive tasks for extended periods with high accuracy.
• Effective communication, oral and written. 
• Ability to maintain confidentiality of employment, personnel, and financial matters. 
• Manage and assist with multiple, on-going, and high priority assignments at the same time.
• Demonstrated ability to work independently.
• Good organizational and time management skills. 

 Requirements:
• High School Diploma or GED.
• 1-2 years of Human Resources or administrative experience.
• Proficient in MS Office software.
• Preferred experience using HRIS or ERP Systems.

*PC Preferred.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Executive Assistant
Fully Remote, Part-Time

ABOUT YOU
You have a refining nature that is always looking for how to make things a little bit better. You notice the small things like a repeating conversation, a habit people fall into, or an unnoticed shortcut. You adapt or suggest changes to others, so those patterns become opportunities for growth.

You care about doing things intentionally. You think things through, break them down clearly, notice details others miss, and bring a sense of order to what you take on.

You’re naturally curious... the kind of person who wants to understand how things work and why something is the way it is. You look for context, ask clarifying questions, and enjoy figuring things out until the “why” becomes clear.

You move through life with a deep belief that everything is for your good. You don’t see challenges as setbacks, you see them as a puzzle to solve, a lesson to learn, or an opportunity for growth. At your core, you’re a glass-half-full person.

ABOUT US
We’re a technical services business currently supporting Cisco systems and moving into AI-based solutions. As a tiny company, it will be just the owner and you. This means communication is direct, decisions are fast, and your work has a real impact on the business & its growth.

WHAT TO EXPECT
You will work directly with the owner keeping the day to day moving smoothly. Your role is to keep the business owner organized, accurate, and moving forward. You’ll have visibility into both business and personal logistics and be trusted to handle them with integrity and ownership.

WHAT YOU'LL OWN
* EMAIL MANAGEMENT: Monitor and organize business email, handle items you can resolve, flag or escalate high?priority messages, and screen requests so the owner only handles necessary emails.
* PERSONAL METRICS TRACKING: Do a daily check in with the owner, update the performance spreadsheet, spot trends or anomalies, and prepare the weekly printed metrics.
* TRAVEL PLANNING: Research and book flights, lodging, tours, and activities; deliver a complete itinerary and manage changes for about one trip per month.
* PERSONAL SUPPORT: Schedule home maintenance, place orders/returns, and handle ad hoc personal tasks as requested.
* BOOKKEEPING: In Quickbooks, enter timesheets for multiple clients, create/send invoices, record and categorize expenses and upload receipts.
* TIMESHEETS & SOWs: Collect and verify time entries, transfer data into QB/Trello/spreadsheets, manage payroll or vendor support tickets to resolution, and update SOWs for review before sending.
*PROJECT TRACKING: Maintain timesheets and to do lists in Trello, keep task statuses current, and ensure critical items are completed on time.
* VISUAL DIAGRAMS: Create L ----------  flowcharts and XMind mind maps, capture live notes into mind maps, migrate maps into diagrams, and convert data between formats (like Excel ? mind map/diagram).

GROWTH OPPORTUNITIES
OPTIONAL: This role could grow into an AI TECHNICIAN. As the owner moves into AI, there is an optional opportunity to become an AI technical assistant.

COMPENSATION & BENEFITS
* HOURS: Part-time starting at 15-20 hours a week, which may increase as needs increase.
* COMPENSATION: $8 USD per hour, based on experience.
* ON-CALL AVAILABILITY: Be available to respond within 20 minutes between 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM PHL time Tuesday to Saturday. You don’t need to actively be working during that time, just be available to reply to messages or join quick meetings so simple questions don’t have to wait until the next day.
* MEETINGS: Weekly all-staff meeting at 7:00 AM on Wednesday (PHL Time), plus additional meetings as needed.
*REMOTE WORK: Work from anywhere with flexible hours.
* INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR: This is a contract position without benefits. Only direct workers should apply. No agencies, please.

HOW TO APPLY:

title: Technical Support Specialist
description:
Solve the Hard Stuff. Keep Customers Moving. 

JOB SUMMARY 

Cybernautic's customers need fast, reliable technical support from someone who actually knows what they're doing. That's where you come in.  

As a Technical Support Specialist, you'll handle the majority of website-related support tickets — HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, CMS updates, bug fixes, DNS records, and email hosting — so our development team stays focused on building great things. You'll be the first line of defense, and you'll resolve most issues without needing to escalate. 

This is a technically sharp, code-capable support role for someone who loves solving problems, communicates clearly, and takes ownership from first contact to resolution. You'll work across our in-house CMS (Editor), Shopify, Cloudflare, GoDaddy, Rackspace and OpenSRS Email, FreshDesk, and more — and you'll use AI tools to troubleshoot faster, write better, and work smarter. 

This role is based in the Philippines and requires availability during U.S. business hours. You'll work closely with our U.S.-based Client Services Specialist, communicate directly with clients by email and occasionally by phone or video, and hold yourself to a high standard — because our customers do. 

If you have real website development experience, strong English communication skills, and the instincts to investigate problems thoroughly before asking for help — this role was built for you. 

WHAT YOU'LL DO 

Website & CMS Support 
* Troubleshoot, resolve, and directly implement fixes for website support tickets across front-end and back-end issues 
* Create, modify, and troubleshoot CMS content structures to support client requests 
* Provide CMS training and guidance to website administrators as needed 
* Use appropriate technical tools and resources to investigate issues and identify root causes 
* Test all changes before closing a ticket — browser compatibility, mobile responsiveness, form functionality, and unintended side effects 
* Document findings, steps taken, files changed, and resolutions clearly within every ticket 
* Protect website stability by following established development, testing, backup, and change-management practices before making updates to live client websites 
* Investigate and resolve the majority of website issues independently, escalating to the development team only when necessary and always with clear documentation 
*  Keep the Client Services Specialist informed of ticket status, technical findings, and escalation needs 

DNS & Email Hosting Support 
* Assist clients with DNS record configuration in GoDaddy and Cloudflare 
* Troubleshoot and resolve SSL certificate issues, including expired certificates, mixed content warnings, and domain verification problems 
* Support clients using Rackspace Email and assist with migrating accounts to OpenSRS, including DNS setup, mailbox migration, and client coordination 
* Help clients configure Rackspace and OpenSRS email accounts into leading email applications including Outlook, Gmail, and mobile mail clients 
* Identify and escalate systemic email delivery or routing issues to vendors as needed 

Shopify Support 
* Troubleshoot and resolve Shopify storefront issues including theme layout problems, navigation, page content, section and block configuration, and checkout display issues 
* Assist clients with connecting custom domains to Shopify, including DNS configuration, SSL verification, and subdomain and redirect setup 
* Help clients with basic Shopify admin tasks including product setup, collections, metafields, and page content management 
* Escalate complex Shopify development requests — such as custom development, advanced Liquid logic, or API integrations — to a lead developer with full documentation 

Customer & Ticket Management 
* Interact with clients to provide timely support and information across all assigned channels 
* Manage the full ticket lifecycle: opening, assigning, monitoring, escalating, and resolving support tickets 
* Troubleshoot and resolve general account and access issues, including password resets, account lockouts, and client inquiries not handled by a dedicated support section 
* Maintain accurate records of client interactions, including details of inquiries, complaints, and actions taken 
* Escalate unresolved or complex issues to the appropriate team member or vendor partner with thorough documentation 
* Fulfill all service level standards for response time and quality 

Knowledge Management 
* Develop and maintain a library of support articles, how-to guides, and best practices  
* Flag outdated or inaccurate articles and update them to reflect current products and procedures 
* Document troubleshooting patterns and contribute new content that reduces repeat ticket volume 

AI-Assisted Workflows 
* Incorporate AI tools into daily support workflows to improve response quality, efficiency, and consistency 
* Use AI to assist with code troubleshooting, research, documentation, and client communications — always verifying AI-generated output before applying it to live systems 
* Stay current on emerging AI tools and recommend new applications that benefit the support team 

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR 

You'll need: 
* Practical experience troubleshooting and updating websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP, including CMS-driven sites — content updates, layout fixes, template edits, and moderately complex code changes 
* Strong understanding of website hosting, domains, and DNS, including the ability to create, update, troubleshoot, and migrate records such as A, CNAME, MX, TXT, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC 
* Experience troubleshooting email setup and delivery issues, including mailbox configuration, configuring email into client applications, DNS-related email problems, and basic deliverability issues 
* Familiarity with FTP/SFTP, hosting control panels, CMS admin tools, browser developer tools, and basic server resources for investigating and resolving issues 
* Comfortable using AI tools to assist with technical troubleshooting, code review, research, documentation, and rewriting client replies — with good judgment about verifying recommendations before applying them 
* Ability to investigate technical problems independently, review code and configurations thoroughly, document findings clearly, and balance speed with accuracy on live systems 
* Strong English communication skills — written and verbal — including clear, professional client-facing responses and the ability to join client calls when needed 
* Availability during U.S. business hours with real-time responsiveness throughout the shift 

You'll stand out if you have: 
* Shopify experience, including theme editing (Liquid, CSS, JavaScript), custom domain and DNS setup, app troubleshooting, and Shopify admin support 
* Experience with Rackspace Email and/or OpenSRS, including mailbox setup, client configuration, deliverability troubleshooting, and email account migration 
* Experience with GoDaddy for domain management, DNS configuration, and registrar-level settings 
* Experience using FreshDesk or a comparable help desk/ticketing platform 
* Experience with custom CMS platforms, WordPress, or other website management systems 
* Experience writing knowledge base articles, technical documentation, or internal troubleshooting guides 
* Experience working with U.S.-based clients or companies 
* Familiarity with Git or other version-control workflows 
* Relevant certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Cloudflare Fundamentals, or Shopify Partner are helpful but not required 

BENEFITS 
* Competitive compensation with 13th month pay (USD or PHP) 
* Long-term engagement with a people-first U.S. agency 
* Consistent schedule: Monday through Friday, U.S. business hours 
* Remote/work-from-home flexibility 
* Real collaboration with a tight-knit U.S. team doing work that matters 

MORE ABOUT CYBERNAUTIC 

Cybernautic designs, develops, and manages the most thrilling and effective web experiences for businesses and organizations of all sizes. We’re a tight-knit team in Bloomington-Normal, IL. We believe hard work, creativity, and innovation move businesses forward — and that the web is one of the most powerful tools for making that happen. We’re investing in AI not to replace great work, but to amplify it. 

We’re looking for someone who shares that vision and wants to help shape what that looks like for our clients and our team. We know what we need and we’re passionate about finding the right fit. If this sounds like you, we’d love to meet you.

title: Head of Growth Marketing – Performance & Demand Generation (Senior Leadership)
description:
Got it. Here's the revised OnlineJobs.ph listing repositioned for a VP / near C-level hire:

Job Title:
Head of Growth Marketing – Performance & Demand Generation (Senior Leadership)
Type of Employment: Full-Time
Job Description:
Seneca Cost Segregation is a fast-growing, technical advisory firm serving real estate investors nationwide. We're searching for a senior marketing leader — someone operating at the VP level — to own our entire demand generation engine and scale it into a market-defining machine.
This is not a coordinator role. This is not a "manage the agency" role. This is a seat at the table for a growth operator who has built and scaled B2B lead generation from the ground up, knows how to move a technical buyer through a long decision cycle, and is ready to own the outcomes — not just the activity.
You will report directly to leadership, hold full ownership of the marketing function, and be a key voice in company growth strategy. If you've been the person behind the numbers at a high-performing B2B or financial services firm, and you're ready to build something that outlasts you — this is your role.
What You Will Own:

Full P&L accountability for marketing spend — every dollar tied to a direct line to revenue
Paid acquisition, SEO, website, events, and retargeting strategy and execution
Design and deployment of the full nurture engine — lead magnets, email sequences, and AI-powered workflows that move prospects from "curious" to "closed"
GoHighLevel CRM architecture — ensuring no lead falls through and retargeting fires on behavior
High-converting landing pages and funnels that translate the technical value of Cost Segregation into action
AI-driven content and acquisition experiments to break past linear growth

Who You Are:

A senior growth operator with a verifiable track record of scaling qualified pipeline in B2B or high-consideration B2C environments
A systems thinker who identifies CRM and funnel inefficiencies and fixes them — personally
Deeply metrics-driven: you own CPL, CAC, conversion rates, domain authority, and pipeline contribution without being asked
AI-savvy and forward-leaning — you're already deploying AI tools in your workflow and see them as a competitive edge, not a novelty
A leader who can eventually build and manage a team beneath them as the function scales

Required:

5+ years of hands-on performance marketing leadership — paid acquisition, SEO, and funnel optimization in B2B or high-consideration B2C
Working proficiency in GoHighLevel
Demonstrated track record of measurable lead-gen results with clear attribution (CPL, CAC, pipeline contribution)
Fluent business English; available during US business hours

Preferred:

Experience in financial services, tax, real estate, or real estate investor markets
 ---------- , Zapier, or similar automation tooling at scale
AI workflow tooling deployed in a production environment
Background scaling lead-gen for technical or expert-led service businesses
Experience hiring and managing marketing talent

What Success Looks Like:

First 30 days: Full audit of current stack — ads, SEO, funnels, CRM, retargeting. Quick wins identified and shipped.
First 90 days: Repeatable nurture engine live in GHL, high-converting landing page system operational, clean attribution from spend to closed revenue.
Year one: CPL and CAC trending down while volume scales; a marketing machine the sales team trusts as their best and most consistent source of qualified leads.

What We Offer:

Direct access to executive leadership and full ownership of the marketing function
Competitive base salary + performance-based compensation — you earn on what you build
Existing AI tooling and infrastructure — you're not starting from zero
A small, fast-moving team where your wins are visible and compound quickly
Real growth runway into a C-suite marketing seat as Seneca scales

To apply, send your resume and a one-minute intro video. In the subject line write: "DYLAN is the COOLEST!"

title: Tech VA
description:

We're excited to expand our remote team and are looking for a Tech VA (Tech Virtual Assistant) who is passionate about technology, eager to learn new skills, and excited to become an integral part of our team! If you're a self-starter with a great attitude and a desire to grow your tech abilities, this is the perfect opportunity for you. We are only reviewing applications submitted through our website.

Role Overview

We're searching for a dedicated Tech VA (Tech Virtual Assistant) to support our tech team. In this role, you'll get hands-on experience with various technologies and processes, including helping with our CRM platform (HubSpot), assisting with simple automations, and supporting web updates. This is an entry-level position where we'll provide full training on everything you need to know. You'll have a fantastic opportunity to learn and grow within an innovative tech environment.
