title: Java and Angular Full Stack software engineer
description:
About the Company:
We are a U.S.-based software company dedicated to the mortgage industry. We build reliable, scalable systems that support mission-critical servicing workflows. Our engineering culture values technical excellence, long-term ownership, and clear execution. We operate in a collaborative, fast-moving environment where experienced engineers are trusted to make architectural decisions and drive the product forward.

Position Overview:
We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Full Stack Developer to join our core engineering team. This is a role for a professional who thrives on building large-scale systems and is looking for a stable, long-term home. You will have significant responsibility across the entire stack—from architecting complex Java backends to crafting seamless Angular frontends.

Please Note: We are looking for a teammate who is fully committed and ready to dedicate their professional focus to our mission. To streamline our compliance and operational workflows, this specific role is strictly targeted toward talent residing in the Philippines.

Key Responsibilities:

End-to-End Development: Design, develop, and maintain high-performance services using Java (Spring Boot) and Angular.

Backend Architecture: Architect and scale APIs and microservices using GraphQL and REST.

Data Modeling: Design and optimize DynamoDB schemas, queries, and indexing strategies.

Front-End Excellence: Build responsive, state-managed UI components in Angular that provide a superior user experience.

System Integrity: Improve system reliability, observability, and fault tolerance within an event-driven architecture.

Leadership: Lead code reviews, enforce engineering best practices, and mentor junior developers.

Required Qualifications:

Experience: 5+ years of professional full-stack development experience.

Backend: Strong expertise in Java and the Spring Boot ecosystem.

Frontend: Advanced proficiency in Angular (TypeScript) and modern web technologies.

API & Data: Proven experience with GraphQL and DynamoDB (or similar NoSQL databases).

Cloud: Hands-on experience with AWS (Lambda, SQS, API Gateway, and DynamoDB).

Reliability: Experience with CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and DevOps practices.

Commitment: Proven track record of dedication to a team and the ability to manage a full-time workload effectively.

Interview Integrity: Zero-tolerance policy for AI-assisted responses or external help during our technical evaluation process.

Preferred Qualifications:

Experience with messaging systems like Kafka or RabbitMQ.

Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, and Infrastructure-as-Code.

Understanding of Domain-Driven Design (DDD) and CQRS patterns.

Why Join Us?

Stability & Growth: Competitive salary aligned with your experience level ($12–$15/hour).

Flexibility: 100% remote work environment.

Impact: High level of ownership and technical influence over a mission-critical platform.

Culture: A collaborative team with high engineering standards and no "red tape."

How to Apply:
If you are a dedicated developer looking for a long-term role where your contributions truly matter, please apply with your updated resume and a brief summary of your experience with Java/Angular architectures.

Important Verification Step: As part of our secure onboarding process and to confirm geographic compliance with local employment guidelines, all applicants must provide a clear copy of a valid government-issued photo ID prior to scheduling the initial interview. Applications submitted without a verifiable photo ID will not be considered.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Operations & Executive Assistant

Part-Time | Remote

Miett Health is a growing online fitness and nutrition coaching company that helps busy women build stronger bodies, healthier habits, and lasting confidence through sustainable coaching that fits real life.

As our company continues to grow, we're looking for a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Operations & Executive Assistant to help support daily operations, client experience, project management, and marketing initiatives.

This is not a traditional virtual assistant role.

We're looking for someone who takes ownership, thrives on organization, enjoys solving problems, and wants to play a meaningful role in helping build a company that positively impacts people's lives.

The right person will become a trusted partner behind the scenes, helping transform ideas into action and ensuring the business runs smoothly as we continue to grow.

Position Details

* Fully remote
* Part-time position to start, with hours increasing as the company grows
* Starting at approximately 5-10 hours per week
* Flexible schedule
* Opportunity for increased hours, responsibility, and compensation as the company grows
* Must have availability for overlap with Mountain Time (US) for communication and meetings

Who We're Looking For

The ideal candidate is:

* Highly organized and detail-oriented
* Self-motivated and proactive
* Resourceful and able to solve problems independently
* Reliable and accountable
* Strong written communicator
* Comfortable learning and adapting to new systems
* Able to manage multiple projects and deadlines
* Passionate about personal growth and continuous improvement
* Excited to be part of a mission-driven company

We value attitude and work ethic just as much as experience, but applicants should have familiarity with the tools and responsibilities listed below.

Required Experience

Applicants should have experience with:

* Canva
* GoHighLevel (GHL)
* Asana
* Social media management and scheduling
* Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Calendar)

Experience with fitness, health, coaching, or online service-based businesses is a plus, but not required.

Responsibilities

Executive & Administrative Support

* Calendar management
* Email organization and follow-up
* Scheduling and coordination
* Document creation and formatting
* Administrative support as needed

Project Management

* Managing projects and workflows inside Asana
* Tracking deadlines and deliverables
* Following up on outstanding tasks
* Helping improve operational systems and processes
* Supporting business growth initiatives

Client Operations

* Assisting with new client onboarding
* Supporting client setup processes
* Maintaining organization within coaching platforms and systems
* Helping create a positive client experience behind the scenes

Marketing & Social Media Support

* Social media scheduling and organization
* Canva graphics and document design
* Content repurposing and formatting
* Updating client resources and materials
* Assisting with marketing campaigns and launches

CRM & Automation Support

* Managing and organizing GoHighLevel
* Updating workflows and automations
* Lead management and organization
* Supporting client communication systems

Non-Negotiables

* Excellent written English
* Strong attention to detail
* Reliable internet connection
* Ability to meet deadlines consistently
* Strong communication skills
* High standards for quality and professionalism
* Takes initiative instead of waiting to be told what to do
* Ability to work independently and problem-solve

What Success Looks Like

The right person creates clarity, organization, and  ---------- ntum.

They are proactive rather than reactive. They anticipate needs, communicate effectively, take ownership of their responsibilities, and consistently look for ways to improve systems and processes.

They don't simply complete tasks—they help move the business forward.

Why Join Miett Health?

title: Bookkeeper / Monthly Financial Review
description:
Purpose of the role JobTracks operates a Manual & AI-assisted bookkeeping pipeline: source documents (PDF invoices, Excel payroll and AP reports, credit-card feeds) are extracted and classified into QuickBooks Online via manual entry and a structured import tool. This role should not need to perform manual data entry. Its purpose is to review, reconcile, correct, and close the books each month — to be the human control layer that catches what the data entry gets wrong and to own the accuracy of the financial record.

Core responsibilities Review transaction entries for correct account classification, flagging and correcting misclassifications before close. Reconcile all bank and credit-card accounts monthly against statements. Verify that automated invoice, bill, and expense imports match source documents on a sampled and exception basis. Confirm payroll entries tie out to ADP records (ADP retains responsibility for payroll tax filing). Manage the exception queue — any transaction the automation flags as low-confidence or cannot classify. Perform monthly close and produce P&L, balance sheet, and cash-flow statements. Identify control gaps or recurring error patterns in the automated pipeline and report them so the upstream rules can be improved.
What this role does NOT do Manual keying of invoices or expenses. Payroll tax filing (ADP). Tax preparation or strategic tax/decree advice (handled by outside CPA/tax counsel).

Required qualifications Hands-on QuickBooks Online proficiency, including reconciliation and month-end close. Demonstrated bookkeeping experience for a company with 1,000+ monthly transactions. Comfort reviewing and correcting machine-generated entries rather than originating them i.e., an editor's mindset, not a data-entry mindset. Strong attention to classification accuracy and an instinct for what "looks wrong."

Preferred Experience with multi-entity bookkeeping (JobTracks operates more than one company). Familiarity with QuickBooks import tools (SaasAnt, Transaction Pro, or similar).

Engagement terms Monthly retainer, scope sized to transaction volume. Specific monthly deliverable: reconciled accounts and closed books with financial statements delivered by [X] business days after month-end.

title: Business Development Representative (Appointment Setter & Prospecting Specialist)
description:
BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE (APPOINTMENT SETTER & PROSPECTING SPECIALIST)

Boat & RV Marketing is seeking a highly motivated Business Development Representative to help us connect with boat dealerships, RV dealerships, marinas, and related marine businesses throughout North America.

This is NOT a customer service position.

This is a prospecting and appointment-setting role focused on generating conversations, creating opportunities, and scheduling qualified discovery calls for our founder and sales team.

We are looking for someone who creates opportunities rather than waits for them.

WORK SCHEDULE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

Monday-Friday
1:00 PM - 5:00 PM Eastern Time (EST/EDT)

20 hours per week

Applicants must be available during these exact hours.

Please do not apply if you cannot consistently work this schedule.

COMPENSATION

$6-$8/hour based on experience

Performance bonuses available for qualified appointments that show and opportunities that advance through the sales process.

RESPONSIBILITIES

• Execute our Focus 30 prospecting system daily
• Contact assigned prospects through phone, email, LinkedIn, and personalized video messages
• Complete a minimum of 30 prospect touches per day
• Schedule qualified discovery calls with dealership and marina decision makers
• Maintain accurate CRM records in GoHighLevel
• Update pipeline stages and opportunity statuses daily
• Create detailed notes after every conversation
• Follow up consistently with prospects according to our outreach process
• Manage prospect follow-up activities and tasks
• Submit an end-of-day activity report
• Communicate prospect feedback and opportunities to management

SUCCESS METRICS

• Minimum 30 prospect touches per day
• 100% CRM compliance
• Accurate pipeline management
• Daily activity reporting
• Minimum 4 qualified appointments booked per week
• Minimum 17 qualified appointments booked per month
• Consistent follow-up execution

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Excellent spoken and written English
• Reliable high-speed internet connection
• Professional home office environment
• Previous sales, appointment setting, lead generation, or business development experience
• Comfortable making outbound calls
• Strong organizational skills
• Strong attention to detail
• Ability to work independently
• Experience using CRM systems

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• GoHighLevel experience
• LinkedIn prospecting experience
• Loom video experience
• Marketing agency experience
• Marine industry experience
• RV industry experience
• B2B sales experience

IMPORTANT APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS

APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A LOOM VIDEO WILL BE AUTOMATICALLY REJECTED.

To be considered for this position, complete ALL of the following steps:

1. Submit your application.

2. Record a 2-3 minute Loom video introducing yourself.

In your Loom video answer:

• Why would you be successful booking appointments with boat dealers, RV dealers, and marina operators?
• What outbound prospecting experience do you have?
• What is your biggest professional accomplishment?
• Why should we hire you instead of other applicants?

3. Include the word ANCHOR in the first sentence of your application.

4. Tell us what time it is in your location when it is 1:00 PM Eastern Time in South Carolina.

5. Provide a screenshot of a CRM system you have used previously (sensitive information may be blurred).

6. After applying, find Keryn Lynn on LinkedIn and send a professional connection request with a brief introduction.

Priority consideration will be given to applicants who proactively connect on LinkedIn and follow all application instructions.

BONUS CHALLENGE

Want to stand out?

Record a 60-second prospecting video as if you were reaching out to a boat dealer, RV dealer, or marina owner to schedule a meeting.

This is optional but will receive priority review.

ABOUT US

Boat & RV Marketing specializes in lead generation, follow-up systems, CRM implementation, automation, and marketing strategy for boat dealerships, RV dealerships, marinas, and storage facilities throughout North America.

We believe relationships matter, follow-up matters, and the businesses that respond first often win.

If you're hungry, proactive, coachable, and willing to do what most applicants won't do, we'd love to meet you.

title: Funnel Rebuild Specialist (GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels) - Part-Time, Long-Term
description:
Hi, and thanks for reading this properly.

I run the marketing for a golf coaching brand, and I am looking for one reliable person to take ownership of a specific, repeatable process: rebuilding our webinar funnels each month.

This is a focused role, not a do-everything VA job. Your main work will be rebuilding and quality-checking our webinar funnels across GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Zapier, and Demio. Most of it is the same process repeated each month, so it gets faster and easier the longer you do it. We train you fully with recorded walkthroughs and written steps, and at the start we work closely alongside you. Once you know the process, it is genuinely straightforward.

What I am looking for:
- Comfortable working inside marketing tools (GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Zapier, Demio, Kajabi). You do not need all of them, but experience with some is a big plus.
- Careful and detail-focused. This work is about doing the same thing correctly every time, not being creative.
- Someone who asks questions when unsure. I would much rather you ask than guess. Asking is doing the job well, and I will always be glad you did.
- Reliable over written updates, since we work across time zones and mostly asynchronously.

This is part-time, around 20 to 25 hours per week, long-term, with room to take on more over time as we build trust.

To apply (please read carefully):
1. Start your message with the word FAIRWAY so I know you read this.
2. Tell me which of these tools you have used before, and roughly how much: GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Zapier, Demio, Kajabi.
3. In one or two sentences, tell me about a repetitive task you owned in a past role and how you kept it accurate.

Applications that skip these steps will not be considered. Looking forward to reading yours.

title: AU Mortgage Credit Analyst
description:
About EasyStaff

EasyStaff partners with Australian businesses to provide high-quality offshore team members across mortgage broking, legal, administration, and professional services industries.

We are currently seeking an experienced Mortgage Credit Analyst to support an Australian mortgage brokerage.

This is a senior-level role best suited to candidates with strong Australian mortgage lending experience and the ability to assess, structure, and present loan scenarios across multiple lenders.

Key Responsibilities

Credit Assessment & Scenario Analysis

- Analyse client financials including payslips, income structures, and employment types
- Accurately calculate base income, overtime, and variable earnings
- Interpret lender policies to determine borrowing capacity and loan suitability
- Run and compare multiple lender servicing calculators
- Use Quickli to assess borrowing capacity

Lender Policy & Niche Expertise (Critical)

- Develop a deep understanding of individual lender credit policies and niches
- Identify which lenders are best suited for each scenario based on their policy strengths and risk appetite
- Apply lender-specific rules such as:
      *Overtime treatment (100% vs shading)
      *Self-employed requirements (e.g. 1-year vs 2-year financials)
      *Income verification variations
- Understand and utilise lender niches such as:
      *ANZ – ability to consider 1-year self-employed financials in certain scenarios
      *Macquarie Bank – policy allowing no financials/accountant letters when company income is not being used
- Stay up to date with lender policy changes and proactively apply them to scenarios
- Use policy knowledge strategically to structure deals for approval, not just assessment

As part of your application, please include the names of three Australian lenders you have worked with or are most familiar with.

Self-Employed & Complex Income Analysis

- Analyse self-employed clients across:
      *Sole Traders
      *Partnerships
      *Companies
      *Trusts (including complex and multiple trust structures)
- Interpret financial documents including:
      *Tax Returns
      *Financial Statements
      *Notices of Assessment
- Accurately extrapolate income and normalise earnings
- Understand how to trace business income back to the individual applicant
- Identify add-backs, one-off expenses, and sustainability of income
- Apply lender-specific rules for self-employed income assessment

SMSF Lending (Desirable Knowledge)

- Understand the fundamentals of Self-Managed Super Fund (SMSF) lending
- Identify required documentation for SMSF loan applications including trust deeds, financial statements, and compliance documents
- Support occasional SMSF lending scenarios where required

Loan Structuring & Submission

- Prepare strong, well-structured loan submissions to maximise approval chances
- Draft detailed submission notes tailored to each lender
- Build and present lender scenarios to BDMs for policy confirmation
- Package deals in line with lender expectations and credit appetite

Policy & Compliance

- Maintain a strong understanding of Australian lending policies
- Know where to locate and how to interpret lender policies
- Ensure all applications meet compliance requirements
- Identify risks that may impact approval outcomes

Credit & Financial Analysis

- Analyse bank statements to identify undisclosed debts or liabilities
- Conduct and interpret credit checks
- Understand credit scoring, risk profiles, and lending red flags
- Identify issues that may delay or decline applications

Client & Lender Communication

- Liaise with lenders, credit teams, and BDMs
- Clearly communicate scenarios and follow up on applications
- Maintain professional, clear, and confident spoken English

Attention to detail is important in this role. Please save your resume using the format: FirstName_LastName_CreditAnalyst.pdf

Additional Responsibilities

- Assist with loan processing when required
- Conduct pricing negotiations with lenders
- Order and manage property valuations
- Understand and assess eligibility for Australian first home buyer schemes and grants
- Collaborate with internal team members and contribute feedback

Work Setup

- Full-time remote position
- Australian business hours
- Stable internet connection required
- Quiet work environment required
- Must have backup internet available

Salary

- Competitive salary based on experience
- Please include your salary expectations in your application

Requirements

- Essential Experience
- Minimum 5+ years’ experience as a Credit Analyst (mortgage or banking)
- Strong experience with Australian mortgage lending
- Proven ability to interpret and apply lender policy
- Experience running servicing calculators across multiple lenders

Highly Desirable

Experience with:

Connective
Mercury Nexus
Go High Level (CRM Automation)
ChatGPT and AI tools

Exposure to:

Self-employed and complex lending scenarios
Trust structures and company income analysis
SMSF lending
Demonstrated understanding of lender niches and policy differences.

Technical Skills

Advanced financial analysis skills
Strong understanding of:
Income verification (payslips, overtime, allowances)
Self-employed income assessment
Credit reports and scoring
Bank statement analysis
Ability to identify risks and structure deals accordingly

Soft Skills

Excellent verbal and written English communication
Confident speaking with lenders and BDMs
High attention to detail
Proactive and solutions-focused mindset
Open to feedback and continuous improvement
Team-oriented with a hands-on attitude

What Success Looks Like

High-quality submissions with strong approval rates
Accurate and efficient credit assessments (including complex scenarios when required)
Ability to match clients to the right lender based on niche and policy advantages
Clear and effective lender communication
Strong compliance track record

Candidates who are successful in this role are highly detail-oriented. When answering the final application question, please begin your response with the word "Broker".

Ideal Candidate Profile
The ideal candidate is a senior-level Credit Analyst who:

Has deep experience in Australian mortgage lending
Has strong knowledge of lender niches and when to use each lender strategically
Understands how to analyse complex structures including companies, trusts, and partnerships
Can break down and attribute income back to individual applicants
Has exposure to SMSF lending concepts and documentation requirements
Thinks like a credit assessor and deal strategist, not just a processor
Knows how to structure deals to fit lender policy strengths
Is confident speaking with lenders and advocating for a deal
Can independently interpret policy and apply it to real-world scenarios

They are:
Detail-oriented but commercially minded
Proactive and take ownership
Comfortable asking questions and giving feedback
Friendly, enthusiastic, and a strong communicator
Adaptable and willing to get their hands dirty when needed

Final Application Question
What do you believe is the most important skill of a successful Credit Analyst, and why?

How to Apply
Please submit your application to:
 ----------

title: Executive Assistant / Business Support Contractor (NZ Consultancy)
description:
Equinox Automation is a specialist engineering consultancy based in New Zealand. We support industrial and energy clients with safety-critical engineering, including fire and gas mapping, functional safety, instrumentation, control systems, and high-hazard facility work.

This is a serious professional services business. We are looking for a strong Executive Assistant / Business Support Contractor who wants ownership, responsibility, and long-term growth.

This is not a basic task-taker role.

We are looking for someone who can help the Managing Director stay organised, follow through on important actions, support business development activity, and reduce day-to-day admin pressure.

The right person will create structure, improve processes, and make the founder's life easier.

The Core Role

The initial focus will be:
• Email and inbox management
• Calendar management, scheduling, reminders, and follow-ups
• Accounts payable admin, including supplier invoices, approvals, payment preparation, and expense records
• Invoicing admin, including preparing draft invoice information, tracking invoice status, and following up required internal actions
• HubSpot CRM updates, contact management, lead tracking, and follow-up support
• LinkedIn client research, prospect list building, and support for LinkedIn marketing strategy execution
• Business development admin, including tracking outreach, client follow-ups, and proposal actions
• Personal admin support for the Managing Director, including appointments, travel, client gifts, reminders, and general organisation
• Project admin tasks
• Process, workflow and SOP creation
• Critical to support the Managing Director in staying organised, focused, and accountable
• More tasks added as role and hours grows.

Who This Role Suits
This role suits someone who:
• Takes initiative and solves problems before being asked
• Creates structure where things are messy or unclear
• Can turn messy ideas into clear actions
• Follows through and does not disappear when things get difficult
• Communicates clearly in written and spoken English
• Is highly organised, reliable, discreet, and detail-focused
• Is comfortable working with a busy founder who moves quickly
• Can work independently without needing constant supervision
• Looks for ways to save time, improve systems, and reduce mental load for the managing director

The right person will think:
"What can I do to make the founder's life and business easier?"

Not:
"What task am I waiting for next?"

Requirements
• Minimum 3-5 years' experience as an Executive Assistant, Senior Executive Assistant, or senior founder support professional
• Strong written and spoken English
• Confident with Microsoft 365, Outlook, Word, Excel, Teams, SharePoint, HubSpot, LinkedIn, and online tools
• Experience with inbox management, CRM updates, LinkedIn research, invoicing admin, accounts payable admin, and founder support is preferred
• Canva skills would be an advantage for simple business graphics, document formatting, LinkedIn content support, and basic marketing collateral
• Comfortable operating as an independent contractor
• Must be available to work during 1:00pm to 5:00pm New Zealand time

Engagement Details
• Remote contractor role
• 20 hours per week initially
• Core working window: 1:00pm to 5:00pm New Zealand time, Monday to Friday
• Opportunity to grow into full-time for a high-quality candidate
• Long-term role based on performance, trust, and business growth
• Contractor rate is negotiable based on skill, experience, and capability
• Contractor is responsible for their own taxes, equipment, internet, statutory obligations, and work setup

How to Apply
To be considered, please send:
1.  Your CV
2.  A short cover letter explaining your relevant experience
3.  A custom 60-second video explaining why we should hire you for this specific role
4.  Answers to the screening questions below

Generic or reused videos will not be accepted. The video must be specific to this role and show that you understand the type of support required.

Applications that do not include both the custom video and answers to the screening questions will not be reviewed.

To show that you read this full advert, include the phrase "organized operator" at the beginning of your application.

Applications close Monday 15 June at 12:00pm NZST.

Screening Questions
Please answer the following:
1.  Tell me briefly about yourself and your current work situation.
2.  Tell me about your experience as an Executive Assistant or Senior Executive Assistant.
3.  Have you directly supported a founder, CEO, Managing Director, or business owner before? If yes, what did you help them with?
4.  How comfortable are you speaking English on phone calls with vendors, suppliers, clients, or service providers?
5.  What tools have you used? Please include Microsoft 365, Outlook, Word, Excel, Teams, SharePoint, HubSpot, LinkedIn, Canva, task management tools, or similar systems.
6.  Tell me about your experience managing inboxes, calendars, reminders, and follow-ups.
7.  Tell me about your experience with accounts payable, invoicing admin, expenses, or basic finance admin.
8.  Have you supported LinkedIn research, CRM updates, lead tracking, or marketing/admin activity before? If yes, explain what you did.
9.  Tell me about a time you created structure, improved a process, or made things easier for a founder or manager.
10.  Tell me about a time you solved a problem before your boss or client noticed it.
11.  How would you help keep a busy founder organised, focused, and accountable?
12.  This role requires initiative, follow-through, and ownership. Give an example of when you took ownership without being asked.
13.  What is your expected contractor hourly rate in PHP? Please provide your all-in hourly rate.
14.  Are you looking for a long-term role that can grow from 20 hours per week into full-time if the fit and performance are strong?

title: Executive Assistant
description:
We only accept applicants who will apply via this link:
 ---------- 


Executive Assistant
About iSono Health Inc.

iSono Health is a dynamic and rapidly growing early clinical-commercial stage medical device company dedicated to saving lives and transforming care through innovative robotics, AI, and 3D ultrasound technologies. 

At iSono Health, we're pioneering a new era of breast care. We believe every woman deserves access to fast, affordable, and comfortable screenings. That's why we developed ATUSA, the world's first AI-powered platform with a point-of-care, automated 3D ultrasound system.

To succeed here, you need to think like an entrepreneur, act like a leader, and execute with precision. We value individuals who take initiative, embrace challenges, and are excited to wear multiple hats. Creativity, resilience, and a commitment to excellence are essential as we push the boundaries of what’s possible in healthcare.

Our work is exciting because it’s meaningful. Together, we’re empowering women to take control of their health by expanding access to potentially lifesaving ultrasound technology. If you’re passionate about making a difference and ready to be part of a nimble, scrappy team that values impact over hierarchy, iSono Health is the place for you.

At iSono Health, success isn’t just about the work—it’s about the mindset. We’re a small but mighty team of dedicated individuals driven by a shared mission: revolutionizing women’s health and making a profound impact for patients and clinicians. With big ambitions and innovative plans, we thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment where every team member owns what they build.

Join us in transforming healthcare and be part of a team where every voice matters, every idea counts, and every action contributes to a greater purpose.

About the role: Remote in Pacific Timezone (PT)

The Executive Assistant will provide critical support to our CEO and executive team while also gaining hands-on experience in startup building, product launch and marketing initiatives. This role is perfect for an organized, highly energized, A-player, detail-oriented individual with a passion for health technology and a drive to make a difference in people’s lives and in an organization. You serve as a vital force multiplier for a team accelerating toward next financing round closure and global commercial expansion. Moving beyond mere calendar management, you proactively anticipate organizational needs, safeguarding the CEO's bandwidth as our most critical asset. From investor relations to clinical partnership logistics, you execute across functions with absolute poise and precision.

If you need to be told what to do next, this isn't your role. If you thrive on context-switching, operate with discretion, and take ownership of outcomes, read on.



EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT ASSIGNMENTS:

Provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO and other executives.
Own CEO calendars, manages priorities, scheduling meetings, travel arrangements, and itineraries. Anticipate needs 2–3 steps ahead; resolve problems before they surface.
communication, including phone calls, emails, and correspondence.
Prepare presentations and reports for meetings and executive reviews.
Organize and maintain filing systems (both physical and digital).
Manage office logistics and ensure smooth day-to-day operations.
Possess excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
Demonstrate strong organizational and time management skills.
Maintain a high level of discretion and professionalism across personnel, legal, and financial matters
Prepare materials for meetings, board reviews, and executive presentations


MARKETING, INVESTORS, INTERNAL OPERATIONS AND OTHER ASSIGNMENTS:

Assist the team with developing and implementing marketing campaigns.
Conduct market research and competitor analysis.
Create social media content (posts, graphics, etc.) to promote iSono Health's technology.
Support with content creation for website and marketing materials.
Manage and analyze social media engagement metrics.
Assist with event planning and execution (trade shows, conferences).
Strong written and verbal communication skills.
Creative and resourceful with an eagerness to learn.
Proficient in social media platforms and basic graphic design tools (a plus).
Support active fundraising: track investor pipeline, coordinate follow-ups, manage document flow.
Manage data room access, NDA execution, and due diligence document requests.
Coordinate scheduling and logistics for investor meetings, partner calls, and clinical site visits.
WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
 3+ years supporting a C-suite executive, startup or high-growth environment strongly preferred.
Unnervingly organized. You live by systems, not good intentions.
Exceptional written communication — you can refine an investor email or draft a LinkedIn post without hand-holding.
Strong confidentiality, discretion and high integrity.
Comfortable in the room when it matters: investor calls, partner meetings, board prep.
Proficient with Google Workspace, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Canva or equivalent tools.
Startup-ready: you don't wait for the process you build it.
Discreet, grounded, and unflappable under pressure.
Genuine interest in women's health, healthcare technology, or mission-driven work.
Proactive and positive attitude to work independently and initiate and complete projects.
Medical device or life sciences experience is a meaningful plus.
Strong project management skills is required.


WHO WE ARE

iSono Health is building the future of breast care. Our platform, ATUSA,  is the world's first wearable, AI-powered, automated 3D breast ultrasound system. FDA-cleared, clinically deployed across 14+ sites, and designed to make high-quality breast imaging accessible to every woman, everywhere.



We're a small, high-conviction team. We move fast, make decisions with data, and hold ourselves to a high standard, because the stakes are real. Breast cancer affects 1 in 8 women. Early detection saves lives. That's not a tagline. That's the work.



We're at an inflection point: Series A in process, clinical traction growing, and a product roadmap that extends well beyond one generation. The person in this role will have a front-row seat, and real responsibility, in what comes next.

We only accept applicants who will apply via this link:
 ----------

title: Frond End Developer
description:
We are looking for a Frontend Developer to join our team and help build and
maintain two core web products:

1. User-facing web service
Event pages, game lobbies, attendance, transactions, my-page, and more.

2. Internal admin dashboard
Analytics & monitoring, member management, coupon management, content management, and more.

You will own features end-to-end — from API integration to production
deployment — and work closely with backend engineers and designers.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
RESPONSIBILITIES
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Develop and maintain user-facing pages and admin dashboard UIs
- Integrate REST APIs and manage server/client state efficiently
- Design reusable, accessible component architecture
- Participate in code reviews and continuously improve code quality
- Contribute to the full development lifecycle: planning ? dev ? deploy

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LANGUAGE & FRAMEWORK
- TypeScript (strong typing, no any abuse)
- Next.js (App Router or Pages Router, real-world project experience)
- React 18+ (hooks, performance optimization, composition patterns)

STYLING
- Tailwind CSS (production experience)
- Conditional class handling with clsx / tailwind-merge

STATE MANAGEMENT
- TanStack Query v5 — server state, caching, pagination, mutations
- Zustand (or equivalent client-side state manager)

FORMS & VALIDATION
- React Hook Form + Zod — schema-driven form design and validation

UI COMPONENTS
- Radix UI or any Headless UI library — accessible, composable components

TOOLING & COLLABORATION
- pnpm package manager
- Git-based workflow, pull request reviews

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TECH STACK
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Frontend Next.js 15–16 / React 19 / TypeScript 5
Styling Tailwind CSS 4 / Radix UI / Framer Motion
Server State TanStack Query v5
Client State Zustand
Forms React Hook Form / Zod
Tables TanStack Table v8 / TanStack Virtual
Charts Recharts
Misc nuqs / date-fns / dayjs / Swiper / Sonner
Tooling pnpm / ESLint / PM2 / Playwright

Backend NestJS 10 / Prisma 7 / MySQL / MongoDB / RabbitMQ
Cloud AWS S3 / DynamoDB / Secrets Manager

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- You design components with clear boundaries and reusability in mind
- You can read an API spec, define your own DTO types, and handle
the full integration without hand-holding
- You have shipped data-heavy B2B UIs (dashboards, admin panels, tables)
- You are comfortable making decisions when requirements are ambiguous
- You give and receive code review feedback constructively

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
WHO MAY NOT BE A GOOD FIT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Heavy reliance on any / type casting to silence TypeScript
- Unable to build basic layouts without a pre-built component library
- Prioritizing "it works" over maintainability and readability

title: Sales Appointment Setter — Commercial Cleaning — Brisbane Australia (Part Time, Work From Home)
description:
We are a growing commercial cleaning company based in Brisbane, Australia called Elevate Cleaning Co. We clean offices, strata buildings, childcare centres, schools and construction sites across Queensland and we are looking for a motivated appointment setter to help us build our client pipeline.
This is a part time work from home role with flexible hours but you must be available during Australian business hours — 9am to 5pm AEST Monday to Friday as you will be contacting Australian businesses by phone and email.

What You Will Be Doing Every Day:
Sending personalised cold emails to business decision makers in Brisbane using templates we provide. Making outbound phone calls to property managers, strata managers, facilities managers and builders to introduce our services and book appointments. Sending LinkedIn connection requests and follow up messages to decision makers. Following up on all previous outreach using our follow up sequences. Adding new prospects to our pipeline spreadsheet daily. Sending an end of day report to the business owner every afternoon.

This Role Is Perfect For You If:
You have experience in cold calling or outbound sales support. Your spoken and written English is excellent — you are confident, clear and professional on the phone. You are highly organised and can manage a spreadsheet and follow a daily system without being micromanaged. You are motivated by results and excited by the opportunity to earn commissions on top of your base pay. You have a reliable internet connection and a quiet place to work.

Pay Structure:
Base pay: $3.79 USD per hour for 3 hours per day Monday to Friday.
Commission on top of base pay — this is where you can significantly increase your earnings:
Every confirmed site inspection you book with a decision maker — $5 USD bonus paid that week.
Every site inspection that converts to a signed cleaning contract — $40 USD bonus paid that month.

We pay weekly via Wise or direct bank transfer. We always pay on time without exception.

To Apply:
Please send us a voice recording of yourself reading the following script so we can hear your English and phone manner:

"Hi, my name is [your name] and I'm calling on behalf of Luke at Elevate Cleaning Co in Brisbane Australia. We're a commercial cleaning company and I'm reaching out to see if you'd be open to a quick conversation about your cleaning requirements. Do you have two minutes?"
Along with your voice recording please include a short paragraph telling us about any previous sales, outreach or appointment setting experience you have had.
Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant for Growing Marketing Agency (GHL / CRM Experience)
description:
About Us

We are an Australian marketing and AI growth agency. We are lead generation experts who incorporate AI driven systems to boost gym growth and profitability. We work with gym and fitness studio owners, building campaigns, automations, and client systems on GoHighLevel (GHL) that help our clients get more leads, more reviews, and more reactivated members.
We are growing fast and we are looking for a Virtual Assistant who wants to grow with us. This is not a place to sit on the sidelines. We want someone who takes ownership, works well inside a team, and genuinely cares about making our clients' lives easier. If you do great work, you will be rewarded for it and you will grow as the agency grows.

What You Will Be Doing

The majority of your work will be messaging. You will be communicating with customers and leads on behalf of our clients, which means your written English needs to be proficient and professional. Clear, natural, well written messages are at the core of this role.
Alongside the messaging, you will help manage client workflows and automations, handle customer service tasks, and keep our systems running smoothly so nothing slips through the cracks. Over time, the right person will take on more responsibility and become a core part of how we operate.

The Schedule

This is a full time role, 4 days a week, made up of 4 x 10 hour days. You must be available to work weekends. Please only apply if this schedule works for you long term.
What We Are Looking For
Proficient written English. This is essential. The majority of your work is messaging, so clear, professional, natural sounding communication is non negotiable.
Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) or another CRM. If you have built workflows, managed pipelines, or worked inside a CRM before, tell us about it.
A background in customer service or messaging. You understand how to talk to people, stay calm, and keep conversations moving.
Stable, reliable internet. This is essential. We need you online and dependable during your working hours.
Reliability and availability. We are looking for someone who can commit to consistent hours, including weekends, without heavy outside responsibilities pulling them away. This is about being dependable for the long term.

How to Apply

Please copy the questions below into your application and answer each one. Applications that do not answer these questions will not be considered.

1. Tell us about your experience with GoHighLevel or any other CRM. What have you built or managed inside it?
2. Describe your background in customer service or messaging. What kind of customers or conversations have you handled?
3. Why do you want to join a growing marketing agency, and what does growing with a company mean to you?
4. Attach a screenshot of an internet speed test taken from where you will be working.
5. This role is 4 x 10 hour days per week and requires weekend availability. Does this schedule work for you long term? Please confirm.
6. Do you currently have any major outside commitments that could affect your availability or reliability, such as caring for young children, caring for a family member or loved one, or a second job? Please be honest. We are simply making sure the role is a good fit for both sides.
7. What are your available working hours in your local time and your time zone?

We read every application properly, so take your time and put your best foot forward. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Integration Engineer
description:
# API Integration & Web Scraping Engineer (Contract)

## About the Project

We are building an AI-powered platform focused on healthcare and real estate intelligence. We are seeking an experienced API Integration & Web Scraping Engineer to help connect multiple real estate listing platforms, aggregate property data, and build reliable data pipelines that support AI-driven search and recommendation capabilities.

## Responsibilities

- Research and integrate APIs from major real estate listing platforms
- Design and implement scalable data ingestion pipelines
- Build and maintain web scrapers where APIs are unavailable or limited
- Normalize and structure property data from multiple sources
- Create automated processes for syncing listings and updates
- Handle authentication, rate limits, and API management
- Ensure data quality, accuracy, and reliability
- Work closely with product and AI teams to support data requirements
- Document integrations and technical architecture

## Required Experience

- 3+ years of software engineering experience
- Strong experience integrating third-party APIs
- Experience working with real estate data platforms
- Experience building web scrapers using tools such as:
  - Python
  - BeautifulSoup
  - Scrapy
  - Selenium
  - Playwright
- Experience working with REST APIs and GraphQL APIs
- Strong understanding of data extraction, transformation, and loading (ETL)
- Experience with databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or MongoDB
- Ability to troubleshoot and maintain production integrations

## Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with MLS integrations
- Experience working with property listing platforms
- Experience with geospatial/location data
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
- Experience with AI or recommendation systems
- Startup experience

## Deliverables

- Complete integration strategy for targeted real estate platforms
- API connectivity and authentication setup
- Web scraping framework for unsupported sources
- Unified property data model
- Automated synchronization process
- Technical documentation and deployment support

## Project Type

- Contract / Freelance
- Remote
- Potential for long-term engagement

## To Apply

Please provide:

1. Relevant API integration experience
2. Examples of web scraping projects
3. Real estate platform integration experience (if applicable)
4. Tech stack proficiency
5. Estimated hourly rate or project-based pricing
6. Availability and expected timeline

title: Expert SEO & Lead Generation Virtual Assistant (Remote)
description:
Please read carefully before applying: We are not looking for general administrative assistants, beginners, or agencies. We need a seasoned, autonomous SEO & Lead Generation Expert who has a proven track record of ranking websites on page one of Google and converting traffic into qualified leads. If you cannot provide verified case studies or proof of your results, please do not apply. We will test your knowledge during the interview process.

About Us
We are an established, fast-growing business ready to dominate our market. We don't have time to micromanage or train someone on the basics of SEO. We need a high-level specialist who can audit our current setup, build a winning strategy, and execute it flawlessly to flood our pipeline with high-quality leads.

Key Responsibilities
Your primary focus is to own our organic search strategy and build a predictable lead-generation machine.

Advanced Search Engine Optimization (SEO):

Perform comprehensive technical, on-page, and off-page SEO audits.

Conduct advanced keyword research focusing on high-intent buyer keywords.

Execute flawless on-page optimization (meta data, schema markup, site architecture).

Build high-quality, authoritative backlinks (no spammy PBNs or cheap directory links).

Monitor and fix technical issues (site speed, crawl errors, indexing issues).

Data-Driven Lead Generation:

Build targeted prospect lists based on our exact Ideal Client Profile (ICP).

Set up and manage cold outreach campaigns (via LinkedIn Sales Navigator, email, etc.) that actually convert.

Track key performance indicators (KPIs) like organic traffic growth, keyword rankings, and lead conversion rates, providing detailed weekly reports.

Required Skills & Qualifications
If you do not match all of these requirements, please do not reach out:

-Proven Track Record: Hands-on experience in SEO and B2B/B2C lead generation.

title: FP&A Analyst
description:
We are seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented FP&A Analyst to support finance operations within a fast-paced, data-driven, and high-performance environment.

The ideal candidate has hands-on experience in FP&A functions including budgeting, forecasting, financial analysis, management reporting, and variance analysis, combined with exposure to General Ledger (GL) accounting processes and strong technical/data skills such as SQL and reporting tools.

This role is ideal for finance professionals who are comfortable working cross-functionally, supporting leadership teams, analyzing large datasets, and translating financial data into actionable business insights.

Who This Role Is For

We are looking for professionals who thrive in:
• Fast-paced finance and shared services environments
• Data-driven and analytical organizations
• Cross-functional business teams
• Strategic finance and operational finance roles
• High-growth and process-oriented environments
• Roles requiring ownership, accountability, and problem-solving

Role Overview

The FP&A Analyst will support key finance and analytical functions including:
• Budgeting and forecasting
• Financial modeling and analysis
• Variance and trend analysis
• KPI and business performance reporting
• GL analysis and topside journal support
• Financial planning and operational finance support
• Executive and management reporting
• Data extraction and reporting analysis

Depending on business needs, the role may also support multi-entity reporting structures, operational finance initiatives, systems/process improvement, and ad hoc strategic analysis.

Key Responsibilities

Financial Planning & Forecasting
• Assist in preparing budgets, forecasts, and financial plans
• Support monthly, quarterly, and annual forecasting cycles
• Analyze actuals versus budget and forecast results
• Assist in operational, headcount, and expense planning
• Support scenario planning and forecasting model improvements

Financial Analysis & GL Support
• Perform variance, trend, profitability, and financial performance analysis
• Support GL analysis including topside entries, accrual review, and reconciliations
• Assist in month-end reporting and financial review processes
• Prepare executive-ready financial reports, dashboards, and management presentations
• Support KPI tracking and business performance reporting

Data Analytics & Reporting
• Utilize SQL for data extraction, manipulation, and reporting analysis
• Analyze large datasets and provide actionable insights
• Assist in building and improving dashboards and reporting tools
• Support finance reporting automation and process improvements
• Work with ERP and reporting systems to ensure data accuracy and reporting efficiency

Business Partnership & Cross-Functional Support
• Partner closely with Accounting, Operations, HR, and leadership teams
• Support strategic decision-making through financial analysis and reporting
• Assist business units with budgeting and reporting requirements
• Support ad hoc analysis, projects, and process improvement initiatives

Required Qualifications
• Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field
• Minimum 3+ years of FP&A, financial analysis, corporate finance, or related finance experience
• Strong experience in budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis
• Exposure to GL accounting processes, reconciliations, accruals, or month-end close
• Hands-on SQL experience for data extraction and reporting analysis
• Advanced Microsoft Excel skills
• Experience with ERP systems, finance systems, and reporting tools
• Strong analytical, problem-solving, and financial modeling abilities
• Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills
• Strong written and verbal communication skills
• Ability to work independently and manage deadlines effectively

Preferred Qualifications
• Experience supporting US-based companies or offshore/shared services environments
• Experience in SaaS, technology, BPO, or high-growth environments
• Exposure to multi-entity finance operations
• Experience with Power BI, Tableau, Power Query, VBA, or similar reporting/analytics tools
• Experience with Workday Adaptive, Hyperion, SAP BPC, or similar FP&A systems is highly preferred
• CPA, CFA, MBA, or equivalent certifications are an advantage
• Experience working cross-functionally with leadership teams is preferred

Application Instructions

To be considered for this position, please submit the following:
• Your application letter
• Unrestricted link to your updated resume/CV

Subject Line:
FPAA – YOUR FULL NAME

Only applicants who meet the required qualifications will be contacted.

title: AI/ML Platform Engineer (Work With Lead AI Engineer)
description:
About Us  
We are building a next-generation AI platform and workflow system for law firms and medical clinics and are looking for a strong AI/ML Engineer to work alongside our existing lead AI engineer. You will help design, build, and improve the core platform that powers our internal tools and end-user experience.

Important – Location  
- **Philippines-based applicants only**  
- Full-time, remote  

Compensation  
- USD $1,500–$2,500 per month, depending on experience and fit  

Important Note  
We are also hiring a separate UI/front-end specialist whose main responsibility is to make the interface as cutting edge as the platform but also easy to use. This role can focus primarily on backend, AI workflows, and platform engineering rather than visual design.

Role Overview  
You will be a key contributor in a small, high-impact team, taking substantial ownership of features and infrastructure. You’ll collaborate closely with our lead AI engineer on architecture and patterns, sometimes assisting with complex components, but you’ll also be expected to work independently on well-defined projects from design through deployment.

Key Responsibilities  
- Design, implement, and maintain AI/ML services and workflows (agents, orchestration, data flows, integrations).  
- Collaborate with our lead AI engineer on system architecture and technical decisions.  
- Own end-to-end delivery of features: scoping, design, implementation, testing, deployment, and monitoring.  
- Integrate with APIs, databases, and internal tools to build reliable, scalable services.  
- Write clean, well-structured, well-documented code.  
- Participate in code reviews and help evolve our engineering standards.  
- Assist with debugging, performance tuning, and refactoring existing components when needed.

Nice to Have – Working With End Users  
- Ability and willingness to patiently guide non-technical users as they learn to use the platform.  
- Comfort running short demos, answering “how do I…” questions, and translating technical concepts into simple language.  
- Empathy for users who are new to AI systems and a desire to incorporate their feedback into product improvements.
- Our AI engineer works in the US time zone because that's when he can reach the end users.

Required Qualifications  
- Based in the Philippines and able to work full-time remotely.  
- Strong experience in Python or a similar language used for AI/ML and backend services.  
- Experience building or integrating with AI/ML systems (LLMs, agents, ML models, or MLOps/platform tools).  
- Solid understanding of software engineering fundamentals: testing, version control (Git), code reviews, and CI/CD.  
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization (Docker).  
- Comfortable working independently with clear ownership of deliverables.  
- Good written and spoken English; able to communicate clearly in async and live settings.

Preferred Qualifications  
- Experience with LLM frameworks or orchestration tools (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar agent frameworks).  
- Background in building internal tools, platforms, or developer-facing services.  
- Exposure to healthcare, legal, or other professional/regulated domains is a plus (not required).  
- Prior remote work experience with distributed teams.

Work Setup  
- Full-time, remote role (Philippines-based).  
- Work closely with our lead AI engineer and founder.  
- Long-term role with opportunities to grow into broader ownership and responsibility.

How to Apply  
Please send:  
- Your CV or OnlineJobs.ph / Upwork profile link  
- A short note describing one AI/ML or backend system you built or significantly contributed to  
- Links to any relevant GitHub repos, portfolios, or demos

title: US B2B Cold Caller | $5/hr Base + Bonuses + Commission | Track to Manager | 3 Openings
description:
Are you a confident communicator who wants a REAL career path, not just another calling job?

MSET LLC is a Phoenix-based marketing agency. We run paid ads, lead capture, and CRM automation for US service-based businesses (landscaping, glass repair, cleaning, moving). Our average client retainer is $1,000+/month with 12+ month retention. This is HIGH-TICKET B2B sales. Your bookings drive real revenue, not vanity meetings.

We are scaling our cold calling team and hiring 3 callers right now. The first one to consistently hit numbers AND coach others moves to the Appointment Setting Manager track within 6 months ($3,500+/month).


WHAT YOU WILL DO

- Make 80 dials/day to US contractors using our GoHighLevel + Twilio phone system (we provide the US number)
- Run BANT-qualified conversations using our proven outlines (not rigid scripts) to book qualified discovery calls
- Aggressively follow up every interested lead. Most B2B contractors need 3 to 7 touches before booking
- Keep meticulous records in GoHighLevel: call outcomes, callbacks scheduled, pipeline stages updated in real time
- Daily 15-minute team standup, weekly 1:1 with the founder
- Hit 2 qualified bookings per day after the 3-week ramp


COMPENSATION (paid weekly via Wise in USD)

After you pass the paid trial week:

- Base wage: $5/hour x 40 hrs/week = $800/month
- Show bonus: $15 per qualified appointment that actually attends
- Close commission: 10% of first-month retainer (~$100/close average)

REALISTIC MONTHLY EARNINGS:
- Solid tier (3 closes, 12 qualified shows): $1,280/month (~Php 74,200)
- Top tier (5 closes, 17 qualified shows): $1,555/month (~Php 90,200)
- Star tier (8 closes, 25 qualified shows): $1,975/month (~Php 114,500)

Earnings are UNCAPPED. Top performers move to Senior Caller (Month 4) and then Manager track (Month 6+) earning $3,500+/month (~Php 203,000+).


PAID TRIAL WEEK

- 5 working days (Monday to Friday) at $3/hr = $120 total
- Pass criteria: book 3+ qualified appointments by EOD Friday
- If you pass: we move you to the full role ($5/hr base, a 67% pay bump, plus bonuses + commission unlocked)
- If you fall short: we part ways with full trial pay and a clean handshake

Trial pay is intentionally lower than the full role so the only people who push hard during the trial are the ones who actually want the long-term role.


WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR (in priority order)

1. NATIVE-LEVEL AMERICAN ENGLISH ACCENT. Contractors must not be able to tell you are calling from overseas in the first 5 seconds. A voice sample is required with your application.

2. COACHABLE. We train you on everything: our outlines, GoHighLevel, the BANT framework, objection handling, and the US contractor world. Your ability to take feedback and improve weekly matters more than your prior experience.

3. CONFIDENT. On a cold call, tone wins the first 5 seconds. You sound like a peer professional, not a discount telemarketer.

4. HIGH PAIN TOLERANCE. Cold calling is brutal. You absorb 70+ rejections per day without losing  ---------- ntum.

5. DISCIPLINED + ORGANIZED. You hit dial volume daily without being micromanaged AND you keep ruthless records. Every callback scheduled, every "almost" lead followed up, nothing falls through the cracks.

BONUS POINTS (not required):
- Any sales experience: retail, real estate, insurance, D2C, B2B SDR, door-to-door
- US BPO experience (Concentrix, Teleperformance, Sutherland, Alorica, TaskUs)
- Lead scraping experience (Google Maps, Facebook, LinkedIn, Apollo)
- GoHighLevel familiarity
- BANT, MEDDIC, or CHAMP framework knowledge


WHAT YOU NEED

- Your own laptop (Mac or Windows, mid-range or better)
- Reliable home internet (10+ Mbps, wired preferred)
- Quiet workspace
- 18+ years old


WHAT WE PROVIDE

- Lead lists, ready to dial (we scrape + DNC-scrub before handing them over)
- US phone number via Twilio + all call and SMS costs covered
- GoHighLevel CRM access
- Cold call outlines + objection-handling playbook
- USB headset (we ship or reimburse)
- Direct training, weekly coaching, and direct founder access


HOURS

Full-time, 40 hours/week, Monday to Friday.

Best US calling windows: 7-9am, 11am-1pm, and 4-6pm local US time across Eastern, Central, Mountain, and Pacific zones. For Philippines callers, this maps to roughly 4pm to 8am Manila depending on which US zones you focus on. We will plan your exact window with you during onboarding.

Time tracking: we use Time Doctor on your machine starting Day 1 (standard for US-facing remote call teams). You are paid for tracked active time. Idle time pauses tracking automatically. This protects both of us and ensures fair, transparent pay.

Start date: ASAP.


HOW TO APPLY (all 4 items required)

Send your application to  ----------  with the subject line "Cold Caller Application - [Your Full Name]".

Include ALL four of the following or your application will not be reviewed:

1. 60-SECOND VOICE RECORDING of you pitching anything (a product, your last role, why we should hire you). Upload as an unlisted YouTube link, Google Drive audio, or Loom video. THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT ITEM.

2. A MEASURABLE METRIC you have improved over time (sales numbers, scores, fitness, anything you tracked and got better at).

3. YOUR WEEKLY PAY EXPECTATION in USD.

4. SCREENSHOT of your home internet speed test from speedtest.net.

NO BPO EXPERIENCE? If you have the voice and the grit but no formal BPO background, write "NO BPO BUT GRIT" at the top of your application. We will prioritize your review.


INTERVIEW PROCESS

1. Initial screen (24 to 48 hours): we review your voice sample and answers.
2. Live video interview (30 minutes via Google Meet) with the founder and tea ---------- mber.
3. Paid trial week.
4. Ongoing role: sign the IC Agreement and join the team.

First 30 complete applications will be reviewed within 48 hours. Apply now.

title: CUSTOMER SUPPORT SPECIALIST - SHOPIFY ECOMMERCE (REMOTE, LONG-TERM)
description:
CUSTOMER SERVICE SPECIALIST - ECOMMERCE (DROPSHIPPING)
Remote | Part-Time | 4-6 Hours Per Day | 7 Days a Week
$3-4 per hour (approximately PHP 209/hour) | Growth opportunities for long-term contributors

-------------------------

This is a long-term role. We are not looking for someone for one month. We want someone we can grow with, give more responsibility to, and pay more over time. Our existing CS team has been with us for years, and we want the same for this new hire.

-------------------------

ABOUT THE ROLE

You will handle customer email tickets for our Shopify-based ecommerce dropshipping brand. That means working through an inbox of 80 to 100 tickets per shift in Gorgias: order status inquiries, cancellation requests, returns and refunds, damaged or lost package cases, and size or quality complaints. You will use our documented SOPs and reply macros to resolve cases consistently, professionally, and with care.

This is not a chat role, not a phone role, and not a social media role. It is email ticket handling in Gorgias, every day.

-------------------------

WHAT YOU WILL DO

- Reply to customer email tickets in Gorgias using our documented SOPs and reply macros
- Hit team KPIs on First Response Time (FRT) and resolution time
- Coordinate with our Supply Chain and Disputes teams when cases require handoff
- Process refunds, replacements, and partial refunds within the approved decision tree
- Escalate cases that fall outside policy to the CS Manager with a clear summary
- Flag products with recurring complaints to the Quality team on a weekly basis
- Keep clean notes on tickets so handoffs are seamless
-------------------------

WHAT YOU WILL HAVE FROM DAY 1

- A full Customer Support SOP covering every scenario you will encounter
- Gorgias reply macros for common situations (cancellations, RTS, damaged items, lost in transit, and more)
- A Risky Products SOP for weekly product quality reporting
- Direct access to the CS Manager for escalations and questions
- An existing CS team to learn from, not a brand new setup
You do not need to invent the playbook. We have built it. You need to execute it cleanly and consistently.

-------------------------

REQUIREMENTS

- Hands-on experience in ecommerce customer support, dropshipping customer support, OR Shopify-based CS (any combination works, dropshipping experience is a strong plus)
- Experience with Gorgias OR a comparable ticketing tool (Zendesk, Reamaze, Freshdesk). Direct Gorgias is preferred but we can train on it quickly if you have strong Zendesk experience.
- Comfort handling 80 to 100 tickets per shift without falling behind
- Strong written English: clear, empathetic, and professional
- Reliable internet and your own computer
Bonus (not required):
- Prior experience handling RTS (return-to-sender) situations
- Familiarity with chargebacks and dispute processes in dropshipping
- Prior experience with EU customers and their return expectations
-------------------------

SCHEDULE - READ THIS BEFORE APPLYING

This role is 7 days a week, every week. Our customers email every day including weekends and public holidays. If you cannot commit to working 7 days a week, please do not apply. We will not make exceptions, and applying anyway only wastes both our time.

You can flex your specific working hours within the day as long as tickets are handled within our FRT target.

-------------------------

COMPENSATION DETAILS

Paid weekly via Wise. Rate grows with performance and tenure, we promote from within for team leads and specialist roles.

-------------------------

HOW TO APPLY

Read this section carefully. Applications that do not follow these instructions will be rejected without review.

1. Put the word BAMBU in your subject line. Nothing else is required in the subject.
2. In your application message, answer these 4 questions in order. Answer each inline, no attachments, no Loom videos at this stage.
Q1. How long have you worked in ecommerce customer support, what kind of responsibilities did you have, and for what type of companies (dropshipping, DTC, marketplace, etc.)? Name the actual companies and your role there in detail.

Q2. Describe one difficult customer ticket you resolved. What was the issue, what did the customer want, and how did you handle it? Keep it specific.

Q3. What ticketing tools have you used (Gorgias, Zendesk, Reamaze, Freshdesk, etc.)? What ticket volume per shift have you typically handled, and what is the most you have ever handled in a shift?

Q4. Confirm your availability: hours per day, days per week (we need 7), and your working hours in your local timezone. Also confirm: are you currently employed, and if yes, what would your start date look like?

-------------------------

We read every application that follows the instructions. We are looking for one person for the long term, not a roster of temporary help.

title: AI-Assisted Full Stack Developer Laravel/Vue/Typescript
description:
Hello developers!

We're building a platform for freelancers, marketers, content creators and small businesses.

We're a small team that moves quickly, uses AI heavily, and focuses on delivering real business value rather than generating code for the sake of generating code.

We're looking for a developer who enjoys solving problems, learning new tools, and using AI as a force multiplier.

## What You'll Work On

* New platform features
* Payment and subscription systems
* AI integrations
* User management
* Community and learning features
* Internal automation tools
* API integrations
* Performance improvements
* Product improvements driven by user feedback

## Tech Stack

Backend:

* PHP
* Laravel
* MySQL

Frontend:

* Vue 3
* TypeScript
* Pinia
* Node

Infrastructure:

* Docker
* Linux
* Bitbucket Pipelines

AI Tools:

* Cursor
* ChatGPT
* Claude
* GitHub Copilot
* Any tools that improve delivery

## Important: AI Usage Is Expected

We are not looking for developers who avoid AI.

We actively encourage:

* Cursor
* ChatGPT
* Claude
* Code generation
* AI-assisted debugging
* AI-assisted testing
* AI-assisted documentation

We care about results, quality, ownership, and delivery speed.

We do not care how many lines you type manually.

## What We're Looking For

You:

* Can work independently
* Take ownership of tasks
* Ask good questions
* Propose solutions instead of waiting for instructions
* Are comfortable learning unfamiliar things
* Use AI effectively
* Can explain technical decisions
* Care about maintainable code

Bonus:

* Experience with Vue 3
* Experience with TypeScript
* Experience with Docker
* Experience with payment systems
* Experience with AI APIs

## What We Value

Much more important than years of experience:

* Problem solving
* Initiative
* Reliability
* Curiosity
* Communication
* Ability to learn quickly

A developer with 2 years of experience who uses AI effectively and solves problems independently is often a better fit for us than a developer with 10 years of experience who needs constant direction.

## What We Don't Want

This role is probably not for you if:

* You dislike AI tools
* You avoid learning new technologies
* You need detailed step-by-step instructions for every task
* You only work within a very narrow technical area
* You are looking for a large corporate environment

## Selection Process

Instead of algorithm puzzles or LeetCode tests, shortlisted candidates will complete a small real-world task similar to the work we do every day.

We're interested in:

* Your thinking process
* How you use AI tools
* Code quality
* Decision making
* Communication

## To Apply

Please send:

1. A short introduction
2. Your hourly rate
3. Technologies you're strongest in
4. Which AI tools you use
5. A brief example of how AI has improved your workflow
6. Links to GitHub, portfolio, or relevant projects


PS: We receive a lot of quick applications from people not even reading the description. Please, use my name in your greeting, otherwise we will not respond to candidates who don't really know what they are applying for.

Starting day: 1st of July (or later upon agreement)

Thanks!
Peter

title: Financial Operations Associate - Digital & Traditional Assets
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically capable Financial Operations Associate to join our growing team. This mid-level role sits at the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets, supporting portfolio execution, custody management, banking operations, and AI-powered tooling — with occasional direct engagement with high-net-worth and family office clients.

Key Responsibilities
Crypto & Digital Asset Management
Execute cryptocurrency trades across centralised and decentralised exchanges with precision and minimal slippage
Manage cold wallet storage and custody protocols, ensuring best-practice security standards (hardware wallets, multi-sig setups, key management)
Monitor on-chain positions and reconcile digital asset holdings

Traditional Market Trading
Execute trades across stocks, bonds, and ETFs on behalf of the portfolio
Maintain accurate records of positions, rebalancing activity, and transaction costs
Support portfolio reporting and performance attribution

Banking & Funds Management
Manage day-to-day bank account operations including wire transfers, reconciliations, and liquidity management
Coordinate with banking partners and custodians to ensure smooth fund flows
Maintain accurate records in compliance with internal controls

AI Tools Support
Operate and troubleshoot existing AI-powered tools used in research, operations, or client reporting
Collaborate with developers or vendors to support the further development and iteration of these tools
Identify automation opportunities within operational workflows

Client Engagement
Communicate professionally with high-net-worth individuals and family office representatives as required
Prepare and present clear, accurate reports and summaries for client review
Respond to client queries regarding portfolio activity and operational matters


Qualifications & Experience
3–6 years of experience in financial services, fintech, or a family office environment
Hands-on experience with cryptocurrency trading and cold wallet / custody management (non-negotiable)
Demonstrated experience executing trades in stocks, bonds, and/or ETFs
Familiarity with AI productivity tools (e.g. LLM-based platforms, workflow automation) and an aptitude for working alongside their continued development
Experience in banking operations, treasury, or fund administration
Excellent attention to detail and a strong sense of operational discipline

Licensing & Compliance
Relevant securities or financial advisory licence preferred (e.g. Stockbroker or CFA is a plus)
Willingness to obtain required licensing where not already held
Demonstrated understanding of AML/KYC requirements and compliance best practices

Personal Attributes
Trustworthy and discreet — comfortable handling sensitive financial information
Strong written and verbal communication in English
Self-directed and reliable in a remote working environment
Curious about technology and financial innovation

Compensation
Competitive, commensurate with experience and location. Details discussed during the interview process.

title: General Accountant
description:
An Accounting Generalist handles a company's day-to-day financial operations. They are responsible for processing payroll, managing accounts payable and receivable, reconciling bank statements, and maintaining the general ledger, to say the least. The role ensures all financial transactions are accurately recorded and compliant with local tax laws and regulations.

Core Responsibilities
• Accounts Payable & Receivable: Process vendor bills, issue payments, monitor collections to maintain healthy cash flow.
• Reconciliation: Perform daily and monthly reconciliations of bank statements, credit cards, and petty cash accounts to ensure zero discrepancies.
• Payroll: Handle end-to-end payroll processing for employees, ensuring accuracy and compliance with local labor laws and tax regulations, Monitor employee lates, absences, holidays and deductions.
• Taxation: Prepare and assist in filing tax returns including withholding taxes, VAT, and income tax and assist in maintaining BIR Tax compliance and related documentation.
• QuickBooks Management: Maintain and manage company’s general ledger in QuickBooks or QuickBooks Online, organized records through chart of accounts, classes, and locations.
• Financial Reporting: Prepare accurate and timely weekly report, monthly financial statements, and annual financial reports, generate profit and loss, balance sheets, and cash flow reports.
• Liquidation & Audits: Reconcile cash advances and liquidation reports, monitor expense liquidation and supporting documents, and prepare accounting records for internal or external audits.
• Commission & Purchasing: Calculate sales commissions accurately, match vendor invoices with purchase orders, and verify pricing agreements.
• Create and improve accounting processes and interna controls
• Develop Standard Operating Procedure (SOPs) for accounting-related concerns
• Establish process flow for all cash requests and financial approvals
• Maintain organized accounting records and documentation
• Perform such other functions authorized by the Management.

Qualifications:
• Education: Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (or equivalent proven experience).
• Software Proficiency: Advanced, certified proficiency in QuickBooks or any related software and strong working knowledge of Microsoft Excel.
• Math Skills: Strong capability to apply financial formulas, specifically calculating percentages and commissions 
• Experience: 1-3 years of hands-on, full-cycle bookkeeping or accounting experience.

Skills:
• Goal-oriented, self-motivated, and proactive.
• Strong problem-solving and consultative skills.
• Ability to work independently and collaboratively.
• Exceptional attention to detail: high accuracy in data entry, auditing, and detecting financial discrepancies.
• Strong organizational, communication and presentation skills
• Ability to handle sensitive financial information with strict confidentiality.
