title: Virtual Assistant for Growing Marketing Agency (GHL / CRM Experience)
description:
About Us

We are an Australian marketing and AI growth agency. We are lead generation experts who incorporate AI driven systems to boost gym growth and profitability. We work with gym and fitness studio owners, building campaigns, automations, and client systems on GoHighLevel (GHL) that help our clients get more leads, more reviews, and more reactivated members.
We are growing fast and we are looking for a Virtual Assistant who wants to grow with us. This is not a place to sit on the sidelines. We want someone who takes ownership, works well inside a team, and genuinely cares about making our clients' lives easier. If you do great work, you will be rewarded for it and you will grow as the agency grows.

What You Will Be Doing

The majority of your work will be messaging. You will be communicating with customers and leads on behalf of our clients, which means your written English needs to be proficient and professional. Clear, natural, well written messages are at the core of this role.
Alongside the messaging, you will help manage client workflows and automations, handle customer service tasks, and keep our systems running smoothly so nothing slips through the cracks. Over time, the right person will take on more responsibility and become a core part of how we operate.

The Schedule

This is a full time role, 6 days a week, made up of 6 x 8 hour days. You must be available to work weekends. Please only apply if this schedule works for you long term.
What We Are Looking For
Proficient written English. This is essential. The majority of your work is messaging, so clear, professional, natural sounding communication is non negotiable.
Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) or another CRM. If you have built workflows, managed pipelines, or worked inside a CRM before, tell us about it.
A background in customer service or messaging. You understand how to talk to people, stay calm, and keep conversations moving.
Stable, reliable internet. This is essential. We need you online and dependable during your working hours.
Reliability and availability. We are looking for someone who can commit to consistent hours, including weekends, without heavy outside responsibilities pulling them away. This is about being dependable for the long term.

How to Apply

Please copy the questions below into your application and answer each one. Applications that do not answer these questions will not be considered.

1. Tell us about your experience with GoHighLevel or any other CRM. What have you built or managed inside it?
2. Describe your background in customer service or messaging. What kind of customers or conversations have you handled?
3. Why do you want to join a growing marketing agency, and what does growing with a company mean to you?
4. Attach a screenshot of an internet speed test taken from where you will be working.
5. This role is 6 x 8 hour days per week and requires weekend availability. Does this schedule work for you long term? Please confirm.
6. Do you currently have any major outside commitments that could affect your availability or reliability, such as caring for young children, caring for a family member or loved one, or a second job? Please be honest. We are simply making sure the role is a good fit for both sides.
7. What are your available working hours in your local time and your time zone?

We read every application properly, so take your time and put your best foot forward. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Full-Time Filipino Technical VA / Developer
description:
We are  a fast-growing Australian marketing & automation company specialising in the fitness industry. We are looking for a highly experienced Technical VA / Developer who can build and manage advanced systems across APIs, automations, AI agents, and CRM workflows.

This is a senior technical role — ideal for someone with strong engineering experience, not an entry-level VA.

???? ROLE OVERVIEW

You will be responsible for architecting, building, and maintaining technical systems used by our company and our gym clients. Work includes:

Custom API integrations and data pipelines

Developing multi-step automations using Zapier, Pipedream,  ---------- , or n8n

Integrating booking systems, e-commerce, payment gateways, and CRMs

Managing GoHighLevel workflows and API-driven processes

Setting up, configuring, and maintaining AI Receptionists & IVR systems

Working with Synthflow, Vapi, Twilio, and similar AI voice/telephony tools

Debugging errors, monitoring automations, and ensuring reliability

Strong English communication is required because you may occasionally respond to client messages or join internal discussions.

???? REQUIRED TECHNICAL SKILLS (MUST HAVE)
API & Webhook Development

? Building custom API calls (GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE)
? JSON transformation & validation
? OAuth2, API keys, bearer token authentication
? Webhooks (setup, testing, error handling)
? Postman / Pipedream / Thunder Client for testing
? Understanding of rate limits, retries, and timeout logic

Automation & Integration Tools

? Zapier (advanced) – custom actions, code steps, API calls
? Pipedream (advanced) – Node.js workflows, custom integrations
? Experience with  ---------- , n8n, Airtable, or similar platforms
? Connecting multiple systems through custom logic

Coding

? JavaScript (Node.js preferred)
? Python (bonus)
? Regex for pattern matching & data cleaning
? Writing backend-like scripts for automation logic

Go High Level (GHL)

? GHL API integrations (REST API v2)
? Workflow automations + triggers
? CRM object management & custom field logic
? Webhook-driven event handling

???? AI RECEPTIONIST / IVR SYSTEM EXPERIENCE (REQUIRED)

The successful applicant MUST HAVE experience in:

AI Agents & Voice Systems

? Synthflow – building agents, flows, prompt logic, testing
? AI Receptionists & IVR routing setup
? Twilio number setup, SIP routing, fallback logic
? Voice workflows, call flows, menu branching
? Handling handoffs between live staff and AI systems
? Debugging telephony errors
? Understanding latency, voice model behaviour & call reliability

Vapi / Similar Tools (bonus but highly valued)

? Creating conversation workflows
? Customizing behaviour using system prompts
? Multi-agent setups and agent-to-agent transfer logic

If the applicant has no prior experience with AI receptionists or Synthflow, they will not be suitable for this role.

? OTHER REQUIREMENTS

Excellent English (written + spoken)

Available full-time (40 hours/week)

Must work during Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

Reliable internet + backup connection

Strong problem-solving and technical documentation skills

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

???? BONUS EXPERIENCE (Not Required, But Appreciated)

Experience with Mindbody,  ---------- nce, Glofox, Hapana, Shopify, Stripe APIs

Serverless deployments (Lambda, Vercel, Cloudflare)

Building dashboards or internal tools

Data engineering or ETL workflow experience

???? COMPENSATION

Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

Stable, long-term position

Growth opportunities into senior technical architect role

???? HOW TO APPLY

Please send the following:

A short introduction about you

Proof of previous API / automation / AI receptionist work

Examples of Zapier or Pipedream workflows you’ve built

Details of any Synthflow, Twilio, Vapi, or IVR experience

Your expected monthly salary (PHP)

Confirmation you are available 40 hrs/week in AU hours

title: Client Operations Manager
description:
ABOUT MANZANO CREATIVE
Manzano Creative is a Canadian content and Meta advertising agency based in Winnipeg, Manitoba. We help service-based businesses — dental clinics, home service companies, and contractors — generate consistent leads through video content and Meta ad campaigns.
We run multiple productions per week, manage active campaigns across multiple clients, and operate as a tight-knit remote team. Our systems run on Slack, Notion, Google Drive, and Meta Ads Manager.

WHAT THIS ROLE IS
We are looking for a Client Operations Manager — someone who wants to grow into a core role inside a fast-moving creative agency.
You will be the main point of contact for our clients. You will manage their campaigns, write their ad copy, keep them informed, and make sure they feel taken care of every single day.
We are not looking for someone who has done everything before. We are looking for someone who is eager to learn, communicates clearly, takes ownership, and genuinely wants to grow with us. We have built out full systems and SOPs for this role — you will be trained on everything.
If you are organised, people-facing, creative, and ready to take on real responsibility — this could be the opportunity you have been looking for.

WHAT YOU WILL OWN
Client Communication

First point of contact for every client from the  ---------- nt they sign
Monday check-in messages and consistent ongoing communication
Answering client questions and keeping them informed and confident
Coordinating shoot days and delivering content for client review
Monthly performance reporting and results walkthroughs

Campaign Management

Setting up and monitoring Meta ad campaigns
Creating lead forms inside Meta Ads Manager
Flagging performance issues and making optimization suggestions
Ensuring CRM connections and automations are working correctly

Copywriting & Ad Creative

Writing ad scripts for paid ads and nurture videos
Writing primary text and headlines for Meta campaigns
Using AI tools to help generate and refine copy


WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Strong written English — clear, warm, and professional
Organised and able to manage multiple clients and priorities at once
Comfortable communicating directly with clients on a daily basis
Able to work independently and take initiative without constant supervision
Willing to learn new tools and systems — we will train you on everything
Reliable internet connection and consistent availability during agreed hours
Comfortable attending weekly tea ---------- etings via video call

Nice to have but not required:

Any experience with Meta Ads Manager or Facebook advertising
Familiarity with tools like Slack, Notion, or Google Drive
Any background in marketing, copywriting, or client management
Experience using AI tools like Claude or ChatGPT


WHO THRIVES IN THIS ROLE
You are a people person who loves staying organised and keeping things moving. You communicate proactively — you do not wait to be told what to do next. You are excited to learn something new and apply it immediately. You take ownership of your work and genuinely care about doing a good job. You want to be part of a team that is building something real.

WHO THIS IS NOT FOR
If you are looking for a simple task-based role with minimal responsibility — this is not the right fit. This role grows with you and we expect you to grow with it.

GROWTH OPPORTUNITY
This role has genuine room to grow in scope and compensation as the agency scales. We are building a team of operators — not a team of assistants. The right person will have long-term runway here and will become a core part of what Manzano Creative is building.

HOW TO APPLY
To be considered please include the following in your application:

A brief introduction — who you are, your background, and why this role interests you
A short paragraph on how you stay organised when managing multiple tasks or priorities
Your current availability and time zone
A short video introduction (2-3 minutes) — record yourself explaining why you are a good fit for Manzano Creative. Tell us what draws you to this type of work and what you are hoping to grow into. We are looking for clear communication, genuine interest, and good energy — not a polished production.

To apply send your application and video intro to:
????  ---------- 
Applications without all of the above will not be reviewed.
We look forward to hearing from you.

title: CRM & Social Media Virtual Assistant — Mobile Luxury Spa
description:
We are Massages VIP Pro Puerto Rico, a growing mobile luxury spa serving clients island-wide — from private homes and Airbnbs to beaches and resorts. We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to take full ownership of our CRM, lead follow-up, booking coordination, and social media operations.
This is a critical role. We need someone who takes initiative, works independently, and genuinely cares about doing things right. If you need constant supervision this is not the right fit.

WHAT YOU WILL OWN:
CRM & Lead Management:

- Monitor our CRM inbox (AgentCRM / GoHighLevel) every day without exception
- Respond to every new lead within 5 minutes using approved message templates
- Follow up with every unresponsive lead after 24 hours
- Move all leads through the pipeline from first inquiry to confirmed booking
- Tag and organize all contacts by location, service type, and booking status
- Send rebooking messages to our existing database of 500+ past clients
- Prepare a weekly report on leads, response times, conversions, and lost bookings

Booking Coordination:

- Receive confirmed bookings and notify the assigned therapist immediately
- Confirm the appointment with the client right away
- Handle reschedules and cancellations professionally and promptly

Automation & Systems:

- Build and manage message templates for common client inquiries
- Continuously improve response workflows to reduce manual work and increase speed

Social Media Management:

- Grow following organically through consistent, engaging content

REQUIREMENTS:

- Strong experience managing social media professionally
- Excellent written English — you will communicate directly with clients
- Highly organized with strong attention to detail
- Self-motivated and proactive — you do not wait to be told what to do
- Reliable internet connection
- Available Monday to Sunday, 9am to 6pm Atlantic Standard Time (Puerto Rico)
- Weekend availability is important — most bookings come in Friday to Sunday
- Experience with Canva for social media graphics
- Spanish language skills — preferred but not required

PREFERRED:

- Experience in hospitality, wellness, or spa industry
- Experience building automated message sequences
- Prior experience working with a US or Caribbean-based business

HOW TO APPLY:
Please send the following:

- Your resume
- A short paragraph explaining your GoHighLevel or AgentCRM experience specifically
- Links or screenshots of social media accounts you have managed
- Your available hours and time zone
- Your expected monthly rate

Applications without GoHighLevel or CRM experience will not be considered. We respond to every qualified applicant and are looking to hire as soon as possible.

title: QA, Release & Platform Engineer
description:
About The Product

We are building a B2B SaaS platform focused on marketing attribution, conversion tracking, revenue measurement and privacy-conscious data collection.

The platform helps businesses understand the difference between platform-reported performance and actual business outcomes by connecting advertising platforms, websites, CRM systems and revenue sources.

Because the platform operates in a privacy-sensitive environment and processes attribution, tracking and revenue data, accuracy, reliability and data integrity are critical.

Our customers rely on the platform to make marketing and business decisions. A bug, release issue or implementation mistake can impact reporting, attribution, revenue calculations, privacy-related functionality and customer trust.

We are looking for a technically strong engineer who can help ensure the platform remains stable, secure, maintainable and production-ready as it grows.

?

The Role

We are looking for a Part-Time QA, Release & Platform Engineer who will act as an independent technical reviewer and quality gate between development and production.

Your primary responsibility is ensuring that software quality, release quality and infrastructure quality remain high as the product evolves.

You will work closely with the lead developer and founder while maintaining an independent technical perspective.

You will help ensure that bugs, regressions, deployment mistakes, security risks and technical debt are identified before they impact customers.

This role combines:

* Quality Assurance
* Release Management
* Code Review
* Infrastructure Oversight
* Technical Documentation
* Occasional Hands-On Engineering

?

Technical Stack

You should be comfortable reviewing and working with a modern TypeScript-first SaaS stack.

Languages

* TypeScript
* SQL (PostgreSQL)

Frontend

* Next.js 14
* React
* App Router
* Tailwind CSS
* shadcn/ui

Backend

* Bun
* Hono
* Prisma
* Kysely
* Better Auth

Data & Queueing

* PostgreSQL 16
* JSONB
* Row Level Security (RLS)
* Redis
* BullMQ

Integrations

* Stripe Billing
* Usage Metering
* Resend
* React Email

Infrastructure

* Hetzner Kubernetes Engine
* Kubernetes Secrets
* S3-compatible storage
* GitHub Actions
* ArgoCD
* Grafana
* Loki
* Prometheus

You do not need to be an expert in every tool, but you should be senior enough to understand how these systems interact and be able to identify risks and improvement opportunities.

?

Responsibilities

Quality Assurance & Testing

You will be responsible for validating new functionality before it reaches production.

This includes:

* Feature validation
* Regression testing
* Release testing
* Acceptance testing
* Bug reproduction
* Integration testing
* User flow testing
* Tracking validation
* Revenue attribution validation
* Test gate improvements

You should be comfortable validating functionality across:

* Frontend applications
* APIs
* Tracking systems
* CRM integrations
* Revenue integrations
* Reporting systems
* Customer onboarding flows
* User permissions and access controls
* Privacy and consent-related functionality

The goal is simple:

Prevent bugs, regressions and incorrect data from reaching production.

?

Code Review & Technical Oversight

You will regularly review development work and provide technical feedback.

You should be comfortable reviewing:

Frontend

* Next.js
* React
* TypeScript
* User flows
* Responsive behaviour
* Product requirements

Backend

* Bun
* Hono
* APIs
* Authentication flows
* Database interactions
* Business logic
* Data processing workflows

Your focus is not only whether code works, but whether it is:

* Maintainable
* Scalable
* Secure
* Well structured
* Consistent with project standards

You should be able to identify:

* Technical debt
* Architectural risks
* Security risks
* Privacy-related implementation risks
* Improper handling of sensitive data
* Permission and access control issues

?

GitHub, CI/CD & Release Management

You will help maintain a professional software delivery process.

This includes:

* Branching strategies
* Pull request workflows
* Protected branches
* Merge policies
* GitHub Actions
* CI/CD pipelines
* Release validation
* Deployment workflows
* Staging reviews
* Production release reviews
* Rollback planning

You should be comfortable improving and expanding test coverage and release safeguards over time.

?

Infrastructure Oversight

You do not need to be a dedicated DevOps engineer.

However, you should be comfortable reviewing infrastructure health and identifying operational risks.

This includes:

* Kubernetes environments
* Docker environments
* Deployment health
* Monitoring dashboards
* Logs and alerts
* Resource usage
* Environment configuration
* Secrets management
* Access control reviews
* Security-related deployment risks

You should be able to identify potential issues and work with developers to resolve them before they become production problems.

?

Technical Contributions

While the primary focus of this role is quality assurance, release management and technical oversight, you should also be comfortable making occasional technical improvements and fixes when appropriate.

Examples include:

* Small frontend fixes
* Small backend fixes
* CI/CD improvements
* GitHub workflow improvements
* Documentation improvements
* Monitoring improvements
* Configuration changes
* Infrastructure-related improvements

You will not be responsible for building major product features, but you should be comfortable contributing directly to the codebase when needed.

?

Documentation

You will help maintain:

* Technical documentation
* Release procedures
* Deployment documentation
* Operational playbooks
* Testing procedures
* I ----------  documentation

?

Requirements

Must Have

* Strong experience with TypeScript
* Strong experience with Next.js and React
* Strong experience reviewing backend application code
* Experience with modern TypeScript backend frameworks or runtimes
* Strong understanding of APIs and backend service design
* Strong understanding of PostgreSQL and SQL
* Experience with GitHub pull request workflows
* Experience with GitHub Actions and CI/CD pipelines
* Experience reviewing code for maintainability, security and scalability
* Strong understanding of QA and release management processes
* Strong written and spoken English

Nice To Have

* Bun experience
* Hono experience
* Prisma experience
* Kysely experience
* PostgreSQL Row Level Security experience
* Redis / BullMQ experience
* Kubernetes experience
* ArgoCD experience
* Grafana, Loki or Prometheus experience
* Stripe Billing experience
* Application security experience
* Privacy/GDPR-sensitive product experience
* SaaS analytics or attribution product experience

?

Compensation

* Part-time position
* Approximately 8-12 hours per week
* Additional hours only with prior approval

?

What Success Looks Like

* GitHub workflows are clean and protected
* Releases are predictable and well-tested
* CI/CD pipelines are reliable
* Test coverage has improved
* Technical debt is visible and controlled
* Infrastructure is stable and monitored
* Security and privacy risks are identified early
* Frontend implementations match requirements
* Bugs and regressions are caught before production
* Developers receive actionable technical feedback

In short, your role is to ensure that poor code, broken functionality, infrastructure issues and risky releases never reach production while helping maintain a high engineering standard across the platform.

title: Head of Operations / Business Operations Manager for 3M/m Subscription Business
description:
We are a fast growing subscription ecommerce brand operating across DTC, Amazon, paid media, subscription billing, payment processing, fulfillment, customer service, retention, and finance.

We are looking for a highly organized, data driven Head of Operations / Business Operations Manager to become the operational right hand to the CEO.

This person will help create structure across the business by managing reporting, tracking projects, identifying bottlenecks, improving workflows, and making sure every department is clear on what they own.

This is not a basic admin role. We need someone who understands ecommerce, can work with data, can manage multiple departments, and can bring clarity to a fast moving business.

Main Goal

Your main goal is to help the CEO run the business with better visibility, better execution, and better accountability.

You should be able to look at the business and clearly answer:

What is happening?
Where is the bottleneck?
Who owns the problem?
What needs to happen next?
Is it getting done?
Is the reporting clear enough to make good decisions?
Responsibilities
Reporting and Business Visibility
Manage the company’s daily operating dashboard
Make sure departments update reports accurately and on time
Build and improve dashboards, trackers, and reporting systems
Create clear daily, weekly, and monthly reporting for the CEO
Help define and track KPIs across departments
Turn raw data into clear insights and action points
Data and Analytics
Work with tools such as Google Sheets, Looker Studio, Shopify, CheckoutChamp, Amazon Seller Central, Triple Whale, Northbeam, payment processors, ad platforms, and other ecommerce tools
Pull data from different platforms and organize it clearly
Build formulas, dashboards, and data views
Spot data issues or inconsistencies between platforms
Help automate reporting where possible
Department Coordination
Act as the link between the CEO and department owners
Coordinate across marketing, finance, CRO, payments, retention, customer service, fulfillment, and agencies
Make sure every department knows what they are responsible for
Follow up on projects, timelines, action items, and deliverables
Keep agencies and internal tea ---------- mbers aligned with company priorities
Push for accountability without creating unnecessary complexity
Bottleneck Detection and Problem Solving
Review daily and weekly metrics to identify issues early
Spot problems across marketing, funnel conversion, payments, retention, fulfillment, refunds, chargebacks, inventory, and cashflow
Escalate problems clearly with context and suggested next steps
Turn messy business problems into clear action plans
Help create systems to prevent recurring problems
Project Management and Workflow Improvement
Manage key projects across departments using tools like ClickUp, Notion, Asana, Monday, Slack, Google Sheets, and Google Drive
Build task boards, SOPs, checklists, meeting agendas, and reporting rhythms
Make sure work is tracked properly and nothing gets missed
Improve workflows as the company scales
Keep the team organized and moving fast
Ecommerce Areas You Should Understand

You do not need to be an expert in every area, but you should understand enough to ask smart questions, spot issues, and coordinate the right people.

Relevant areas include:

DTC ecommerce
Shopify
CheckoutChamp or similar checkout and CRM systems
Subscription billing and rebills
LTV, retention, churn, and cohort reporting
Paid media, MER, CAC, ROAS, and contribution profit
CRO, funnels, landing pages, AOV, CVR, and upsells
Payment processing, approval rates, declines, chargebacks, reserves, and MIDs
Amazon Seller Central
Customer service, refunds, cancellations, and complaints
Fulfillment, 3PLs, inventory, and shipping performance
Basic ecommerce finance and cashflow
What Success Looks Like

In the first 30 to 60 days, success looks like:

The daily operating dashboard is clearly maintained
Each department has clear KPIs, owners, and reporting
The CEO has a clear view of daily performance and bottlenecks
Meeting action items are tracked and followed up on
Agencies and internal tea ---------- mbers have clearer accountability
Major operational gaps are identified and prioritized
Reporting becomes cleaner, faster, and more useful
The business feels more organized and less reactive

Long term, success looks like:

The company has a strong operating system
Department owners are accountable to clear numbers
Bottlenecks are identified quickly
Projects move faster with fewer missed details
The CEO can spend more time on strategy and growth because operations are under control
Requirements
Strong ecommerce experience, ideally with subscription or high volume DTC brands
Strong analytical skills
Excellent Google Sheets or Excel skills
Experience building dashboards, trackers, reports, or scorecards
Strong understanding of ecommerce KPIs including revenue, CAC, MER, ROAS, AOV, CVR, LTV, churn, refunds, contribution profit, approval rates, and fulfillment metrics
Strong project management skills
Experience working across multiple teams or departments
Excellent written and verbal communication
Comfortable working with agencies, contractors, and internal tea ---------- mbers
Able to run calls, follow up, push projects forward, and hold people accountable
Highly proactive and able to work without constant direction
Fast learner who can quickly understand new tools and systems
Nice to Have
Experience with Shopify, CheckoutChamp, Amazon Seller Central, Meta Ads, Triple Whale, Northbeam, Looker Studio, Hyros, or similar tools
Experience with supplements, health ecommerce, subscription brands, or performance marketing businesses
Experience with payment processing, chargebacks, approval rates, MIDs, reserves, or rebill optimization
Experience working with ecommerce brands doing $1M+ per month
Experience managing reporting across finance, marketing, CRO, retention, customer service, and fulfillment
Basic understanding of SQL, Zapier, APIs, data connectors, or automation tools
Personality Fit

We are looking for someone who is:

Proactive
Highly organized
Data driven
Commercially minded
Clear in communication
Comfortable with pressure
Fast moving
Detail oriented
Strong at follow through
Able to create clarity from chaos
Comfortable challenging assumptions
A natural leader

You should not wait to be told what to do. You should be able to look at a messy area of the business, understand what is missing, and help build the system to fix it.

Role Summary

This role is for someone who can become the operational right hand to the CEO.

You will help turn a fast growing ecommerce business from reactive and chaotic into clear, accountable, data driven, and execution focused.

The ideal candidate combines:

Project management
Ecommerce understanding
Analytics
Finance awareness
Operational leadership
Strong communication
Proactive problem solving

This is a high impact role with significant responsibility and room to grow.

How to Apply

Please apply with:

Put 'Clarity MD COO' as the subject line so i know youve read all this
A short summary of your ecommerce operations experience
Examples of dashboards, reports, trackers, or operating systems you have built
The ecommerce tools you have worked with
The types of brands you have worked with, including revenue size if possible
One example of a business bottleneck you identified and helped solve

title: Social Media VA (Outbound Prospecting + Inbound Lead Response) – Real Estate Marketing | $4 USD/hr | 40 hrs/week
description:

Virtual Xposure (VX) is a fast-growing real estate media and marketing company based in Canada. We help real estate agents sell their listings faster, sell for more money, and save time through elite media and marketing systems.
We are looking for a sharp, self-motivated Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to join our team long-term. This is a fully online role — no phone calls, no cold calling. Everything is done through social media and messaging platforms.
Type the words SOCIAL STAR at the very beginning of your application so we know you read this in full.

What You'll Be Doing

Research and identify real estate agents on platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn
Send connection requests and personalized outreach messages to warm up prospects
Follow up with leads who have shown interest in our services
Track outreach activity and update our CRM daily

Inbound Lead Management

Monitor and respond to comments, DMs, and messages across our social media accounts
Qualify inbound inquiries and move interested prospects to the next step
Keep conversations warm and organized

Social Media Support

Help schedule and post content across platforms
Assist with basic engagement (likes, comments, community management)
Report on performance metrics weekly


What We're Looking For
Required:

Excellent written English — clear, friendly, and professional
Experience managing social media accounts (personal or professional)
Comfortable reaching out to strangers online and starting conversations
Organized and reliable — you follow up without being reminded

Bonus (Not Required):

Experience with GoHighLevel, Asana, or similar tools
Canva or basic graphic skills


This Role Is NOT For You If:

This Role IS For You If:

You take initiative and think ahead

Work Schedule

Canadian business hours preferred (flexibility for the right person)

Compensation

$4 USD/hour
Stable, long-term position
Opportunities for raises and growth as VX scales


Our Culture
At VX, we live by:

Excellence – high standards, no shortcuts
Integrity – we say what we mean and mean what we say
Unreasonable Hospitality – we treat clients and teammates exceptionally well
Continuous Improvement – always getting 1?tter


How to Apply

We are reviewing applications quickly. If this sounds like the right fit for you, we'd love to hear from you.
— The Virtual Xposure Team

title: E-commerce Operations Assistant for Growing U.S. Online Store
description:
Hi!

I’m looking for a reliable full-time E-commerce Operations Assistant to help with daily operations for a growing online store in the U.S. market.

The business is expanding, and I need someone hands-on who can help with customer communication, supplier follow-ups, product research, pricing checks, Shopify tasks, product listings, SEO edits, and keeping operations organized.

This is a growing business, so I am looking for someone who can grow with the company. New ideas, suggestions, and process improvements are welcome, especially after you understand how our systems work.

Experience with high-ticket e-commerce stores would be a strong advantage. This includes stores that sell expensive products, supplier-direct items, freight products, multi-brand catalogs, products with warranties, products with different lead times, or products where customer communication and accuracy are very important.

We sell high-ticket products, not a simple one-product dropshipping item. We work with multiple brands and suppliers, and each brand can have different prices, margins, shipping rules, product details, lead times, warranties, and return policies.

Many products are shipped directly from suppliers or manufacturers, so attention to detail is very important.

This is a full-time position, and it is not a “work whenever you want” role. Since this position involves customer emails, SMS, calls, supplier follow-ups, abandoned checkout follow-ups, and order updates, you must be available during agreed U.S. business hours, ideally between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM Eastern Time.

The first week will focus on training, onboarding, and learning how our process works. We may use Zoom calls, Google Meet calls, training videos, SOPs, examples, and internal documents to explain tasks clearly.

You are encouraged to ask questions when something is unclear. I prefer someone who asks before guessing, especially when dealing with customers, suppliers, pricing, shipping, returns, warranties, or order issues.

As the business grows and you prove you are reliable, responsibilities can increase and pay can also increase based on performance.

Main tasks may include:

Responding to customer emails, SMS, and calls in English, including order updates, product questions, quote follow-ups, abandoned checkout follow-ups, and general customer support.

Making and answering customer calls in English when needed.

Following up with customers by call, SMS, or email for quotes, pending payments, abandoned checkouts, product questions, delivery updates, and order issues.

Following up with suppliers about stock, pricing, shipping, product details, lead times, tracking, freight delivery, warranty cases, and order updates.

Updating customers about order status, delivery updates, supplier responses, delays, and next steps.

Checking product prices, supplier costs, margins, shipping costs, MAP rules, and competitor pricing.

Comparing our prices with U.S. competitors.

Using a VPN when needed to view U.S. pricing, competitor websites, and product availability.

Helping with Shopify product uploads and product updates.

Creating, editing, and improving Shopify product listings using supplier information.

Reviewing product titles, descriptions, specifications, images, SEO titles, meta descriptions, tags, collections, warranty details, shipping details, and product page accuracy.

Helping identify missing product information, incorrect specs, weak descriptions, pricing issues, or product pages that need improvement.

Reviewing product pages for missing or incorrect information.

Keeping CRM sheets and internal spreadsheets organized.

Updating customer notes, supplier notes, order notes, lead status, and follow-up status.

Helping with warranty, return, cancellation, delivery, and supplier communication.

Assisting with documentation for warranty claims, returns, delivery issues, disputes, and chargebacks when needed. This may include organizing emails, screenshots, order details, tracking information, supplier communication, customer communication, and timelines. Final decisions on refunds, disputes, cancellations, compensation, or discounts are handled by management.

Handling customer problems professionally and knowing when to escalate an issue before making promises or decisions.

Following SOPs and training videos for each task.

Suggesting improvements to processes, product pages, customer communication, follow-ups, spreadsheets, or SOPs after learning how the business works.

You will not be expected to know everything on day one. I will assign specific tasks and provide instructions, examples, and training videos when needed.

Requirements:

Please do not apply if you do not think you qualify.

Advanced written and spoken English for U.S. customer communication.

Confident speaking with U.S. customers by phone in clear, professional English.

Please only apply if you are comfortable handling conversations in English with U.S. customers, including questions, follow-ups, problems, delays, delivery concerns, warranty issues, and customer complaints.

Spoken English will be verified through a short Zoom, Google Meet, or similar video call during the hiring process.

Comfortable answering calls, making follow-up calls, replying to SMS, and handling customer issues professionally.

Able to communicate clearly when there is a problem, delay, warranty issue, delivery concern, or customer complaint.

Experience with Shopify, e-commerce operations, customer support, product listings, SEO edits, pricing checks, or virtual assistant work.

Experience with high-ticket e-commerce stores, supplier-direct shipping, freight products, warranty cases, returns, or multi-brand online stores is strongly preferred.

Experience using Google Sheets, CRM sheets, spreadsheets, or similar tools to stay organized.

Able to work with the U.S. market and U.S. customers.

Available full-time during agreed U.S. business hours, ideally between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM Eastern Time, for customer calls, SMS, emails, supplier follow-ups, Shopify tasks, and order updates.

Must have reliable internet.

Must be able to use a VPN when needed.

Strong attention to detail.

Organized and able to keep accurate notes.

Able to follow step-by-step instructions carefully.

Comfortable checking supplier websites, product pages, pricing, shipping details, and competitor pages.

Able to ask questions when something is unclear instead of guessing.

Able to work with urgency when a task is assigned.

Able to suggest useful ideas, improvements, or better ways to organize work after understanding the business process.

Must understand that refunds, cancellations, discounts, returns, disputes, or compensation cannot be approved without owner approval.

Experience using Slack or similar communication tools is a plus, but not required.

Important:

This business sells high-ticket products, so mistakes can be expensive. A wrong product detail, wrong price, missed follow-up, or incorrect promise to a customer can create serious problems.

You should not promise customers exact delivery dates unless they are confirmed. You should not approve refunds, returns, cancellations, discounts, disputes, or compensation unless I specifically authorize it.

You must be careful when checking prices because different brands have different margins, supplier costs, shipping fees, MAP rules, and competitor pricing.

This is not a simple task-based role where you only reply to messages. I am looking for someone who can help keep operations organized, follow processes, communicate professionally, and grow into more responsibility over time.

Examples of tasks you may receive:

“Check if this product is in stock with the supplier and confirm the shipping cost.”

“Reply to this customer asking for a delivery update.”

“Call this customer and confirm their shipping address.”

“Call or text this customer who started checkout but did not complete the order.”

“Follow up with this lead and ask if they have any questions before purchasing.”

“Compare our price with this competitor and calculate the margin.”

“Update the CRM sheet with the customer status and next follow-up.”

“Check this Shopify order/customer profile and update the CRM sheet with the latest status.”

“Check if this product page is missing warranty, shipping, or specification details.”

“Upload these products to Shopify using this supplier page.”

“Review this product listing and improve the title, description, specifications, SEO title, and meta description.”

“Organize this supplier information in the supplier database.”

“Follow up with this supplier about tracking or freight delivery.”

“Review this customer issue and prepare a draft response.”

“Organize documents and communication related to a warranty claim, return, delivery issue, dispute, or chargeback.”

How to apply:

Please message me here if you are interested.

To show that you read the full post carefully, start your message with:

“Hi Chris, I can help with U.S. e-commerce operations.”

Also, somewhere in your application, mention:

“CRM sheet”

If possible, please include a short video or voice recording speaking in English. This can be a Loom video, Google Drive link, or any similar link where I can hear you speak clearly.

This is not required, but it will strongly help your application and hiring decision. In the video, please briefly introduce yourself, explain your e-commerce/customer support experience, and mention if you have experience with high-ticket products, supplier-direct shipping, freight items, warranty cases, returns, or multi-brand online stores.

It would also be very helpful if you explain your experience with Shopify product listings, including product uploads, product titles, descriptions, specifications,  SEO titles, meta descriptions, tags, collections, pricing updates, or reviewing product pages for missing information.

You can also explain how you would handle customer issues such as delayed orders, delivery concerns, warranty problems, refund requests, or customers asking for exact delivery dates.

Please do not send a generic cover letter. Instead, answer these questions in your own words. I want to understand your real experience, communication style, and judgment, so please do not use AI-generated responses.

1. Have you worked with Shopify, customer service, or e-commerce operations before? Explain briefly.

2. Have you worked with high-ticket e-commerce products, supplier-direct shipping, freight items, or multi-brand online stores before? If yes, please explain your experience.

3. Are you comfortable speaking with U.S. customers by phone in English?

4. Are you available full-time during U.S. business hours, ideally between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM Eastern Time, for assigned tasks, calls, SMS, emails, and follow-ups?

5. Have you used Google Sheets, CRM sheets, or spreadsheets to manage customer/order information?

6. Have you used Slack or similar communication tools before?

7. Have you helped create, edit, or improve Shopify product listings before? If yes, what parts have you handled? For example: product titles, descriptions, specifications, images, SEO titles, meta descriptions, tags, collections, or pricing.

8. If you have worked with other e-commerce stores before, what is one process, system, product page, or customer communication workflow you helped improve?

9. A customer asks for an exact delivery date, but the supplier only gave an estimated transit time. How would you respond?

10. Before telling a customer that a product is in stock, what would you check?

11. If a customer asks for a refund, discount, cancellation, return, dispute update, or compensation, what would you do before confirming anything?

12. Are you able to use a VPN to check U.S. competitor pricing and product availability?

13. Are you willing to do a short Zoom or Google Meet call so we can verify your spoken English and communication skills?

If you have any questions before applying, feel free to include them in your message. I will be reviewing applications and answering questions through the chat.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

Thanks!

Chris

title: Ecommerce Fulfillment & Shipping Operations Coordinator
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE
We're a premium direct-to-consumer apparel brand selling mainly to US customers, with manufacturing in Asia and warehouses in the US. We're hiring a hands-on Fulfillment & Shipping Operations Coordinator to run the daily operations that get orders shipped correctly, keep our inventory accurate, and keep our shipping costs in check.

YOUR THREE PRIORITIES (what you'll be measured on)
1. Inventory accuracy. Make sure we never lose stock; when stock is lost, file and recover the claim; and keep inventory counts accurate and matched across every system.
2. Getting orders to customers. Fast fulfillment from the  ---------- nt an order is placed, fast delivery from the  ---------- nt it ships, and quick resolution of any issue along the way.
3. Costs. Verify every shipping, warehouse, and returns charge is accurate, and continuously find ways to reduce those costs.

HOW THE ROLE WORKS
The core of this job is daily: making sure orders flow to the right warehouse, handling the exceptions our automation can't, and working our issue/tracking boards (shipping issues, unfulfilled orders, late deliveries) through to resolution every business day. Around that sits a lighter set of monthly tasks (inbound receiving, inventory checks, a few reports, and carrier-invoice verification) — much of which is already automated, so the job is to run and verify those, not build them by hand.

You'll work across our ecommerce platform, order-management and warehouse systems, and a project/issue-tracking tool, coordinate with the team over chat, and follow written SOPs. Hours are standard Philippine business hours (about 9am–6pm PHT); no night shift. Working time is tracked with a time-tracking tool.

This is NOT entry-level. You should have run ecommerce fulfillment before, be comfortable learning and working across multiple systems, stay organized under a daily queue, and communicate clearly and promptly. If you go quiet when things get hard, this isn't for you. If you take ownership and keep things moving without being chased, you'll do well here.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Daily — order fulfillment (priority 2):
- Oversee the daily order flow. Most orders route to the right warehouse automatically; you make sure the daily outbound completes cleanly and handle the exceptions.
- Process manual-override cases: split orders across two warehouses, international orders (purchase/register the shipping label, attach the commercial invoice), and reshipments.
- Reconcile edited/held orders between the store and the warehouse system.

Daily — shipping-issue & delivery resolution (priority 2):
- Own the issue boards end to end: log each issue, classify it, respond to the customer within 24 hours, follow up with the warehouse/carrier on a set cadence, resolve it (reship/refund/claim), and close it out.
- Clear open/unfulfilled orders flagged by automation within SLA.
- Track late or non-moving shipments and drive resolution with the warehouses and carriers.

Inventory accuracy (priority 1):
- Receive inbound shipments using documentation from Procurement; build the inbound records, reconcile against the packing list, and log any shortages/damage.
- Run the monthly inventory checks (store-vs-warehouse, plus an internal check) and fix discrepancies so stock matches across systems.
- When a warehouse loses or mishandles stock, file the claim and follow it through to recovery.
- Produce the monthly inventory/inbound/outbound/delivery reports — run them, sanity-check the output, and fix anything that looks off.

Costs (priority 3):
- Verify freight, storage, and returns invoices against rate cards using our in-house tool; flag and recover overcharges.
- Continuously look for ways to lower shipping and fulfillment costs (e.g., right-sizing packaging, improving routing, catching recurring billing errors).

REQUIREMENTS
- 3–5 years' hands-on ecommerce fulfillment / shipping / order operations (running the systems, not physical warehouse work).
- Strong experience with a major ecommerce platform (multi-location orders and inventory).
- Experience with order-management/ERP software and third-party warehouse (3PL) systems.
- Experience running an issue/ticket board to a daily SLA.
- Strong spreadsheet skills; comfortable with AI-assisted reporting (a plus).
- Able to audit carrier invoices against rate cards and spot overcharges.
- Excellent written English and fast, reliable communication.
- High attention to detail; dependable during PH business hours; comfortable logging time via a time-tracker; self-manages from written SOPs.

Nice to have: experience with returns and help-desk platforms; apparel/fashion ecommerce; US shipping & customs (DDP/DDU).

HOW TO APPLY (please follow exactly — applications that skip these will not be reviewed)
1. Start your reply with the word XPRESS so I know you read the full post.
2. A short paragraph on your most relevant fulfillment/operations role: which platforms you used and what you personally owned.
3. Scenario A: An order shipped from our warehouse three days ago, but the tracking hasn't moved since. Walk me through how you'd resolve it — what you'd check, who you'd contact, and on what cadence.
4. Scenario B: An order has two items, and each needs to ship from a different warehouse. How would you handle splitting and processing it?
5. What ecommerce platform, order-management/warehouse systems, and issue-tracking tools have you used directly, and for how long?
6. How comfortable are you using AI tools to run or check reports? Give an example if you have one.
7. Your typical working hours in Philippine time, and the longest you've stayed in one fulfillment/operations role.

title: Supply Chain & Customer Experience Coordinator
description:
Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full Time

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, Sydney Business Hours (AEST/AEDT)

Company: My Home Design

About My Home Design

My Home Design is a growing Australian furniture and interiors company specialising in premium furniture, custom pieces, hospitality projects, trade partnerships and interior design solutions.

As we continue to grow, we are looking for an experienced Supply Chain & Customer Experience Coordinator to take ownership of the operational journey from supplier to customer.

This is a critical role within the business.

You will be responsible for ensuring that orders move smoothly through production, shipping, warehousing and final delivery while providing exceptional communication and service to customers throughout the process.

This is not a customer service role.

This is not an administrative role.

This is an operational ownership role.

The ideal candidate is highly organised, proactive, detail oriented and comfortable managing multiple moving parts simultaneously.

Position Overview

The Supply Chain & Customer Experience Coordinator acts as the operational link between:

* Customers
* Suppliers
* Freight forwarders
* Shipping companies
* Warehouses
* Delivery partners
* Installation teams
* Internal departments

You will own the post-sale process and ensure that every order is properly tracked, managed and communicated until successfully delivered.

A customer should never need to chase us for an update because we should already know exactly where their order is and proactively communicate with them.

Key Responsibilities

Supplier Management

* Follow up suppliers regarding production progress and order status
* Obtain production updates and ETAs
* Monitor supplier deadlines and commitments
* Escalate delays and potential issues
* Maintain strong supplier relationships
* Ensure all supplier information is documented and updated

Freight & Shipping Coordination

* Monitor container shipments and freight movements
* Coordinate with freight forwarders and shipping companies
* Track shipment milestones and estimated arrival dates
* Follow up on delays and exceptions
* Maintain shipment tracking reports
* Ensure accurate documentation is maintained

Warehouse & Inventory Coordination

* Coordinate incoming inventory arrivals
* Liaise with warehouse teams regarding stock arrivals
* Monitor inventory discrepancies and damages
* Assist with stock management and reporting
* Coordinate stock transfers when required

Delivery Coordination

* Schedule deliveries with customers
* Coordinate with transport providers and installation teams
* Confirm delivery appointments
* Resolve delivery issues and delays
* Ensure proof of delivery is collected and recorded

Customer Experience Management

* Provide proactive updates throughout the order journey
* Respond to customer enquiries regarding orders and deliveries
* Manage delivery expectations professionally
* Handle customer concerns and escalations
* Resolve issues quickly and effectively
* Ensure a positive customer experience from order to delivery

Operational Reporting

* Maintain accurate order tracking systems
* Update ClickUp and internal tracking tools
* Maintain shipment trackers
* Prepare weekly operational reports
* Identify bottlenecks and operational risks
* Recommend process improvements

Process Improvement

* Create and maintain SOPs
* Improve operational workflows
* Identify inefficiencies and opportunities for automation
* Help build scalable operational systems

Required Experience

Applicants must have experience in at least one of the following:

* Supply Chain Management
* Logistics Coordination
* Freight Coordination
* Operations Management
* Order Fulfilment
* Customer Experience Management
* Procurement Coordination
* Warehouse Operations

Strongly Preferred

* Furniture industry experience
* E-commerce experience
* Importing and international shipping experience
* Australian business experience
* Experience managing suppliers in multiple countries

Required Skills

* Exceptional organisational skills
* Strong written and verbal English
* Excellent follow up and problem solving abilities
* Ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously
* High attention to detail
* Strong sense of accountability and ownership
* Ability to work independently
* Strong customer service and communication skills
* Experience handling difficult situations professionally

Software & Systems Experience

Experience with some or all of the following is preferred:

* ClickUp
* Shopify
* Google Workspace
* Gmail
* Google Sheets
* CRM Systems
* Slack
* Xero
* Freight tracking platforms
* Inventory management systems

What Success Looks Like

Within the first 90 days, the successful candidate will:

* Have complete visibility over all active orders
* Proactively communicate with customers before they ask for updates
* Maintain accurate supplier and freight tracking
* Ensure delivery scheduling runs smoothly
* Keep operational systems updated and organised
* Reduce customer escalations through proactive communication
* Identify opportunities to improve operational efficiency

Who We Are Looking For

We are looking for someone who:

* Takes ownership rather than waiting for instructions
* Loves organisation and operational excellence
* Enjoys solving problems
* Follows through relentlessly
* Is calm under pressure
* Communicates proactively
* Thinks ahead and anticipates issues before they occur
* Takes pride in delivering an exceptional customer experience

Application Instructions

To apply, please submit:

1. Your CV
2. A short introduction about yourself
3. Details of your supply chain, logistics or operations experience
4. Examples of systems or processes you have improved
5. Software platforms you have worked with
6. Your expected monthly salary
7. A short video (3 to 5 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you would be a great fit for this role

Please begin your application with the words:

“Operational excellence drives customer satisfaction.”

Applications that do not include this phrase may not be considered.

title: Client Experience & Marketing Coordinator
description:
Hours: Approximately 15 hours per week
Location: Remote
Reports To: Tatum Brown, Founder of The Social Dog Company & Pet PowerHaus™

About The Role

We're looking for a highly organised, proactive person who thrives on creating order, delivering an exceptional client experience, and keeping things moving behind the scenes.

This isn't a traditional Virtual Assistant role.

You'll become the operational backbone of a growing coaching business, supporting marketing, client experience, lead generation, administration, and content creation.

The ideal person genuinely loves systems, enjoys talking to people online, notices details others miss, and takes ownership without needing constant direction. Speaks english well in written and verbal form. Has confidence. Bonus if you love dogs and animals and they are the types of businesses we work with. 

We're a high standards, high ownership business. We move quickly, take action, and focus on solutions. We value people who are proactive, resourceful, accountable, and willing to figure things out. If you take pride in your work, communicate well, and treat the business like it's your own, you'll fit right in.

The Purpose Of This Role

To help buy back founder time by creating smoother systems, improving client experience, increasing lead follow up consistency, supporting marketing implementation, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

The outcome of this role is simple:

More organised operations. Better client experiences. More leads converted. Greater marketing consistency. Less founder overwhelm.

Primary Outcomes

You will be responsible for helping achieve the following outcomes:

• Faster lead follow up and appointment setting via DM on social media - primarily IG
• Improved client onboarding experiences (this is quite small at the  ---------- nt)
• Reduced founder inbox overwhelm (organise and reply)
• Consistent social media engagement and content publishing - comments, reply, outbound engagement
• Improved organisation across files, folders, and backend systems (google folders)
• Increased operational efficiency and reduced bottlenecks (this needs to be a strength and I'll look to you for recommendations)
• More consistent implementation of marketing activities - sending emails, scheduling posts, posting stories

Core Responsibilities

Community Management & Lead Generation
• Reply to social media comments
• Send DMs to warm leads and enquiries - outcome to book calls
• Respond to inbound messages professionally - by fun and friendly
• Book discovery calls into the calendar
• Follow up with potential clients
• Maintain accurate lead tracking systems
• Track clients in spreadsheets manually


Client Experience & Onboarding

• Set up new clients inside Skool
• Create and organise client folders in Google Drive and send via Skool
• Support a smooth and positive client experience - this will develop over time

Administration & Organisation

• Organise and manage inboxes
• Sort, categorise, and maintain emails
• Draft and respond to routine communications
• Maintain spreadsheets and tracking documents
• Keep folders, systems, and resources organised
• Support calendar management as required

Marketing & Content Support

• Create social media posts using Canva (no reels)
• Repurpose existing content into graphics, carousels, and promotional assets
• Schedule and publish content across social media platforms (Facebook, IG and LinkedIn)
• Post Instagram Stories as directed
• Write captions using existing frameworks and messaging provided by the founder
• Send and schedule emails through Kajabi (must know Kajabi backend)
• Support the implementation of launches and marketing campaigns
• Organise Canva assets and maintain brand consistency

Daily Tasks
• Monitor social media comments and DMs
• Respond to enquiries and book calls
• Organise and maintain email inboxes
• Provide updates on outstanding tasks
• Support urgent client experience requests
• Maintain communication with the founder regarding priorities

Weekly Tasks
• Create and develop SOPS for procedures
• Design and schedule social media posts
• Schedule and publish Instagram Stories
• Send Kajabi emails as required
• Update lead tracking spreadsheets
• Audit Google Drive folders for organisation
• Review open tasks and priorities with the founder
• Organise Canva assets and marketing materials

KPIs & Success Metrics
Success in this role will be measured by:
• Lead follow ups completed within agreed timeframes
• Discovery calls successfully booked
• Client onboarding completed accurately and efficiently
• Inbox response times maintained
• Tasks completed by deadlines
• Reduction in founder administrative workload
• Social media content published consistently and on time
• Brand consistency maintained across all platforms
• Accuracy and attention to detail across all tasks

Communication Expectations
• Daily updates during workdays
• Questions asked early rather than waiting until deadlines approach
• Proactive communication when challenges arise
• Strong attention to detail
• Fast responses during agreed working hours
• Ownership over assigned responsibilities - no hand holding
• Transparent communication around workload and priorities

Non Negotiable Standards
• Reliability
• Professional communication
• Attention to detail
• Strong organisational skills
• Ownership mentality
• Ability to follow systems
• Respectful communication
• Proactive problem solving
• Meeting deadlines consistently
• High level of discretion and confidentiality

Software & Tools
Experience with the following is highly desirable:
• Google Drive
• Google Sheets
• Canva
• Kajabi
• Skool
• Meta Business Suite
• ChatGPT
• Zoom
• Loom

Ideal Person For This Role
You are:
• Highly organised
• Calm under pressure
• Naturally proactive and GREAT at problem solving
• Friendly and professional communication
• Tech confident and quick to learn
• A strong communicator - good at booking calls from leads
• Detail oriented
• Independent and resourceful
• Someone who genuinely enjoys creating structure and helping businesses run smoothly
• Comfortable interacting with leads and clients online
• Able to switch between administration, client experience, and creative tasks with ease

You don't wait to be told what to do.

You see problems and help solve them.

Bonus points if you have a strong eye for design and understand how to create engaging social media content that balances aesthetics with conversion.

Red Flags
This role is not suitable for people who:
• Need constant reminders
• Miss deadlines regularly
• Struggle with organisation
• Avoid communication
• Become defensive when receiving feedback
• Require excessive supervision
• Lack initiative or ownership
• Have poor attention to detail

Final Role Summary

If this role is successful:
• Founder stress decreases
• Clients receive an exceptional experience
• Leads are nurtured consistently
• Administrative bottlenecks are reduced
• Marketing implementation becomes more consistent
• The business becomes more scalable and we grow as a team
• Communication improves
• The founder buys back valuable time to focus on growth

If you love creating order, thrive in a fast paced environment, enjoy supporting ambitious business owners behind the scenes, and take pride in helping businesses grow, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Travel Services Specialist (Amadeus)
description:
To apply, please attach an accessible link to your CV/Resume

We are seeking a Travel Services Specialist to provide support for travelers experiencing urgent travel issues and itinerary modifications. This role is centered on handling travel disruptions, schedule changes, rebookings, cancellations, and other travel-related assistance requests.

The ideal candidate is highly organized, able to remain composed under pressure, and experienced in managing time-sensitive travel situations. This is a travel support role and does not involve vacation planning, destination recommendations, or leisure travel consulting.

title: Web Developer + Designer
description:
About us
We're an Australian social media and brand agency. We handle organic growth, content, design and strategy for premium wellness and lifestyle brands. We're looking for a developer-designer to build and improve client websites — starting with one clearly defined project, with ongoing part-time design work for the right person.
The first project
Optimising an existing Shopify site for a premium wellness brand. It's an improvement of a live site, not a rebuild. The core of the work:

Integrating Shopify + Timely (bookings) + Mailchimp so they work as one connected system
Making the online booking experience simpler and better connected to the site
Rebrand cleanup (old brand name still in title tags / metadata) + a 301 redirect from the legacy domain
Analytics & tracking: GA4 and Meta Pixel set up with key events (views, add-to-cart, checkout, bookings)
Technical and on-page SEO + LocalBusiness schema for two locations
Conversion elements: a reviews/testimonials module and a "Why us / our technology" page

We provide a full brief, all copy and content, and brand guidelines. Design direction is collaborative.
Ongoing (part-time)
We're refining our client's brand identity right now and have steady design work coming. For the right person, after this project we'd love to bring you on part-time, ongoing, to support our design — brand identity plus web and social design across our clients.
You should have

Solid Shopify experience (theme customisation; Liquid a strong plus)
Experience connecting tools via API or Zapier/Make — bonus if you've integrated a booking system (Timely or similar) and Mailchimp before
Technical SEO, GA4 and Meta Pixel setup
Web + graphic design skills with an eye for clean, premium, considered design (Figma / Adobe / Canva)
Strong written English and clear communication
Reliable, organised, able to work independently and hit deadlines

Nice to have: experience with wellness, health or premium lifestyle brands.

How to apply:
Tell us:
Whether you've connected Shopify + a booking system + email tools before, and briefly how
A few design samples or a portfolio link
Your availability per week, and whether you're open to ongoing part-time work afterward

Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Customer Support & Collections Agent
description:
We're looking for someone who genuinely enjoys helping people sort out their finances. If you're calm under pressure, know your way around repayment conversations, and have a background in fintech or payments, we'd love to hear from you.
Apply here:  ---------- 

THE ROLE
You'll be the person our customers turn to when they need help navigating their accounts, catching up on payments, or resolving issues. Day to day, that means handling inbound and outbound contact across chat, email, and phone, working through repayment options, and supporting debt recovery in a way that's professional and empathetic.
This role also comes with a real growth path. As the team expands, there's a clear opportunity to step into a Team Lead or Manager position, with a salary increase to match.
Please read the responsibilities carefully before applying to make sure this is the right fit.


WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING
* Be the first point of contact for customers across chat, email, and phone, resolving issues efficiently and professionally.
* Guide customers through repayment options and account management with patience and care.
* Manage collections activity, including outbound contact with overdue accounts and negotiating repayment arrangements.
* Respond to customer reviews and public feedback in a way that reflects well on the brand.
* Handle complaints with empathy, and escalate complex or sensitive cases appropriately.
* Spot and flag suspicious activity or potential fraud, and follow the correct escalation process.
* Use AI tools and automation to work smarter and deliver faster, higher-quality support.
* Feed customer insights back to the product and operations teams to help improve the experience over time.


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
* Solid experience in customer service, ideally in fintech, lending, or payments. BNPL experience is a strong advantage.
* A good understanding of collections, repayments, and fraud, paired with genuine empathy for customers in difficult financial situations.
* Confident communicating across multiple channels, adjusting tone and approach depending on the situation.
* Comfortable with AI tools and a general willingness to adopt new technology.
* Someone who thrives in a startup environment where things move quickly and no two days are the same.
* Detail-oriented, professional, and trustworthy.


COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS
* $1,300 - $1,500 USD per month, depending on experience
* Growth path to Team Lead or Manager as the team scales, with a salary increase
* 100% remote, work from anywhere in the Philippines
* 15 days paid leave
* Bi-weekly salary payouts
* Philippine public holidays off
* Startup culture where your input is genuinely valued


WORKING HOURS
* During onboarding: 6:00 PM - 1:00 AM PH time, Monday to Friday
* A fixed schedule will be confirmed after onboarding based on business needs
* Weekend availability required
* Full-time only (40 hours per week)


READY TO APPLY?
Click the link below to submit your application and let's get started:
 ----------

title: Website Designer and Technical Specialist
description:
Are you looking for a stable, long-term role where your design and technical skills get put to good use on real projects that drive results?

We're a fast-growing Singapore-based digital marketing company that's been helping local businesses win online for years. Our team is a mix of Filipinos and Singaporeans working in the same time zone, so you're never out of sync with the people you collaborate with.

Important: Please read this posting thoroughly and answer the questions at the bottom when you apply. Applications that skip the questions will be ignored.

What you'll be doing:
• Design and build conversion-focused landing pages using WordPress (Thrive Architect/Elementor) and modern AI/marketing platforms (Lovable, GoHighLevel).
• Set up and configure GoHighLevel (GHL) tool, including WhatsApp automation, funnels, and CRM workflows
• Act quickly on urgent requests (e.g., site down, layout breaks) and handle routine edits, plugin updates, and bug fixes for active client campaigns.
• Migrate sites from Lovable (and other AI builders) into WordPress cleanly and reliably
• Troubleshoot website and technical errors, solving problems independently through research
• Build integrations and automations using Zapier (and similar tools) to connect platforms and streamline workflows
• Design banners, graphics, and logos and do basic video edits 
• Research into AI tools and software and update SOPs consistently to improve workflow 

What we're looking for:
• A fast and stable internet connection (this is a MUST)
• At least 2 years of web design experience
• Attention to detail 
• Strong WordPress skills 
• Adoption of AI 
• Experience with (or genuine willingness to learn fast) GoHighLevel 
• Comfort with automation logic — Zapier, or equivalent
• A real eye for design and solid understanding of colour palettes
• Basic web dev knowledge (cPanel, HTML) 
• Resourceful — you can research and figure things out on your own
• Independent, but communicates openly with the team
• Accountable, responsible, and operates with integrity

In your application, please answer:
• What kinds of websites have you designed?
• What software do you use for design?
• Have you worked with GoHighLevel, Zapier or a similar funnel or workflow builder? If so, what did you build?

Please also provide WordPress design samples, including landing pages — only ones you designed and developed entirely yourself on WordPress/Lovable. Provide live URLs, not image files. (Applications without these will not be considered.)
We're looking for a long-term, in-house designer/developer to grow with us.

Too many businesses in Singapore are stuck with outdated websites that fail to generate sales. We build modern, beautiful sites that convert traffic into leads and real impact for our clients — and increasingly, we back those sites with smart automation that keeps the leads moving.

title: Operations and Billing Admin Assistant - WEST

title: Video Editor (PHP 370/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!

We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.

We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.

BENEFITS INCLUDE:
- 100% remote
- Weekly pay
- USD $6 / Hour = 370 PHP / Hour
- Paid training
- No work during the weekends
- Opportunity to go from part time to full time
- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)
- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards

WHAT YOU WILL DO:

Short form (main focus):
- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn
- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts
- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage
- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse

Long form & channel support:
- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key  ---------- nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)
- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)
- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks
- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)
- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations

Collaboration & cadence:
- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities
- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team
- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand

Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):
- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)
- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week
- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

Experience & portfolio:
- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos
- Strong portfolio showing:
Before/after edits from long form to short form
YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed
Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)

Tool competence (we provide licenses):
You will work daily inside:
- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)
- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)
- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)
- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)
- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)
- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)
- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)
- ClickUp (task management)
- Slack (communication)

You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.
Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)
- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently
- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations
- Quiet environment to work

TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):
- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)
CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)
RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)
Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects
GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.

- Software capability:
Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.

-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption
Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus

- Other:
Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls
Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work

If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.

SCHEDULE:
You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.

title: Operations & Tech Assistant (Make.com / GHL / AI Automation)
description:
