title: AI Engineer
description:
Built on over four decades of pioneering research at Princeton University, our platform represents the leading edge of innovation in freight and transportation planning. We help customers unlock double-digit revenue gains and drive smarter, data-driven operations at scale.
With the recent close of our Series C funding round led by Koch Disruptive Technologies, we’re entering an exciting new phase of growth. Today, Optimal Dynamics is a high-growth company of ~70 employees, backed by top-tier investors including Bessemer Venture Partners, The Westly Group, Activate Capital, and Koch. 

We're on a mission to redefine the way logistics decisions are made—and we’re just getting started.

About Our Team

We are a team of bright, kind, and solution-oriented people focused on creating value for our customers. We can solve problems individually, but understand that the best solutions are found when the team brainstorms ideas together. We are excited about balancing the need to deploy new solutions quickly and designing solutions that are secured, reliable, maintainable, and scalable for the long run.

About The Role
We’re looking for a Senior AI Engineer to lead the 0?1 buildout and 1?n scaling of AI capabilities at Optimal Dynamics. You’ll set direction, establish engineering standards, and deliver production systems that ground AI outputs in trustworthy company and customer data. This is a hands-on role with broad ownership where you’ll make key architecture and tooling choices and evolve them as we learn.

Key Responsibilities:

Own RAG initiatives end-to-end from problem framing and data readiness through prototyping, iteration, and production launch.

Establish foundational components and practices for document processing, indexing, retrieval, orchestration, and evaluation; selecting tools and approaches that balance quality, cost, and speed.

Build reliable services and APIs that are observable, secure, and designed for scale in a cloud environment.

Define success metrics (quality, latency, cost, safety) and drive continuous improvement via experimentation and data-driven decisions.

Create durable team assets (i.e. playbooks, test harnesses, checklists, and documentation) to make RAG development repeatable across products.

Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Data/ML, Engineering, and GTM to translate ambiguous needs into shippable capabilities with clear business impact.

Mentor teammates and contribute to a strong engineering culture around AI systems and responsible deployment.
Who You Are
Experienced: a Senior, hands-on engineer who can take a fuzzy problem from discovery to reliable production outcomes.

Pragmatic: You balance quality, cost, speed, and risk to ship value iteratively.

Innovative: Comfortable choosing and evolving the stack as needs change; you create guardrails and standards along the way.

Communicative: You have the ability to align stakeholders and translate complex technical ideas into clear decisions.

Operational Owner: You care about reliability, observability, and measurable impact on customers and the business.
Key Qualifications
4+ years of proven industry experience building and operating backend, platform, or data services at production scale 
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Operations Research, or Mathematics/Physics
Proven track record delivering data or ML-powered features end-to-end (Discovery/Prototyping > Launch > Iteration).
Python Proficiency - you write well-tested & maintainable code.
API design expertise and experience with cloud services (preferably AWS)
Familiarity with information retrieval concepts and grounding AI systems in trustworthy data.
Comfort setting technical direction, selecting tools, and establishing engineering best practices for AI-focused builds. 
Nice to Have (Bonus Points)
Experience introducing retrieval-augmented or knowledge-grounded AI capabilities in a product or platform context.
Exposure to evaluation methodologies for AI systems (quality, latency, cost, safety) and running experiments/A-B tests.
Background working with unstructured data pipelines, indexing, and search, whether homegrown or via managed services.
Experience mentoring engineers, uplifting practices, and creating reusable playbooks and templates.
Experience in the transportation, logistics, or broader supply chain industry.
Customer-facing collaboration comfort: gathering requirements, scoping MVPs, and measuring ROI post-launch.
Why Join Us
At Optimal Dynamics, you’ll work with a world-class AI team and industry experts to tackle some of the most complex and impactful challenges in logistics. You’ll have the opportunity to shape a greenfield capability from the ground up—setting strategy, architecture, and standards while seeing your work directly power decisions for leading logistics companies. You’ll thrive in a pragmatic, collaborative culture with tight feedback loops, the autonomy to choose the right tools, and the support to make bold ideas a reality. Along the way, you’ll partner with experienced engineers, data and ML practitioners, and industry experts.

If you’re passionate about building AI products that solve real-world problems, we’d love to hear from you.

Pay Range

$2000 - $2500 USD

Benefits

Competitive compensation, including Series C level equity
Health / Dental / Vision 100% covered for employee and 50% for dependents
Life Insurance, with optional supplemental insurance
Flexible Spending Account (FSA)
Health Spending Account (HSA)
401(k) with match
Unlimited PTO (vacation, personal days, sick days, jury duty, military leave, bereavement)
11 Holidays
Paid Parental Leave for all employees
Short-term and Long-term Disability Insurances, and AD&D Insurance
Fitness membership reimbursement
Commuter benefits
Optimal Dynamics is proud to be an equal opportunity employer that celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive workplace with equal opportunity for all applicants and employees. Our goal is to recruit the most talented people from a diverse candidate pool regardless of race, color, ancestry, national origin, religion, disability, sex (including pregnancy), age, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, marital status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

Optimal Dynamics is committed to working with and providing access and reasonable accommodation to applicants. If you require an accommodation, please reach out to  ----------  once you've begun the interview process. All requests for accommodations are treated discreetly and confidentially, as practical and permitted by law.

title: AI-Augmented Laravel + Vue 2 Developer / Engineer (EU property/SaaS-tech, remote)
description:
Role
We are looking for a strong, reliable engineer who likes to move fast with AI tools and still ships carefully. We care heavily about clear communication, good decisions, and a clean trial result.

About us
We are a European property-tech company. We maintain a long-running Laravel application with Blade, Vue 2, Bootstrap, and tenant-scoped data patterns. We use GitLab merge requests. We care about security, privacy, and small reviewable changes.

How we work
We use an AI-assisted development workflow. You are expected to use coding assistants to speed up analysis and implementation, but you treat generated output as draft work: clarify scope, plan the change, verify behaviour, keep diffs small, and prove changes with sensible and thorough checks and testing before review.

This role is a great fit if you like turning requirements into a short plan, using AI where it helps, keeping changes easy to review, and checking your work before you ask for feedback. It is not a fit if you want to ship large unreviewed blocks of AI-generated code.

What you will do
- Deliver scoped changes on a mature Laravel + Vue 2 codebase using AI-assisted methods safely.
- Open merge requests with clear descriptions, scoped commits, and tests where applicable.
- Communicate in writing about plan, trade-offs, and verification steps.

Requirements
- Demonstrable AI-assisted workflow in real product work (you can explain it concretely).
- Comfortable working in Laravel in a larger codebase, including reading and navigating existing code you did not write yourself.
- Comfortable with Vue 2 in production, or strong Vue experience with a clear plan to work within Vue 2 patterns in this codebase.
- Comfortable with Blade templates and web security (escaping, CSRF, safe handling of user input).
- Solid Git habits: branches, scoped commits, merge request workflow.
- Written English strong enough for async work with EU stakeholders.
- Ideally 4 to 6 hours overlap per workday with CET business hours (Monday to Friday). Please state your timezone and the CET window you can reliably cover each workday.

Nice to have
- AI-assisted work on legacy codebases (careful refactors, incremental upgrades, tenant-scoped features).
- Laravel Mix / Webpack and Docker-based local builds.
- Multi-tenant SaaS experience.

Trial (before any production access)
We run a mini-trial on a sandbox repository that mirrors our stack patterns but contains no production code or customer data. Timebox is about 4 to 6 hours, agreed upfront.

You may use AI tools during the trial, but you must not paste secrets, customer data, production logs, or private business information into external tools. You must be able to explain and defend everything you submit.

How to apply (English, no template letters)
1) Your current AI-assisted workflow: how you scope prompts, verify output, and prevent scope creep.
2) One example where an AI tool gave a wrong or risky suggestion. How did you catch it?
3) Either (A) walk us through one concrete merge request or commit you authored where AI was your primary tool: what you prompted, what came back, and what you changed before merge, or (B) if you cannot share a link, describe your first 30 minutes on an unfamiliar legacy Laravel/Vue task before you edit code.
4) How do you keep AI-assisted changes small and reviewable in a legacy monolith?
5) Multi-tenant safety: what checks would you do before changing a query that returns tenant-owned records?
6) What information must never be pasted into external AI tools? Name categories, not examples from real projects.

Do not apply if
- You are not the person who will do the work.
- You ship AI output without verification.
- You cannot describe your workflow concretely.
- You only have Vue 3 experience and cannot commit to Vue 2 patterns in this codebase.

title: Customer Experience Lead $3,000-$4,000
description:
Customer Experience Lead

READ THIS FIRST — DO NOT APPLY UNLESS

You've LED customer support at a DTC subscription/rebill brand (supplements or health a big plus), not worked as one agent on a team
You've built a support function from scratch, or know exactly how: helpdesk, SOPs, team, the whole thing
You understand chargeback PREVENTION cold: keeping disputes from ever being filed, not winning them after
You've hit fast response standards (think sub-15-minute) through systems and coverage, not by personally living in the inbox
You've hired, trained, and managed support agents
Fast, responsive, available 6 days/week on EST hours

If that's not you, don't apply. If it is, keep reading.

The role

We're a DTC supplement brand on a subscription/rebill model, scaling aggressively. On track for 8 figures this year, targeting 9 across brands next year.
You'll own the entire customer experience function and build it from the ground up. Right now there's no helpdesk, no SOPs, no team. You build all of it. You're not a ticket-answerer. You're the leader who designs the system, hires the people, sets the standard, and owns the numbers, especially the one that matters most: chargebacks stay near zero.

What you'll own

The system

Set up and run the helpdesk (Gorgias): views, tags, routing, macros, automations, AI agent
Write the SOPs for every high-volume issue: refunds, cancellations, WISMO, rebill complaints, chargebacks
Build the KPI dashboard: first response time, resolution time, CSAT, refund rate, chargeback ratio

The team

Hire, train, and manage the support team
Build shift coverage that holds a 15-minute first response, 24/7, without you living in the inbox
Run QA, coaching, and accountability so quality holds as we scale

Subscription & retention

Own the rebill support experience: cancellations, save flows, failed payments, "why was I charged again"
Refund-first, proactive, customer-trust-protecting approach

Chargebacks (our #1 metric)

Keep the chargeback ratio under 0.5% through prevention: fast refunds, easy cancellation, clear billing descriptors, rebill reminders, pre-dispute alerts (Disputifier/Ethoca/Verifi), RDR, fraud screening at checkout
A filed chargeback is a loss even if we win it. Your job is they never get filed.

Scale

Build it so it clones. We're going from one brand to many; the system has to drop onto the next brand without starting over.


Requirements

Led CS/CX at a DTC subscription or rebill brand (supplements/health a plus)
Built a support function from scratch, or can prove you know how
Real chargeback prevention experience and knowledge of processor ratio thresholds
Hands-on helpdesk experience (Gorgias ideal, Zendesk/Reamaze fine)
Hired and managed agents
Extremely responsive, detail-obsessed, EST hours, 6 days/week


Why this role

You lead a department and build it your way, with real ownership from day one
Direct line to the founder, no bureaucracy
We're scaling to many brands. Build this well and you grow into running CX across all of them, with a real path to a senior/C-suite seat.


To apply, answer these (Yes/No or one line each)

Have you led a subscription/rebill brand's support? Which one, and what volume were they doing monthly?
Have you built an entire customer service team from scratch — if not, why do you think you would be capable of doing so?
How do you keep chargebacks from ever being filed and the ratio low? Name your tactics.
What chargeback ratios are you familiar with maintaining, and which chargeback alert tools have you used or know?
Have you held a 15-minute response time 24/7 using systems you built? How?
Can you work 6 days/week on EST hours?

title: Expert Maintenance Coordinator, Property Management
description:
Maintenance Coordinator (Property Management) — REAL Experience Required, Live SOP Test Day One

Dreamteam Property Management is hiring an experienced Maintenance Coordinator. Before you apply, read this in full, because we screen differently than most.
Do NOT apply unless you have 2+ years of hands-on experience in property management or maintenance coordination. We can tell within minutes whether someone has actually done this work. Generic resumes, AI-written cover letters, and "I can learn anything fast" messages will be ignored. Experience is heavily rewarded here, in pay and in responsibility.
How we hire: No long back-and-forth. Finalists complete a live, real-time SOP test. We will hand you an actual work order scenario and watch how you triage it, dispatch it, communicate with the tenant and vendor, and document it, on the spot. If you have truly done this job, you will move quickly and confidently. If you have not, it will be obvious. There is no way to fake your way through it.
What you'll actually do:

Intake and triage maintenance requests across single-family and multifamily units
Dispatch and follow up with vendors, hold them to scope and timeline
Communicate clearly with tenants and owners throughout the job
Document everything accurately in our system.
Manage nudge and escalation sequences so nothing falls through the cracks

You should know, cold:

The difference between an emergency, urgent, and routine work order
How to handle an angry tenant and a no-show vendor in the same hour
Trade basics: when a job needs a plumber vs. handyman, what a reasonable bid looks like, when to push back on a vendor invoice

To apply, answer these three in your message (skip them and you're out):

How many years have you coordinated maintenance, and for roughly how many units?
Walk me through how you'd handle a no-heat call at 9pm in January.
What property management software have you used?

We respond to qualified, experienced applicants only. Serious operators, we'd love to meet you.

title: Advanced SEO Specialist / SEO Strategist
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled SEO Specialist / SEO Strategist to join our team and help manage SEO campaigns for multiple businesses across different industries.

This is not a basic “write meta titles and install Yoast” role. We need someone who understands SEO at a strategic level and can think beyond checklists. The ideal candidate knows how to diagnose ranking problems, build content strategies, improve technical SEO, analyze competitors, and help turn organic traffic into real leads and revenue.

You should be comfortable working independently, researching deeply, making clear recommendations, and explaining why a specific SEO action matters.

Responsibilities

You will be responsible for planning, executing, and improving SEO strategies across client websites.

Your work may include:

Conducting full SEO audits, including technical SEO, content quality, site structure, keyword targeting, internal linking, indexing issues, Core Web Vitals, crawlability, and backlink profiles.

Performing advanced keyword research based on search intent, business value, competition level, conversion potential, and topical authority.

Creating SEO content strategies that include pillar pages, supporting articles, service pages, location pages, comparison pages, and long-tail keyword opportunities.

Analyzing competitors to identify content gaps, backlink gaps, ranking opportunities, SERP patterns, and weaknesses we can exploit.

Optimizing existing website pages for better rankings, higher CTR, better internal linking, stronger topical relevance, and improved conversions.

Working with writers, designers, developers, and marketing managers to make sure SEO recommendations are actually implemented correctly.

Improving website structure, URL architecture, navigation, schema markup, internal linking, and crawl depth.

Monitoring Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Ahrefs/Semrush, Screaming Frog, and other SEO tools to find issues and opportunities.

Creating monthly SEO reports that explain what changed, what improved, what declined, why it happened, and what we should do next.

Identifying and fixing indexing problems, duplicate content, cannibalization, thin content, broken links, redirect issues, sitemap problems, robots.txt issues, and technical bottlenecks.

Building local SEO strategies, including Google Business Profile optimization, local landing pages, citations, reviews, and location-based keyword targeting.

Helping develop backlink and digital PR strategies when needed, including outreach targets, linkable assets, guest post opportunities, and brand mentions.

Using AI tools intelligently for research, outlines, briefs, clustering, optimization, and analysis — but not blindly publishing generic AI content like a content farm from 2013.

Required Skills

You must have strong experience with:

Google Search Console
Google Analytics / GA4
Ahrefs, Semrush, or similar SEO tools
Screaming Frog or Sitebulb
WordPress SEO
Technical SEO
On-page SEO
Keyword research
Content strategy
Competitor analysis
Internal linking strategy
Local SEO
SEO reporting
Basic HTML/CSS understanding
Schema markup basics
Page speed and Core Web Vitals basics

Experience with Shopify, WooCommerce, Webflow, or custom CMS platforms is a strong plus.

What We Are Looking For

We want someone who is analytical, detail-oriented, and strategic.

You should be the kind of person who does not just say, “traffic dropped.” You should be able to investigate and say:

“Traffic dropped because these 4 pages lost rankings after a competitor expanded their topical coverage, our internal links are weak, and Google is now favoring pages with stronger commercial intent. Here’s what we should do.”

That is the level we are looking for.

You should also be comfortable challenging ideas. If a client, writer, or manager suggests something that does not make sense for SEO, we expect you to explain the better approach clearly and professionally.

Nice-to-Have Skills

Experience with SEO for service businesses
Experience with e-commerce SEO
Experience with local SEO for multi-location businesses
Experience building topical maps
Experience with programmatic SEO
Experience with conversion rate optimization
Experience using Make, Zapier, Airtable, or Google Sheets for SEO workflows
Experience creating content briefs for writers
Experience managing SEO projects in ClickUp, Asana, Trello, Monday, or similar tools

Work Style

This is a remote position. You must be reliable, communicative, and able to manage your work without constant supervision.

We value clear thinking, honest reporting, and execution. We do not need vanity metrics. We need someone who understands that SEO is not just about rankings — it is about bringing the right traffic that can turn into leads, sales, and revenue.

Requirements

Strong written English
Reliable internet connection
Ability to work during agreed hours
Ability to communicate clearly through chat and video calls when needed
Ability to document your work
Ability to meet deadlines
Ability to research and solve problems independently

To Apply

Please send the following:

A short introduction about yourself and your SEO experience
Examples of SEO campaigns or websites you have worked on
The SEO tools you use regularly
A short explanation of how you would audit a website that is not ranking well
Your expected monthly salary
Your availability and preferred work schedule

Please include the word “Topical Authority” in your application so we know you read the full job description.

title: Google Ads Specialist
description:
About Spearlance Media
Spearlance Media is a website design and digital marketing agency that helps businesses grow through high-quality websites, SEO, Google Ads, email marketing, and digital strategy.

We work with a variety of service-based businesses, including home service companies, healthcare clinics, professional service businesses, and other growing companies that need better websites and stronger online marketing.

About the Role
You will be trusted to manage campaigns independently, make optimization decisions on your own, and deliver results without hand-holding. If you need constant direction launch campaigns, this role isn’t for you.

The chosen candidate will demonstrate results through client retention and lead goal achievement. S/he will be rewarded with performance bonuses. As we continue to grow, this person has a clear path to leading and eventually running our Google Ads department.

This role is ideal for someone with proven, hands-on experience running Google Ads campaigns for local service businesses such as construction, home services etc. We're a full-service digital marketing agency working with 8- and 9-figure construction companies, and we need someone who can own campaigns end-to-end without being managed through the process.

This is not a learning role and will not require supervision. You must already understand how to build, optimize, and scale Google Ads campaigns that generate real leads for local businesses.

Key Responsibilities
Build, manage, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Performance Max as applicable) for construction and home service clients
Research and implement strong local keywords relevant to each client's services and market
Write high-converting ad copy and continuously test for improvement
Monitor and troubleshoot conversion tracking, campaign performance, and budget pacing
Update and optimize GoHighLevel landing page templates to support campaign performance
Identify underperforming campaigns and make proactive recommendations
Join a weekly check-in (8AM–4PM EST window) to share campaign updates with operation manager
Build automations in GoHighLevel to support lead follow-up and campaign workflows

Required Skills & Experience
2–4 years of hands-on Google Ads experience, specifically for lead generation
Proven results running campaigns for local service or construction businesses
Strong understanding of campaign structure, bidding strategies, Quality Score, and conversion tracking
Experience updating and optimizing landing pages in GoHighLevel
Ability to analyze performance data and make independent optimization decisions
Fluent in English with clear written and verbal communication
Organized, reliable, and accountable for campaign outcomes

Nice to Have
GoHighLevel automation experience
Google Analytics 4 and/or Google Tag Manager experience
Experience managing campaigns across multiple client accounts simultaneously
Google Ads certification (or equivalent practical experience)

What Success Looks Like
Campaigns are generating consistent, qualified leads for clients
Cost per lead improves over time
Budgets are paced accurately and nothing is wasted
Account managers have clear, actionable updates to share with clients each week
Issues are flagged and addressed before they become problems

Work Style & Expectations
Works independently and owns outcomes
Proactive about identifying optimization opportunities without being asked
Comfortable being the internal expert on Google Ads and trusted to deliver
Clear communicator who can explain campaign performance 

If you've read this far, please include "Google Ads Pro" at the start of your application.

Pay: $8-$10 depending on experience 
Schedule: Monday to Friday (EST) / 8PM – 4AM PHT | Weekends and US Holidays off Long-term opportunity for the right person.

To Apply, Please Send 
Your resume
Examples of Google Ads campaigns you've managed
Campaign results or screenshots you can share
A brief note on your GoHighLevel experience

title: GHL Automation Specialist (VA) - Part-Time, Remote
description:
Practivo AI builds done-for-you AI automation systems for personal injury law firms and medical practices. Every client account lives inside GoHighLevel. We need a GHL specialist who can own those systems precisely and reliably, and work hand-in-hand with our Account Manager to keep every client running smoothly. The right person in this role has a clear path to leading and managing a VA team as we scale.  Visit our website at practivo.ai to learn more about the owner (me) and our services.

WHAT YOU'LL DO...
1. Build and QA GoHighLevel workflows, automations, pipelines, and sub-accounts for client accounts
2. Receive build briefs from our Account Manager (AM), deliver on time with a clear written handoff
3. Investigate and fix workflow issues flagged by the AM within 24 hours
4. Proactively monitor client accounts, catch errors before the AM or client has to ask
5. Pull monthly performance reports and maintain client trackers in Airtable
6. Handle A2P 10DLC registration admin and Google Drive file organization (SOPs provided for both)

YOU'RE THE RIGHT FIT IF...
- You have built real GoHighLevel workflows, pipelines, automations, sub-accounts (not just tutorials)
- You send updates before being asked and communicate in writing with precision
- You QA everything yourself before it goes to anyone else
- You can explain what you built to a non-technical Account Manager in plain, clear language
- You want to grow with the company, not just do the work, but eventually lead a team doing it

GROWTH PATH...
This role starts hands-on. As Practivo grows, we are actively looking for someone to step into a VA Team Lead position - managing, training, and QA-checking a team of VAs. If that is the direction you want to grow, this is where it starts.

DETAILS...
Hours: 15–20/week to start — grows with client load and role
Schedule: Async — work your own hours, daily update required, 24-hr turnaround on all tasks
Rate: $5–10/hr USD based on GHL experience — compensation grows as the role grows
Tools: GoHighLevel, Airtable, Google Workspace, Slack. We provide all access.
Start: As soon as possible

HOW TO APPLY
Send a short message answering these two questions:
(1) Describe a GoHighLevel workflow you built — what was it for and what did it do?
(2) You finish a build and it's QA'd. What does your handoff message to the Account Manager look like?

Applications that skip these questions will not be reviewed. We are looking for reliable and personable, not just experienced.

title: GoHighLevel Landing Page Developer
description:
REViVE Marketing Partners is a boutique Amazon agency that helps better-for-you CPG brands grow with elite-level strategy and relentless execution. We've scaled our own CPG brand to eight figures, grown multiple clients 6–8x, and built a small, high-performance team that operates with integrity, humility, and genuine care.
We operate fast, we operate honestly, and we operate with impact.
If you take initiative, sweat the details, and treat the work like it's your own brand on the line, you'll fit here.
This is project-based work paid per page, not a salaried or hourly role. If we work well together there's steady ongoing volume, but every page is its own scoped job with its own price.

What You'll Own
This is real build ownership, not just dragging blocks around. You'll be the person I hand a video and copy to, and trust to turn it into a page that converts.
Page Builds: Build VSL landing pages (video sales letter style) and other page types directly in my GoHighLevel website builder. I give you the video, the copy, and example pages to model. You turn that into a clean, fast, conversion-ready page that matches the reference
Speed & Turnaround: When I send a page, I need it back in days, not weeks. Fast, reliable turnaround is the whole point of this role
Quality & QA: Every page works on mobile and desktop, with working buttons, forms, and tracking. Pages match the reference and look right the first time. I should not have to send a page back three times
Funnel Structure: Set up pages correctly inside GHL so they connect properly to forms, follow-ups, and tracking, not just sit there as a pretty static page

What We're Looking For
Real, demonstrated experience building inside GoHighLevel specifically. Not Wordpress, not Webflow, not "I can learn it." GHL is its own animal and I need someone who already knows the builder cold
VSL landing page experience specifically
GHL funnel and automation experience
Fast turnaround with the ability to juggle multiple page requests at once
Highly detail-oriented. You match the reference and catch your own mistakes before I see them
Reliable communicator, able to work overlap with US Central time
A portfolio of live GHL pages you've actually built
Nice to Have: light design eye / creative direction · ClickUp and Slack proficiency · experience building full funnels from scratch

Our Team
We're a small, tight-knit team where everyone's work is visible and your ideas actually get heard. There's no corporate bureaucracy here, just a group of driven people who care deeply about the brands they work with and each other.

Our Values
We're a faith-driven, value-first team. These aren't just words, we live them daily.
Results · Relationships · Integrity · Responsiveness · Confidence · Continuous Learning
If that doesn't resonate with you, we're probably not your team, and that's okay.

How to Apply

Email  ----------  with the subject line: GHL Landing Page Developer – Your Name
Include:
Links to GHL landing pages you've actually built (live URLs preferred)
Your price per page, and how that price changes by complexity (simple VSL page vs. longer multi-section page)
Your typical turnaround time per page
Whether you've built VSL pages specifically
Tools you use daily and any GHL experience details

title: Virtual Assistant Lead – Guest Relations & Operations (High EQ Communicator)
description:

description:

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
Customer Support Specialist (Email)

We're a fast-growing eCommerce brand and we're looking for a sharp, reliable Customer Support Specialist to handle our email inbox and keep our customers happy. This role is for someone who writes clean, friendly, native-level English and can solve problems fast.

What you'll do:
- Reply to customer emails daily (order questions, shipping, refunds, product questions, subscriptions).
- Handle order issues directly: tracking, address changes, cancellations, replacements.
- Process refunds and resolve disputes calmly and professionally.
- Manage subscription requests (pause, cancel, swap, billing questions).
- Turn unhappy customers into satisfied ones by solving the actual problem, not just deflecting.
- Flag recurring issues, refund patterns, or product complaints so we can fix the root cause.
- Keep response times fast and tone consistent with our brand voice.

Required Skills + Experience:
- Native or near-native written English. Your replies must read like a native speaker wrote them.
- Able to use AI for help (Claude, ChatGPT and etc).
- Understanding of order management, refunds, and subscription apps.
- Calm, empathetic, and professional under pressure, including with angry or confused customers.
- Strong attention to detail.
- Self-managing: you can handle a full inbox without constant supervision.

Work Speed:
- Must respond to emails within our target turnaround (same-day on weekdays).
- Must be able to handle high daily email volume without quality dropping.

When you apply, send: (1) a short note on your relevant experience, (2) any tools you've used, and (3) one example of how you handled a difficult customer.

title: Guest Services • Vacation Rental Management
description:
STR Management • Guest Services Representative
Austin, Texas | Vacation Rental Property Management

STR Management is a premier vacation rental company headquartered in the lively city of Austin, Texas. We take immense pride in delivering top-notch property management services to vacation rental property owners while ensuring guests have unforgettable experiences. Currently, we manage a growing portfolio of 160+ properties, and as part of our international team, you will play a pivotal role in supporting this expansion by becoming intimately familiar with a large and diverse property portfolio.

Primary responsibilities will include:

• Guest Communication - Engage with guests through multiple online travel agency platforms and communication channels, including email, text, and phone.. Ensure all communication is tailored to each guest’s needs and preferences, creating a personalized experience.

• Phone Support & Timely Response Standards - Respond to all guest messages within 2 minutes during operational hours to maintain our high standard of responsiveness. Answer and manage incoming phone calls during your scheduled shifts.

• Guest Support Coverage Windows - We are a 24/7 business operating in Central Standard Time (CST), with varying shift schedules to ensure round-the-clock guest support. We have varying shift schedules to cover the morning, afternoon, evening, and overnight to be available for our guests around the clock.

• Channel Relations & Booking Support - Build and maintain relationships with channel account representatives. Address escalations and troubleshoot booking-related issues as needed.

• Internal Coordination - Collaborate efficiently with our cleaning and maintenance teams to gather documentation for guest refund requests, Air Cover claims, and damage waiver claims.

Qualifications:
• Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal
• Strong customer service orientation focused on guest satisfaction
• Comfortable working in a high-volume, fast-paced environment managing multiple properties simultaneously
• Tech-savvy with the ability to troubleshoot independently and use available resources effectively
• Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills
• Available to work scheduled shifts, including some weekends and holidays
• Prior experience in vacation rental or hospitality industries is a plus
• Access to a secure, reliable internet connection and a laptop capable of handling work communications

Benefits:
• Competitive starting wage
• Opportunities for career growth and development
• Collaborative and supportive team environment

? Application Questions
To be considered for this role, please answer the following application questions and share your resume:

1. Customer Service Experience: Briefly describe your customer service background, including the length of time and your direct involvement with customers or guests. Share a specific example where you went above and beyond to ensure guest satisfaction. How did you personalize communication, and what was the outcome?

2. Managing Multiple Inquiries: Describe a time when you successfully handled multiple guest inquiries at once. How did you prioritize and ensure timely, satisfactory responses?

3. Problem-Solving: Share a difficult guest situation you successfully resolved on your own by troubleshooting independently. What steps did you take, what tools or resources did you use, and how did you ensure the information you provided was accurate?

4. Technical Skills: What communication tools, software, or booking platforms have you used in managing guest interactions? Do you have reliable internet and a laptop suitable for this role?

5. English Proficiency: Please rate your proficiency in written and spoken English.

6. Availability: We are a 24/7 business with shifts scheduled to cover the morning, afternoon, evening, and overnight (CST), including some weekends and holidays. What shift windows are you available for? Please confirm your local time zone and explain how you plan to manage the time difference. What hours are you available to be scheduled?

7. Start Date & Compensation: What is your earliest possible start date? What is your ideal hourly rate?

8. Additional Info: Do you have any questions about STR Management or this role? Is there anything about your career goals or passion for guest services you'd like to share?

If you are a dedicated individual with a commitment to delivering exceptional customer service and possess a talent for effective communication, we enthusiastically invite you to consider applying for the Guest Services role!  Join our team and become a part of our international success story, contributing significantly to guest satisfaction in the vibrant city of Austin, Texas.

title: Web Developer – Interactive Furniture Cost Estimator
description:
We are an interior design firm looking for a skilled web developer to build an interactive furniture cost estimator for our website. The tool will allow potential clients to select furniture items, choose pricing categories, input quantities, and receive an instant budget estimate.

The ideal candidate will have experience in front-end development, JavaScript-based interactive calculators, and optionally back-end integration for dynamic pricing and form submissions.

Responsibilities:
- Develop a responsive web page with a table-based calculator for furniture estimates.
 - User selects a room (Living Room, Bedroom, Dining, etc.) from a dropdown or tab. The form dynamically loads the  furniture items for that room.  Optional: load a photo of the given room...for example, a photo of living room appears when living room is selected
- User selects a room size (small, medium, large, etc.) from a dropdown or tab.  The form automatically 
- User selects a pricing category ($, $$, $$$, $$$$) and will dynamically populate the pricing category below, but allows for adjustment.
- Enable real-time calculation of subtotals and total estimates.
- Capture user emails if users would like to download or have the total estimates emailed to them. 
- Ask user if they would like to be contacted for a complimentary design consultation or an email detailed quote for our design service.
- Implement tracking feature to see which rooms gets the most traffic/usage 

Item    Pricing Category Unit Price ($)    Quantity Subtotal ($)
Sofa         [dropdown] [auto-update] [input] [auto-calc]
Dining Table [dropdown] [auto-update] [input] [auto-calc]
Armchair [dropdown] [auto-update] [input] [auto-calc]
Coffee Table [dropdown] [auto-update] [input] [auto-calc]
Rug                [dropdown] [auto-update] [input] [auto-calc]
Total Estimate:                                                                 [auto-calc]


Requirements / Skills:
- Proficient in HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
- Experience with front-end frameworks (React, Vue, or Angular) is a plus.
- Familiarity with backend technologies (Node.js, PHP, Python, or Firebase).
- Ability to create interactive, real-time calculation features.
- Experience with responsive design and UX/UI best practices.
- Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.
- Good communication skills for understanding project requirements.
- Experience with WordPress or Webflow integration.
- Knowledge of PDF generation and emailing forms from the web page.

How to Apply:

 ---------- 

Please complete the Google Form to provide your contact details, a brief overview experience, portfolio samples, experience, desired project rate, and upload your resume.

title: ClickUp Operations Specialist (Virtual Assistant)
description:
We are a commercial real estate brokerage based in New York City looking for a detail-oriented ClickUp specialist to manage and maintain our internal project management system.

What You'll Do:
- Maintain and update ClickUp workspaces, lists, and custom fields
- Build and adjust task templates and workflow automations
- Clean and organize existing data and field structures
- Debug issues within ClickUp as they arise
- Implement changes based on direction from leadership

What You Won't Do:
- Build AI systems or integrations
- Work with third-party APIs or external software development
- Manage agents or client relationships

Requirements:
- Minimum 3 years of hands-on ClickUp experience (not just basic familiarity)
- Comfortable with ClickUp automations, custom fields, templates, and views
- Detail-oriented and organized
- Reliable and responsive — this is an ongoing role, not a one-time project
- Good written English communication

Nice to Have:
- Experience supporting a real estate, sales, or operations team
- Familiarity with CRM or pipeline management concepts

About Us:
Origin CRE is an AI-enabled commercial real estate brokerage in Long Island City, NY. We're growing fast and building the systems to support that growth. You'll be working directly with leadership to keep our operations running cleanly.

title: AI Agent Developer & Operations Specialist
description:
Do NOT send a generic cover letter. We will ignore it.
Step 1: Fill out the application form here:  ----------  — attach your resume/CV.
Step 2: Record a 5–8 minute video answering the four questions below. Upload it to Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube (unlisted) and paste the link in the form.
VIDEO QUESTIONS (all four are required):
•	Show us your screen and walk through a project where you built or deployed an AI agent or automated workflow. What did it do, what tools did you use, and what broke along the way? We want to see a real project, not a slide deck.
•	Our managers are not developers. Explain what an API is and why it matters — as if you are talking to someone who has never written a line of code. This tests whether you can communicate with our team.
•	You are tasked with building an AI agent that automatically sends a follow-up email to a client 3 days after a deal moves to "Closed Won" in a CRM. Walk us through how you would build that — what tools, what steps, what could go wrong, and how you would monitor it.
•	What AI tools or frameworks have you used in the last 90 days? Show us something you are currently working on or learning. We want to see that you are active in this space right now, not that you took a course two years ago.
Applications with completed videos get reviewed first. Bonus points if you also include a GitHub, portfolio, or demo link.
The Role
You will be the technical owner of our AI agent ecosystem. We currently run 30+ automated skills and agents through Claude (Anthropic), OpenClaw, and various API integrations (HubSpot,  ---------- , Google Workspace, RingCentral). Your job is to deploy, maintain, improve, and scale these agents — and build new ones as the business needs them.
This is NOT a traditional software engineering role. You will be working with AI agent frameworks, prompt engineering, API integrations, automated email systems, CRM pipeline automation, and server deployment. You are essentially building AI employees that do the work of real staff members — generating reports, moving deals through pipelines, sending follow-up emails, updating dashboards, and surfacing insights to managers automatically.
You need to be comfortable figuring things out fast in a rapidly evolving AI tooling landscape.
what we need done.
Pipeline & Lead Hygiene (Sales / BCO)
•	Auto-flag inactive leads with no activity after 7 days and alert the manager
•	Auto-flag leads with fewer than 3 contact attempts within 14 days
•	Enforce the 400-lead cap and remove overflow automatically
•	Check if a lead is already a client or on the DNC list before it ever gets dialed
•	Distribute new leads evenly across setters via round-robin logic
•	Run the weekly BCO city report and flag cities below Alliance minimums
•	Assign leads as tasks to BCO Scouts in bulk every Monday
HubSpot Logging & Deal Creation (Sales)
•	Create callback tasks with exact date, time, and context notes
•	Set appointment booked disposition and trigger the thank-you email automatically
•	Run the cleaning calculator and populate the deal price field
•	Associate contact, call, task, and meeting to the deal in a single action
•	Create the pre-presentation task and assign it to the correct presenter
•	Enroll prospects in the email sequence when they request email-only follow-up
•	Flag any HubSpot record not updated before end of shift
Daily Performance Monitoring (Sales / BCO / CS)
•	Alert the manager if a setter hasn't started dialing by 9:05 AM
•	Track daily dials and send a pace alert if they are behind by midday
•	Calculate and report daily talk time per rep
•	Generate an end-of-day KPI summary per setter automatically
•	Measure rep downtime — flag any gap over 5 minutes between calls
Ticket Management (Client Services)
•	Pull the client checklist and verify whether the complaint is in scope before any action is taken
•	Format the ticket title correctly on every ticket, every time
•	Determine the correct ticket type (New Concern, R1, Move to BCO) by checking 3-month client history
•	Create and pin the Master Note with all required fields auto-populated where data exists
•	Auto-tag Edgar, Peter, Taylor, and the assigned handler on every note
•	Send the templated client acknowledgment email immediately on ticket creation
•	Schedule the follow-up email at 8 AM the morning after the correction clean
•	Send the second follow-up if the client does not respond (Template F)
•	Auto-open a service ticket when a survey score comes back at 5 or below
•	Send the R1 Warning Template the  ---------- nt a second-strike ticket is created
•	Block ticket closure if the closure checklist is not complete
•	Flag any ticket open longer than 7 days
•	Track monthly attrition and alert when it approaches $6K
BCO Pipeline Operations
•	Move ticket stages automatically as milestones are hit
•	Calculate profit splits based on building type and billing amount
•	Check Alliance issue history and active contract count before any match is made
•	Pin verification notes and tag the right people on every one
•	Send the Welcome Email on approval and the contract via Google Signature
•	Download signed contracts and file them to the correct Drive folder automatically
•	Check inspection report submission by 8 AM after every first clean and alert if missing
•	Auto-create a BCO ticket the  ---------- nt an Alliance partner gives up a building
•	Send email and SMS outreach sequences automatically on no-answer
HR & Hiring
•	Write the three screening questions for each new job ad
•	Review  ----------  for new applicants as they auto-populate
•	Send reference request outreach to candidates via email
•	Create Google Meet links with correct titles and send confirmation emails
•	Run the Claude Analyzer after every interview, save the PDF, create the Drive link, and paste it into  ---------- 
•	Log manager interview notes from email into the candidate's  ----------  record
•	Run the end-of-day board audit and flag any fields that were not updated
Performance Documentation (All Departments)
•	Pull the full performance history for any employee before a coaching conversation
•	Check whether a written expectation was ever actually sent
•	Check whether a deadline was ever actually set
•	Check Trainual for training completion before any performance action is taken
•	Draft the post-coaching confirmation email from structured notes
•	Flag when an escalation threshold is hit (3rd issue, missed deadline pattern)
•	Compile the full escalation documentation package before a termination
Core Infrastructure (Ongoing)
•	Deploy and manage OpenClaw AI agents on Linux VPS and Docker — ensure 24/7 uptime
•	Build, test, and improve agent skills across sales, service, BCO/HR, and executive reporting
•	Maintain and extend integrations with HubSpot,  ---------- , Google Workspace, and RingCentral
•	Build and maintain HTML dashboards and reporting tools used by managers daily
•	Manage the agents' knowledge layer — SOPs, KPIs, org structure, and process documentation
•	Train non-technical tea ---------- mbers on browser-based tools and new systems
•	Troubleshoot agent failures, API errors, and integration breakdowns — fix them fast
•	Document everything you build so it is not locked in your head
Required Skills & Experience
Must-Have:
•	2+ years working with Node.js / JavaScript in a production environment
•	Experience deploying and managing applications on Linux servers (Ubuntu preferred)
•	Comfortable with Docker, SSH, and basic DevOps (deploying and maintaining agents on VPS instances)
•	API integration experience — REST APIs, webhooks, and OAuth flows
•	Experience with Google Workspace (Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets) including API-level integration
•	Experience building automated email workflows or CRM automation (HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar)
•	Strong English communication — you will work directly with non-technical managers who need clear explanations
•	Ability to train non-technical users on browser-based tools — patience, clear documentation, screen recordings
•	Self-directed and proactive — you do not wait to be told what is broken, you find it and fix it
Strong Preference:
•	Experience with AI agent frameworks (OpenClaw, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, or similar)
•	Prompt engineering skills — writing effective system prompts, managing context windows, and building knowledge bases for LLMs
•	Experience with HubSpot API (deals, contacts, tickets, pipelines, workflows) and  ----------  API
•	Experience building agents or bots that automate multi-step business processes (not just chatbots)
•	Familiarity with vector databases (ChromaDB, Pinecone) and RAG architectures
•	HTML/CSS for building dashboards and reports
•	Experience working with a small team remotely across time zones
Nice-to-Have:
•	Python scripting (some of our automation uses Python)
•	Experience with Pipedream or serverless deployment
•	Familiarity with Anthropic's Claude API or OpenAI API
•	Background in business process automation (not just coding — understanding why we automate)
•	Experience with  ---------- , Zapier, or n8n workflow platforms
How to Apply
Compensation & Growth
•	$1,200 – $2,400 CAD/month depending on experience and skill match
•	Performance reviews at 30, 60, and 90 days with potential raise based on results
•	Long-term role — we are building a permanent AI operations layer, not a one-off project
•	Autonomy — you own the technical stack. If something should be done differently, you tell us
•	Growth opportunity — as One Janitorial scales, so does the AI infrastructure and your role with it

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
About Holistic Vitalis
At Holistic Vitalis, we believe that true wellness comes from harmony within the body and mind. We are dedicated to
providing high-quality, natural wellness products that empower our community to live vibrant, healthy lives. We treat
our customers like family, and our customer support team is at the heart of our mission, ensuring every interaction
reflects our values of empathy, care, and vitality.

Role Overview
We are seeking an empathetic, detail-oriented, and proactive Customer Service Representative to join our growing
team. In this role, you will be the voice of Holistic Vitalis, helping customers navigate their wellness journeys,
resolving order issues, and building meaningful relationships.

You will manage the entire post-purchase customer experience, spanning direct email communication, backend order
management, and active social media engagement (comments and DMs) to ensure our community always feels
heard, valued, and supported. We have extensive AI automations to assist with this workflow and the ideal candidate will have experience working with and managing AI automations. 

Key Responsibilities
1. Email Support & Inquiry Management
• Respond Promptly: Answer customer emails and inquiries within established guidelines with an empathetic, helpful,
and brand-aligned tone.
• Product Education: Guide customers on product benefits, usage guidelines, and ingredients (training will be
provided).
• Problem Resolution: Address complaints regarding product quality, shipping issues, or billing with care and
efficiency.
2. Order Management & Logistics Coordination
• Manage Orders: Monitor and process incoming orders, cancellations, modifications, and address updates.
• Returns & Refunds: Process returns, replacements, and refunds in accordance with company policy.

Holistic Vitalis — Job Description
• Courier Liaison: Coordinate with our fulfillment team 
• Inventory Alerts: Flag recurring product issues or fulfillment delays to management.
• Social Monitoring: Monitor customer comments, mentions, and questions across social media platforms
(Instagram, Facebook, TikTok).
• Direct Messages (DMs): Timely respond to customer DMs with support questions, converting casual inquiries
into loyal customers.
• Brand Advocacy: Engage with the community in a warm, welcoming tone to foster a positive brand image and
defuse public complaints constructively.

Qualifications & Skills
• Experience: 1–3 years of experience in Shopify customer support, social media community management, or
a retail/hospitality customer-facing role.
• Communication: Exceptional written communication skills. You can convey warmth, professionalism,
and understanding through text.
• Technical Savvy: Experience with Shopify and customer support is highly preferred. AI automation experience preferred.
• Social Media Literacy: Familiarity with social media platforms (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok) and social
management tools.
• Problem Solving: A natural troubleshooter who remains calm under pressure and is skilled at defusing tense
situations.
• Passion for Wellness: A genuine interest in holistic health, clean ingredients, or wellness lifestyles is a huge
plus!

title: Senior executive assistant (30+)
description:
# Senior Executive Assistant / Senior Operations Assistant — Evening to Night Shift, Remote
(Please read the whole posting for the keyword - to select serious applicants)

We are looking for a highly experienced, reliable, and highly organized Senior Executive Assistant based in the Philippines to support a business owner working across international markets.

This is a remote role, but it requires senior-level judgment, strong communication, excellent English, business maturity, and the ability to work closely with the owner during live working hours.

## Required Experience

Minimum 5 years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Senior Virtual Assistant, Operations Assistant, Chief of Staff Assistant, Administrative Manager, Client Coordinator, or similar role.

Experience supporting founders, CEOs, business owners, consultants, investors, or international companies is strongly preferred.

## Work Schedule

Monday evening to Friday evening
11:00 PM to 3:00 AM Philippine Time
20 hours per week to start

Please apply only if you are fully available during this schedule and can consistently protect your rest time after the shift. Because this is a night-shift role, we are looking for someone who can rest for at least 6 hours after work and does not have major chores, another job, or family obligations before 9:00 AM Philippine Time.

## Main Responsibilities

You will help with senior executive, administrative, communication, research, and operations tasks, including:

* Supporting the business owner directly with daily priorities and follow-ups
* Confirming meetings by phone, email, or message
* Joining frequent video calls during working hours
* Taking clear, detailed notes on every call
* Organizing schedules, files, tasks, contacts, and follow-up systems
* Preparing summaries, reports, research notes, and simple analysis
* Communicating professionally with clients, vendors, partners, and business contacts
* Tracking action items and making sure nothing is missed
* Helping research markets, companies, people, and opportunities
* Supporting business development, client communication, and operational execution
* Helping improve systems, processes, and workflows over time

## Critical Requirements

You must have:

* At least 5 years of relevant executive assistant, senior VA, administrative, operations, or client support experience
* Availability to work 11:00 PM to 3:00 AM Philippine Time, Monday evening to Friday evening
* Reliable internet connection and a dependable computer
* Comfort working in a live video-call environment during the shift
* Excellent English communication skills, both written and spoken
* Strong analytical thinking and ability to understand business information
* Ability to confir ---------- etings professionally by phone
* Excellent organizational skills
* Strong attention to detail
* Senior-level reliability, discretion, and judgment
* Willingness to learn quickly
* Ability to take detailed notes on every call
* Clean criminal record and willingness to complete a background check, if requested

## Good to Have

These are not required, but they are a plus:

* Canva, design, website, or basic marketing skills
* AI tools and prompt-writing skills
* University education
* Passport or ability to travel outside the Philippines for company meetings in the future
* Knowledge of sales principles
* High emotional intelligence
* Experience supporting executives, founders, consultants, family offices, investors, or international companies
* Experience with Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Excel, Notion, CRM systems, project management tools, or automation tools

## Personality Fit

The ideal person is:

* Mature, honest, and reliable
* Calm under pressure
* Highly organized and detail-oriented
* Comfortable working directly with a business owner
* Able to think ahead and anticipate needs
* Professional on phone and video calls
* Comfortable asking questions when something is unclear
* Able to follow instructions while also thinking independently
* Serious about long-term growth
* Discreet with confidential business information

## How to Apply

Please send the following:

1. A short introduction about yourself
2. Details of your 5+ years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Senior VA, Operations Assistant, Administrative Manager, or similar role
(Please also include the word “SENIOR” in the header of the message so we know you read the full job post carefully)/
3. Examples of executives, founders, business owners, or companies you have supported
4. Your internet speed and computer setup
5. Confirmation that you can work 11:00 PM to 3:00 AM Philippine Time, Monday to Friday
6. Confirmation that you are comfortable being on video calls during work hours
7. Confirmation that you can make phone calls to confir ---------- etings
8. Examples of tools you know, such as Google Workspace, Excel, Canva, Notion, CRM systems, AI tools, or project management tools
9. Your expected monthly salary for 20 hours per week
10. One example of a difficult situation you handled professionally as an assistant or operations support person

title: Marketing & Digital Coordinator
description:
About the role
We are a multi-branch [optical / clinical] practice looking for a versatile, reliable Marketing & Digital Coordinator to keep our online presence running smoothly and looking sharp. This is a hands-on, part-time freelance role suited to someone who can juggle web maintenance, social media, graphic design and marketing campaigns, and who responds promptly to requests from our branches and clinical team.


Key responsibilities

Websites:
- Maintain website(s), including security, domains, hosting, SSL renewals and regular backups
- Make edits and updates to the website on request, with a quick turnaround
- Manage on-page and technical Search Engine Optimisation (SEO)
- Publish regular blogs and updates (content written by our staff/clinicians)
- Produce and send regular (quarterly) email newsletters using Beefree and Optix
- Keep website aesthetics and design current and on-brand
- Ensure marketing campaigns are reflected on the website in a timely fashion
- Maintain Google Business Profile / local listings across all branches
- Ensure the site remains accessible and compliant 
- Regularly check online booking platforms and collaborate with managers

Social media
- Maintain accounts, logins and passwords securely; manage user access
- Plan and publish regular central posts, including Reels and short-form video
- Source, encourage and curate regular posts from individual branches
- Monitor and report on engagement; flag and help respond to online reviews and comments

Graphic design
- Design required graphics on request (social, web, print, campaigns)
- Match the current aesthetic and brand guidelines
- Maintain a tidy, organised library of brand assets and templates
- Deliver a quick turnaround when required

Marketing campaigns
- Develop and maintain a rolling marketing calendar
- Manage the execution of all campaign elements per the campaign checklist
- Reporting & compliance
- Provide regular (e.g. monthly/quarterly) reporting on website traffic, social engagement and campaign performance


Person specification

Essential:
- Demonstrable experience in a similar mixed marketing/web/design role
- Confident editing websites on [WordPress / your CMS]
- Graphic design skills using [Ideally Canva]
- Working knowledge of SEO best practice
- Experience with email marketing 
- Social media management, including creating Reels / short-form video
- Excellent written English and a good eye for design and brand consistency
- Highly organised, responsive, and able to manage multiple requests independently
- A portfolio of relevant work

Desirable
- Experience in the optical healthcare sector
- Experience with paid social/search advertising
- Knowledge of analytics tools (Google Analytics, Meta Insights)

title: IT Vendor Coordinator
description:
VENDOR COORDINATOR — BREEZE IT
Remote | Full-Time | Philippines-Based
Salary: $1,000 – $1,200 USD/month

---

ABOUT BREEZE IT

Breeze IT is a Managed Service Provider (MSP) based in Orange County, California. We provide IT support, systems management, and cybersecurity services to small businesses. Our team is growing and we are looking for a detail-oriented, experienced back-office professional to join us as a Vendor Coordinator.

---

ABOUT THE ROLE

The Vendor Coordinator is a back-office support role that works closely with our Account Manager and technical team. You will be the person who gets things done with our vendors — making calls, sending emails, managing tickets, following up, and seeing requests through to completion. You will not communicate directly with our clients. All client-facing work is handled by our Account Manager.

This is not a general admin role. We are looking for someone with real experience working in or alongside an MSP or IT services environment.

MSP experience is required.

---

WHAT YOU WILL DO

- Contact vendors on behalf of our clients to handle contract renewals, cancellations, pricing changes, and account updates
- Manage vendor-side support tickets escalated by our technical team — follow up, track progress, and drive resolution without needing to loop in our engineers
- Research vendor options, gather quotes, and prepare summaries to help our team make purchasing decisions
- Work with providers like RingCentral, Microsoft, Vonage, and Sage integrators to resolve billing issues, provisioning problems, and service changes
- Keep accurate records of vendor accounts, contract terms, and open action items in our PSA (Autotask)
- Document vendor processes and build runbooks so our team can handle recurring tasks consistently
- Coordinate with our Account Manager and accounting team to act on vendor items as they are identified and handed off to you

---

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- 4+ years in a vendor management, procurement, or back-office coordination role
- Experience working within or alongside a Managed Service Provider (MSP) — this is required
- Familiarity with VOIP and telecom vendors (RingCentral, Vonage, or similar) including how their support and account portals work
- Strong written English — you will be representing Breeze IT in vendor communications
- Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple open items across different vendors at the same time
- Self-directed and comfortable working independently in a remote, async environment

---

TOOLS WE USE

Experience with any of the following is a plus:
- Autotask (PSA / ticketing)
- RingCentral
- Vonage
- Microsoft 365 Admin Center

---

ROLE DETAILS

- Position: Vendor Coordinator
- Type: Full-Time, Remote
- Location: Philippines
- Reports To: Account Manager
- Salary: $1,000 – $1,200 USD/month (based on experience)
- Client Contact: None — this is a back-office role only

---

HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, please send us a message that includes the following:

1. A brief summary of your MSP or IT services experience
2. One example of a vendor issue or escalation you managed from start to finish — what was the situation, what did you do, and how was it resolved?
3. List the vendor portals or platforms you have worked with (e.g. RingCentral, Microsoft, Autotask, etc.)
4. Your expected monthly salary in USD

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed. We are looking for someone who reads carefully and communicates clearly — this is your first opportunity to show us that.

We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Customer Service & Sales Virtual Assistant for Digital Product Business
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a highly organized, tech-savvy, and customer-focused Virtual Assistant to support the daily operations and growth of our digital product business. This role combines customer service, sales support, marketing assistance, and administrative responsibilities. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable working independently while managing multiple tasks.

Key Responsibilities

Customer Service
* Respond promptly to customer inquiries via email, social media, SMS, and other communication channels.
* Resolve customer concerns professionally and efficiently.
* Maintain high customer satisfaction and positive client relationships.
* Follow up with leads, prospects, and customers as needed.

Sales & Appointment Setting
* Conduct sales calls with potential customers.
* Qualify leads and identify customer needs.
* Schedule appointments and consultations.
* Follow up with prospects to increase conversion rates.
* Maintain accurate records of leads and sales activities.

Social Media Management
* Schedule and publish content across social media platforms.
* Monitor comments, messages, and engagement.
* Assist with content organization and implementation of marketing campaigns.
* Support community growth and engagement initiatives.

Video Editing
* Edit short-form and long-form videos for social media, marketing, and educational content.
* Add captions, transitions, graphics, and branding elements.
* Ensure videos are optimized for various platforms.

Funnel Building & Marketing Automation
* Build and maintain sales funnels.
* Set up and manage GoHighLevel accounts, pipelines, automations, and workflows.
* Create landing pages, forms, surveys, and websites within GoHighLevel.
* Monitor funnel performance and make recommendations for improvements.


Email & SMS Marketing
* Create and schedule email marketing campaigns.
* Develop SMS marketing campaigns and automation sequences.
* Monitor campaign performance and engagement metrics.
* Maintain and organize contact databases.

Community Management
* Manage Facebook Groups and online communities.
* Approve new members and moderate discussions.
* Engage with members and answer questions.
* Encourage participation and maintain a positive community environment.
