Design Eye: Ability to create clean, modern UI/UX within the GHL page builder.

Technical Troubleshooting: Expertise in DNS settings (CNAME, A Records, MX Records).

API Knowledge: (Optional but a plus) Experience with Zapier/Make for external integrations.

Deliverables
A fully functional, white-labeled sub-account.

Live website and funnel with tested forms and surveys.

Automated email/SMS sequences for new leads.

A 15-minute "Handover" video walkthrough (Loom) explaining the setup.

How to Apply
Please start your application with the word "Automation" so I know you read this. Include:

A link to a GHL site/funnel you personally built.

Your favorite GHL feature and why.

Your estimated timeline for a full setup.

Pro-Tips for the Hiring Process:
Ask for a Portfolio: Many people claim to be "GHL Experts" but just use pre-made, ugly snapshots. Ensure their design aesthetic matches your brand.

Verification: During the interview, ask them to explain the difference between a Trigger Link and a Custom Value. If they can't answer that, they aren't an expert.

Scope Creep: Be clear if you need them to write the copy (text) for the site, or if you will provide it. Usually, GHL experts build the tech, while copywriters handle the words.

title: AI Growth & Automation Engineer
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly skilled AI Growth & Automation Engineer to join our fully remote team.

This role combines AI automation, systems integration, sales operations, marketing automation, and business process optimization. You will work with international companies to design and implement AI-powered solutions that improve efficiency, generate revenue, and help businesses scale.

This is a full-time remote position for someone who enjoys solving business problems, building systems, and leveraging AI to drive growth.

What You'll Do
AI Automation & Systems
Build AI-powered workflows using tools like Make, Zapier, n8n, and similar platforms
Integrate AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, and other LLMs into business operations
Connect APIs, CRMs, marketing platforms, and internal systems
Design and optimize automated business processes
Monitor, troubleshoot, and improve workflow performance

Sales & Lead Generation
Build AI-assisted lead generation systems
Create automated outreach workflows for email, LinkedIn, and CRM platforms
Support prospect research, enrichment, and targeting
Improve sales efficiency through automation and process optimization
Track and analyze outreach performance metrics

Marketing & Growth
Build and optimize marketing funnels
Automate lead capture and nurturing processes
Use AI tools to create and improve marketing campaigns
Support paid advertising and growth initiatives
Analyze performance data and identify optimization opportunities

Content & AI Operations
Create AI-assisted content for blogs, landing pages, emails, advertisements, and social media
Optimize content for SEO and conversion performance
Develop prompts, templates, and AI workflows for internal teams
Research and evaluate emerging AI tools and technologies

Requirements
Experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or similar platforms
Experience with Make, Zapier, n8n, or other automation tools
Understanding of APIs, webhooks, and system integrations
Experience supporting sales, marketing, operations, or business automation initiatives
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken)
Ability to work independently and manage projects remotely
Reliable internet connection and professional remote work setup

Nice to Have
Experience with HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, or similar CRM platforms
Familiarity with OpenAI APIs and AI application development
Knowledge of Python, JavaScript, or scripting
Experience with Airtable, Notion, Bubble, or other no-code tools
Background in GTM, RevOps, Growth Marketing, or Solutions Architecture
Experience building AI chatbots and customer-facing AI solutions

What We Offer
100% Remote Work
Full-Time Long-Term Opportunity
Work with International Clients
Exposure to Real-World AI Projects
High Ownership and Impact
Growth-Focused Team Environment
Competitive Compensation Based on Experience
Who We're Looking For

We're seeking someone who understands both business and technology and can use AI to improve how companies operate, generate leads, automate workflows, and scale efficiently.

If you're passionate about AI, automation, growth systems, and solving complex business challenges, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Drywall + Painting Quantity Surveyor
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Quantity Surveyor with hands-on experience in drywall and painting scopes to join our growing remote estimating team. This is a client-facing role — you will be the direct point of contact between our firm and the contractors we serve, so professionalism, accuracy, and clear communication are non-negotiable.

Strong plus — Spanish fluency
Fluency in Spanish is a very large plus for this role. A significant portion of the drywall and interior finish contracting workforce communicates primarily in Spanish, and candidates who can operate professionally in both English and Spanish will have a meaningful advantage in client communication, job coordination, and team interaction.

What you'll do
Perform detailed quantity takeoffs for drywall (GWB, Type X, moisture-resistant, shaftwall) and painting scopes from architectural drawings and specifications.

Source and review incoming bid opportunities via email, evaluate project scope and complexity, and determine fit and priority for our clients before distributing to the estimating team.

Serve as a direct client-facing representative — communicate takeoff results, answer scope questions, and build working relationships with drywall and painting contractors.

Deliver clean, organized estimate packages including SF calculations, partition type breakdowns, labor and material summaries, and bid-ready documentation.

Meet bid deadlines consistently and manage multiple projects simultaneously across different clients and project types.

Requirements
Minimum 2 years of experience performing quantity takeoffs for drywall, GWB, or interior finish scopes.

Ability to read and interpret architectural plans, partition type schedules, reflected ceiling plans, and finish schedules.

Strong written and spoken English — this is a client-facing role and professional communication is required at all times.

Experience managing inbound job requests via email and evaluating bid-fit for contractors across different market segments.

Proficiency in takeoff software (Bluebeam, PlanSwift, On-Screen Takeoff, or equivalent) and Microsoft Excel.

Self-directed and reliable — this is a remote position requiring strong time management and accountability.

Nice to have
Prior experience with painting takeoffs including surface prep, primer, and finish coat quantities by surface type.

Background in or knowledge of commercial interior construction — tenant improvement, institutional, or federal projects.

Experience working within an outsourced estimating or service-based model (supporting multiple contractors simultaneously).

title: Financial Operations Specialist for US-based Consulting Company (Quickbooks Online)
description:
ABOUT PESTLAUNCH

PestLaunch helps pest control business owners build better businesses.

Most of our clients are between $300,000 and $3,000,000 in annual revenue. They are great operators, but many lack financial visibility, reporting systems, accountability, and operational structure.

Our mission is simple: Help pest control owners grow faster, become more profitable, and gain clarity in their business.

We do this through implementation, dashboards, scorecards, financial reporting, operational systems, hiring systems, and business coaching.

Unlike most consultants, we don't just tell clients what to do. We help build the systems that make it happen.

As we continue growing, we're looking for a Financial Operations Specialist to own the financial reporting layer of our client experience.

ABOUT THE ROLE

This is not a traditional bookkeeping role.

Yes, QuickBooks experience is required.

But we're not simply looking for someone to categorize transactions.

We're looking for someone who can create financial clarity.

Your job is to ensure every PestLaunch client has accurate, clean, current financial data so we can help them make better business decisions.

You will become our internal QuickBooks expert and a key part of our implementation team.

Your work directly impacts:

• Client dashboards
• Financial reporting
• Business decisions
• Profitability analysis
• Growth recommendations
• Client success

If you enjoy creating order from chaos and helping business owners understand their numbers, you'll love this role.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Client Financial Management

• Manage QuickBooks Online for multiple pest control companies
• Review and maintain accurate books across all assigned clients
• Reconcile bank and credit card accounts
• Categorize transactions correctly
• Match deposits and payments
• Maintain customer and vendor records
• Investigate and resolve discrepancies

Financial Clarity & Reporting

• Implement and maintain PestLaunch financial standards
• Standardize Chart of Accounts across clients
• Prepare monthly Profit & Loss reports
• Review Balance Sheets for accuracy
• Ensure books are current and trustworthy
• Identify unusual expenses, margin issues, reporting gaps, and inconsistencies
• Flag concerns and opportunities to the PestLaunch team

Dashboard Support

• Pull financial data from QuickBooks
• Update dashboard source files and templates
• Verify dashboard metrics match QuickBooks
• Ensure all reporting remains accurate and up to date
• Assist with ongoing dashboard quality control

Process Improvement

• Follow documented SOPs
• Help improve existing processes
• Identify opportunities for automation
• Help create scalable systems as we grow

WHAT THIS ROLE DOES NOT INCLUDE

You will NOT be responsible for:

• Tax preparation
• Tax strategy
• Payroll processing
• Sales tax filings
• IRS communication
• Legal advice
• CPA-level advisory work

Our focus is financial visibility, reporting accuracy, and operational decision-making.

REQUIREMENTS

Must Have

• 4+ years of recent QuickBooks Online experience
• Strong understanding of accounting fundamentals
• Experience reconciling multiple accounts
• Experience managing books for multiple businesses or clients
• Strong attention to detail
• Excellent organizational skills
• Strong written English
• Ability to follow systems and SOPs
• Reliable internet connection
• Quiet work environment

Preferred

• Experience with US-based service businesses
• Experience with pest control, HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, roofing, or home services
• Experience in a bookkeeping firm, accounting firm, agency, or BPO environment
• Advanced Google Sheets experience
• Experience with dashboard reporting
• Experience with Zapier, Make, AI tools, or workflow automation

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

After 90 Days

• Assigned client books are fully current
• Monthly reconciliations are completed on time
• Dashboard numbers match QuickBooks
• Financial reporting is reliable and consistent
• Issues are proactively identified before becoming problems

After 12 Months

• You are the trusted owner of financial reporting inside PestLaunch
• Client financial data is clean, current, and standardized
• Dashboard accuracy exceeds 95%
• Financial reporting systems are scalable across dozens of clients
• PestLaunch leadership trusts the numbers without needing to verify them

COMPENSATION

• Full-Time Position
• Remote
• Long-Term Opportunity

Starting Compensation:

• $700-$1,000/month starting based on experience
• Performance reviews after 60 and 120 days
• Growth opportunities available

The right person can grow into a senior Financial Operations role overseeing multiple tea ---------- mbers and client reporting systems.



HOW TO APPLY

Use the subject line: Financial Operations Specialist – [Your Name]

Include the following:

1. Brief introduction (2-3 paragraphs)
2. How many years of QuickBooks Online experience you have
3. How many businesses or clients you have managed simultaneously
4. A bookkeeping cleanup project you've completed and what you fixed
5. A bookkeeping or accounting challenge you've solved
6. Why you're interested in this role
7. Resume or CV

8. (optional - but big boost) Attach a Loom video - Record a 2-5 minute Loom video answering:

• Who are you?
• Why are you interested in this position?
• What makes you a strong QuickBooks Online operator?
• Why should PestLaunch hire you?

Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.


FINAL NOTE

We care far more about accuracy, ownership, reliability, and problem-solving than formal accounting credentials.

We're looking for someone who wants to become an important part of a growing company, not someone looking for another bookkeeping gig.

If you love systems, numbers, dashboards, and helping businesses improve, we'd love to meet you.

title: AI Solutions Engineer
description:
We’re seeking an AI Solutions Engineer to help design, build, and support AI-driven automations, system integrations, and cloud-based business solutions. This role partners closely with the IT Director to improve processes, connect business systems, and implement practical AI tools that increase efficiency across the organization.
This is an excellent opportunity for a technically strong builder with experience in software development, cloud platforms, automation, or systems integration who wants to grow in AI and solution architecture.

What You’ll Do
AI, automation, and solution development

Systems integration and cloud operations

What Success Looks Like

• Build reliable, maintainable solutions with clear documentation.
• Demonstrate curiosity, ownership, and sound technical judgment.

If you are interested please send your resume to  ----------

title: AI, Data & Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
We're a U.S.-based company that manages a large research and contact database. We're looking for a sharp, detail-obsessed virtual assistant to help us build and maintain that database and keep our daily operations organized and running smoothly.
You'll be the person who keeps our single source of truth clean, current, and well-organized. We work with modern tools — databases, APIs, and AI assistants like Claude — so we want someone genuinely comfortable in that environment, not just basic data entry. Reliability and accuracy matter most; we'll train you on the specifics.

What you'll do:

Enter, clean, and de-duplicate records in our database and spreadsheets
Review possible duplicate matches and flag the ones that aren't clear-cut
Build and clean contact lists, and log outreach results back to the right records
Run recurring data pulls and compile shortlists
Triage inboxes, route messages, and keep cloud files organized
Maintain internal trackers — status, dates, and ownership
Use AI tools to speed up repetitive work, and take on recurring organization tasks as we grow

Must have:

Excellent written English
Strong Excel / Google Sheets — formulas and large datasets
Comfort working with databases: imports, queries, and cleaning large record sets
Hands-on experience pulling and pushing data through APIs
Real familiarity with AI tools, especially Claude, and writing clear, effective prompts
Experience with data entry, list building, and CRM/database tools
Meticulous attention to detail and data accuracy
Self-directed, dependable, and consistent at following a process

Nice to have:

Light scripting (Python or Google Apps Script) to automate repetitive tasks
Experience connecting tools together — wiring a database to an API or chat layer
Exposure to U.S. public-records or property/land data

title: MARKETING & SOCIAL MEDIA VIRTUAL ASSISTANT
description:
MARKETING & SOCIAL MEDIA VIRTUAL
ASSISTANT
Starting Part-Time (20 hrs/week) | Strong Path to Full-Time+ | Long-Term | Remote
California Pools Philadelphia | Countywide Landscape | Countywide Fert & Pest | CW Mulch
Who We Are
We are a family of four home services and outdoor living companies based in the Philadelphia
area, all owned and operated by the same team. Our brands cover the full outdoor living
experience:
• California Pools Philadelphia -- pool construction and renovation
• Countywide Landscape -- outdoor living design and landscaping
• Countywide Fert & Pest -- lawn fertilization and pest control
• CW Mulch -- retail yard supplies and bulk delivery
We are a hands-on, growth-oriented team building out our digital marketing presence across all
four brands. We need a sharp, motivated VA who can help us look great online, grow our
audience, and generate real leads.
The Opportunity
This role starts part-time at approximately 20 hours per week, but we want to be upfront: we see
this growing into a full-time position -- and potentially beyond that -- as our brands expand and
you prove yourself. We are not looking for a temp. We are looking for someone to build with.
We will start by giving you our scripts, tone guides, and brand direction -- but our goal is to
eventually step back and have you running the content calendar on autopilot, bringing ideas to
us rather than waiting for us to assign every task.
If you are the kind of person who sees a competitor ad and immediately thinks 'we could do that
better,' or notices a slow season coming and proactively drafts a campaign -- this role is for you.
What You'll Do
Social Media Management
• Create, schedule, and post content across Facebook, Instagram, and Google Business
Profile for all four brands
• Write captions that match each brand's voice and speak directly to homeowners in the
Philadelphia/tri-state area
• Build and maintain a monthly content calendar
• Engage with comments and messages in a timely, professional manner
• Source or create graphics using Canva or similar tools

Facebook & Instagram Advertising
• Set up and manage paid ad campaigns (lead gen, awareness, retargeting)
• Write compelling ad copy and test variations (A/B testing)
• Monitor ad performance, adjust targeting and budgets, and report results weekly
• Build and maintain custom audiences and lookalike audiences
SEO & Google Maps Optimization
• Optimize and maintain Google Business Profiles for all four companies
• Ensure NAP consistency (name, address, phone) across all directories
• Monitor and respond to Google reviews; develop a review-generation strategy
• Perform basic on-page SEO updates: meta titles, descriptions, image alt text
• Track rankings and organic traffic using Google Search Console and/or SEMrush/Ahrefs
• Identify local keyword opportunities and seasonal content topics
Content & Campaign Ideas
• Proactively bring content ideas, trending formats, and seasonal campaign concepts
• Draft email or SMS campaign copy when needed
• Stay current on what competitors and adjacent industries are doing online
Big Bonus: AI & Automation
We actively use Claude (Anthropic's AI) internally, and if you have experience building simple
automations or workflows using AI tools -- especially Claude -- that is a major plus. Examples
include:
• Automating repetitive reporting or social scheduling tasks
• Building prompt workflows for content drafting or review responses
• Connecting tools via Zapier, Make, or similar platforms
You do not need to be a developer. If you are someone who loves finding smarter ways to get
things done with AI, we want to hear about it.
Who We're Looking For
Required
• 2+ years of experience managing social media and/or paid ads for a business (not just
personal accounts)
• Proven experience with Facebook Ads Manager
• Experience optimizing Google Business Profiles and understanding of local SEO
• Strong written English -- you can write in a brand's voice, not just translate
• Highly organized and self-directed -- you can manage multiple brands without handholding
• Reliable internet connection and availability during US Eastern business hours (overlap
required)
Preferred
• Experience in home services, construction, landscaping, or trades marketing
• Familiarity with Canva, Buffer, Later, Hootsuite, or similar scheduling tools
• Basic knowledge of Google Analytics, Search Console, or SEO platforms
• Experience with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) for content creation or automation
• Video editing for Reels/Shorts is a plus but not required
What We Offer
• Starts part-time (20 hrs/week) with a genuine path to full-time and beyond -- we are
building for the long haul
• Paid 2-week trial to kick things off -- we want it to be a great fit for both sides
• Stable, long-term engagement with a growing multi-brand company
• Competitive compensation based on your experience (discussed during interview)
• Full creative ownership as you grow into the role -- we want a partner, not just a tasktaker
• Clear daily communication via WhatsApp and regular video check-ins -- you will always
know where you stand
• Prompt, reliable payment and a respectful working relationship
How to Apply
Please apply with the following -- applications missing any of these will not be reviewed:
• A short intro (2-3 sentences) about your background in digital marketing
• Links to 2-3 social media accounts or pages you currently manage or have managed
• One example of a Facebook or Google ad campaign you ran -- what was the goal, what
did you do, and what happened?
• Your experience with Google Business Profile optimization (be specific)
• Your hourly rate or monthly rate expectation
• Your availability in US Eastern Time
Bonus points: Tell us about a time you came up with a marketing idea on your own and ran with
it. We are not just looking for someone to execute -- we are looking for someone who thinks.
Four brands, one team, and a lot of room to grow -- let's build something.

title: Customer Service Team Lead | Full-Time
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company in the health and wellness space, managing multiple successful online brands. We are hiring a Customer Service Team Lead to work closely with the CEO in overseeing daily customer support operations, leading a small team, and ensuring consistently high-quality customer experience.
The ideal candidate has strong written communication skills, excellent problem-solving abilities, high empathy, and proven leadership experience. Experience in outreach or cold email communication is also required, as the role may involve supporting customer and wholesale communications. This role begins as a CEO support position focused on email-based sales support. Once you are fully settled and consistently performing well in this role, it will transition into a customer service team lead position.


Key Responsibilities:
Manage and execute email-based outreach and sales support activities
Support daily administrative and operational tasks as needed
Lead, coach, and support Customer Service agents to ensure performance and accountability
Conduct daily check-ins, team huddles, and performance reviews
Handle escalated customer issues and ensure proper resolution.
Assign tasks, manage schedules, and ensure adequate coverage
Monitor key performance metrics (response time, CSAT, productivity) and drive improvements
Provide feedback, coaching, and corrective action when needed
Oversee daily email and chat support operations
Help document, improve, and refine SOPs, workflows, and customer service processes
Handle complex or escalated customer concerns. Ensure timely and proper resolution of high-priority cases
Act as the bridge between customers and higher management when needed
Ensure consistency in customer service quality across the team
Support hiring, onboarding, and continuous upskilling of tea ---------- mbers.
Conduct ongoing skill development sessions
Ensure the team is updated on product, policy, and system changes
Review customer interactions to ensure compliance with service standards and quality metrics.
Work closely with other departments (Ops, Sales, Tech) to resolve issues and improve customer experience
Assist the CEO with Cafely wholesale inquiries, including email-based sales support tasks

Requirements
3–5 years of customer service experience
1–3 years of leadership or team lead experience in a customer support environment
Strong English communication skills (written & verbal)
Hands-on experience with CRM and customer support tools (e.g., Zendesk, Gorgias, Freshdesk, or similar)
Strong problem-solving, decision-making, and leadership skills
Ability to work independently in a remote setup with minimal supervision
Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple priorities

Schedule (Strict)
9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (12:00 AM – 8:00 AM PH Time)
Full 8-hour graveyard shift required
Must be fully available for US hours

Nice to Have
E-commerce experience
Experience with AI tools or automation tools
Experience in scaling support teams
Familiarity with SOP creation and process improvement
Experience supporting both customer service and basic sales/wholesale inquiries
Exposure to AI tools or automation for customer support


What We Offer
Full-time remote role
Training provided
Growth opportunity into higher leadership roles

HOW TO APPLY:

Please submit your cover letter (must include the keyword “I love coffee”) to confirm that you have read the entire job post.
Also include:
CV/Resume
Portfolio (optional)

Then answer the following:

1. How many years of experience do you have in customer service, and how many years were in a team lead or supervisory role? Please briefly describe your key responsibilities.
2. Do you have experience handling both customer support and outbound outreach? Please briefly summarize your roles in each.
3. What tools, CRM platforms, or systems have you used to manage customer communication or outreach at scale?


Only complete applications will be considered. Applicants must be willing to go through a multi-step hiring process, including tests and interviews. If you advance, you will receive an email invitation for the next steps.

What We Offer

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist — CRM Automation & System Rebuild

This is not an entry-level position. We need someone who truly understands GoHighLevel and can create systems that run smoothly with minimal oversight.

What You'll Do

  - Lead nurturing
  - Appointment reminders

  - Client onboarding and retention
- Set up email and SMS automations with triggers and conditions
- Build calendars and booking automations
- Integrate GHL with other systems/tools using Zapier, webhooks, forms, etc.

- Help create systems and processes that are scalable long-term

Bonus Points If You:

- Understand lead flow, compliance-sensitive communication, and long-term client retention
- Have experience rebuilding or restructuring CRMs
- Have experience building automations for appointment-based businesses

Requirements

- Strong understanding of workflows, triggers, campaigns, and pipeline logic
- Ability to work independently and problem-solve
- Strong attention to detail and organization
- Good written English and communication skills
- Reliable and proactive

Position Type:
Part-time or Full-time (depending on experience and availability)

To Apply, Please Submit:

title: Part-Time Technical VA / Website & App Testing Assistant for UK Marketplace Project
description:
Part-Time Technical VA / Website & App Testing Assistant for UK Marketplace Project

Job Type: Part-time
Hours: 10 to 20 hours per week to start
Location: Remote
Salary: Please send your expected hourly rate
Start: As soon as possible

About the Role

I am looking for a reliable, honest and organised part-time worker to support my UK online marketplace project.

The main project is a PCO/PHV car hire and car sales marketplace website and mobile apps. The platform is for drivers, car owners and businesses in the UK private hire vehicle industry.

The first priority will be to test, check, organise and help prepare the website and apps for launch. Later, the role may also include support for other online marketplace projects.

This role is suitable for someone who is good with websites, mobile apps, testing, admin, AI tools, social media and online project support.

Main Responsibilities

1. Website and App Testing

You will help test the website and mobile apps and report any problems clearly.

This includes checking:

* Website pages
* Mobile app screens
* Login and registration
* User accounts
* Car listing process
* Search and filters
* Contact forms
* Buttons and links
* Mobile and desktop layout
* Spelling and wording mistakes
* Broken pages or errors
* Any missing or unfinished sections

You must be able to make clear reports with screenshots, screen recordings and notes.

2. Project Organisation and Updates

You will help keep the project organised and make sure issues are followed up properly.

Tasks may include:

* Creating bug reports
* Keeping a task list
* Checking what has been fixed
* Re-testing after updates
* Communicating clearly with me
* Helping organise information in Google Sheets or documents
* Preparing simple reports

3. AI Tools and Automation

I am interested in using AI to help run and improve the project.

You should be comfortable using tools like ChatGPT and willing to learn AI automation.

Tasks may include:

* Creating AI-assisted replies
* Preparing customer support templates
* Creating car advert templates
* Helping create automated workflows
* Using tools like Google Sheets, Zapier, Make, Notion, Trello or similar
* Helping find ways to save time using AI

You do not need to be an advanced programmer, but you must be willing to learn and use AI tools properly.

4. Social Media and Online Support

You may also help with social media and online promotion.

Tasks may include:

* Setting up or managing social media accounts
* Preparing posts
* Using Canva for simple designs
* Posting content
* Researching competitors
* Helping with online adverts
* Keeping records of content and marketing ideas

5. General Project Support

You may also help with:

* Research
* Data entry
* Admin tasks
* Website content checking
* Writing simple messages or replies
* Preparing documents
* Checking competitors
* Helping manage project progress

Required Skills

Please apply only if you have:

* Good English writing skills
* Good attention to detail
* Experience testing websites or apps
* Ability to create clear reports with screenshots
* Good organisation skills
* Experience using Google Sheets or Excel
* Experience with ChatGPT or other AI tools
* Basic social media knowledge
* Ability to work independently
* Honesty, reliability and good communication

Helpful Extra Skills

These are not required, but would be useful:

* Canva
* Trello, Notion, ClickUp or Asana
* Zapier or Make automation
* WordPress or no-code tools
* Basic SEO
* Meta Business Suite
* App testing experience
* Customer support experience
* Marketplace website experience

Important

This is a long-term part-time role for the right person, but we will start with a small paid trial task first.

The first task will likely be to check the current website and apps and prepare a clear report showing:

* What is working
* What is not working
* What looks unfinished
* What needs fixing before launch
* Screenshots or videos of problems
* Priority level for each issue

How to Apply

Please reply with:

1. Your experience with website and app testing
2. Your experience with AI tools like ChatGPT
3. Your experience with social media or online projects
4. Your expected hourly rate
5. How many hours per week you are available
6. Examples of any similar work you have done
7. Your internet speed and computer setup
8. Why you think you are suitable for this role

Please also start your application with this sentence:

“I have read the full job post and I understand this is for website/app testing, AI tools and project support.”

Applications that do not include this sentence may not be considered.

title: Operations Manager / Amazon Co-Pilot (Private Label)

title: E-Commerce Virtual Assistant – Amazon, TikTok Shopify & Klaviyo Specialist
description:
Riverbend Resources designs and sells innovative poultry products, including our popular chicken feeders and waterers, as seen on Shark Tank. We are looking for a highly qualified, detail-oriented E-Commerce Virtual Assistant to help manage and grow our online sales channels.
This is not a basic VA role. We are looking for someone with hands-on experience in Amazon Seller Central, TikTok Shop, Klaviyo, ecommerce operations, digital marketing, reporting, and marketplace management.
The right person will be proactive, organized, analytical, and comfortable taking ownership of tasks without needing constant direction.

Key Responsibilities
Amazon Seller Central
• Manage and optimize Amazon product listings, including titles, bullet points, descriptions, backend keywords, images, A+ content, and variation setup. 
• Monitor Seller Central account health, customer messages, reviews, Q&A, inventory issues, suppressed listings, stranded inventory, and listing errors. 
• Assist with Amazon SEO, keyword research, competitor research, and listing improvement. 
• Help create, monitor, and improve Amazon advertising campaigns, including Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display. 
• Track ACOS, ROAS, conversion rates, click-through rates, sales, and other Amazon performance metrics. 
• Support product launches, coupons, promotions, deals, and seasonal campaigns. 
• Assist with reporting IP infringement, counterfeit products, knockoffs, and unauthorized listings through Amazon tools such as Brand Registry and related enforcement programs. 

TikTok Shop & Social Commerce
• Help manage TikTok Shop listings, product details, pricing, promotions, and order-related issues. 
• Assist with TikTok Shop affiliate outreach, creator communication, sample coordination, and campaign tracking. 
• Monitor TikTok Shop performance, content opportunities, product trends, and competitor activity. 
• Help organize and track creator posts, affiliate sales, and promotional efforts. 

Klaviyo / Email Marketing
• Help manage Klaviyo email campaigns, flows, lists, segments, and reporting. 
• Assist with email campaign setup, product launch emails, abandoned cart flows, customer education emails, review requests, and promotional emails. 
• Track email performance, including open rates, click rates, revenue, and customer engagement. 
• Help maintain clean customer lists and proper segmentation between retail, wholesale, and direct-to-consumer customers. 

General E-Commerce Support
• Assist with WooCommerce/website updates, product pages, pricing, promotions, and customer experience improvements. 
• Help maintain accurate product, inventory, listing, and campaign records. 
• Prepare weekly reports with clear results, insights, problems, and recommendations. 
• Conduct competitor research across Amazon, TikTok Shop, Walmart, Google, social media, and other ecommerce channels. 
• Help identify growth opportunities, operational issues, customer complaints, and listing improvements. 
• Coordinate with our team to keep branding, messaging, and product information consistent across all sales channels. 

Qualifications
• Proven hands-on experience with Amazon Seller Central is required. 
• Experience with TikTok Shop is strongly preferred. 
• Experience with Klaviyo or similar email marketing platforms is strongly preferred. 
• Strong understanding of Amazon SEO, PPC, product listings, Brand Registry, and marketplace operations. 
• Experience with ecommerce tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Keepa, Canva, Google Sheets, WooCommerce, Shopify, or similar platforms is a plus. 
• Strong written English and ability to communicate professionally with customers, partners, and tea ---------- mbers. 
• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working independently. 
• Strong spreadsheet and reporting skills. 
• Ability to identify problems, suggest solutions, and follow through. 
• Experience with consumer products, pet products, poultry products, homesteading, farm supply, or retail ecommerce is a plus. 
• Experience helping brands fight knockoffs, counterfeit listings, or IP infringement is a major plus. 

Ideal Candidate
The ideal person is more than a task-taker. We want someone who can look at our ecommerce channels, understand what is happening, and help us improve.
You should be comfortable saying:
• “This listing needs better keywords.” 
• “This campaign is spending too much.” 
• “This competitor is ranking ahead of us because…” 
• “This TikTok creator is worth contacting.” 
• “This email flow could be improved.” 
• “This Amazon issue needs attention.” 

Required Application Video
To apply, please send a short video, no longer than two minutes, introducing yourself.
In the video, please briefly answer:
1. What ecommerce platforms have you worked with? 
2. What is your experience with Amazon Seller Central? 
3. What is your experience with TikTok Shop and/or Klaviyo? 
4. Why do you think you would be a good fit for this role? 

Applications without a video will not be reviewed.

title: Appointment Setter - Remote | Cybersecurity | $3,000+ (USD) | High Earners Only
description:
About the role:

Wall Security (wallsecurity.pro) is a US-facing cybersecurity company. We deploy senior security engineers into American and European companies as fractional CISOs and security teams. The market is massive, the offer is strong, and we need appointment setters who can open conversations with CTOs and founders and book them into a call with our founder.

This is a pure performance role. No base salary. You earn when deals close.

What you will do:
Send LinkedIn connection requests to qualified prospects from our target list.
Send LinkedIn messages using our proven scripts and your own personalization.
Send cold emails using our proven templates and your own personalization.
Log all activity in our CRM system daily.
Report numbers to us every evening via WhatsApp
Book qualified meetings with CTOs, CEOs, and VP Engineering at US SaaS, fintech, and healthtech companies.

Everything is provided:
Full script library, connection notes, message sequences 1 through 3, objection handling responses, cold email templates. You follow the system. You also need to be able
To write from scratch as well as understand sales and psychology. You execute.

What you earn:
10% of the first month retainer value on every deal that closes from your meetings
A Core retainer deal closed: $650 commission
A Full Deploy deal closed: $1,200 commission
A SOC 2 compliance project closed: $1,500 to $3,000 commission
No ceiling. No cap. The more meetings you book, the more you earn.

Who this is for:
You have worked in BPO, outbound sales, or lead generation before. You know what a daily target is and you hit it. Your written English is clean and confident. You are available during US East Coast morning hours. You want to earn based on what you produce, not what you are promised.

Who this is not for:
General virtual assistants. Social media managers. Anyone looking for a fixed salary with light work. This role has daily targets and daily reporting. If that is uncomfortable, this is not the right fit.

How to apply:
Record a 2-minute Loom video answering this question: “Tell me about a time you had to send a high volume of outreach and how you managed your daily targets.” Send the Loom link and your CV to  ----------  Loom video means no response.

title: Intermediate Accountant (Work-From-Home)
description:
Harvest Advisory Philippines Inc. (HAPI) is seeking an Intermediate Accountant to join our domestic corporation in the Philippines. We are headquartered in Singapore under Harvest Accounting ( ---------- .sg) and support over 300 Singaporean small businesses in their bookkeeping, accounting, and taxation needs. Currently, we have about 6 Client Managers based in Singapore, and Malaysia and 12 Accountants based in the Philippines.

You'll play a key role in supporting Harvest Accounting in providing exceptional accounting services to our clients.
You must have had a minimum of 2 to 3 years of relevant bookkeeping and management accounting experience. Exposure to Singapore companies (FRS and tax law) is a bonus.

The role requires strong communication skills and the ability to work in a cross-cultural environment. You will have regular and independent communication with management, peers in finance, and other functions/business. You will be responsible for bookkeeping and full-set accounts preparation for a portfolio of customers ranging from small business owners to Finance-Admin staff and assist with issues on accounting, GST, tax, payroll, and Xero migration.

Teamwork:

What you will get:

About Harvest Accounting
A Xero Platinum Partner, Harvest Accounting is a digital-first accounting firm that is passionate about streamlining operational finance, reimagining workflows, and identifying suitable add-ons and technology from the Xero app ecosystem to help small businesses win. title: Education, Membership & Office Manager
description:
Company: Staff Connect Australia (on behalf of an international client)
Location: Philippines (Remote)
Schedule: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AEST, Monday to Friday
Salary: PHP 40,000 per month

About the Role

We are seeking a highly organised, proactive, and detail-oriented Education, Membership & Office Manager to support the day-to-day operations of an international professional membership and education organisation.

This is more than a traditional Virtual Assistant role. You will serve as a key operational support partner, helping manage memberships, education programs, executive schedules, communications, CRM systems, and business operations.

You will work closely with senior leadership to ensure tasks are completed, deadlines are met, enquiries are managed efficiently, and operational processes run smoothly. The ideal candidate is someone who demonstrates strong initiative, excellent communication skills, sound judgement, and the ability to work independently without constant direction. You will act as a trusted right-hand support person to senior leadership, balancing executive support responsibilities with a strong focus on membership engagement, education program delivery, customer experience, and organisational growth.

Key Responsibilities

Office Management & Executive Support

- Prepare meeting agendas, notes, and action items

Website & Systems Administration
- Update website content and member information

- Assist with system improvements and administrative processes

Systems & Tools

Experience with some or all of the following is preferred:
- Microsoft 365 Suite (Outlook, Teams, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, SharePoint, OneDrive)

- Learning Management Systems (Moodle, Brightspace, Canvas, or similar)

- WooCommerce

Requirements

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills
- Strong proficiency in Microsoft 365 applications, particularly Outlook, Excel, Word, Teams, SharePoint, and OneDrive
- Experience managing calendars, meetings, and executive support functions
- Experience using CRM systems, preferably HubSpot
- Strong organisational and time management skills
- Excellent attention to detail
- Comfortable handling phone calls and stakeholder communications
- Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines simultaneously

Nice to Have

- Experience with WordPress, Elementor, and WooCommerce
- Experience using Microsoft Power Automate or workflow automation tools
- Experience managing SharePoint document libraries and collaboration platforms

What We're Looking For

- Demonstrates strong initiative and takes ownership of outcomes
- Has exceptional organisational and project management skills

title: Credit Analyst – Australian Mortgage Broking
description:
We are seeking an experienced and highly capable Credit Analyst with a strong background in Australian mortgage broking

This is not an entry-level processing role. We are looking for someone who can work alongside brokers to assess deals, identify lending opportunities, complete servicing calculations, and provide recommendations before submission.

About the Role

As a Credit Analyst, you will play a critical role in helping brokers determine whether a client is finance-ready and identifying the most suitable lending solutions.

You will be responsible for conducting detailed financial assessments, analysing complex scenarios, and assisting brokers in structuring deals that meet lender policies and client objectives.

Key Responsibilities
Deal Assessment & Structuring
Review client fact finds and supporting documentation.
Analyse PAYG, self-employed, company and trust structures.
Assess borrowing capacity and loan suitability.
Identify strengths, risks and potential issues within applications.
Recommend suitable lenders based on policy and servicing outcomes.
Assist brokers in structuring complex lending scenarios.
Serviceability & Credit Analysis
Complete lender servicing calculators accurately.
Assess income types including:
PAYG
Casual income
Overtime
Bonuses
Rental income
Self-employed income
Company and trust income
Calculate debt servicing ratios and borrowing capacity.
Review liabilities, commitments and living expenses.
Analyse credit reports and identify concerns.
Lender Policy Assessment
Research and compare lender policies.
Determine lender suitability for each application.
Identify policy exceptions and alternative lending options.
Provide clear recommendations to brokers.
Pre-Submission Review
Complete preliminary assessments.
Identify missing documents and compliance gaps.
Review supporting evidence before submission.
Ensure files are submission-ready.
Broker Support
Work directly with brokers to discuss scenarios.
Provide recommendations on deal structure.
Assist with lender selection.
Support application progression through to approval.
Essential Experience
Minimum 2 years' experience working within an Australian mortgage broking business.
Proven experience completing lender servicing calculators.
Strong understanding of Australian lending policies.
Experience assessing PAYG and self-employed applicants.
Ability to analyse financial statements, tax returns and business structures.
Experience with residential lending.
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.
Highly Desirable

Experience using:

ApplyOnline
Mercury Nexus
Lender servicing calculators 

Knowledge of:

Residential lending
Investment lending
Refinancing
Debt consolidation
Asset finance
Commercial lending
What Success Looks Like

The successful candidate will be able to:

? Assess a scenario and determine borrowing capacity.

? Recommend suitable lenders based on policy and servicing.

? Identify risks before submission.

? Assist brokers in structuring complex deals.

? Reduce turnaround times and increase approval success rates.

? Operate with minimal supervision.

To Apply

Please provide:

Resume/CV.
Number of years working in Australian mortgage broking.
List of lenders you regularly assess.
Experience with servicing calculators.
Experience with self-employed lending.
Experience with commercial lending (if applicable).
Systems and CRM platforms used.
Availability (Full-Time or Part-Time).
Expected hourly rate.

Only candidates with demonstrated experience in Australian mortgage broking and credit analysis should apply

title: Virtual Assistant – Operations, Project Management & Design
description:
Virtual Assistant — Operations, Project Management & Design
THE ROLE

We're hiring an Operations & Design VA to become the force that keeps everything moving.

You'll help run the systems, manage the projects, and create the assets that power our agency.

This role sits at the intersection of operations, project management, and design.

Some days you'll be cleaning up pipelines inside GoHighLevel.
Some days you'll be coordinating projects and chasing down missing pieces.
Some days you'll be building ad creative, lead magnets, and Canva designs.

The common thread is simple:

You make sure things get done.
You don't wait to be told what to do next.
You don't need constant direction.
You take ownership, solve problems, and bring back finished work.

If that sounds like you, keep reading.

THE TWO THINGS THAT MAKE YOU A FIT

Relentless Follow-Through
You don't leave things half-finished.
When something lands on your plate, it gets completed.
Obstacles don't slow you down. You figure them out.
You get genuine satisfaction from crossing things off the list and moving projects across the finish line.

You're an Executor, Not a Spectator
You take a rough idea and turn it into a finished result.
You don't need every step mapped out for you.
You take ownership, coordinate the moving pieces, and bring back work that's polished and ready to ship.

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE AFTER 30 DAYS

By day 30:
Every active project has a clear status, owner, and next step.
Nothing is falling through the cracks.
GoHighLevel pipelines are clean, accurate, and up to date.
Tasks are being tracked and followed up on without being assigned twice.
Creative requests are being turned into finished assets with minimal oversight.
Communication loops are being closed consistently.
The team trusts that when something is assigned to you, it gets done.

WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Operations (GoHighLevel)
You own the CRM.
You keep the machine running, not just set up once, but maintained every day.
Pipelines stay clean. Opportunities stay updated. Follow-up sequences run on schedule. Automations work as intended.
Nothing sits stale.

Project Management
You own the scoreboard.
At any  ---------- nt, you know what's on track, what's blocked, what's late, and what needs attention.
You track deadlines, chase inputs, close loops, and keep projects moving.
If something is slipping, you identify it early.
If I'm the bottleneck, I expect you to tell me.
Your job isn't to wait on me.
Your job is to keep the ball moving.

Design
You take a brief and turn it into finished ad creative, Canva layouts, lead magnets, and marketing assets.
You bring back polished work that's ready to launch.
Not rough drafts.
Not half-finished concepts.
Finished work.

Ad Support (Meta)
You upload, QA, and publish creative in Meta Ads Manager.
You catch mistakes before they go live.
You sweat the details.

HOW TO BE A HERO

Take a brief and run with it.
Execute fully and close the loop.
Self-start without waiting for instructions.
Deliver finished work, not endless drafts.
Hold me accountable when I'm slowing things down.
Flag problems before they become problems.
Come with solutions, not just issues.
Communicate proactively.
Report back when something is complete.

HOW TO DRIVE ME CRAZY
Sending voice notes.
Delivering a file and disappearing.
Making me follow up for status updates.
Bringing me problems with no attempt at a solution.
Letting things sit because nobody followed up.
Missing deadlines that could have been prevented.
Moving slowly when urgency is required.

QUALIFICATIONS
Proven experience in operations, project coordination, executive assistance, or virtual assistance.
Proven design experience creating ads, Canva layouts, and marketing materials.
Experience managing multiple projects simultaneously.
GoHighLevel experience preferred, or a demonstrated ability to learn complex systems quickly.
Canva proficiency required.
Daily use of ChatGPT or AI tools to increase productivity.
Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager.
Strong written English and communication skills.
Reliable internet connection.
Full-time availability during US business hours (Eastern preferred).

TOOLS YOU'LL USE
GoHighLevel
Canva
Meta Ads Manager
ChatGPT / AI tools
Slack
Google Drive
Bonus but not required:
Figma
Lovable
Zapier
We'll teach the rest.

TO APPLY
 ---------- Send 3–5 examples of design work — ads, Canva layouts, marketing materials. Add a quick note on what each piece was for.

Then answer these questions in your reply:

1. Share 3–5 design samples and tell me, in one line each, what the piece was for and what the goal was.

2. Walk me through your GoHighLevel experience. What have you built or managed — pipelines, automations, follow-up sequences? If you haven't used GHL, what complex system have you learned fast?

3. You're managing six projects at once. How do you keep all of them moving so nothing falls through? Walk me through your system.

4. I send you a rough brief with barely any direction — "make me an ad for a deck company, here's the logo." Walk me through how you'd take that to a finished Canva ad.

5. How do you use ChatGPT or AI in your day-to-day work? Give me one real example of something it helped you do faster.

title: Email Marketing Specialist
description:
The Email Marketing Specialist is responsible for the strategy, planning, execution, and optimization of email and SMS marketing programs.

This role requires your expertise in e-mail marketing and the digital marketing industry.

DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Channel Strategy

> Develop monthly campaign calendars aligned with brand goals
> Plan lifecycle marketing flows (Welcome, Abandonment, Post-Purchase, etc.)
> Create SMS strategy alongside email (campaigns + automation)

2. Execution & Build

> Track retention contribution to total revenue

Please apply through our website only.

title: AI Outbound Agent Expert for GoHighLevel Setup — Voice AI, Automations, CRM, Appointment Setting
description:
We are looking for an experienced AI Outbound Agent / AI Voice Agent Setup Specialist to help build and optimise AI-powered outbound appointment-setting systems for an Australian psychology and mental health business.

This role is for someone who understands how to set up AI agents, outbound calling systems, CRM workflows, automations, lead routing, call summaries, appointment booking, and follow-up systems.

The AI agents will be used to support referral-development outreach to professional organisations such as:

NDIS Support Coordinators
Plan Managers
WorkCover rehabilitation providers
Return-to-work coordinators
GPs
Psychiatrists
Allied health providers
Schools
Lawyers
Community organisations
Disability providers
Aged-care providers

The goal is to compare and optimise human vs AI outbound appointment setting inside a GoHighLevel-based referral development system.

Main Responsibilities

You will help design, build, test, and optimise AI outbound systems, including:

Setting up AI outbound calling agents
Connecting AI agents with GoHighLevel / GHL
Creating AI call scripts and conversation flows
Designing prompts for professional referral partner outreach
Setting up lead lists and call campaigns
Configuring appointment-booking logic
Creating CRM workflows based on AI call outcomes
Setting up call summaries and automatic CRM notes
Creating follow-up email and SMS automations
Creating tags, opportunities, tasks, and pipeline movements inside GHL
Testing AI call quality
Improving AI agent prompts based on call outcomes
Comparing AI performance with human telemarketers
Helping build reporting dashboards
Troubleshooting technical issues
Documenting the setup so it can be repeated and improved
Required Skills

You must have experience with:

AI voice agents or AI outbound calling tools
GoHighLevel / GHL
CRM automations
Appointment-setting workflows
Prompt writing for AI agents
Call outcome tracking
Webhooks, Zapier, Make, or similar integration tools

Email/SMS follow-up automation
Testing and improving AI conversations
Clear documentation
Strongly Preferred Experience

Experience with any of the following would be highly valuable:

GoHighLevel AI tools
AI voice platforms such as Vapi, Bland, Synthflow, Retell, Air.ai, Twilio-based systems, or similar
GHL calendars
GHL workflows
GHL opportunities and pipelines
GHL conversations
GHL forms and surveys
GHL webhooks
Call tracking
Call transcription and summarisation
Automated lead qualification
Appointment booking automation
Human vs AI campaign testing
B2B appointment setting
Healthcare, mental health, NDIS, allied health, insurance, or professional services campaigns
Key Outcomes for This Role

The goal is to build an AI outbound system that can:

Call referral partner leads
Introduce the business professionally
Identify relevant decision-makers
Qualify interest
Book meetings or follow-up calls
Record call outcomes in GHL
Trigger appropriate follow-up workflows
Provide useful call summaries
Allow performance comparison against human telemarketers
KPIs We Care About

We will measure:

AI calls completed
Connection rate
Decision-maker conversations
Qualified conversations
Appointments booked
Appointment attendance rate
Referral partners activated
Referrals received
Cost per appointment
Cost per referral
Call quality
CRM accuracy
Follow-up automation accuracy
Human vs AI performance comparison
Important Requirements

Because this is a mental health and professional services business, the AI agent must sound professional, respectful, and appropriate.

The AI agent must not make clinical claims, give psychological advice, or misrepresent the business.

The system must be designed for referral-development outreach, not aggressive sales.

Confidentiality, professionalism, and careful CRM data handling are important.

Who This Role Suits

This role suits someone who is:

Technically strong
Experienced with AI voice or outbound AI systems
Strong with GHL
Good at automations
Able to test and troubleshoot
Able to document systems clearly
Interested in building a scalable AI appointment-setting system
Comfortable improving prompts, workflows, and performance over time
Work Arrangement

This will begin as a paid trial project.

If successful, there may be ongoing work to build, improve, and manage AI outbound systems across multiple referral campaigns.

You will need to show practical experience and be able to explain how you would build the system.

Application Instructions

To apply, please answer the following questions:

What AI voice agent or AI outbound calling tools have you used?
What is your experience with GoHighLevel / GHL?
Have you connected AI agents to GHL before?
Have you built appointment-setting automations before?
What tools have you used for call summaries, webhooks, lead routing, or workflow automation?
Have you worked on B2B outbound campaigns before?
Have you worked with healthcare, mental health, NDIS, allied health, insurance, legal, or professional services businesses?
Please describe the best AI outbound system you have built.
What would your first steps be in setting up an AI outbound agent for this business?
What is your expected hourly or project rate?
Are you available for a paid trial?

title: Lead Transactions Coordinator & Executive Assistant
description:
I’m a real estate entrepreneur based in Dallas, Texas, running two connected businesses: a real estate sales team that helps buyers and sellers, and a property management company that operates furnished co-living rentals. We use ClickUp for task and project management and Google Drive as our primary file system. We also use Buildium as our main property management tool.

I’m looking for a full-time Real Estate Lead Transaction Coordinator to manage the flow of transactions from contract to close, making sure deadlines are met and nothing falls through the cracks.

This role combines transaction management with systems coordination. You’ll handle communication between agents, clients, title, and lenders — while also ensuring that files and documents for each transaction are organized and fully documented.

WHAT YOU’LL DO
- Manage all real estate transactions from contract to close
- Communicate with agents, clients, title companies, and lenders to ensure smooth closings
- Schedule showings, enter listings, and draft proposals
- Track deadlines, contingencies, and documentation compliance
- Create and update SOPs and workflow documentation for transaction processes
- Coordinate with automation partners for system improvements

YOU’D BE A GREAT FIT IF
- 2+ years of experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (or a similar role in real estate operations)

- You write and speak clearly in English
- You stay calm managing many moving parts
- You take ownership and don’t need hand-holding
- You take initiative: you spot issues early, investigate, and propose next steps/solutions
- You use good judgment and can prioritize without being told every step
- You thrive in a fast-paced environment and can adapt quickly as priorities shift
- You are tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and reliable under deadlines
- Understanding of contract timelines, title/lender coordination, and client communication
- Flexibility to work some hours on weekends is preferred

description:

This role involves developing and executing marketing campaigns, creating content, analyzing market trends, and collaborating with sales and product teams to enhance brand visibility and generate leads.

Conduct market research to identify customer trends, competitor offerings and demographic data.

Discover effective marketing and promotional channels, including media platforms to be used to relay product messages to customers.

title: Travel, Procurement & Fleet Coordinator
description:
Who is Bare?
Bare is the new way to funeral. We are a holistic end of life care provider, allowing our families to grieve in their own way, at their own pace, knowing their loved one is cared for by a team who truly understand their needs.

By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalized and affordable. In only five years, we’ve served more than 30,000 families, have become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (with awards in customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and have built a team of more than 100 people committed to changing the way Australians deal with end-of-life. And we’re just getting started.
Position Overview
We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Travel, Procurement & Fleet Coordinator to manage operations for our Australian business. This multi-faceted role is critical to maintaining seamless daily logistics. You will be responsible for orchestrating domestic and corporate travel, managing supplier procurement in line with local compliance, and assisting with the maintenance and safety of our corporate fleet.
The ideal candidate understands the Australian vendor landscape, has experience managing corporate travel across ANZ, and brings a strong customer-service focus to supporting our local workforce.

Key Responsibilities
1. Travel Management (Approx. 40%)
Booking & Domestic Logistics: Coordinate extensive corporate travel bookings across Australia (interstate) including flights (Qantas, Virgin Australia, Jetstar), corporate accommodation, and car rentals.
Policy Compliance: Enforce the company’s travel and expense policy, ensuring cost-efficient booking habits and appropriate tier selections.

TMC & Platform Management: Act as the primary administrator for the corporate travel management platform (e.g., Corporate Traveller, FCM, or Serko) and handle corporate profile updates.

Fringe Benefits Tax (FBT) & Expense Alignment: Support the Finance team by ensuring travel expenses are accurately categorized to assist with FBT reporting and tracking meals/entertainment allowances.

2. Procurement & Supplier Relations (Approx. 40%)
Local Sourcing: Raise purchase requisitions and manage the end-to-end purchase order (PO) process for Australian suppliers, covering office supplies, IT equipment, and operational materials.

Vendor Management: Onboard new vendors, track supplier performance, and maintain compliant records including valid Australian Business Numbers (ABNs) and GST status verification.

Payment Lifecycle Collaboration: Reconcile invoices against delivery receipts and POs, liaising closely with the Accounts Payable team to ensure adherence to agreed payment terms.

Modern Slavery Act Compliance: Assist the procurement team in verifying supplier compliance in alignment with corporate social responsibility guidelines and local Modern Slavery reporting frameworks.

3. Fleet Management Assistance (Approx. 20%)
Asset Tracking & Registration: Maintain an updated corporate fleet registry, ensuring all vehicle registrations (via relevant state bodies like VicRoads, Transport for NSW, TMR, etc.) and compulsory third-party (CTP) insurances are systematically renewed.

Maintenance & Safety: Coordinate scheduled logbook servicing, tyre replacements, and vehicle inspections to maintain fleet safety and uphold manufacturer warranties.

Fuel Cards & Linkt/E-Toll Management: Monitor corporate fuel card accounts (e.g., Ampol, BP, Shell) and toll account usage (e.g., Linkt), reporting on weekly or monthly variances.

I ----------  Management: Assist drivers with a ----------  reporting processes, insurance claims documentation, and coordinating roadside assistance when required.

Qualifications & Skills
Experience: 2–4 years of experience in an operations, procurement, or corporate travel coordination role within Australia. Previous exposure to vehicle fleet coordination or logistics is highly regarded.

Technical Systems: Proficiency with ERP/financial software (e.g., Xero, MYOB, SAP, NetSuite), expense management tools, and corporate travel software (e.g., Velocity, Concur).

Regulatory Understanding: Familiarity with Australian business operational requirements, including GST invoicing principles, state-based vehicle registration rules, and basic workplace safety requirements.

Communication & Negotiation: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a collaborative approach to handling internal staff requests and local vendor negotiations.

Problem-Solving: Strong situational awareness with the ability to resolve rapid shifts in logistics, such as travel disruptions or freight delays.

What We Offer
Competitive salary package.
Collaborative team environment with hybrid working flexibility.
Clear pathways for professional growth and career progression across the operations and procurement functions.

Please include a link to your resume for review.

title: Ecom Video Editor For Meta & TikTok Ads
description:
About Us:
We are a dynamic and rapidly growing 7-figure women's jewelry brand powered by Shopify. We are passionate about great design that speaks for itself, drawing inspiration from everyday fashion and influencers, and genuinely caring about the products we create and the relationships we build. Our marketing is performance-driven, and high-converting video creative is central to our scaling strategy.

The Role:
We're seeking a skilled and agile E-commerce Response Video Editor (full time / 40 hours per week) who understands how to create video ads that don't just look good but convert. You will work in lockstep with our Creative Strategist, taking raw footage (UGC, potentially studio shots) and briefs to produce engaging, platform-optimized video ads primarily for Meta (Facebook/Instagram) and TikTok. Your job is to execute rapidly, iterate effectively based on performance insights (provided by the strategist), and ensure the final output is engineered for maximum engagement and conversions. Forget long-form content; this is about short, punchy, direct-response video.

***** IMPORTANT ***** 
This is not a role for someone juggling multiple jobs, working for or running a freelancing agency, or managing several clients at once. We are looking for a dedicated full-time video editor who will ONLY WORK EXCLUSIVELY WITH US and be fully committed to our brand, team, and creative output.

Key Responsibilities:

• Edit High-Performing Video Ads: Transform raw footage and strategist briefs into compelling video ads optimized for Meta and TikTok feeds/stories/reels.

• Rapid Iteration: Quickly execute multiple variations of winning ad concepts provided by the Creative Strategist (testing different hooks, visuals, text overlays, CTAs, music). Understand that iteration based on data is key.

• Platform Optimization: Expertly edit for platform best practices – strong hooks within the first 3 seconds, fast pacing, engaging captions/text overlays, appropriate aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 4:5), safe zones, and effective sound design.

• Integrate Copy & CTAs: Seamlessly weave in primary text concepts, headlines, and clear calls-to-action as guided by the strategist.

• Collaborate Closely: Maintain clear, fast communication (Slack, etc.) with the Creative Strategist to receive feedback, discuss edits, and ensure alignment with performance goals.

• Asset Management: Organize and manage video files and project assets efficiently.

• Meet Deadlines: Deliver high-quality edits reliably and on schedule in a fast-paced environment.

Who We're Looking For:

• Proven Social Ad Editing Experience: Minimum 2+ experience specifically editing short-form video advertisements for performance marketing campaigns on Meta & TikTok. A portfolio showcasing direct-response style video ads is required.

• Technical Proficiency: Highly skilled in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut is a major plus). Proficiency in basic motion graphics (e.g., After Effects for text overlays) is desirable.

• Platform Native: Deep understanding of what works visually on TikTok and Meta feeds/stories/reels – you know the trends, the hooks, the pacing, the sounds that grab attention immediately.

• Performance-Oriented Mindset: You understand the goal is conversion, not just aesthetics. You are receptive to feedback driven by ad metrics and can adapt edits accordingly. (Links to Strategist's "Data Mastery," "Creativity That Converts").

• Speed and Agility: Ability to work quickly, execute variations efficiently, and adapt to changing requirements without sacrificing quality. (Links to Strategist's "Adaptability & Agility").

• Collaborative Spirit: Excellent communication skills and ability to work effectively and receive direction from a Creative Strategist. (Links to Strategist's "Collaboration is Key," "Clear Communication").

• Strong Work Ethic & Accountability: Reliable, proactive, meets deadlines, and takes ownership of edit quality – no babysitting needed. (Links to Strategist's "Work Ethic").

• Detail-Oriented: Ensures brand consistency, correct aspect ratios, and error-free text/graphics. Nothing sloppy makes the cut.

• Basic understanding of direct response marketing principles.

• Experience editing UGC content.

Compensation:
$2,000 monthly base salary, with the opportunity to earn monthly performance-based bonuses tied to creative contributions. Total monthly compensation can reach up to $4,000 based on performance.

***** HOW TO APPLY *****

In your proposal, you MUST include (give as much detail as possible):

1. Provide your Resume/CV and link to your portfolio showcasing E-CO ---------- RCE VIDEO ADS for Meta/TikTok. Other type of ads will not be looked at or considered. 
2. Briefly describe your process for editing a typical 15-45 sec. video ad.
3. How do you handle feedback and rapid iteration requests from creative strategists?
4. List your primary editing software and mention your experience with CapCut.
5. What AI tools or software have you used to create video ads and which is your favorite? Provide as much detail as possible and share any previous AI work if any.

***** APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS *****

1. Applicants MUST use a minimum of 10 Apply Points for their application to be looked at and considered.
2. Applicants MUST CONFIRM they are willing to complete a practical editing exercise/test trial as part of the hiring process. This is not a paid trial but for the right candidate, this opportunity can lead directly to a long-term position with us.

title: Remote Mortgage Funder
description:
JOB OVERVIEW
REMOTE MORTGAGE FUNDER (FRESH GRADUATES WELCOME | MORTGAGE EXPERIENCE PREFERRED)

Salary:
Php 19,700 - Php 28,600 per month (No Mortgage Experience)
Php 30,000 - Php 35,000 per month (With Mortgage Experience)

Location:
Remote (Work From Home)

Schedule:
Full-Time
U.S. Pacific Time (PST)
Philippine Graveyard Shift

ABOUT THE ROLE

Wholesale Mortgage Bankers is seeking a detail-oriented and motivated Mortgage Funder to join our growing team.
We welcome fresh graduates who are eager to build a career in the U.S. mortgage industry. Candidates with mortgage funding, closing, post-closing, processing, setup, underwriting support, or related mortgage experience are highly encouraged to apply.

This position offers an excellent opportunity to learn the U.S. mortgage process, work directly with mortgage professionals, and develop valuable industry skills while working from home.

RESPONSIBILITIES

> Process funding requests and maintain funding records
> Review loan files and identify missing or incorrect documentation
> Perform quality control reviews prior to funding

QUALIFICATIONS

> Fresh graduates are welcome to apply

> Experience in mortgage funding, closing, post-closing, processing, setup, underwriting support, or related roles is an advantage
> Strong attention to detail and accuracy
> Excellent organizational and time management skills
> Strong communication skills, both written and verbal
> Ability to work independently and manage deadlines
> Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook)
> Experience with mortgage software or loan origination systems is a plus

WORK-FROM-HOME REQUIREMENTS

> Windows-based laptop or desktop computer
> Minimum 8GB RAM (16GB preferred)
> Reliable high-speed internet connection
> Backup internet connection preferred
> Quiet and professional work environment
> Dual-monitor setup is an advantage
> Willing to install company-required software and monitoring tools

WHAT WE OFFER

> Competitive salary based on experience
> Comprehensive training and exposure to U.S. mortgage operations
> Long-term career growth opportunities
> Work-from-home setup
> Supportive and professional team environment
> Performance and salary reviews based on performance and tenure

HOW TO APPLY
