title: Experienced M&A Deal Sourcer - Minimum 3 years experiences in prospecting and creating a M&A pipeline
description:
Position: Experienced M&A Deal Sourcer / Research Analyst
Location: Remote (UK preferred)
Type: Part-Time to Full-Time Progression
Salary: Competitive, based on experience

About Us

We are an ambitious investment and acquisitions group with a strong focus on growth through strategic business acquisitions. Our goal is to complete up to five acquisitions per year across selected industries, building a sustainable and scalable M&A division to support long-term expansion.

We are now seeking an experienced M&A Deal Sourcer who can help us identify, qualify, and manage acquisition opportunities in the UK SME and lower mid-market space.

The Role

You’ll be responsible for creating and managing the full M&A sourcing pipeline — from market research and target identification to broker engagement and initial outreach. This is a high-impact position for someone with a deep understanding of deal origination and a hunger to build a growing acquisitions arm within an expanding group.

Key Responsibilities:

Research the market / web and identify suitable acquisition targets across defined sectors.

Develop detailed acquisition search criteria and sourcing strategies.

Build and maintain strong relationships with business brokers, corporate advisors, and owners.

Create and manage an active M&A pipeline within CRM systems.

Conduct outreach via email, LinkedIn, and phone to generate and qualify leads.

Prepare initial summaries and deal overviews for internal review.

Support senior management during the early stages of due diligence and analysis.

Requirements

Minimum 3 years’ experience in M&A sourcing, deal origination, or acquisition research (essential).

Strong understanding of the M&A process — from research through to initial negotiation.

UK market experience preferred, though international (US or EU) experience also valued.

Proven success building and managing broker and intermediary networks.

Confident using CRMs, databases, and research platforms to manage deal flow.

Excellent communication skills and attention to detail.

Ambitious, driven, and passionate about growing a division from the ground up.

Why Join Us

Work directly with senior leadership in a fast-growing acquisitions team.

Opportunity to grow into a senior, full-time leadership position heading up the M&A division.

Real progression, autonomy, and the ability to shape long-term acquisition strategy.

How to Apply

Please send your CV and cover letter answering the following:

Your current role and main responsibilities.

How many years you’ve worked in M&A sourcing or deal origination.

Which countries/markets you’ve worked in and familiarity with UK vs US M&A differences.

Your process for identifying and approaching acquisition targets.

Tools or CRMs you use to manage your pipeline.

What motivates you in M&A and your long-term career goals.

Why you’re the perfect candidate for this role.

Availability (part-time initially, with potential to move to full-time).

Note: We are looking for real, experienced professionals — not AI-generated cover letters. Generic applications will be automatically rejected.

???? Apply with subject: M&A Deal Sourcer Application – [Your Name]

title: QA Automation Engineer (ASAP)
description:
Job Title: QA Automation Engineer (Remote – Philippines)
Location: Remote – Philippines
Company: EETech

About EETech

EETech is a dynamic technology company committed to delivering innovative digital commerce solutions. Our global team collaborates to create cutting-edge platforms that drive success for our clients. We value creativity, technical excellence, and a forward-thinking approach to solving complex challenges.


Job Overview
EETech is looking for a skilled QA Automation Engineer to ensure our software products are robust, efficient, and ready for production. In this remote role, you will design and develop automated test scripts, integrate testing frameworks into our CI/CD pipelines, and work collaboratively with cross-functional teams to improve product quality. This position is ideal for a proactive engineer who is passionate about leveraging automation to drive continuous improvement in quality assurance.


Key Responsibilities
• Test Automation Development:
o Design, develop, and maintain automated test scripts for web and mobile applications.
o Implement automated testing frameworks and integrate them with existing CI/CD pipelines.

• Quality Assurance & Continuous Improvement:
o Collaborate with development and product teams to identify test requirements and ensure comprehensive test
coverage.
o Analyze test results, track issues, and work with the team to resolve defects promptly.

• Framework & Tool Enhancement:
o Evaluate and implement new automation tools and best practices to enhance testing efficiency and accuracy.
o Maintain and update existing test suites in response to new feature developments or changes.

• Documentation & Reporting:
o Create detailed test plans, test cases, and technical documentation to support automation efforts.
o Provide clear, concise reports on test outcomes, quality metrics, and areas for improvement.

• Collaboration & Agile Practices:
o Actively participate in agile ceremonies, including daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and retrospectives.
o Work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure timely delivery of high-quality software solutions.


Qualifications
• Technical Skills:
o Proficiency in programming languages such as JavaScript, Python, or Java.
o Strong experience with test automation frameworks (e.g., Selenium, Cypress, Appium).
o Familiarity with CI/CD tools and processes (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD).

• Experience:
o Proven track record in automating test cases for web and mobile applications.
o Experience in a remote work environment with effective communication and time management skills.

• Soft Skills:
o Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities with keen attention to detail.
o Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with diverse teams.

• Preferred Qualifications:
o Experience with performance and load testing tools is a plus.
o Knowledge of agile development methodologies and continuous testing practices.


What We Offer
• Remote Work Flexibility:
o Enjoy the freedom to work from anywhere in the Philippines while collaborating with a global team.
• Collaborative Environment:
o Be part of an innovative, team-oriented culture that values technical excellence and continuous improvement.

title: Technical Project Manager
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)
Reports to: Strategic Implementation and Success Lead (US Based)
Full Time

A successful candidate will be available consistently between 9-5pm, 7-3pm, or 8-4pm USA
MDT Timezone

The Opportunity
EETech is a growing systems integrator with our own proprietary commerce technology. We are currently hiring two Senior Technical Project Managers to join our overseas team. Our development environment is highly mature, featuring strong, autonomous developers and excellent architects. Because our technical team operates with a high degree of independence, this role is not about micromanagement. Instead, we are looking for professionals who excel at meticulous tracking, capacity visibility, and clear reporting. We are currently managing resources between Azure Boards and  ---------- , and we need project managers who can keep this data flawlessly organized so our US leadership always has an accurate view of project
health.

You will be stepping into two main roles,
? Track 1: Client Implementations, managing the pipeline of third party software integrations and standard digital presence projects.
? Track 2: Core Platform and Launches, managing the internal development roadmap for our proprietary EETech Commerce software, alongside managing the specific client projects launching on that platform.

Key Responsibilities
Visibility and Tracking
? Maintain absolute data integrity within Azure Boards and  ----------  so that a task is always accurately reflected for US leadership.
? Build and maintain capacity planning trackers to forecast developer bandwidth and prevent bottlenecks.
? Generate clear, concise weekly status reports for the US Client Solutions team and the VP.

Agile Facilitation and Unblocking
? Facilitate standard Agile ceremonies, such as stand ups and sprint planning, with the goal of overall project alignment.
? Act as the ultimate unblocker, tracking down pending assets from clients or answers from architects so developers can focus entirely on coding.

Cross Functional Coordination
? For the Client Implementations track, ensure third party tech integrations map perfectly to the Statement of Work signed by the US Success Leads.
? For the Core Platform track, balance the competing priorities of internal platform upgrades, requested by the architects, against custom feature requests needed for upcoming client launches.

Client Engagement & Communication
? Engage directly with clients as needed to gather requirements, follow up on deliverables, and keep projects moving forward
? Communicate clearly and confidently with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, translating complex concepts into plain English
? Represent the project team professionally in client-facing interactions and ensure a positive, solutions-oriented experience

Required Qualifications
? 4+ years of Technical Project Management in software development.
? Proven experience managing capacity and resource planning in a matrix environment, specifically handling shared technical resources across implementations, maintenance, and internal SaaS projects.
? Highly organized with a proven ability to build manual capacity trackers in tools like Excel or  ----------  while we evaluate dedicated resource software.
? Ability to understand web architecture enough to comprehend what our senior developers and architects are building, and translate that into plain English updates for US stakeholders.
? Experience thriving in an environment where you are trusted to manage the process while letting the engineers manage the code.
? Deep expertise in Azure DevOps, specifically Azure Boards, and modern tracking tools like  ---------- .

Preferred Traits
? Comfortable engaging in client-facing interactions and building strong working relationships
? A proactive, go-getter mindset with a positive attitude toward problem-solving and ownership
? Strong sense of accountability and ability to push initiatives forward without constant oversight
? Naturally curious, with a desire to learn, grow, and continuously improve

title: Linkedin / Sales Nav / Phantombuster l
description:

We’re looking for a detail-oriented and reliable LinkedIn Virtual Assistant to support our outbound lead generation efforts. This is an execution-focused role — we will provide the strategy and messaging. We need someone who can efficiently build targeted lists, safely export data, and manage LinkedIn profile updates.

AVAILABLE UK HOURS 7-3PM - THIS IS ADHOC ON DEMAND ROLE BUT WE NEED SOMEONE with some availability duiring those hours

* Potential for long-term collaboration

---

title: Finance Analyst/ Account Analyst
description:
Atrium Housing is a mission-driven real estate development firm focused on creating affordable housing and vibrant communities. Our projects span mixed-finance and LIHTC transactions, and we pride ourselves on delivering high-quality, impactful housing solutions while fostering a collaborative, supportive, and growth-oriented work environment.

At Atrium, you’ll have the opportunity to learn directly from experienced development professionals, work on meaningful projects that impact communities, and build a strong foundation for a career in real estate finance and affordable housing development.

Role Purpose

As a Development Analyst, you’ll support affordable housing transactions through financial underwriting, due diligence coordination, and application support. While LIHTC experience is a plus, it is not required—what matters most is your analytical mindset, attention to detail, and eagerness to learn.

Primary Value You’ll Bring:

* Accurate underwriting and financial modeling
* Organized and reliable diligence tracking
* High-quality application support for housing agencies, investors, and lenders

What You’ll Do

* Build and maintain detailed financial models and sources-and-uses statements (LIHTC exposure is a bonus)
* Prepare rent schedules, operating pro formas, and subsidy layering analyses
* Support preparation of state housing agency applications
* Coordinate third-party reports such as market studies, appraisals, environmental studies, and surveys
* Maintain due diligence and closing checklists
* Assist with investor, lender, and internal memos

What We’re Looking For

Technical Competencies:

* Intermediate to advanced Excel skills (formulas, pivot tables, modeling)
* LIHTC fundamentals (ideal, not required)
* Strong data organization

Behavioral Competencies:

* High attention to detail
* Responsiveness and proactive communication
* Strong accountability and ownership

Qualifications:

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Real Estate, Economics, Planning, or related field
* 0–3 years of relevant experience
* Strong analytical and organizational skills
* Performance Metrics
* Accuracy and reliability of underwriting
* Timeliness of deliverables
* Quality and completeness of application materials
* Responsiveness to team and project needs

Why You’ll Love Working at Atrium Housing

* Impactful work: Contribute to projects that provide affordable housing and improve communities.
* Professional growth: Learn from experienced development professionals and gain exposure to mixed-finance and LIHTC projects.
* Collaborative culture: Work with a supportive, mission-driven team where your contributions matter.
* Flexible remote work: Balance your professional growth with personal life while collaborating across time zones.

To apply, answer these questions via vocaroo and send your link.
1. What struck your interest about the role?
2. What's your experience in handling finance especially in the construction industry?
3. Attach the LINK to your updated resume.

title: Construction Accounting
description:
We’re hiring a Project Accountant to support construction, loan, and compliance operations across multiple affordable housing developments. If you’re detail-driven, good with documentation, and like work that has real impact, this is a strong long-term fit.

Why You’ll Love This Role

You will work directly with decision-makers — your work will be visible and valued.
You will help keep projects compliant, funded, and on schedule.
No bureaucracy, no busywork — your work directly moves projects forward.
Real room to grow into senior financial coordination or project support.

Your Typical Day
Organize and maintain project financial and compliance documentation.
Support the preparation of monthly construction draw requests.
Communicate with contractors to collect invoices, lien waivers, and documents.
Update budgets, change order logs, and payment tracking sheets.
Coordinate with lenders, accounting, and project managers as needed.

What You’ll Be Doing

1) Loan & Draw Support
Compile lien waivers, invoices, schedules, and supporting docs for draw packages.
Compare cost reports to contracts, change orders, and lender requirements.
Track soft costs (architect, engineering, inspections, interest, title, etc.).
Prepare clear, organized submission files for lenders.

2) Construction Financial Administration
Maintain digital project files (contracts, pay apps, insurance, permits, payrolls).
Track executed change orders against pay apps and budgets.
Monitor buyout logs, completion schedules, and compliance documents.
Follow up with contractors until documentation is accurate and complete.

3) General Coordination & Reporting
Maintain trackers, logs, and internal reports.
Prepare agendas, notes, and status reports for project meetings.
Communicate professionally with internal and external stakeholders.
Handle confidential financial data with discretion.

What We’re Looking For
2–4+ years in project accounting, construction admin, or loan/draw processing.
Familiarity with construction draws, budgets, or lender compliance preferred.
Proficiency in Excel and document management tools (Procore/Built/Buildertrend a bonus).
Extremely organized, detail-accurate, and accountable to deadlines.
Strong written and verbal communication skills.
Experience working for a US construction company or real-estate developer

Nice to Have
Experience in real estate development or affordable housing.
Knowledge of construction accounting.
Experience with billing using AIA G702/G703 forms.
Degree in Accounting, Construction Mgmt, Business, or related field.

TO APPLY: send a recording via  ----------  and answer these questions:
1.) What struck your interest about the role?
2.) Tell me about your experience in construction accounting?

SUBJECT: Construction Accounting - YOUR NAME

About Us

Atrium Housing is a mission-driven affordable housing developer with an affiliated construction company with offices in Louisiana, Florida and Texas. We don’t just build buildings — we create opportunities for families and communities. Our finance and construction teams work with lenders, contractors, and public partners to move projects from concept to completion.

title: GoHighLevel SaaS Automation & CRM Specialist
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing German-based SaaS and automation company focused on helping local service businesses improve lead generation, customer communication, appointment booking, online reputation, and operational efficiency.

Our clients include businesses such as:

* Roofers
* Electricians
* Plumbers
* Painters
* Construction Companies
* Cleaning Companies
* HVAC Contractors
* Home Service Providers
* Local Service Businesses

We build scalable systems using GoHighLevel, automation, AI, CRM technology, and modern business workflows.

We are currently looking for a highly experienced GoHighLevel SaaS Automation Specialist who can help us build and scale our SaaS infrastructure.

This is NOT a beginner role.

We are looking for someone who already has real-world experience implementing GoHighLevel systems for businesses and agencies.

---

# Position

GoHighLevel SaaS Automation & CRM Specialist

Remote | Long-Term | Full-Time or Part-Time

---

# Primary Objective

Your role is to build, optimize, and maintain our GoHighLevel SaaS backend infrastructure.

You will be responsible for creating scalable, repeatable systems that can be deployed across multiple client accounts.

You should be comfortable building complete business operating systems inside GoHighLevel.

---

# Core Responsibilities

## 1. GoHighLevel SaaS Development

Build and maintain:

* SaaS Snapshots
* Agency Templates
* Client Templates
* CRM Structures
* Sales Pipelines
* Opportunity Management Systems
* Lead Management Systems

Your goal is to create systems that can be replicated across hundreds of clients.

---

## 2. Workflow Automation

Create and optimize:

* Lead Follow-Up Workflows
* Missed Call Text Back
* Appointment Reminders
* Lead Nurturing Sequences
* Customer Reactivation Campaigns
* Quote Follow-Up Campaigns
* Customer Onboarding Workflows
* Internal Notification Systems
* Sales Pipelines

---

## 3. Booking & Calendar Systems

Configure:

* Appointment Calendars
* Booking Pages
* Confirmation Workflows
* Reminder Sequences
* Rescheduling Processes
* Cancellation Processes
* Team Calendars

---

## 4. Reputation Management Systems

Build systems for:

* Google Review Requests
* Review Follow-Up Campaigns
* Customer Feedback Collection
* Reputation Management Automation

---

## 5. SMS & WhatsApp Automation

Implement:

* SMS Follow-Up Sequences
* WhatsApp Workflows
* Customer Communication Automations
* Lead Response Systems
* Appointment Reminders

---

## 6. White Label SaaS Development

Assist with:

* White Label Mobile App Configuration
* LeadConnector Customization
* SaaS Mode Setup
* Client Provisioning Systems
* SaaS Automation Frameworks

title: Senior Shopify Support Engineer (Storefront Operations)
description:
Senior Shopify Support Engineer (Storefront Operations)
Location: Philippines (Remote)

About the Role
We support a large-scale Shopify retail operation spanning hundreds of storefronts and are looking for a highly technical Shopify operator to help maintain storefront quality, troubleshoot issues, identify recurring patterns, and work closely with engineering teams.

This role sits at the intersection of Shopify operations, technical support, quality assurance, and engineering. You'll investigate issues, determine root causes, make low-risk fixes directly within Shopify, and coordinate with engineering teams on larger technical problems.
The ideal candidate has experience supporting Shopify stores at scale and enjoys solving technical problems, improving operational reliability, and preventing issues before they impact customers.

Why Join Us
For more than 15 years, our leadership team has partnered with thousands of talented professionals across the Philippines to build and support high-performing teams serving global clients.
We believe exceptional careers are built through long-term relationships, continuous learning, and sustainable growth. We invest in our people, provide opportunities to expand technical and operational expertise, and create an environment where strong performers can take on increasing ownership and responsibility over time.
This role offers the opportunity to work directly with experienced US-based operators, engineers, and ecommerce leaders while developing deep expertise in Shopify, storefront operations, technical troubleshooting, and large-scale ecommerce systems.

Responsibilities
 • Review and audit Shopify storefronts to identify issues affecting customer experience, merchandising, pricing, checkout flows, integrations, content, and site functionality.
 • Investigate storefront, theme, catalog, inventory, and integration issues and determine root causes.
 • Resolve low-risk issues directly within Shopify when appropriate.
 • Create detailed bug reports, reproduction steps, and technical escalation tickets for engineering teams.
 • Work closely with QA, engineering, merchandising, and operations teams to drive issues through resolution.
 • Support storefront launches, feature rollouts, platform enhancements, and operational changes.
 • Identify recurring issues across multiple storefronts and help improve processes, documentation, and quality standards.
 • Track issues through resolution and validate fixes before closure.
 • Contribute to operational documentation, troubleshooting guides, and knowledge-sharing initiatives.
 • Proactively identify opportunities to improve storefront reliability, operational efficiency, and issue prevention.

Requirements
 • 4+ years of experience supporting Shopify or ecommerce storefronts in a technical capacity.
 • Strong experience with Shopify Admin and Shopify storefront operations.
 • Working knowledge of Liquid, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and browser developer tools.
 • Experience troubleshooting storefront, theme, integration, catalog, inventory, or checkout-related issues.
 • Ability to investigate root causes and independently diagnose technical problems.
 • Experience creating detailed bug reports and working closely with engineering teams.
 • Strong written communication, documentation, and organizational skills.
 • Experience supporting multiple storefronts simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.
 • Strong sense of ownership and accountability from issue identification through resolution.

Preferred Backgrounds
We are particularly interested in candidates with experience in:
 • Shopify Support Engineering
 • Shopify Technical Support
 • Shopify Technical Operations
 • Shopify Implementation
 • Ecommerce Solutions Engineering
 • Shopify Agencies or Shopify Plus Agencies
 • Ecommerce Agencies
 • Ecommerce Platform Support
 • Ecommerce QA

Nice to Have
 • Shopify Plus experience.
 • Experience supporting dozens or hundreds of storefronts simultaneously.
 • Experience with Contentstack or other headless CMS platforms.
 • Familiarity with tools such as Jira, Linear, Datadog, Sentry, New Relic, Splunk, LogRocket, or FullStory.
 • Experience with product catalog management, inventory systems, order management systems, or PIM platforms.
 • Experience supporting storefront launches and migrations.
 • SQL or basic analytics experience.

What Success Looks Like
In this role, you become a trusted technical operator helping maintain the health and quality of a large-scale Shopify ecosystem.
Success means consistently identifying root causes, resolving issues efficiently, reducing recurring i ---------- , improving operational processes, and helping deliver a reliable ecommerce experience across hundreds of storefronts.
You will build deep expertise in Shopify operations, storefront troubleshooting, ecommerce infrastructure, and cross-functional collaboration while partnering closely with QA, operations, and engineering teams.

Ideal Candidate
You've supported multiple Shopify storefronts, either within a Shopify agency, ecommerce agency, implementation partner, or ecommerce brand. You're comfortable troubleshooting issues independently, making low-risk fixes when appropriate, and working closely with engineering teams on larger technical problems.
You have strong systems-thinking skills, can identify patterns across multiple stores, and take ownership of issues from discovery through resolution. You enjoy solving problems, improving processes, and helping maintain a high-quality ecommerce experience at scale.
You're looking for a long-term opportunity where you can continue developing your technical expertise, expand your impact, and grow alongside a team that values ownership, learning, and operational excellence.

What We Value
 • Ownership and accountability
 • Continuous learning and professional growth
 • Clear and proactive communication
 • Long-term thinking
 • High-quality, sustainable work
 • Team-first collaboration
 • Curiosity and problem solving

This is a long-term opportunity for someone who enjoys solving complex technical problems, improving ecommerce operations, and building a career within Shopify and large-scale ecommerce support.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (Node.js / TypeScript) — Wix Apps & Self-Hosted Solutions
description:
We’re looking for a strong full-stack developer with deep experience in Node.js + TypeScript to own the end-to-end delivery of complex applications. You will move beyond standard CLI builds to architect self-hosted applications and robust backend services that integrate seamlessly with the Wix ecosystem and other platforms to follow

We are a forward-thinking team that embraces modern efficiency: you will be expected to leverage AI tools like Claude Code and Cursor to accelerate development speed, streamline refactoring, and maintain high-velocity output without sacrificing quality.

The role would be developing custom apps for Wix App Market & Other Marketplaces as well like (Shopify / Webflow / Framer etc)


Key Responsibilities
*Architecture & Self-Hosted Apps
-Build Self-Hosted Solutions: Design and deploy fully self-hosted applications (beyond standard Wix CLI apps), managing the necessary infrastructure (hosting, networking, security, and external databases).
-Backend Development: Develop robust, scalable backend services in Node.js / TypeScript (REST endpoints, custom authentication, input validation, and structured logging).
-Data Strategy: Design clean data models and persistence layers, managing integrations between Wix Data, external SQL/NoSQL databases (Supabase/Firebase/Postgres), and caching strategies.

*Wix Ecosystem & Integrations
-Wix App Development: Build and maintain Wix apps using the Wix CLI, creating seamless dashboard extensions, admin UIs, and backend services.
-Deep Integrations: Utilize the Wix SDK and Platform APIs to interact with Wix Stores, Orders, Collections, and eCommerce domain objects.
-Feature Implementation: Build complex logic such as:
-Configurable settings panels and custom admin dashboards.
-"Additional Fees" logic and complex product-based rules.
-File upload and attachment flows.
-Service plugins and validation flows (e.g., shipping address verification).

Requirements (Must Have)
-Self-Hosted Infrastructure: Experience setting up and maintaining self-hosted Node.js applications (deployment, server management, environmental configuration).
-AI Adaptability: Enthusiasm for and experience with using AI tools (Claude Code, Cursor) to speed up coding tasks.
-Languages: Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript
-Infrastructure: Self-Hosted Node.js environments, REST APIs, External DBs (Supabase/Firebase/etc.)
Frontend: React (Admin UI)

Nice to Have
-Proven Wix Experience:
-Building Wix CLI projects.
-Using Wix SDK and Platform APIs (Stores, eCommerce, OAuth).
-Implementing Wix Service Plugins and SPIs.
-Proven Marketplace Apps Development Experience:
E.g. Salesforce / Monday / Shopify / Webflow / Wix / AWS / Snowflake
-DevOps: Familiarity with Docker, CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), and cloud hosting platforms (AWS, Vercel, Heroku, or similar).
-Reliability: Experience with logging, monitoring, and error tracking tools.

title: Technical Product Manager (Storefront Operations)
description:

title: Prior Authorization Specialist
description:
Job Title: Prior Authorization Specialist (US Healthcare | Remote)

Eastern Time (US) – Monday to Friday (08:00 AM TO 05:00 PM)

Must be willing to work graveyard shift (PH time)

We are seeking a highly experienced Prior Authorization Specialist who can independently manage the end-to-end prior authorization process for a US-based healthcare practice.

The ideal candidate must be confident in handling high-volume submissions and able to complete at least 25–30 cases per day accurately and efficiently.


Key Responsibilities (End-to-End Process)

-Verify patient insurance eligibility and benefits

-Review provider orders and clinical documentation

-Submit prior authorization requests via portal, fax, or phone

-Upload required medical records

-Follow up with insurance companies for status updates

-Handle approvals, denials, and appeals

-Communicate status updates to providers and the internal team

-Document all actions accurately in EMR/EHR systems

-Strong knowledge of commercial insurance, Medicare, Medicaid, and workers' compensation authorization processes.

-Experience obtaining authorizations for pain management procedures, injections, imaging studies, and related treatments.

-Ability to track authorization status, follow up with insurance payers, and resolve denials.

-Familiarity with EMR/EHR systems and medical billing workflows.

-Excellent communication and organizational skills.

-Ability to work independently in a remote environment.

Preferred:

-Experience with interventional pain management procedures.

-Knowledge of CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS coding related to pain management services.

title: Title: Salesforce CRM Architect / Implementation Specialist (Setup & Automation)
description:
Overview

We are looking for an experienced Salesforce expert to help us design and implement a complete CRM and operations system inside Salesforce. The goal is to build a clean, reliable system so our company can operate primarily inside Salesforce instead of using multiple disconnected tools.

This is an implementation and architecture role. We want someone who can plan the structure correctly and then build it.

Our focus is simplicity, reliability, and automation.

About Our Company

We are a growing home services company in the United States focused on storm shelters. Our business generates leads through phone calls and website inquiries and we need a streamlined system for managing leads, sales, estimates, and customer lifecycle.

Currently we use multiple tools, and we want to consolidate as much as possible into Salesforce.

Primary Goals

• Centralize lead management and customer data  
• Track phone and web leads inside Salesforce  
• Manage the full sales pipeline  
• Automate follow-ups and notifications  
• Create a simple quoting / estimate workflow  
• Track customer status from lead ? sale ? installation  
• Provide clear dashboards and reporting  

Responsibilities

• Design the Salesforce architecture for our business  
• Set up Sales Cloud (and other modules if needed)  
• Create pipelines, stages, and opportunity management  
• Build automations and workflows  
• Configure lead capture from forms and phone calls  
• Design quote/estimate workflow  
• Set up dashboards and reporting  
• Configure integrations with other systems if required  
• Document the system and train our team

Requirements

• Strong Salesforce implementation experience  
• Ability to architect systems, not just configure fields  
• Experience with workflow automation and process design  
• Experience integrating external tools and APIs  
• Ability to simplify systems (we prefer clean over complex)  
• Strong communication and documentation skills

Nice to Have

• Experience with home services or contractor businesses  
• Experience with call tracking integrations  
• Experience building quoting workflows in Salesforce  
• Salesforce certifications

Project Scope

Initial engagement will focus on system architecture and implementation. After the system is live, there may be ongoing work for improvements and optimization.

Important

We are looking for someone who can build a simple, reliable system rather than overengineering the platform. Our goal is for our team to operate inside Salesforce daily with minimal complexity.

If you apply, please include:

• Examples of Salesforce systems you have implemented  
• Your recommended approach for building a CRM for a home service business  
• Estimated timeline for implementation

title: TikTok Growth & Creator Partnerships Manager
description:

title: AI-Native Digital Growth Specialist
description:
Role purpose
We are looking for an AI-native digital growth specialist to help us grow organic search visibility, AI visibility, Google advertising performance and online marketing ROI.

We are a trade-only B2B ecommerce supplier in Australia. We currently sell through a WooCommerce website and are moving to Shopify Plus in the medium term.

This role will help manage and improve our search, content, advertising and reporting systems so our online marketing becomes more effective, more measurable and less dependent on external agencies.

This is not just a traditional SEO role. We want someone who understands SEO, AEO, AI search visibility, Google Ads, content, analytics, ecommerce conversion and how to use AI properly to work faster and smarter.

Core responsibilities

1. SEO and organic growth

• Improve rankings for commercial B2B search terms, especially keywords moving into stronger ranking positions
• Improve category pages, product pages, content pages, FAQs, internal links, metadata and headings
• Use Google Search Console, GA4 and SEO tools to identify opportunities and track results
• Support technical SEO work including redirects, canonicals, schema, indexation, crawl issues and ranking-sensitive page structure
• Support the WooCommerce to Shopify Plus migration from an SEO preservation and growth perspective

2. AEO, AI visibility and AI-native workflows

• Improve visibility in AI-generated answers and AI-assisted search journeys
• Track visibility across tools and environments such as Google AI Overviews, Gemini, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Copilot and Bing where practical
• Use AI tools properly for keyword clustering, competitor research, content briefs, ad copy testing, reporting, content improvement and workflow automation
• Create repeatable AI-assisted processes without compromising quality, accuracy or brand trust
• Keep moving with how buyers are using AI to research products and suppliers

3. Google Ads and performance marketing

• Be fully conversant with Google advertising products, including Search Ads, Shopping, Performance Max, YouTube, Demand Gen, Display, remarketing, Merchant Centre, GA4 and Google Tag Manager
• Help improve paid search and paid marketing ROI
• Review campaign structure, search terms, landing pages, conversion tracking and performance reporting
4. Content, authority and outreach
• Build content plans around real trade buyer needs, not generic blog activity
• Improve domain authority / reputation consistently
• Improve existing pages and create content briefs for new pages, guides, FAQs and support content
• Help build authority through relevant supplier, manufacturer, trade, partner, industry and content opportunities
• Focus on quality backlinks, genuine mentions and commercially useful authority wins rather than low-value link volume
• Track backlinks, referring domains, target pages, anchor text, quality, relevance and live status

5. Reporting and commercial accountability
• Build and maintain clear reporting across SEO, AEO, Google Ads and online marketing performance
• Report on organic traffic, keyword movement, ranking improvements, organic orders, new account signups, enquiries and revenue where available
• Report on AI visibility and brand mentions in AI/search environments
• Track marketing activity against commercial outcomes, not just activity completed
• Identify what is working, what is not working, and what should change

Key performance expectations

The role will be measured against agreed internal baselines and commercial outcomes, including:
• Improving our overall domain authority, domain rating and search authority over time
• Increasing organic traffic from priority commercial search terms
• Increasing the number of priority keywords ranking in stronger positions
• Improving measurable AI visibility month by month
• Improving ROI from Google Ads and other digital marketing channels used
• Creating clear monthly reporting that links activity to sales, enquiries, new accounts, traffic, rankings and commercial impact
• Maintaining safe, sustainable and quality-focused SEO practices

Required skills and experience

• Strong practical SEO experience, preferably in ecommerce or B2B ecommerce
• Experience improving category pages, product pages and commercial landing pages
• Strong Google Search Console, GA4 and keyword tracking experience
• Strong working knowledge of Google Ads, including Search, Shopping, Performance Max and remarketing
• Strong understanding of content-led SEO and authority building
• Practical understanding of AI search, AEO and how AI tools are changing search behaviour
• Confident using AI tools in day-to-day work to improve speed, quality and output
• Able to build reports that management can understand and act on
• Able to work remotely with clear priorities, accountability and regular updates
• Able to challenge weak assumptions and give practical recommendations, not just agree with everything

Nice-to-haves

• Shopify Plus SEO experience
• WooCommerce SEO experience
• Experience with B2B, trade, industrial, ecommerce or wholesale businesses
• Experience with Semrush, Ahrefs, SE Ranking, Screaming Frog, Looker Studio or similar tools
• Experience with Google Merchant Centre and product feed optimisation
• Experience with Microsoft/Bing Webmaster Tools and AI visibility tracking
• Basic HTML/CSS understanding
• Experience working with developers on technical SEO tasks
• Experience creating content briefs for writers, designers or internal tea ---------- mbers

Tools and workflow

• Work managed through a simple task board such as Basecamp or similar
• Weekly priorities agreed with management
• Clear monthly reporting required
• Standard process for SEO tasks, content briefs, ad reviews, technical requests and reporting
• All key tools, accounts and data must remain under company ownership and access

Employment model

• Part-time or full time role
• Long-term role for the right person
We are not looking for someone who only produces generic SEO activity.

We want someone who can help us build a stronger internal digital growth system across SEO, AI visibility, Google Ads, content, reporting and ecommerce conversion.

The right person will be commercially minded, practical, direct, organised and outcome-focused.

Checklist for your application

Please include the following in your application:

1. Your experience with ecommerce SEO, especially category pages and product pages
2. Your experience with Google Ads, including which Google Ads products you have managed
3. Your experience with AI tools and how you use them in real marketing workflows
4. Your understanding of AEO / AI visibility and how you would track it
5. Your experience with Shopify, Shopify Plus or WooCommerce SEO
6. The SEO tools and reporting tools you have used
7. Examples of ranking, traffic, revenue, lead or ROI improvements you have helped achieve
8. One example of how you would improve a B2B ecommerce category page
9. One example of how you would assess backlink or authority quality
10. A short explanation of how you would approach the first 90 days in this role

Please do not apply if your SEO approach is mainly based on low-quality backlinks, generic blog posting, directory submissions or activity reports that do not connect to commercial outcomes.

title: Finance Administrative Assistant
description:

This role supports daily finance and administrative operations, including data entry, reporting, and schedule coordination. It involves managing sales data in Xero, handling reconciliations, overseeing payables, and assisting with month-end closing, while providing general administrative support.

• Support month-end closing processes, including the preparation of accruals and AP-related journal entries.
• Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives by assisting in the implementation of process enhancements and automation opportunities.

• Proficient in word-processing software and spreadsheets, including Microsoft Excel, Microsoft Word, Google Drive, and • Google Sheets
• Strong attention to detail, with the ability to identify numerical errors
• Excellent command of English, both written and spoken
• Eagerness to learn, proactive mindset, meticulous approach, and effective team player
• Ability to work independently, meet tight deadlines in a fast-paced environment
• Positive working attitude and a pleasant personality

title: AI Agents & Automation Engineer
description:
We’re hiring a hands-on builder who can create real systems using AI tools. You’ll design and deploy AI agents, automations, and LLM-powered workflows that replace manual processes and support internal operations.

This opportunity is best suited for candidates who already have experience building working automations, agent workflows, or internal tools, beyond simply experimenting with AI tools.



What You’ll Do and Deliver:

-Build and maintain AI agents and LLM-powered workflows for real operational use

-Design end-to-end workflows that take action, not just generate responses

-Turn repetitive and manual processes into practical AI-driven automations

-Improve workflow logic, response quality, and reliability across AI-powered processes

-Debug, refine, and optimize existing AI automations for better performance and consistency

-Help turn business needs into usable AI-assisted tools and working solutions

-Identify opportunities where AI can reduce effort, improve output quality, or speed up internal work



RELEVANT TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGIES

You don’t need experience with every tool listed below, but you should be comfortable working with some of them in real projects:

-OpenAI / ChatGPT API or Anthropic Claude

-Workflow automation tools such as n8n, Zapier, or Make

-Prompt design, workflow logic, and AI task orchestration

-Google Apps Script or JavaScript for automation

-Google Sheets automation, formula logic, and process improvement

-AI-assisted development tools such as Cursor or GitHub Copilot



Who This Role Is Best Suited For:

-Has hands-on experience working with AI automations and agent-based workflows

-Enjoys figuring things out and improving how work gets done

-Can bring structure to messy or unclear processes

-Likes building useful solutions that have real impact

-Takes initiative and follows through on responsibilities

-Is adaptable, thoughtful, and always looking for ways to improve



SALARY & BENEFITS

title: Executive Associate - CEO's Core Team
description:
Location: 100% Remote
Job Type: Full-Time (via performance-based ramp-up)

Who We Are
We are an innovative European business group based in Sweden, operating a dynamic portfolio of companies driven by a singular focus: massive brand growth. At our core, we are an execution engine. We specialize in digital marketing, social media scaling, high-performance web platforms, and building the systemic architecture required to amplify our brands and get our message out to the world.

The Opportunity
We are looking for a highly driven, recent graduate to step into a high-impact, remote role as part of a small, hyper-efficient team working directly alongside our CEO. This is not a traditional, slow-moving entry-level job. This is an intense, fast-paced business apprenticeship where you will work across multiple companies and learn how modern businesses are scaled from the inside out.

We expect excellence, extreme ownership, and a relentless desire to advance. In return, you will get unfiltered access to executive decision-making, collaborate closely with our core team, and receive hands-on training in the skills that drive the future of digital business.

What You Will Do & Learn
You will work intimately with the CEO and our tight-knit team on a daily basis. You don't need to be an expert in our systems on day one, but you must be able to learn them faster than anyone else. Your core focus will be:

* Digital Marketing & Brand Systems: You will help manage and optimize the web platforms, campaigns, and systems we use to get our brands in front of massive audiences.

* Process Thinking (The Core Mission): Working across several companies means organization is everything. You will learn to map out, audit, and build the systems that help our portfolio run and scale efficiently.

* AI Implementation: You will learn how to leverage cutting-edge AI tools to automate our marketing workflows, multiply your output, and solve complex operational problems.

* Modern Social Media: You will help drive, manage, and execute social media strategies across different brands to maximize our visibility.

Who You Are & What You Need
* Recent Graduate: You have recently finished your studies and are hungry to kickstart your career with real responsibility.

* Tech-Fluent (Elemental Programming): You have a basic understanding of programming logic (e.g., Python, JavaScript, advanced scripting, or data logic). You aren't applying to be a software developer, but you know how to think logically and use basic code to manage web systems, solve problems, and automate tasks.

* Extremely Fast Learner: You are comfortable being thrown into new situations. Give you a new software tool, and you will figure out how it works over the weekend.

* Process-Oriented: You naturally look at messy, complicated situations and want to build a clean, efficient system to organize them.

* The Right Setup (100% Remote): Because you will be executing at a high level, you must have a reliable, high-performance computer and a strong, stable internet connection capable of handling intense digital workflows, video collaboration, and AI tools without lagging.

The Structure: Prove Your Potential
We are looking to fill a full-time position immediately, but we only hire the best.
This role begins with a Testing Period on a flexible, ramp-up schedule. This is your opportunity to prove your learning velocity, adaptability, and standard of excellence. As you master our processes and demonstrate your capability, your hours and responsibilities will rapidly scale up to a permanent, full-time remote position on the core team. The speed of this transition is entirely in your hands.

How to Apply
If you are ready to bypass the traditional corporate ladder and prove what you are capable of, we would love to hear from you. Please send us your resume along with a brief introduction.

To help us get a sense of how you tackle challenges, we ask that you include a short paragraph in your introduction sharing a time when you used logical thinking or basic programming to solve a real-world problem or improve a process.

title: Customer Support Representative (WORK-FROM-HOME)
description:
Customer Support Representative (Full-Time)

Position Overview
We are seeking a proactive and customer-focused Customer Support Representative to serve as the primary point of contact for customers, distributors, and business partners. This role is responsible for handling inbound communications, managing customer inquiries, conducting follow-ups, and ensuring a positive customer experience across all communication channels, including phone, email, website inquiries, contact forms, and social media platforms.

Working Hours
Schedule: Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Time (US)

Key Responsibilities
Answer inbound phone calls and address customer and distributor inquiries professionally and promptly.
Monitor and respond to inquiries received through email, website contact forms, live chat, and social media channels.
Assist customers and distributors with questions related to orders, product availability, distribution opportunities, shipping status, pricing, and general support requests.
Conduct follow-up calls, emails, and messages to ensure customer concerns and requests are resolved in a timely manner.
Process and track customer inquiries from initial contact through resolution.
Coordinate with internal teams to obtain information, resolve issues, and ensure customer satisfaction.
Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, inquiries, and follow-up activities.
Escalate complex inquiries to the appropriate department when necessary.
Support customer retention and relationship-building through proactive communication and exceptional service.
Assist with administrative and customer service-related tasks as needed.

Qualifications
Previous experience in customer service, customer support, or a related role.
Excellent verbal and written English communication skills.
Strong phone handling and customer relationship management skills.
Experience managing customer inquiries across multiple communication channels.
Strong organizational and time-management skills.
Ability to multitask and prioritize effectively in a fast-paced environment.
Proficiency with Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, CRM systems, and customer support tools.
Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving abilities.
Reliable internet connection with backup and professional remote work setup.

Preferred Qualifications
Experience supporting businesses involved in product distribution, logistics or wholesale
Familiarity with order management and distributor support processes.
Experience using CRM

Success Metrics
Timely response to customer inquiries.
Effective follow-up and issue resolution.
Customer satisfaction and retention.
Accuracy of information and documentation.
Professional handling of distributor and customer relationships.

Benefits
Full-time, long-term position.
Consistent daytime schedule aligned with US Eastern Time.
Opportunity for growth within a customer-focused organization.

title: Executive Assistant / Personal VA
description:
Executive Assistant / Personal VA for Car Plug 559 & Car Plug Academy

I am looking for a highly organized, proactive Executive Assistant / Personal VA to become an extension of me and help manage the day-to-day operations of multiple businesses.

This is not a simple admin role. I need someone who can help keep me organized, hold me accountable, stay on top of important tasks, and help move the business forward without needing constant supervision.

* Car Plug Academy (online education/community platform)

* Help manage my Skool community and ensure content stays organized and up to date
* Coordinate with freelancers, contractors, VAs, and tea ---------- mbers
* Assist with customer inquiries and basic communication when needed
* Help organize vehicle inventory, photos, pricing, listings, and sales tracking
* Assist with Facebook Marketplace posting systems and listing management
* Monitor business operations and identify bottlenecks or areas needing attention
* Create reports and summaries so I always know what needs attention
* Help implement new systems, automations, and workflows to improve efficiency
* Keep me focused on high-value tasks instead of getting buried in day-to-day operations

Huge Plus Skills

The following skills are not required but are highly valuable:

* Social media management
* Facebook Marketplace experience
* Meta Ads Manager experience
* Instagram growth experience
* Content scheduling and organization
* GoHighLevel experience
* Skool platform experience
* AI tools and automation experience
* Project management experience

Who I’m Looking For

* Extremely organized
* Excellent English communication
* Fast response times
* Reliable and proactive
* Detail-oriented
* Able to think ahead and solve problems
* Comfortable managing multiple projects at once
* Able to work independently without constant direction

I need someone who genuinely wants to help build businesses, not someone looking to complete a few tasks and disappear.

My goal is to find a long-term person who can become my right-hand assistant and help me scale Car Plug 559 and Car Plug Academy.

1. Your experience as an Executive Assistant or Personal VA

This is a long-term opportunity for the right person. I’m looking for someone who can grow with the business and become a key part of the team.

title: Administrative Assistant for Financial Advisor Team
description:
Job Title: Administrative Assistant
Flexible work schedule. Hours may vary. Beginning with 5-10 hours per week during the training period. May increase over time up to 15-25 hours per week if successful in the role.

Credit Union Wealth Group (CUWG) is a Registered Investment Advisor (RIA) that specializes in delivering wealth management services to members of credit unions. We pride ourselves on delivering personalized, high-quality financial guidance and investment management for individuals and families.  We are seeking an administrative assistant to join our team to assist in client service and business operations.

Position Summary:
We are seeking a detail-oriented Administrative Assistant to support our financial advisor team by handling various administrative and operational tasks. This role will not be client-facing. The focus will be on back-office responsibilities such as completing forms, entering data into our CRM, facilitating money movement, and taking notes during internal meetings. The ideal candidate will be organized, dependable, and capable of managing multiple tasks with accuracy and efficiency. The candidate should have previous experience working in financial services and/or with financial advisors. The training period will be included as part of the onboarding process.

Key Responsibilities
- Scheduling & Calendar Management: Coordinate and manage internal schedules, set up meetings, and ensure effective time management for the advisory team.
- Forms Management: Prepare and process client paperwork, applications, and other financial documents accurately and in a timely manner.
- Data Entry: Maintain and update client information in the CRM system, ensuring data integrity and compliance with firm policies.
- Money Movement Support: Assist in initiating and tracking wires, transfers, and deposits, following strict protocols to maintain accuracy and security.
- Meeting Coordination: Participate in internal tea ---------- etings to take notes, follow up on action items, and maintain organized digital records.
- Document Organization: Maintain an orderly electronic and physical filing system for quick reference and compliance purposes.
- General Administrative Tasks: Perform additional administrative duties as needed. Work with advisors on operational projects focusing on automation, efficiency, scalability of services, and risk controls

Qualifications & Skills
- High school diploma or GED required; associate’s or bachelor’s degree in business, finance, or related field preferred.
- Ideally of several years of administrative experience in financial client service, RIA experience is preferred. Experience & ability to work independently in a remote environment. Reliable and punctual.
- Tech savvy - Ability to learn software systems. Proficiency in Google Suite (Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, etc.); Proficiency in Microsoft Office Experience; CRM software (e.g., Salesforce, Redtail, Wealthbox) is strongly preferred.
- Strong organizational skills and accuracy in handling data, documentation, and transactional work.
- Excellent written communication for note-taking and documentation.
- Ability to prioritize tasks and manage deadlines effectively in a fast-paced environment.
- Willingness to collaborate with the advisory team and other staff members while respecting confidentiality.
- Upholds the highest ethical standards, particularly when handling sensitive financial information.

title: eCommerce Virtual Assistant
description:
We are expanding our remote team and looking for a reliable, disciplined, and ambitious eCommerce Virtual Assistant who wants long-term growth.

Our local agency is based in the Philippines and manages multiple eCommerce brands for international clients. This role is for someone who takes work seriously, learns fast, and wants to build a real career in digital work, not just a short-term VA job.

This is a busy and fast-paced role. Since we work with multiple clients, there will be days with several tasks, urgent revisions, and deadlines. We need someone who can stay organized, work under pressure, follow instructions properly, and remain reliable even when the workload gets heavy.

If you are organized, proactive, and can work independently, this is a strong opportunity.

About the Role

Start Date
Immediate

Schedule
Graveyard shift Philippine time
Monday to Friday
Weekends off

Please note that occasional overtime may be required when there are urgent client tasks, important deadlines, or time-sensitive updates. This does not happen every day, but we need someone who understands that eCommerce work can sometimes require flexibility.

Responsibilities

You will support daily operations across multiple eCommerce brands. Tasks include:

• Managing and updating Shopify, WooCommerce, and Amazon stores
• Writing, editing, and optimizing product listings
• Conducting product, competitor, and market research
• Handling basic customer service and order processing
• Completing website updates and admin tasks
• Assisting with marketing and content-related tasks
• Creating simple graphics and visuals using Canva
• Helping with basic website layout and design improvements
• Using ChatGPT and AI tools to improve speed and accuracy
• Following systems, checklists, and instructions precisely
• Handling multiple tasks across different client accounts
• Responding quickly to task updates during working hours
• Staying organized even when the workload is busy

As you improve, you will manage client accounts more independently and take on higher-value tasks.

Requirements

• Fast learner with strong problem-solving skills
• Organized, detail-oriented, and accountable
• Able to follow instructions and meet deadlines
• Strong communication and reliability
• Proactive mindset and good work ethic
• Comfortable working in a busy and fast-paced environment
• Able to handle pressure and urgent tasks professionally
• Own laptop or desktop
• Stable, high-speed internet connection
• Fully available during assigned working hours
• No other job, client, or commitment that will affect your focus, schedule, or performance

Preferred but Not Required

• Experience with Shopify
• Basic graphic design skills or Canva experience
• Understanding of layout, spacing, and clean design
• Familiarity with ChatGPT or other AI tools
• Basic video editing skills using CapCut
• Previous VA, eCommerce, customer service, or admin experience

We prioritize attitude, discipline, consistency, and reliability over years of experience. Skills can be trained, but work ethic, honesty, and commitment are required from the start.

Compensation and Growth

• Monthly Range: ?25,000 to ?30,000
• Performance Bonus: ?5,000 to ?8,000 per month
• Clear path for raises, promotions, and leadership roles
• Long-term stability for consistent top performers

Why Join Us

• Stable long-term work with a structured eCommerce agency
• Clear systems, feedback, and guidance
• Learn Shopify, Amazon, WooCommerce, and TikTok Shop operations
• Work with automation and AI tools daily
• Gain real experience handling international eCommerce brands
• Real opportunity to grow into senior or leadership roles

Important

This is not a passive VA role where you only wait for instructions. We need someone who can move fast, think clearly, stay focused, and take responsibility for their work.

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long term. If you are only looking for a side job, temporary work, or something easy, this may not be the right fit.

Application Instructions

Please submit the following:

Resume
Internet speed test result
Laptop or PC specifications, including model, processor, RAM, and storage
Short cover letter explaining who you are, what you’ve done, and why you are a strong fit

NOTE:
This is a long-term position with strong potential for career growth. We are looking for someone fully committed to the role. You must not have other jobs, clients, or commitments that may interfere with your schedule, focus, availability, or performance.

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant (Database Manager & ISA)
description:
Full-Time Virtual Assistant (Database Manager & ISA)
40 Hours Per Week | $200 Per Month | $3 Bonus Per Scheduled & Attended Appointment

We are hiring a highly disciplined, systematic, and professional Virtual Assistant / Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to take full ownership of our real estate database. If you thrive on consistency, high-volume outreach, and meticulous organization, this long-term role is for you.

Responsibilities:
High-Priority Daily Outreach: Call all high-priority incoming leads first thing every morning before handling regular tasks.

Systematic Database Calling (The DTD2 Method): Work through the database alphabetically on a 13-week rotation, calling every contact within the designated weekly alphabet section daily.

Multi-Channel Weekly Follow-Up: Text and email remaining database contacts weekly to ensure 100?tabase coverage.

Real-Time Update stages, timelines, detailed conversation notes, and clear next steps.

Client Segmentation & Lead Nurturing: Categorize contacts into specific automation pipelines (Buyers, Sellers, Renters) and set them up on property update software (RealScout).

Rapport Building: Execute tailored messaging strategies—offering high-value content (newsletters, events) to warm leads, and discovery-based outreach to colder leads.

What We Are Looking For:
Good English Communication: Strong verbal and written English communication skills are required.

Great Phone Presence: Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls daily with a confident, professional phone manner.

Highly Systematic & Disciplined: Ability to strictly follow a structured weekly alphabet rotation without cutting corners.

Meticulous Data Entry: Obsessive about CRM organization, accurate tagging, and detailed note-taking.

Tech-Savvy: Fast learner who can easily navigate CRMs, texting platforms, and real estate tools.

Bonus Experience:
Experience with the DTD2 (Do the Database 2) framework or similar database management systems.

Familiarity with RealScout, FollowUpBoss, or similar real estate CRMs.

Past experience as a Real Estate ISA or Lead Generation VA.

Important Application Instruction:
Include “DTD2” at the end of your name in the email subject line.

Example: Real Estate Database VA | Jane Doe DTD2

Applications that do not follow this exact instruction will not be considered.

How To Apply:
Please send the following:

Your updated Resume or CV.

title: Medical Records Retrieval Specialist
description:
Job description:

Medical Records Retrieval Specialist Onsite – Ortigas, Pasig City
Full-Time | US Healthcare Account

About the Role
We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Medical Records Retrieval Specialist to support a US-based pulmonary practice. The role primarily involves coordinating, tracking, and following up on missing diagnostic imaging and medical reports to ensure patient records are complete and accurately documented within the EMR system.

This position is ideal for candidates with experience in healthcare coordination, medical records retrieval, diagnostic imaging follow-up, referrals, prior authorization, or healthcare customer service.

The ideal candidate is confident in English communication, comfortable making outbound follow-up calls, and highly persistent when coordinating with hospitals, imaging centers, and healthcare providers.

Key Responsibilities

Track and follow up on pending or missing chest X-ray, CT scan, and diagnostic imaging reports
Contact hospitals, imaging centers, physician offices, and healthcare facilities to retrieve required medical records and reports
Monitor patient charts and identify incomplete or missing documentation
Upload and accurately document reports within the EMR/EHR system
Maintain organized tracking logs and status updates for outstanding requests
Coordinate with providers and clinical staff regarding report completion and follow-ups
Handle outbound and inbound communications professionally using RingCentral and related tools
Ensure accuracy, confidentiality, and HIPAA compliance when handling patient information
Perform other healthcare administrative and coordination tasks as assigned
Qualifications

Previous experience in medical records retrieval, healthcare coordination, referrals, prior authorization, healthcare customer service, or medical virtual assistance
Experience supporting US healthcare accounts is highly preferred
Strong spoken and written English communication skills
Comfortable making outbound follow-up calls to healthcare facilities and providers
Strong customer service, follow-through, and problem-solving skills
Previous Experience using EMR/EHR systems preferred; Elation experience is a plus
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
Ability to multitask and manage repetitive follow-up tasks efficiently
Familiarity with diagnostic imaging workflows or medical terminology is an advantage
Familiarity with pulmonary terminology such as CT scans, pleural effusion, chest imaging, or radiology reports is a plus but not required
Willing to work onsite in Ortigas, Pasig City supporting a US-based client
Candidates with experience in the following may excel in this role:

Medical records retrieval
Diagnostic imaging coordination
Referrals coordination
Prior authorization
Radiology workflows
Pulmonary or internal medicine clinics
EMR/EHR documentation
Healthcare customer service
Benefits:


Paid training
Work Location: In person

title: Lead Follow-Up & Appointment Setter
description:
We are hiring a sharp, sales-minded DM Setter / Appointment Setter to help convert warm inbound leads from Instagram and other social platforms into booked sales calls.
We already use Stan Store for auto DMs and keyword automation, so this role is not about building automations from scratch. This role is about taking over after the first message, continuing conversations with interested leads, qualifying them, following up consistently, and booking the right people onto calls.
You will be speaking with entrepreneurs and clothing brand owners who are interested in SMS marketing help, Postscript setup, and backend sales systems. You must know how to keep conversations natural, persuasive, and organized without sounding robotic.
Responsibilities:
Respond to inbound leads after the initial auto DM
Continue DM conversations in a natural way
Qualify leads based on business stage, seriousness, and budget
Follow up with warm leads daily until they book or clearly opt out
Handle simple objections and create urgency around limited spots
Book qualified leads into calls
Track all conversations, lead status, and booked calls in a simple system
Report daily on number of conversations, follow-ups, and booked appointments
Match the founder’s tone and brand voice in DMs

title: HubSpot CMS & UX/UI Web Developer
description:
HubSpot CMS & UX/UI Web Developer

Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-Time Contract
Work Schedule: Must be available to work during Pacific Standard Time business hours
Compensation: $8–$12 per hour USD, depending on experience and skill set

About Set 2 Close

Set 2 Close is a revenue operations and enablement agency that helps businesses optimize their marketing, sales, and customer success systems for predictable growth. We bridge the gap between strategy, technology, and execution by helping clients build better systems, improve workflows, and create scalable digital experiences.

We are looking for a HubSpot CMS & UX/UI Web Developer to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who combines strong front-end development skills with a sharp eye for user experience and visual design. The right candidate will be comfortable working directly with clients to design, build, and optimize web pages inside HubSpot CMS / Content Hub.

Role Overview
The HubSpot CMS & UX/UI Web Developer will be responsible for creating responsive, user-friendly, and visually polished web pages using HubSpot CMS. This person should be well-versed in HubSpot’s CMS capabilities, including website building, templates, modules, HubDB, integrations, and front-end customization.

This role is primarily focused on HubSpot CMS web design and development, but experience with HubSpot reporting, analytics, pipelines, marketing campaigns, and general HubSpot administration will be valuable.

We are looking for someone who can take client requirements, translate them into strong UX/UI designs, and then build functional, scalable web pages within HubSpot.

* Key Responsibilities
HubSpot CMS Web Design & Development
Design, build, and maintain responsive web pages using HubSpot CMS / Content Hub.
Develop and customize HubSpot templates, themes, modules, landing pages, and website pages.
Use HTML, CSS, HubL, and basic JavaScript to create clean, scalable, and functional front-end experiences.
Build modular page designs that are easy for clients and internal teams to update.
Work with HubDB to create dynamic content and database-driven web pages.
Support the setup and customization of HubSpot CMS assets, including forms, CTAs, menus, blog templates, and global content.
Ensure websites and landing pages are optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile experiences.

* UX/UI Design
Create clean, intuitive, and visually appealing user interfaces.
Translate client brand guidelines, marketing goals, and business requirements into strong web experiences.
Apply UX/UI best practices to improve usability, navigation, page flow, and conversion performance.
Design wireframes, mockups, or page layouts when needed before development.
Balance design aesthetics with practical, functional, and scalable implementation inside HubSpot.

* Client-Facing Collaboration
Work directly with clients to understand their website needs, page requirements, branding, and desired user experience.
Communicate technical and design decisions clearly to both clients and internal teams.
Collaborate with marketing strategists, RevOps specialists, developers, and project managers to deliver high-quality HubSpot CMS projects.
Gather feedback, make revisions, and ensure final web pages align with client expectations.

* HubSpot Marketing & CRM Support
Assist with building and supporting HubSpot marketing campaigns.
Help create and optimize landing pages, forms, workflows, email assets, and campaign-related web pages.
Support basic HubSpot reporting and analytics setup.
Assist with HubSpot pipeline setup, basic CRM configuration, and marketing/sales process support when needed.
Use HubSpot reporting tools to help clients understand website performance, campaign results, and conversion activity.

* Testing, Optimization & Maintenance
Test pages across browsers, devices, and screen sizes.
Troubleshoot layout, styling, responsiveness, and CMS-related issues.
Optimize pages for speed, SEO, accessibility, and conversion best practices.
Maintain clean, organized, and reusable front-end code.
Identify opportunities to improve existing HubSpot CMS pages, templates, and user experiences.

* Required Skills & Qualifications
Proven experience designing and developing websites inside HubSpot CMS / Content Hub.
Strong front-end development skills, especially in HTML, CSS, and HubL.
Working knowledge of JavaScript is preferred.
Strong understanding of UX/UI design principles.
Experience building responsive websites and landing pages.
Experience working with HubSpot templates, modules, themes, and CMS page editing tools.
Familiarity with HubDB and dynamic content inside HubSpot.
Ability to build visually appealing designs and translate them into functional web pages.
Strong communication skills and ability to work directly with clients.
Ability to collaborate with marketing, sales, and technical teams.
Understanding of SEO, accessibility, website speed, and conversion best practices.
Ability to work during Pacific Standard Time business hours.
A portfolio showcasing HubSpot CMS, UX/UI, web design, or front-end development work is required.

* Nice-to-Have Skills
Experience with HubSpot Content Hub Remix.
Experience creating custom HubSpot themes and reusable modules.
Experience with HubSpot marketing tools, email campaigns, workflows, forms, and CTAs.
Experience setting up HubSpot dashboards, reports, and basic analytics.
Experience building or supporting HubSpot pipelines.
Basic understanding of RevOps, CRM systems, lead generation, and marketing automation.
Experience using design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Canva, or similar platforms.
Experience working in an agency or client-facing environment.

* Ideal Candidate Profile
The ideal candidate is a hybrid designer and developer who understands both how a website should look and how it should function. You are creative, detail-oriented, and technically capable. You can work with a client to understand their vision, design a strong user experience, and build it inside HubSpot CMS.
You should be comfortable taking ownership of HubSpot CMS projects, from page layout and UX/UI design to front-end implementation and troubleshooting. You enjoy creating web pages that are not only visually strong but also functional, responsive, and easy to manage.

This role is best suited for someone who can communicate clearly, work independently, collaborate with internal teams, and deliver high-quality HubSpot CMS experiences for clients.

* Compensation & Benefits
$8–$12 per hour USD, based on experience and skill set.
Remote work setup.
Opportunity to work with a fast-growing revenue operations and enablement agency.
Exposure to HubSpot CMS, RevOps, marketing automation, CRM, and client-facing digital projects.
Collaborative environment with opportunities to grow technical, creative, and strategic skills.

How to Apply
Interested applicants should send the following:
Resume
Portfolio showcasing HubSpot CMS, UX/UI, web design, or front-end development work
A short note explaining why they are a strong fit for this HubSpot CMS and UX/UI web development role
Send applications to:  ---------- 
Subject line: HubSpot CMS & UX/UI Web Developer Application – [Your Name]
