title: Advertising Auditor (PPC)
description:
The Advertising Auditor is responsible for meticulously implementing MAG’s best practices for PPC growth on assigned client accounts within the Advertising department. This role entails ensuring the team consistently delivers high-quality work and adheres to best practices for organizing and updating Asana boards under the PPC Only Client Management Guild.

The Advertising Auditor must demonstrate strong Amazon PPC mastery, with a focus on auditing accounts for inefficiencies, identifying opportunities for optimization, and driving continuous improvement. This role will rover across accounts to support PPC specialists (PPC Specs), providing hands-on auditing, coaching, and process improvements.

The Advertising Auditor is accountable for their work, providing regular progress reports, actionable account feedback, and promptly escalating roadblocks to their Guild Manager. Additionally, the role involves actively assisting leadership in facilitating in-depth skills transfer, training, and coaching sessions to elevate overall team performance.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct daily PPC account audits, ensuring adherence to MAG standards and identifying inefficiencies, wasted spend, and performance gaps.
• Rover across accounts to support PPC Specs, providing audit support, optimization insights, and execution assistance.
• Manage account performance across segmentation, negotiations, search terms, and PPC/SEO coordination.
• Deliver actionable insights and reports to Brand Management on account health, trends, and optimization opportunities.
• Provide structured daily Asana updates, ensuring tasks are tracked, assigned, and completed
• Coach and train PPC Specs on improvements, enhancing execution quality and audit performance.
• Improve processes by identifying workflow gaps and implementing efficiency-driven solutions.
• Ensure compliance with MAG standards while aligning with client goals and driving performance improvements.
• Collaborate with internal teams to resolve issues and support account growth and retention.

Qualifications:
• Amazon PPC mastery experience required with a strong track record of managing and optimizing campaigns.
• Proven experience auditing accounts for inefficiencies and identifying optimization opportunities.
• Ability to coach/train PPC Specs on improvements and best practices.
• Experience working in a rover capacity supporting multiple PPC accounts is highly preferred.
• Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and translate insights into actions.
• Excellent communication and reporting skills.
• Experience with Asana or similar project management tools.
• Strong understanding of PPC structures, keyword strategies, and bid optimization.
• Process improvement mindset with a focus on continuous optimization.
• Ability to work collaboratively across teams while maintaining accountability.
• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive in identifying issues and solutions

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary base
• Permanent remote setup
• Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library
• Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

Excited to make a real impact and drive business growth through systems, automation, and strategy? If this role feels like the right fit for you, don’t wait—apply now and join a team where your expertise truly shapes the future.

Have questions or want to follow up on your application? Reach out to us anytime at  ----------

title: QA Analyst : ERP & Business Systems URGENT
description:
We’re looking for someone who likes breaking things (on purpose). 

At Hutility, we build and support solutions that help organizations streamline operations through ERP customizations, integrations, automation, and custom web applications. 

Your role would span both sides: validating that ERP workflows behave correctly, and making sure the custom tools our team builds are solid before they reach users. 

What you'll be doing 
- Testing enhancements, fixes, and new functionality across Sage 300 and our custom applications 
- Following business workflows end-to-end to make sure transactions, data, and processes behave correctly 
- Trying to break things in smart, intentional ways 
- Working closely with consultants and subject matter experts to understand what the expected outcome should be 
- Finding, documenting, and clearly explaining bugs so devs can fix them fast   
- Helping improve how the team tests, ships, and prevents issues 

You'll be a great fit if you... 
- Can naturally notice if something feels “off” 
- Enjoy working in complex systems with interconnected processes 
- Like fast-moving environments where things change often 
- Can independently investigate issues and think through edge cases 
- Have strong analytical and problem-solving skills 
- Can write clear, useful bug reports and test cases   
- Have used tools like Selenium, Cypress, Playwright, Postman, Pytest, or similar 

Bonus points if you've done this before 
- Worked with accounting, finance, procurement, inventory, payroll, or billing workflows 
- Proactively spotted ways a product, workflow, or process could work better and said so  
- Have experience with ERP platforms such as Sage, SAP, Oracle, NetSuite, Microsoft Dynamics, Acumatica, or similar 

What success looks like 
- Bugs are caught early and clearly explained, and old issues don’t quietly come back 
- The team trusts QA because things don’t break unexpectedly 
- You find ways the product or workflow could be better

title: CSR - Sales Rep / Account Manager (SDR Focus)
description:

title: Tech Operations Manager - Affiliate Marketing (€150 Trial)
description:
???? THE ROLE

We're Unbreakable Media - managing Google Ads + Facebook Ads campaigns for gadget products across Europe. Our affiliate network operates 24/7, and we need a Technical Operations Manager to keep our infrastructure running smoothly.

Campaigns spend money 24/7. One technical problem = direct financial loss in minutes. We need someone FAST, RELIABLE, and INDEPENDENT.

---

? WHAT YOU'LL DO

? Manage proxies (ISP residential), anti-detection profiles, Gmail configurations
? Setup and maintain domains (Cloudflare DNS, Hostinger hosting, SSL certificates)
? Provide FAST technical support to affiliates via  ----------  (<5 minute response time)
? Create and manage webhooks for affiliate network integrations ( ---------- )
? Resolve account suspensions, recover banned accounts, handle appeal processes with Google/Facebook
? Document all work in Asana - maintain full traceability
? Monitor infrastructure 24/7 - prevent issues before they become critical

---

???? REQUIRED SKILLS

ESSENTIAL (No negotiation):
? Proxy ISP management experience (Proxy Seller or similar)
? AdsPower (anti-detection browser) or equivalent
? Cloudflare DNS and domain management
? Hosting administration (Hostinger, cPanel, or similar)
? Google Ads account setup and troubleshooting
? Facebook Ads account setup and management
? Webhook integrations ( ---------- , Zapier, or similar)
? Independent technical problem-solving (no hand-holding needed)
? ITALIAN OR SPANISH (mandatory for affiliate communication)

NICE TO HAVE:
? Previous affiliate marketing or performance marketing background
? WordPress and Elementor experience
? Network API integration (Adrice, Cashbolt, Isla networks)
? Google Ads account appeal process experience
? Account recovery and ban negotiation skills

---

? SCHEDULE & HOW IT WORKS

Monday - Friday: 10:00 - 22:00 CET (Central European Time)

Important: This is NOT a 9-to-5 job with consistent daily tasks.

• Some days: You'll have minimal work (everything running smoothly, affiliates happy)
• Other days: You'll have high-volume work (account suspensions, urgent issues, campaign launches)
• You're "on standby" for emergency support during those working hours
• Response time requirement when issues arise: Less than 5 minutes

This is perfect if:
- You work from home and have flexibility
- You have other side projects/income
- You prefer variable workload over fixed 8-hour days
- You're energized by solving problems quickly under pressure

---

???? COMPENSATION STRUCTURE (3-TIER SYSTEM)

TIER 1 - TRIAL WEEK
€150 total for the complete first week
Purpose: Let's evaluate fit, competency, and communication style
Outcome: If not working - we part ways professionally, no hard feelings. If working - move to Tier 2.

TIER 2 - HIRED (Months 1-3)
€800/month fixed salary
Includes: Full onboarding to all processes, learning all systems and tools, building operational independence
Review: After 3 months, evaluate performance and readiness for Tier 3

TIER 3 - AUTONOMOUS (Month 4+)
€1,000/month fixed salary
Requirements: Proven independence in troubleshooting, managing affiliates without supervision, proactive problem-solving, excellent documentation
Benefits: Potential for bonus, additional responsibilities, career growth in the company

This is a low-risk trial for both sides. We both get to see if it's a good fit.

---

????? IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

You're the right person if:
? You're not afraid of technical pressure and urgency
? You solve problems independently without needing hand-holding
? You document everything you do (for team knowledge and compliance)
? You communicate clearly in Italian or Spanish
? You learn new tools quickly and adapt to changes
? You understand that in affiliate marketing, time literally equals money
? You have a proactive mindset (solve issues before they escalate)
? You're comfortable with variable workload and flexible urgency levels

You're probably NOT the right fit if:
? You don't speak Italian or Spanish fluently
? You need detailed instructions for every technical task
? You can't be available during European hours (10:00-22:00 Mon-Fri CET)
? You prefer 100% predictable, routine work
? You work best in highly structured 9-to-5 environments
? You don't like working under pressure or with urgency

---

???? HOW TO APPLY

Please send us the following information:

1. Brief CV or work history (highlight your experience with proxy management, hosting, Google Ads, Facebook Ads, affiliate marketing)
2. Tell us about one technical problem you solved completely on your own - what was it, how did you fix it?
3. Your availability and timezone (are you available Mon-Fri 10:00-22:00 CET?)
4. Confirm you speak Italian and/or Spanish fluently

We'll review applications as they come in. Top candidates will be invited to a brief screening call (15 minutes) before we move forward with the trial week.

---

? START WITH CONFIDENCE

This isn't a long-term commitment until you prove yourself. One week, €150, no obligations beyond that if we don't click. If we do click, you have a clear path to €1,000/month with increasing responsibility.

Ready to join a fast-moving affiliate marketing operation? Apply now.

We look forward to hearing from you!

title: SEO & Website Growth Manager
description:
SEO & Website Growth Manager

Yum Street | Full-Time Remote | 40 Hours Per Week - Some looking for a long term job.

The 3 Key Skills We Need
SEO that generates enquiries, not just rankings
Website conversion and lead generation thinking
WordPress / website implementation ability

About Yum Street

Yum Street is a fast-growing catering and events business providing:

Corporate catering
Wedding catering
Private events
Festival catering
Mobile food units
Sporting venue catering
Venue partnerships

We are not looking for a basic SEO assistant.

We are looking for someone who can help turn our website into our number one salesperson.

Our goal is simple:

More enquiries. More quote requests. More bookings. More revenue.

- Not vanity traffic.
- Not keyword reports with no commercial impact.
- Not blogs for the sake of blogs.

The Role

We are hiring a full-time SEO & Website Growth Manager to take ownership of Yum Street’s organic growth.

You will be responsible for improving our visibility on Google, Google Business Profile, local search, AI search and our website but the real measure of success is whether your work creates more qualified enquiries.

This role is ideal for someone who understands SEO, but also thinks like a growth marketer.

You must be able to look at a website and ask:

“How do we turn more visitors into enquiries?”

What You Will Work On
SEO strategy
Local SEO
Google Business Profile optimisation
Website conversion improvements
Service landing pages
Location pages
Corporate catering pages
Wedding catering pages
Event catering pages
Technical SEO
Keyword research based on buyer intent
Website content strategy
Blog and resource strategy
Case studies
FAQs and AI search optimisation
Internal linking
Tracking enquiries, calls and quote requests
Monthly performance reporting
WordPress updates and implementation
What We Do NOT Want

Please do not apply if your only focus is:

Backlinks
Meta titles
Generic blog writing
Traffic with no enquiries
Ranking reports with no business outcome
AI-generated content with no personality
Technical SEO without commercial thinking

We need someone who understands that SEO is only valuable if it helps generate enquiries and bookings.

What Great Looks Like

The right person will understand how to create pages and systems around searches such as:

Wedding catering Southampton
Wedding catering Hampshire
Corporate catering Southampton
Corporate catering Hampshire
Event catering Hampshire
Food truck hire London
Street food catering for events
Mobile catering for corporate events

You should understand customer intent, landing pages, trust signals, calls to action, quote forms, reviews, case studies and the journey from Google search to enquiry.

Tools & Skills

Strong experience with some or all of the following is preferred:

WordPress
Google Search Console
Google Analytics / GA4
Google Business Profile
SEMrush / Ahrefs / SE Ranking
Screaming Frog
Looker Studio
Rank tracking tools
Local SEO tools
ChatGPT / AI search tools
Basic HTML / CSS
Conversion tracking
CRM or automation tools such as GoHighLevel
Working Hours

This is a full-time role.  40 hours per week

You must be available to work agreed UK working hours.  We use time tracking and daily reporting. This is non-negotiable.

Important Application Questions

To apply, please answer the following 5 questions carefully.

Applications that do not answer these questions properly will not be considered.

1. Yum Street currently receives website traffic but wants more enquiries.
If you joined us, what would you do in the first 30 days to generate more enquiries from the traffic we already have?
2. If our Corporate Catering page received 300 visitors per month but only generated 2 enquiries, what would you review and what specific changes would you make?
3. What are the first 10 high-intent keywords or page ideas you would focus on for Yum Street, and why?
4. Give one real example where your SEO or website work generated leads, enquiries, bookings or revenue. Please include numbers if possible.
5. What is the difference between an SEO Specialist and a Website Growth Manager?
What We Are Looking For

We are looking for someone who can:

Think commercially
Understand customer behaviour
Build landing pages that convert
Improve Google visibility
Improve Google Business Profile
Create useful content from real business experience
Track enquiries and conversions
Explain work clearly
Take ownership
Work directly with directors
Help Yum Street grow
Final Note

This is not a role for someone who only wants to complete SEO tasks.

This is a role for someone who wants to help build a serious inbound enquiry engine for a growing catering and events business.

If you think like a business owner, understand SEO, and know how to turn website visitors into real enquiries, we would like to hear from you.

title: Tax Preparer
description:
Position: US Tax Preparer
Location: Remote (Work from Home)
Employment Type: Full-time position

Who we are:
Our company provides expert tax services, delivered by an experienced team. We offer personalized, strategic support to help clients confidently pay less in taxes and maximize their financial potential. Through proactive planning and in-depth knowledge of tax regulations, we ensure each client receives tailored guidance to meet their unique needs.

Key Responsibilities:
- Prepare individual, corporate, and partnership tax returns, including related city and state reports and filings
- Enter and analyze previously filed tax returns for optimization or refund opportunities
- Respond to tax notices and inquiries from various taxing jurisdictions
- Communicate with tax leads to address issues and meet deadlines.
- Maintain and update document checklists for efficient workflow.
- Explore automation opportunities for document requests.
- Process tax returns, manage schedules, and facilitate document flow.

Mandatory:

title: IT Specialist & IT QA Specialist
description:
IT SPECIALIST

The IT Specialist is a strategic position that plays a pivotal role in the data integrity of key My Amazon Guy functions. The position is responsible for assisting the CTO and IT Department, maintaining and enhancing dashboards, data models, and data pipelines. Possess advanced analytical and decision-making skills. The role requires someone who is passionate about data quality, data analytics, and automation in order to drive business strategy. An ability to be an expert in problem-solving, critical thinking, and an understanding of complex system dependencies are essential in enabling the IT Manager to show where My Amazon Guy processes are broken and how those processes are affecting key data points. An individual with a strong passion to solve problems and improve data integrity will excel in this position.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage and maintain company IT systems, ensuring optimal performance, reliability, and security across all platforms.
• Provide technical support and troubleshooting for software, and network-related issues across teams.
• Ensure implementation and compliance with security systems, including antivirus, firewalls, and two-factor authentication.
• Oversee and optimize the use of company tools (e.g., Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, Asana, Slack, Monday, HubSpot, WordPress).
• Support website management and CMS platforms, ensuring functionality, updates, and performance optimization.
• Analyze system data and create reports, dashboards, and visualizations to support decision-making.
• Collaborate cross-functionally to understand workflows and improve system integrations and data architecture.
• Assist in automation and process improvements, including API integrations and workflow optimization where applicable.
• Document IT processes, provide training, and ensure teams are equipped to use systems efficiently.
• Proactively identify technical issues, recommend solutions, and implement improvements to enhance operational efficiency and quality output.

Qualifications:
• 1+ years of experience in an IT Help Desk role
• Excellent verbal and written communication skills
• Ability to multitask and prioritize
• Experience with
• Data Analytics
• Jotform
• Airtable
• Zapier
• Hubspot
• Asana
• Google Workspace
• Database management is a plus but not required
• JavaScript, Python, CSS, HTML is a plus but not required
• Proficient with Microsoft Office, G Suite applications, and computer security systems
• Proficient with, or able to quickly become proficient with, a range of general and specialized applications, software, and hardware used in the organization and the industry.
• Expert in problem-solving, critical thinking, and an understanding of complex system dependencies

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

IT QA SPECIALIST

The IT Quality Assurance role has ended up being 99% focused on Quality Assurance (QA) rather than audits. It is responsible for ensuring that IT systems and processes are consistently monitored and improved in alignment with MAG’s standards and industry regulations. Responsibilities include performing detailed tests to identify and resolve system bugs, developing and maintaining automated test scripts, and providing expert and technical audits.

An ability to be an expert in problem-solving, critical thinking, and an understanding of complex system dependencies are essential in enabling the IT Manager to show where My Amazon Guy processes are broken and how those processes are affecting key data points. An individual with a strong passion to solve problems and improve data integrity will excel in this position.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper prioritization of tasks is observed, and assignments are properly actioned and handled per MAG standards.
• Proactively contribute to providing strategies for work quality advancements.
• Collaborate with IT Devs to ensure testing and observation of solutions add value to end users.
• Ensure all fields in tasks have met the standard requirement of the team.
• Perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA) on complex system issues.
• Act as a Cross-Departmental Unblocker by managing tasks such as workflow automations.
• Create templates and initiatives to improve QA process efficiency across the organization.
• Coordinate and generate independent test cases for each newly developed application/system.
• Manage QA IT projects during each phase, ensuring all tasks are reviewed for quality assurance.
• Communicate and recommend improvements to the functionality, design, and usability of new systems/applications.
• Ensure all work projects are compliant with the company’s standards.
• Serve as the final line of defense to ensure IT solutions meet end users’ requests.

Qualifications:
• At least 3 years of relevant experience in IT quality assurance and audit roles.
• Strong understanding of quality assurance principles, methodologies, and best practices.
• Hands-on experience with No-Code/Low-Code platforms, such as Zapier, Google Workspace, JotForms, HubSpot, PandaDoc, and AirTable.
• Knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, and API integration.
• Experience with Asana or similar project management tools for task and project tracking.
• Familiarity with software testing techniques, tools, and defect-tracking systems.
• Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
• Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
• Ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a team en

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary base
• Permanent remote setup
• Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library
• Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

Ready to take your skills to the next level? If this role feels like the right fit for you, don’t wait! Apply today and join a team where your impact truly matters.

Have questions or want to follow up on your application? Feel free to reach out to us at  ----------

title: SEO Content Specialist (PH | Remote)
description:
About the Role
We are looking for a seasoned SEO Content Specialist to join our growing Content Team on a full-time, remote basis. You will work directly under our SEO Content Team Lead and collaborate closely with SEO Strategists, writers, and editors to produce high-quality, search-optimized content that drives measurable results for our clients. This role goes beyond briefs and optimization — you'll also step in to write blog articles and service pages for urgent or high-priority requests. If you love SEO, write well, and want to play a key role in a results-driven digital marketing team, we'd love to hear from you.

What You'll Do
- Support the Content Team Lead in executing SEO and content strategies that align with client goals
- Write blog articles, service pages, and other website content for urgent or high-priority content requests as needed
- Create detailed SEO content briefs that guide writers and editors toward ranking and quality goals
- Generate and support both paid and manual link-building campaigns and outreach
- Edit and optimize existing content — GBP descriptions, FAQ sections, website copy — in line with SEO and brand guidelines
- Implement on-page SEO improvements: meta tags, internal linking, keyword alignment, and schema recommendations
- Collaborate with writers, editors, and SEO strategists to maintain content quality and relevance
- Monitor and stay current with Google algorithm updates and emerging SEO best practices
- Maintain organized documentation, tracking sheets, and reports for all SEO and content tasks

What We're Looking For
- 4+ years of experience in SEO, content optimization, or digital marketing
- 4+ years of experience in SEO writing — blog articles and service page content across multiple brands or industries
- Strong understanding of on-page SEO principles, keyword research, and link-building strategies
- Hands-on experience with SEO tools: Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, SurferSEO, or Clearscope
- Hands-on experience with AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or Perplexity for research and content writing support
- Familiarity with Google Business Profile (GBP) optimization and local SEO techniques
- Excellent attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tasks within structured workflows
- Strong communication and collaboration skills — you work well across teams
- Post-secondary education or equivalent experience in SEO, content, or digital marketing

Why Join Us
- Supportive Team Culture – Work with a collaborative, international team where your contributions truly matter.
- 100% Remote Work – Work from the comfort of your home with a team that respects your work-life balance.
- Paid Leaves & PH Holidays – We value your time off. Enjoy paid leaves and observance of Philippine holidays.
- Unlimited Growth Potential – This is a long-term role with performance-based salary increases and opportunities to advance as the agency scales.
- Job Stability – We are looking for an "A-Player" who wants a long-term career home, not just a gig.
- Results-Driven Autonomy – We operate on high trust. If your work is on track and your funnels are converting, we give you the space to lead.
- Comprehensive Healthcare (HMO) – We value your well-being. We provide HMO coverage to ensure you and your family are taken care of.
- Monthly Salary of $700 (Note: there's a 3-month probation period for this role)

Interested applicants should fill out this form to be considered for the role:  ----------

title: Senior IT Help Desk Support Specialist (Remote)
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a highly experienced and dependable Senior IT Help Desk Support Specialist to join our growing team. We are looking for a proactive problem-solver who can independently manage technical support issues, assist end users, and maintain smooth day-to-day IT operations.

The ideal candidate has strong experience in troubleshooting hardware, software, networking, Microsoft 365, cloud-based systems, and remote support environments. You should be highly organized, technically skilled, and capable of delivering excellent support with minimal supervision.

This is a long-term remote opportunity for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments and can confidently handle escalated technical issues.

Responsibilities
Provide advanced technical support for hardware, software, email, and network-related issues
Troubleshoot and resolve Windows, MacOS, VPN, printer, and connectivity problems
Support Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, VoIP systems, and cloud-based applications
Manage help desk tickets and ensure timely issue resolution
Handle Level 1 and Level 2 technical support requests
Configure, install, and maintain computers, software, and user accounts
Assist with employee onboarding/offboarding, including device setup and permissions
Maintain and troubleshoot remote desktop environments
Monitor systems and proactively identify potential technical issues
Document technical procedures, solutions, and troubleshooting steps
Escalate complex issues when necessary while maintaining ownership of the resolution process
Deliver professional and timely communication to users and internal teams

Requirements
Minimum 3+ years of experience in IT Help Desk, Technical Support, or IT Support roles
Strong knowledge of Windows, MacOS, Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, and networking fundamentals
Experience with ticketing systems and remote support tools
Familiarity with Active Directory, Azure, VPNs, antivirus software, and cloud environments
Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities
Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal
Ability to work independently with minimal supervision
Highly organized with strong attention to detail
Stable internet connection and reliable remote work setup

Preferred Qualifications
Experience supporting remote teams or international companies
Knowledge of cybersecurity best practices
IT certifications are a plus (CompTIA, Microsoft, Cisco, etc.)
Experience with VoIP systems, firewalls, and network troubleshooting
Familiarity with SaaS platforms and business productivity tools

What We’re Looking For

We are looking for someone who:

Takes ownership of technical issues and sees them through to resolution
Is proactive instead of reactive
Can communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical users
Thrives in a fast-paced remote environment
Has a strong customer-service mindset while maintaining technical excellence
Important

ONLY experienced IT Help Desk professionals should apply. Applications without relevant technical support experience will not be considered.

Please include your resume, relevant technical experience, and a short introduction explaining your previous IT support background.

title: Senior SEO & Lead Generation Marketing Specialist (Strategic Growth Role)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a highly experienced and results-driven Marketing Specialist who can independently build, execute, and optimize high-level SEO and lead generation strategies that directly contribute to business growth.

This is not a basic task-based marketing role. We are specifically looking for strategic thinkers and marketing builders — professionals who understand how to create scalable marketing systems, generate qualified leads, improve search visibility, and drive measurable ROI without requiring constant direction.

The ideal candidate has a proven history of developing full-scale marketing initiatives, executing advanced SEO strategies, analyzing performance metrics, and making data-driven decisions that produce real business results.

If your experience is primarily limited to posting content, basic social media management, or following step-by-step instructions without strategic ownership, this role is likely not the right fit.

Key Responsibilities
Develop and execute comprehensive SEO and lead generation strategies
Perform advanced keyword research, competitor analysis, and market positioning
Improve organic search rankings through technical SEO, on-page optimization, and content strategy
Build scalable lead generation funnels that drive qualified inbound opportunities
Monitor campaign performance and optimize based on ROI and conversion metrics
Analyze website traffic, user behavior, and SEO performance using analytics tools
Collaborate with leadership to align marketing initiatives with business growth objectives
Identify new growth opportunities across organic and digital marketing channels
Create strategic marketing plans rather than simply executing assigned tasks
Manage projects independently with minimal supervision

Requirements
Proven experience developing and managing full-scale SEO and lead generation strategies
Advanced understanding of technical SEO, on-page SEO, content optimization, and search strategy
Strong experience with lead generation, conversion optimization, and campaign performance analysis
Ability to independently create marketing systems that generate measurable business growth
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Excellent English communication skills
Ability to work autonomously and take ownership of marketing initiatives

Experience using SEO and marketing tools such as:
Ahrefs
SEMrush
Google Analytics
Google Search Console
Google Tag Manager
CRM and automation platforms

Preferred Qualifications
Experience working with U.S.-based businesses
Experience scaling organic traffic and inbound lead generation
Strong understanding of local SEO and conversion-focused marketing
Experience managing high-performing marketing campaigns with measurable ROI
Ability to identify growth opportunities proactively without needing detailed direction
What We’re Looking For

We are looking for a builder, strategist, and problem-solver — not someone who simply completes assigned tasks.

The right candidate:

Thinks strategically
Understands business growth
Takes initiative
Solves problems independently
Understands SEO beyond basic optimization
Can connect marketing efforts directly to revenue and lead generation
Important

Please do not apply if:

Your experience is limited to basic social media posting or administrative marketing support
You rely heavily on detailed instructions for execution
You do not have hands-on experience driving SEO growth or lead generation campaigns
You cannot provide measurable examples of marketing results or campaign success

We are specifically seeking experienced marketers who can take ownership of growth initiatives and contribute strategically from day one.

title: Customer Service & Administration Officer
description:
Company: Victoria Rideshare Cover Inc. 
Location: Melbourne, Victoria
Employment: Full-Time Position
Reports To: Operations Manager (Robbie)

About the Role
Victoria Rideshare Cover is seeking a highly organised and customer-focused Customer Service & Administration Officer to join our growing team. As the first point of contact for our members, you'll manage communications, assist with a ----------  claims, process administrative tasks, and ensure a smooth customer experience across phone, email, and WhatsApp. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, enjoy helping people, and have strong attention to detail, we'd love to hear from you.

Primary Responsibilities

Member Support Communications
* Answer incoming calls (5-20 per day) and address member inquiries promptly
* Respond to emails (0-30 per day) within 30 minutes of receipt
* Monitor and reply to WhatsApp Business messages within 5-10 minutes
* Maintain professional tone and accurate records in all interactions
* Escalate complex issues to Robbie as required

A ----------  & Claims Assistance

* Receive a ----------  reports fro ---------- mbers
* Confir ---------- mber safety (no ambulance required, all parties secure)
* Send claim form and required documentation checklist via email or WhatsApp
* Advise members of 48-hour submission deadline
* Do not escalate — pass information directly to claims processing

Payment Administration

* Identify failed payment transactions
* Contact members via phone, WhatsApp, and email
* Request updated banking details
* Resend payment links as required
* Update payment status in records

Policy Management

* Create and send membership certificates for new members
* Monitor policy expiry dates in system
* Send renewal certificates 7 days before expiration
* Ensure all documentation is accurate and timely

Administration & Record Keeping

* Maintain master spreadsheet with all member interactions
* Record invoice receipts from underwriter with dates
* Update member information changes
* Prepare daily follow-up lists
* Archive correspondence and documentation

What We're Looking For

Essential Skills & Experience
• Fluent written and spoken English
• Minimum 1 year customer service experience
• Strong Excel and spreadsheet skills
• Confident using email and WhatsApp Business
• Excellent organisational and communication skills

Required Competencies
* Multi-tasking — manage simultaneous calls, emails, and messages
* Time management — meet strict response deadlines
* Accuracy — error-free data entry and record-keeping
* Communication — clear, professional, and empathetic
* Organization — manage high-volume tasks without losing track
* Problem-solving — identify issues and escalate appropriately
* Stress management — remain calm under high-volume pressure

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
• Email responses within 30 minutes
• WhatsApp responses within 5–10 minutes
• Minimum 80% call answer rate
• Claim forms sent within 1 hour of a ----------  reports
• 100% a ----------  reminder compliance
• Failed payments contacted within 24 hours
• Same-day certificate processing for new members
• Renewal certificates sent 7 days before expiry
• 100% interaction logging accuracy
• Same-day invoice recording

Typical Workday
9:00 AM – Start
• Log into all communication systems
• Review follow-ups and priorities
• Prepare daily task list

Throughout the Day
• Respond to calls, emails, and WhatsApp messages
• Process claims and member requests
• Follow up payments and renewals
• Update records and spreadsheets

5:00 PM – Finish
• Review outstanding tasks
• Prepare next-day follow-up list
• Ensure all records are updated

When to Escalate
Please notify the Operations Manager regarding:
* Complex member disputes or complaints
* Requests for policy exceptions or special conditions
* Pricing questions or quote adjustments
* Membership cancellation requests
* Unclear or suspicious a ----------  circumstances
* Payment disputes or refund requests
* Any member expressing significant dissatisfaction
* Issues outside your authority to resolve

Success Metrics - This role is successful when:
*  All members receive responses within target timeframes
* 100% of a ----------  claims receive documentation within 1 hour
* Zero missed 48-hour reminders on a ----------  claims
*  Failed payment recovery rate exceeds 90%
*  Spreadsheet is 100% accurate and up-to-date
*  Member feedback is consistently positive
*  No escalations due to missed deadlines or poor communication
*  All administrative tasks completed on schedule

NOTES
* This role requires flexibility and the ability to prioritise multiple simultaneous tasks
* Response times are critical — members expect quick resolutions
* Accuracy in record-keeping is essential for compliance and member satisfaction
* This position may require occasional overtime during peak periods
* Training will be provided on all systems and procedures

Why Join Victoria Rideshare Cover?
• Supportive team environment
• Full training provided
• Stable full-time position
• Opportunity to grow with the business
• Meaningful customer-focused role

To apply, please submit your resume and a 1- 2 minute introductory video explaining your customer service experience & admin experience and why you're a great fit for the role. Include the keyword ‘Cover’ in your cover letter; applications without the video or keyword will not be considered for an interview.

title: Integrations Associate – Automation & Systems
description:
DAP Brands is seeking a detail-oriented, technically savvy, and solution-driven Integrations Associate to support our mission of building seamless, scalable automations across the organization. This role goes beyond task execution. You’ll work closely with our Technology Integration Manager to design, maintain, and optimize workflows that improve efficiency across Sales, Marketing, and Operations.

If you enjoy connecting systems, solving process gaps, and leveraging automation tools to create reliable, intelligent workflows, this role is for you.

Key Responsibilities:
- Integration Setup & Maintenance: Assist in setting up, testing, launching, and maintaining integrations using platforms such as Zapier, Make, and GoHighLevel. Monitor automations for accuracy and performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement long-term fixes.
- Automation & Workflow Optimization: Identify inefficiencies in existing processes and propose smart automation solutions. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand needs and build tailored workflows.
- Technical Support: Work with APIs, webhooks, and basic scripting (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL) to resolve data sync issues, system errors, and performance bottlenecks.
- Documentation & Training: Document workflows, integrations, and processes to ensure scalability. Assist in training internal users on newly built systems and automation tools.

Tools You’ll Work With:
- Automation & Integrations: Zapier, Make, Webhooks
- CRMs & Operations Tools: GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Stripe, ClickUp
- Collaboration Tools: Google Sheets, Zoom, Google Workspace
- Scripting & APIs: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL

Application Instructions:
Please submit your application through the online form provided:  ---------- 

- To be considered, you MUST type “MAVERICK” in front of your full name if you are applying via our website:  ---------- 
- If you are an Integrations Associate who takes ownership, thinks in systems, and thrives in a fast-moving, automation-driven environment, we invite you to apply.

title: Automations Specialist
description:
Let’s be clear. This isn’t a “follow-the-steps” kind of role.

At DAP Brands, we build systems that scale. We move fast, automate aggressively, and continuously optimize how work gets done across Sales, Marketing, and Operations.

We’re looking for a detail-oriented, technically capable, and solution-driven Integrations Associate who doesn’t just execute tasks but understands how systems connect, why they break, and how to make them better.

If you think in workflows, enjoy solving inefficiencies, and know how to turn manual processes into clean, automated systems...keep reading.

What You’ll Do

Build & Maintain Integrations
Set up, test, launch, and maintain automations using tools like Zapier, Make, and GoHighLevel. Monitor performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement long-term fixes—not band-aid solutions.

Optimize Workflows
Identify gaps in current processes and design smarter, more efficient systems. Work cross-functionally to understand needs and translate them into scalable automations.

Handle Technical Problem-Solving
Work with APIs, webhooks, and basic scripting (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL) to resolve sync issues, errors, and performance bottlenecks.

Document & Enable Teams
Create clear documentation for workflows and systems. Support internal teams by helping them understand and effectively use new automations.

Tools You’ll Work With:
1. Automation & Integrations: Zapier, Make, Webhooks
2. CRMs & Operations: GoHighLevel, Stripe, ClickUp
3. Collaboration: Google Sheets, Zoom, Google Workspace
4. Technical Stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, APIs

Who This Role Is For

You’ll thrive here if you:
1. Take ownership and don’t wait to be told what to fix
2. Think in systems, not just tasks
3. Enjoy solving problems at the root, not the surface
4. Are comfortable in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment
5. Care about building processes that actually scale

title: Customer Success Associate
description:
Feathery is a fast-growing workflow automation and form-building platform used by some of the leading financial services, insurance, and enterprise companies in North America. We are looking for a Customer Success Associate to help manage and grow our existing client relationships.

This is a fully remote role based in the Philippines, working Eastern Time hours. You will work closely with our Customer Success team to ensure clients are getting the most out of Feathery, renewals are handled on time, and existing accounts are growing. A big part of this role is identifying expansion opportunities and upselling clients into additional features, higher volume tiers, and new use cases — so a commercial mindset is just as important as a service-oriented one.

What you will be doing:
Regular check-ins with existing clients to ensure they are happy and seeing value from the platform
Proactively identifying opportunities to expand client accounts through additional features, upgraded plans, and new use cases
Handling inbound client questions over email, routing technical issues to support and billing questions to the right tea ---------- mber
Joining recurring syncs with clients, taking notes, tracking action items, and following up
Supporting the renewal process with a target of maintaining 90%+ gross revenue retention and 110%+ net revenue retention across the book
Monitoring client health and flagging any accounts that may need additional attention or are at risk of churning
Assisting with onboarding new clients and making sure they get off to a strong start

What we are looking for:
Strong written and verbal English communication skills
Comfortable working Eastern Time hours
Proven experience in a customer success or account management role at a SaaS company, with a track record of upselling and expanding accounts
Commercially minded with the ability to identify and act on growth opportunities within existing clients
Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive
Comfortable managing multiple client relationships simultaneously
Bonus: familiarity with tools like HubSpot, Slack, or similar

Why Feathery:
Work with an exciting, fast-growing US-based SaaS company
Fully remote with a collaborative and supportive team
Competitive compensation

title: Amazon Operation Specialist
description:

This role will be a partner to the stakeholders by providing quality, transparent and meaningful reporting and analyses to support key business decisions. *This role at the start will be in Philippine Time Zone Hours: 9PM - 5:00AM (Graveyard Shift)
**Needs to attend daily meeting at 8:30AM
***This is not a client facing position

title: Virtual Assistant / Personal Assistant (GoHighLevel Required)
description:
Hello,

I’m currently looking to bring on a highly motivated Virtual Assistant / Personal Assistant to work directly with me at HTP Solutions, a growing credit repair and funding company.

This role is ideal for someone who is a fast learner, ambitious, tech-savvy, and able to work independently. The right person will become my go-to support person and, based on performance and skill level, may grow into a managerial role overseeing and training future hires.

Compensation

Starting pay is $3.50/hour 
Performance-based bonuses available, including $50 bonuses for sales of selected products/services
Opportunity for pay increases and leadership compensation as responsibilities grow

Key Responsibilities & Skills:

Strong knowledge of GoHighLevel (required)

Automations, workflows, pipelines, CRM management

Campaign setup, tagging, integrations, and troubleshooting

Administrative & operational support

Calendar management, task tracking, documentation

Process creation and optimization

Credit repair & funding support (training provided)

Learning how to read and analyze credit reports

Understanding the dispute process and compliance basics

Assisting with client workflows and funding preparation

Tech-savvy & resourceful

Comfortable learning new tools and systems on your own

Able to follow SOPs and also help improve them

Communication & organization

Clear written English

Detail-oriented and reliable with deadlines

What I’m Looking For:

Someone proactive who doesn’t need constant supervision

A problem-solver who can figure things out and ask smart questions

Long-term mindset — I’m looking to build, not just delegate tasks

If this sounds like something you’d be interested in and you believe your skills align with what I’m looking for, I’d love to learn more about you.

Please let me know:

Your experience level with GoHighLevel

Any experience with credit repair, funding, or CRM systems

Whether you would be available for an interview

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards,
Nick
HTP Solutions

title: Zoho Developer – Deluge (Work-From-Home)
description:
Company: 
We are an MSP (Managed Service Provider) in Australia, delivering comprehensive IT support services, including Microsoft 365 management, Cyber Security Essentials, networking, routers, and general IT infrastructure. We also operate as a channel partner for Optus, providing telco services, router procurement, and configuration, with exposure to data center environments. In addition, we deliver CRM solutions (Zoho) and custom development services.

Role Overview:
We are seeking a highly skilled Developer with expertise in Zoho platforms, Deluge scripting to design, develop, and optimize end to end business workflow. The ideal candidate will have experience in customizing Zoho applications, integrating third-party APIs, and building scalable solutions to enhance business processes.

---Key Responsibilities---

Zoho Development & Customization:
Develop and customize Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, Zoho Books, and other Zoho applications using Deluge scripting and workflows.
Build and manage Zoho integrations with third-party applications (e.g., Xero, Microsoft 365, payment gateways).
Automate workflows and processes to improve business efficiency.

Database & API Integration:
Design and manage database structures (SQL, NoSQL) for efficient data storage and retrieval.
Develop and manage RESTful APIs to connect Zoho applications with other platforms.
Ensure data security and compliance with best practices.

Technical Support & Maintenance:
Troubleshoot and resolve Zoho platform issues, performance bottlenecks, and integration challenges.
Perform regular system updates, debugging, and performance optimization.
Work closely with business teams to gather requirements and provide technical solutions.

---Required Skills & Experience---

Zoho Development:
Experience with Zoho Creator, Zoho CRM, Zoho Books, Zoho One.
Understanding of Deluge scripting and Zoho API integrations.

Full Stack Development is a plus
Proficiency in Java, JavaScript, Python, Node.js, or other backend technologies.
Front-end experience with React, Angular, or Vue.js.
Knowledge of SQL/NoSQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)

----Soft Skills---
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Excellent communication and documentation skills.

---Preferred Qualifications---
Certifications in Zoho Creator, Zoho CRM, or Java development.
Experience with automation, business process optimization, and ERP integrations.
Familiarity with Agile development methodologies.

title: Remote HubSpot Implementation Specialist
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Remote HubSpot Implementation Specialist to optimize and manage our CRM ecosystem. This role will be responsible for reviewing existing processes, improving workflows, maintaining data integrity, and enhancing the overall efficiency of our client management systems. The ideal candidate will have strong HubSpot expertise, experience with CRM automation and integrations, and the ability to identify opportunities for process improvement. This position will play a key role in integrating business applications, supporting marketing automation initiatives, and ensuring HubSpot is effectively leveraged to support business growth and operational excellence. Candidates with experience in CRM integrations, workflow automation, and system development are highly encouraged to apply.

Key Responsibilities:

Review current processes and optimize workflows for greater efficiency.
Integrate additional tools, such as Aircall, Zuper, QuickBooks, and other business software.
Ensure data accuracy, deduplication, and CRM hygiene within HubSpot.
Build and support client portals and simple websites connected to HubSpot.
Assist with HubSpot marketing tools, including email campaigns and automation.
Support data collection, reporting, and system improvement initiatives.
Create and manage Google Forms and other data collection tools.
Configure and maintain HubSpot workflows, pipelines, and automation processes.
Monitor CRM performance and generate reports to support business decision-making.
Provide support for CRM processes and assist with maintaining efficient business operations.
Perform other duties related to the position as assigned.

Qualifications & Requirements:

Proficient level of English (written and spoken).
Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, allowing for effective collaboration with clients, colleagues, and teammates.
Strong HubSpot CRM knowledge, including lead generation and automation.
Experience managing CRM data and maintaining data integrity.
Tech-savvy with the ability to adapt to new technologies and processes.
Understanding of workflow automation and process optimization.
Familiarity with CRM integrations and automation tools.
Basic coding knowledge is a plus for integrations and automation.
Experience building CRM integrations and automated systems is a plus.
Software development experience with CRM/HubSpot integrations is a plus.
Experience integrating Aircall, Zuper, QuickBooks, or similar platforms with CRM systems and workflows is highly preferred.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
High attention to detail and data accuracy.
Ability to take ownership of responsibilities and work independently.
Strong organizational and time management skills.
Ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.
Ability to quickly learn new systems, software, and workflows.
Proficiency with Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook), and standard business tools (email, spreadsheets, document management).
Out-of-the-box thinker, highly accountable, reliable, self-motivated, and confident approach.
Positive attitude and the ability to learn and adapt quickly.
Ability to understand and follow established processes accurately with minimal supervision.
Ability to work U.S. Eastern Time (New York) business hours and adapt to business needs.
Interested in long-term career opportunities.
Reliable computer (Windows 10 or newer), two monitors, and stable high-speed internet.?

Compensation & Benefits:

100% remote work.
Compensation in USD.
Full-time position with 40 hours weekly.
Please note that this is a long-term opportunity.
Great work environment with potential for growth.

title: Senior Marketing Specialist
description:
We Are Looking for a Senior Marketing Specialist — Work from Home, Part-Time (with path to Full-Time for the right candidate)

About the Company
About 21 Webs We're a Melbourne-based digital marketing agency helping Australian service businesses grow through practical, measurable strategies. We value clear thinking, real outcomes, and quality work over hype.

Role Description
Lead strategic marketing plans and digital campaigns for our portfolio of Australian clients. You'll manage campaigns end-to-end, mentor a remote team, optimise ROI, and work closely with our creative and technical teams. Start part-time, grow into a full-time senior seat as you prove impact.

What You'll Bring
• 5+ years in digital marketing, with 2+ years in a senior or team-leading role (agency experience preferred)
• Strong skills across SEO, paid ads, social media, and ROI analysis
• Extensive experience using automation and AI tools to scale output and efficiency
• Highly skilled in strategic planning and market research
• Hands-on with Google Ads, GA4, Meta Business Suite, Semrush/Ahrefs, and CRM tools
• Proven track record leading remote teams and managing client accounts
• Excellent written and verbal English
• Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, or related field (MBA or certifications a plus)

Bonus Experience with Australian clients, WordPress/Elementor, or service-based industries (trades, healthcare, NDIS).

What We Offer
• Part-time to full-time pathway within 3–6 months for strong performers
• 100% remote, flexible around Australian business hours
• Competitive pay, direct access to leadership, real ownership

How to Apply Send your CV, a short cover note, and 2–3 examples of campaigns you've led with measurable outcomes.

title: Email Marketing Executive Multi-Brand
description:
About The Beaute Group: 
The Beaute Group is a vertically integrated UK group at the intersection of clinical aesthetics, skin science, and longevity medicine. Our portfolio spans seven brands: Lumi SKN Clinics, Lumi SKN Devices, Skin United (AI skin diagnostics and professional education), Flou (SaaS clinic growth platform), Institute of Cosmetologie, Lumi Aure (HBOT and longevity), and Indiba Aesthetics UK.
We are a fast-moving, ambitious group with a growing remote team and a founder-led culture built on precision, excellence, and clinical credibility. We do not do generic. Every word, every email, every campaign must reflect that.

The Role
We are looking for a talented Email Marketing Executive to support the full email marketing function across all brands. This is not a template-and-send position. You will be building, executing, and optimising email campaigns that drive real commercial outcomes: lead generation, nurture sequences, sales conversions, re-engagement, and retention.
Copy and messaging will be provided by our in-house Copy and Social lead. Your role is to take that copy and turn it into beautifully designed, technically sound, high-performing emails that land in inboxes and convert.
You will work across multiple audiences including clinical professionals, aesthetics practitioners, clinic owners, franchise prospects, B2B device buyers, and consumers. Each brand has a distinct voice, audience, and commercial objective. You must be able to adapt design and layout to serve each one.

What You Will Own

End-to-end email campaign execution across all group brands
Campaign design, segmentation, scheduling, and performance analysis
Building and managing automated nurture sequences (welcome flows, lead magnet follow-up, re-engagement, sales sequences)
Turning cold and warm leads into paying customers through strategically structured email journeys
A/B testing subject lines, CTAs, layouts, and send times to drive continuous improvement
List health management: segmentation, suppression, deliverability monitoring, and list hygiene
Designing visually polished, on-brand email templates using HTML and graphic design tools, in line with each brand's visual identity
Building and maintaining campaigns inside Zoho Campaigns (primary platform)
Collaborating with the automation team (Zoho CRM, Interakt WhatsApp, ManyChat) to ensure email fits within a broader multi-channel sales flow
Monthly performance reporting: open rates, click rates, revenue attributed, and conversion by sequence
Supporting product and course launches with full launch email sequences


Who You Are

You have 2+ years of hands-on email marketing experience, ideally within aesthetics, beauty, health, or a premium B2C/B2B brand
You understand the full sales and lead generation funnel and know how email fits within it at every stage
You are a strong designer with a sharp visual eye. Your emails look beautiful and are built with purpose, not pulled from a default template
You are analytically minded. You look at data, ask why, and make changes based on evidence
You are organised, self-directed, and able to manage multiple brand campaigns simultaneously without dropping quality
You take ownership. If a campaign underperforms, you investigate and fix it
You are fluent in English with strong written communication for briefing, reporting, and team collaboration


Must-Have Skills

Proven track record of email campaigns that have directly contributed to sales or lead conversion
HTML email coding: you can build and troubleshoot custom email templates from scratch, not just drag and drop
Graphic design proficiency using Canva, Figma, Adobe, or equivalent tools — you produce work that looks genuinely premium
A portfolio of design work that demonstrates your visual range across different brand styles and audiences
Experience building automated email sequences (welcome, nurture, re-engagement, post-purchase)
Data literacy: comfortable with open rates, click-through rates, conversion rates, and segmentation metrics
Understanding of spam compliance, GDPR, and email deliverability best practices


Bonus Points

Zoho Campaigns experience (strong preference)
Experience in clinical aesthetics, beauty, or health-related brands
Familiarity with Zoho CRM and how email integrates with CRM pipeline stages
Exposure to multi-channel campaigns combining email, WhatsApp, and SMS
Experience marketing to both B2C and B2B audiences


The Brands You Will Work Across
Lumi SKN Clinics — UK clinical aesthetics clinic network and franchise. Audience: consumers, franchise prospects.
Lumi SKN Devices — B2B aesthetic technology sales. Audience: clinic owners, practitioners.
Skin United — AI skin diagnostics and professional education platform. Audience: aesthetic professionals, therapists.
Flou — SaaS clinic growth platform. Audience: clinic owners.
Institute of Cosmetologie — Professional aesthetics education. Audience: aspiring practitioners.
Lumi Aure — HBOT and longevity medicine. Audience: consumers, wellness clients.
Indiba Aesthetics UK — UK distribution of Indiba devices. Audience: clinics, practitioners.

How to Apply
?? Applications via OnlineJobs.ph only. We do not accept applications through LinkedIn, email, WhatsApp, or any other channel. Any application received outside of OnlineJobs.ph will not be reviewed, no matter how strong the candidate. This is a firm policy with no exceptions.
Please apply with the subject line: Email Marketing Executive Application. Include the following:

Your CV or portfolio link
A portfolio of design work showing email templates, graphics, or branded content you have created
Two or three examples of email campaigns you have built and the results they achieved
A brief note (no more than 200 words) on how you approach a brand new email nurture sequence from scratch
Your Zoho Campaigns experience level, if any

Applications without a design portfolio and examples of previous campaign work will not be considered.

title: GoHighLevel Web Builder
description:
Job Summary:
We are seeking a skilled GoHighLevel Web Builder to design and deploy professional websites using GoHighLevel snapshots. You will build a master website that can be cloned and customized for multiple end users, with custom fields, workflow automations, and pipelines built in so every rollout is ready to go. This role is ideal for a fast, reliable GoHighLevel expert who takes pride in delivering polished, deploy-ready sites.

Key Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain master websites in GoHighLevel that can be cloned for multiple end users
- Create reusable snapshots with everything built in and ready to deploy
- Set up custom fields so cloned sites populate and customize correctly
- Build workflow automations and pipelines into snapshots for turn-key rollouts
- Customize cloned sites for individual end users, including branding and contact details
- Optimize sites for search, including AEO for next-generation search engines
- Set up a content marketing engine for ongoing evergreen content
- Optimize site speed and Lighthouse performance scores

Mandatory Skills:
- Hands-on GoHighLevel expertise with snapshots, custom fields, workflows, and pipelines
- Strong website build and design experience with a portfolio of completed sites
- Solid knowledge of SEO and AEO
- Experience optimizing Lighthouse and site performance
- Ability to work quickly while keeping quality high
- Reliable, detail-oriented, and able to work independently
- Strong communication skills

Preferred Skills:
- Experience building premium, high-end websites
- Familiarity with content marketing automation
- Ability to create repeatable, scalable build systems
- Comfortable managing multiple builds at once

Why Join Us:
Take ownership of a key technical role in a growing operation where your work makes a direct impact. There is real room to grow your hours and responsibilities over time while working with a team that values speed, reliability, and quality.

title: Full-Time Property Manager (Rent Manager & AppFolio Expert) – Spanish Bilingual
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate and property management firm seeking a high-energy, detail-obsessed, and fluent Spanish-Bilingual Property Manager to join our core operations team full-time.

If you have a massive engine, thrive in fast-paced environments, and have a proven track record of managing tenant workflows seamlessly, this is your long-term home.

This is an exclusive, full-time 40-hour per week position. We enforce a strict zero-tolerance policy against job-stacking. We are investing in a dedicated partner who wants to grow with us.

Core Responsibilities
System Management: Maintain and audit day-to-day data entry, tenant profiles, and maintenance pipelines within Rent Manager and AppFolio.

Bilingual Communication: Handle inbound and outbound calls, emails, and texts from both English and Spanish-speaking tenants, owners, and vendors.

Leasing & Onboarding: Manage tenant screening, lease processing, renewals, and onboarding workflows with absolute precision.

Maintenance Coordination: Triage maintenance tickets, dispatch vendors, and follow up relentlessly until the issue is marked 100% resolved.

Account Collections: Monitor ledger balances, execute rent reminders, and manage delinquency follow-ups.

Required Qualifications & Experience
Experience: Minimum of 3+ years of direct experience in U.S. Property Management operations.

Software Stack: Absolute mastery of Rent Manager and AppFolio is non-negotiable.

Language: Native or near-native fluency in both English and Spanish (written and verbal).

Vibe: High energy, proactive execution style, and an unshakeable customer-service posture.

Infrastructure: Reliable high-speed fiber internet, a quiet dedicated workspace, and a solid power backup solution.

Compensation & Hours
Salary: Up to $7.00/hour (paid weekly/bi-weekly via Wise), scaled based on your direct Rent Manager/AppFolio automation experience.

Hours: Full-Time (40 hours/week), operating on U.S. EST/CST business hours.

How to Apply (The Bot Filter)
To ensure you have high attention to detail and aren't just copy-pasting your application, you must follow these instructions exactly or your application will be ignored:

Change the subject line of your response to: "I am the High-Energy Rent Manager Expert for [Insert Your Name]"

Provide a brief 2-3 sentence summary of your direct experience using AppFolio and Rent Manager.

State your level of Spanish proficiency (conversational, fluent, or native).

Explicitly confirm that you are available for exclusive, full-time work and do not hold any other active client contracts.

Include a link to your updated resume/portfolio and a brief 1-minute Loom video introducing yourself.

title: Home Care Customer Service Attendant (Remote)

description:

title: Social Media & Community Coordinator
description:
Fusion Mineral Paint
Full-Time | Remote (Philippines-Based)

Fusion Mineral Paint is looking for a creative, organized, and community-focused Social Media & Community Coordinator to help grow and support our online presence across Facebook, Instagram, and our highly engaged “Paint it Beautiful” community.

This is not just a scheduling role — this person will play an important part in helping Fusion continue growing toward our goal of reaching 1 million combined followers and community members across our social platforms. We’re looking for someone who understands how strong community engagement, consistent content, and thoughtful interaction all work together to build an inspiring and highly engaged brand presence.

What You’ll Be Responsible For
Social Media Planning & Growth
Assisting with social media planning for Facebook and Instagram

Scheduling and organizing content calendars

Coordinating post timing, captions, hashtags, and content flow

Supporting content strategies focused on engagement, reach, and follower growth

Helping identify trends, content opportunities, and high-performing post styles

Maintaining consistent brand voice and visual presence across platforms

Supporting promotional launches, campaigns, and seasonal content

Community Engagement & DMs

Engaging with comments in a warm, encouraging, and helpful tone

Helping foster a highly engaged and positive online community

Identifying opportunities for deeper engagement with followers and creators

Monitoring group activity and helping maintain a safe, welcoming atmosphere

Encouraging conversations, celebrating community transformations, and increasing participation within the group

What We’re Looking For
Strong understanding of Facebook and Instagram platforms

Experience with video editing apps or software (CapCut, Canva, Adobe Express, Premiere Pro, etc.)

Excellent written English communication skills

Strong understanding of social engagement and online community building

Organized, detail-oriented, and highly reliable

Comfortable following brand voice and communication guidelines

Positive, proactive, and community-first mindset

Ability to work independently in a remote environment

Familiarity with DIY, home décor, painting, crafting, or creative brands is a strong asset

Bonus Skills
Experience growing social media accounts or Facebook Groups

Understanding of engagement metrics and content performance

Canva or graphic design experience

Basic analytics and reporting knowledge

Photography or content creation skills

Familiarity with scheduling tools like Meta Business Suite, Later, or Planoly

Customer service or online moderation experience

Awareness of current social media trends and viral content formats

Success in This Role Looks Like
Consistent and engaging social media content

Increased follower growth and community participation

Faster and more thoughtful engagement with followers

High-quality video content aligned with the Fusion brand

A positive, inspiring, and well-managed >Facebook community

Helping Fusion move closer toward its goal of 1 million combined followers and community members

Why Join Fusion Mineral Paint?
At Fusion, we believe creativity should feel approachable, inspiring, and fun. You’ll be part of a collaborative team helping makers around the world share their projects, build confidence, and truly “Paint it Beautiful.”

title: Salesforce Administrator
description:
We are a driven group of people who believe we can have a significant impact on the small business finance industry. LLama Loan was founded on the premise that honest finance partners can help small businesses get through challenging times and resolve their cash flow problems. Our risk infrastructure is iterated constantly, and we are quick enough to make decisions. Our company benefits from market turbulence. We think outside the box.

We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Salesforce Administrator to manage, maintain, and enhance our Salesforce platform. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Salesforce administration, security, automation, data management, reporting, and user support. This role will work closely with business stakeholders to ensure Salesforce solutions align with organizational needs and business processes.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
Salesforce Administration
• Configure and maintain Salesforce objects, fields, page layouts, record types, validation rules, and custom settings.
• Manage Salesforce users, roles, profiles, permission sets, and access controls.
• Implement and maintain Salesforce security model, including sharing rules, role hierarchy, and field-level security.
• Support sandbox management, refresh activities, and environment governance.

Automation & Process Optimization
• Design, build, and maintain Salesforce Flows to automate business processes.
• Analyze existing processes and recommend improvements to increase efficiency and scalability.
• Troubleshoot and resolve automation-related issues.

Reporting & Analytics
• Create and maintain custom report types, reports, and dashboards.
• Develop meaningful business insights through Salesforce reporting and analytics.
• Support stakeholders with ad hoc reporting requirements.

Data Management
• Perform data imports, exports, cleansing, deduplication, and mass updates using Salesforce tools and Excel.
• Manage data integrity, quality, and governance processes.
• Utilize Data Loader and other Salesforce data management tools for bulk operations.

Deployment & Testing
• Participate in deployment planning and execution across Salesforce environments.
• Perform system testing, user acceptance testing (UAT), and validation of new features and enhancements.
• Maintain deployment documentation and change management processes.

Integrations & System Support
• Support Salesforce integrations with third-party applications and internal systems.
• Assist in troubleshooting integration issues and coordinate with development teams when necessary.
• Monitor system performance and ensure platform reliability.

User Support & Training
• Provide day-to-day Salesforce support to users.
• Create and maintain documentation, training materials, and best practices.
• Conduct user training sessions and onboarding for new tea ---------- mbers.

Required Skills & Qualifications
• Strong knowledge of Salesforce Security Model (Profiles, Permission Sets, Roles, Sharing Rules, Field-Level Security).
• Experience with Page Layouts, Record Types, Custom Fields, Validation Rules, and Formula Fields.
• Hands-on experience with Salesforce Flow automation.
• Strong reporting and dashboard development skills.
• Experience creating Custom Report Types and advanced reports.
• Knowledge of Salesforce deployment processes and sandbox management.
• Experience with Salesforce data management tools, including Data Loader.
• Strong Excel skills for data analysis, cleansing, and bulk updates.
• Understanding of Salesforce integrations and APIs.
• Experience with testing, troubleshooting, and system maintenance.
• Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
• Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

Preferred Qualifications
• Salesforce Administrator Certification.
• Experience with Sales Cloud and Service Cloud.
• Knowledge of change sets, DevOps, and release management practices.
• Basic understanding of Apex, SOQL, and Lightning Components.
• Experience working in Agile environments.

Success Factors
• Ability to understand business requirements and translate them into Salesforce solutions.
• Strong attention to detail and commitment to data quality.
• Proactive approach to identifying process improvements and platform enhancements.
• Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.



For interested applicants, PLEASE SEND AN ACCESSIBLE LINK TO YOUR UPDATED CV/RESUME.

title: Business Analyst
description:
CPP Clinics is a leading provider of medical aesthetics services, offering innovative treatments across multiple medspas under the CPP umbrella. We are dedicated to delivering exceptional patient experiences and outstanding results, utilizing advanced technologies and personalized care.

The Role:

We're hiring a Business Analyst to join our team. This is a fully remote position. You'll partner with clinic leadership and cross-functional teams to turn data into actions that drive growth.

Day to day, you'll own two key areas:

Analysis & Reporting: P&L analysis, performance diagnostics, ad-hoc deep dives, and KPI reporting - translating operational data into actionable opportunities.

Process & Automation: Building and improving the systems that power our reporting - better data quality, faster turnaround, and more scalable processes.

Key Objectives:

Analysis & Insights

- Analyze clinic-level P&Ls to identify key drivers of revenue, cost, and EBITDA performance

- Conduct ad-hoc analyses on operational changes, staffing decisions, and margin improvement initiatives

- Synthesize complex analysis into clear, executive-ready insights for leadership and clinic operators

Reporting & Systems

- Build and maintain performance dashboards and KPI reporting
- Drive continuous improvement and automation of reporting - improving data quality, coverage, and speed

Planning & Collaboration

- Support budgeting, forecasting, and scenario analysis for clinic operations and growth initiatives
- Partner cross-functionally with Central Operations, Marketing, and Clinic Operations to ensure aligned execution


Qualifications:

- Advanced Excel and PowerPoint skills; comfort working with imperfect and evolving datasets

- Ability to structure ambiguous problems and deliver concise, actionable analysis

- Strong communication skills, written and verbal, with experience distilling complex analysis into clear presentations

- Collaborative mindset with the ability to build relationships across diverse stakeholders

- Self-directed, organized, and able to manage competing priorities in a fast-paced environment

title: GoHighLevel & Automations Specialist
description:
About Us
AmplifyPlus is an 7 figure high-growth Marketing & Consulting Agency based in the UK, serving high-ticket clients across America. 

We operate at a 9-figure standard, move at lightning speed, and hold an uncompromising bar for quality. We don’t manage people; we manage outcomes.

The Role
We are hiring an Automations Expert to seamlessly integrate client CRMs with GoHighLevel (GHL) and Google Sheets.

Most of your daily tasks will involve standard native integrations and Zapier/Make workflows. However, you will regularly encounter complex edge cases requiring custom API integrations. - Advanced GoHighLevel (GHL) Architecture
- Zapier / Make / N8N
- Claude & AI API Integrations
- Custom API webhooks & documentation mapping

Who You Are:

- Thrives in a fast paced, demanding environment
- Extreme ownership. You own the outcome, not just the task assigned
You don't say "the webhook failed." You say "the webhook failed, I found the bug, and it's fixed."

To apply
